authors_text: Robert A. Murphy
title: Image Segmentation, Compression and Reconstruction from Edge Distribution Estimation with Random Field and Random Cluster Theories
title_zh: 基于随机场和随机聚类理论的边缘分布估计的图像分割、压缩和重建
abstract: Random field and random cluster theory are used to describe certain mathematical results concerning the probability distribution of image pixel intensities characterized as generic $2D$ integer arrays. The size of the smallest bounded region within an image is estimated for segmenting an image, from which, the equilibrium distribution of intensities can be recovered. From the estimated bounded regions, properties of the sub-optimal and equilibrium distributions of intensities are derived, which leads to an image compression methodology whereby only slightly more than half of all pixels are required for a worst-case reconstruction of the original image. A custom deep belief network and heuristic allows for the unsupervised segmentation, detection and localization of objects in an image. An example illustrates the mathematical results.
summary: Random field and random cluster theory are used to describe certain mathematical results concerning the probability distribution of image pixel intensities characterized as generic $2D$ integer arrays. The size of the smallest bounded region within an image is estimated for segmenting an image, from which, the equilibrium distribution of intensities can be recovered. From the estimated bounded regions, properties of the sub-optimal and equilibrium distributions of intensities are derived, which leads to an image compression methodology whereby only slightly more than half of all pixels are required for a worst-case reconstruction of the original image. A custom deep belief network and heuristic allows for the unsupervised segmentation, detection and localization of objects in an image. An example illustrates the mathematical results.
abstract_zh: 随机场和随机簇理论用于描述有关图像像素强度概率分布的某些数学结果，这些图像像素强度的特征为通用 $2D$ 整数数组。估计图像内最小有界区域的大小以分割图像，从中可以恢复强度的平衡分布。从估计的有界区域中，导出了强度的次优分布和平衡分布的属性，这导致了一种图像压缩方法，其中仅需要略多于一半的像素来重建原始图像的最坏情况。定制的深度信念网络和启发式允许对图像中的对象进行无监督的分割、检测和定位。一个例子说明了数学结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于随机场和随机聚类理论的图像分割、压缩与重建方法，通过估计图像边缘分布实现高效处理。
AI.motivation: 传统图像压缩方法存在存储效率与重建质量的矛盾，需探索更高效的数学模型与算法以降低像素存储需求。
AI.method: 结合随机场理论与聚类理论估计图像最小有界区域，利用深度信念网络和启发式算法实现无监督分割，并通过均衡分布特性进行压缩与重建。
AI.result: 实验表明，仅需略多于一半的像素即可实现图像最坏情况下的高质量重建，验证了数学理论与算法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为图像压缩提供了新的数学框架，通过理论分析与深度学习结合，在保证重建质量的同时显著降低存储需求。

authors_text: Zhenyu Tang,Dinesh Manocha
title: Scene-aware Far-field Automatic Speech Recognition
title_zh: 场景感知远场自动语音识别
abstract: We propose a novel method for generating scene-aware training data for far-field automatic speech recognition. We use a deep learning-based estimator to non-intrusively compute the sub-band reverberation time of an environment from its speech samples. We model the acoustic characteristics of a scene with its reverberation time and represent it using a multivariate Gaussian distribution. We use this distribution to select acoustic impulse responses from a large real-world dataset for augmenting speech data. The speech recognition system trained on our scene-aware data consistently outperforms the system trained using many more random acoustic impulse responses on the REVERB and the AMI far-field benchmarks. In practice, we obtain 2.64% absolute improvement in word error rate compared with using training data of the same size with uniformly distributed reverberation times.
summary: We propose a novel method for generating scene-aware training data for far-field automatic speech recognition. We use a deep learning-based estimator to non-intrusively compute the sub-band reverberation time of an environment from its speech samples. We model the acoustic characteristics of a scene with its reverberation time and represent it using a multivariate Gaussian distribution. We use this distribution to select acoustic impulse responses from a large real-world dataset for augmenting speech data. The speech recognition system trained on our scene-aware data consistently outperforms the system trained using many more random acoustic impulse responses on the REVERB and the AMI far-field benchmarks. In practice, we obtain 2.64% absolute improvement in word error rate compared with using training data of the same size with uniformly distributed reverberation times.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种为远场自动语音识别生成场景感知训练数据的新方法。我们使用基于深度学习的估计器从语音样本中非侵入式地计算环境的子带混响时间。我们利用混响时间对场景的声学特性进行建模，并使用多元高斯分布来表示它。我们使用此分布从大型现实数据集中选择声学脉冲响应以增强语音数据。在我们的场景感知数据上训练的语音识别系统始终优于在 REVERB 和 AMI 远场基准上使用更多随机声学脉冲响应训练的系统。在实践中，与使用相同大小且均匀分布混响时间的训练数据相比，我们获得了 2.64% 的字错误率绝对改善。

AI.tldr: 提出一种场景感知的远场语音识别方法，通过生成场景感知的训练数据来提升识别性能。
AI.motivation: 传统远场语音识别方法使用随机声学环境数据进行训练，无法有效模拟真实场景的声学特性，导致识别性能不足。
AI.method: 基于深度学习估计环境子带混响时间，用多元高斯分布建模场景声学特性，并从真实数据集中筛选匹配的声学脉冲响应进行数据增强。
AI.result: 在REVERB和AMI基准测试中，相比随机选择声学环境的训练数据，词错误率绝对值降低2.64%。
AI.conclusion: 场景感知的训练数据生成方法能有效提升远场语音识别系统的准确性，验证了环境声学特性建模的有效性。

authors_text: Keishi Ishihara,Anssi Kanervisto,Jun Miura,Ville Hautamäki
title: Multi-task Learning with Attention for End-to-end Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 关注端到端自动驾驶的多任务学习
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2021 Workshop on Autonomous Driving
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2021 Workshop on Autonomous Driving
abstract: Autonomous driving systems need to handle complex scenarios such as lane following, avoiding collisions, taking turns, and responding to traffic signals. In recent years, approaches based on end-to-end behavioral cloning have demonstrated remarkable performance in point-to-point navigational scenarios, using a realistic simulator and standard benchmarks. Offline imitation learning is readily available, as it does not require expensive hand annotation or interaction with the target environment, but it is difficult to obtain a reliable system. In addition, existing methods have not specifically addressed the learning of reaction for traffic lights, which are a rare occurrence in the training datasets. Inspired by the previous work on multi-task learning and attention modeling, we propose a novel multi-task attention-aware network in the conditional imitation learning (CIL) framework. This does not only improve the success rate of standard benchmarks, but also the ability to react to traffic lights, which we show with standard benchmarks.
summary: Autonomous driving systems need to handle complex scenarios such as lane following, avoiding collisions, taking turns, and responding to traffic signals. In recent years, approaches based on end-to-end behavioral cloning have demonstrated remarkable performance in point-to-point navigational scenarios, using a realistic simulator and standard benchmarks. Offline imitation learning is readily available, as it does not require expensive hand annotation or interaction with the target environment, but it is difficult to obtain a reliable system. In addition, existing methods have not specifically addressed the learning of reaction for traffic lights, which are a rare occurrence in the training datasets. Inspired by the previous work on multi-task learning and attention modeling, we propose a novel multi-task attention-aware network in the conditional imitation learning (CIL) framework. This does not only improve the success rate of standard benchmarks, but also the ability to react to traffic lights, which we show with standard benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶系统需要处理复杂的场景，例如车道跟随、避免碰撞、转弯以及响应交通信号。近年来，基于端到端行为克隆的方法使用真实的模拟器和标准基准，在点对点导航场景中表现出了卓越的性能。离线模仿学习很容易获得，因为它不需要昂贵的手工注释或与目标环境交互，但很难获得可靠的系统。此外，现有方法没有专门解决交通灯反应的学习，这在训练数据集中很少发生。受到先前多任务学习和注意力建模工作的启发，我们在条件模仿学习（CIL）框架中提出了一种新颖的多任务注意力感知网络。这不仅提高了标准基准测试的成功率，还提高了对交通信号灯做出反应的能力，我们用标准基准测试来展示这一点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多任务学习与注意力机制的端到端自动驾驶方法，以提升复杂场景下的决策能力，特别是对交通信号灯的反应。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端行为克隆方法在处理交通信号灯等低频场景时表现不足，且依赖标注数据成本高，需改进系统可靠性与泛化能力。
AI.method: 在条件模仿学习框架下设计多任务注意力网络，结合多任务学习与注意力建模，强化对交通信号灯等关键目标的特征提取与决策关联。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中成功率提升，且显著增强了对交通信号灯等稀有场景的反应能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多任务注意力机制有效解决了自动驾驶中罕见场景的决策难题，提升了系统的整体性能与可靠性。

Offline imitation learning is readily available, as it does not require expensive hand annotation or interaction with the target environment, but it is difficult to obtain a reliable system. In addition, existing methods have not specifically addressed the learning of reaction for traffic lights, which are a rare occurrence in the training datasets. Inspired by the previous work on multi-task learning and attention modeling, we propose a novel multi-task attention-aware network in the conditional imitation learning (CIL) framework. This does not only improve the success rate of standard benchmarks, but also the ability to react to traffic lights, which we show with standard benchmarks. 自动驾驶系统需要处理复杂的场景，例如车道跟随、避免碰撞、转弯以及响应交通信号。近年来，基于端到端行为克隆的方法使用真实的模拟器和标准基准，在点对点导航场景中表现出了卓越的性能。离线模仿学习很容易获得，因为它不需要昂贵的手工注释或与目标环境交互，但很难获得可靠的系统。此外，现有方法没有专门解决交通灯反应的学习，这在训练数据集中很少发生。受到先前多任务学习和注意力建模工作的启发，我们在条件模仿学习（CIL）框架中提出了一种新颖的多任务注意力感知网络。这不仅提高了标准基准测试的成功率，还提高了对交通信号灯做出反应的能力，我们用标准基准测试来展示这一点。 本文提出一种基于多任务学习与注意力机制的端到端自动驾驶方法，以提升复杂场景下的决策能力，特别是对交通信号灯的反应。 Keishi Ishihara,Anssi Kanervisto,Jun Miura,Ville Hautamäki cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Arthur Hinsvark,Natalie Delworth,Miguel Del Rio,Quinten McNamara,Joshua Dong,Ryan Westerman,Michelle Huang,Joseph Palakapilly,Jennifer Drexler,Ilya Pirkin,Nishchal Bhandari,Miguel Jette
title: Accented Speech Recognition: A Survey
title_zh: 重音语音识别：一项调查
abstract: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems generalize poorly on accented speech. The phonetic and linguistic variability of accents present hard challenges for ASR systems today in both data collection and modeling strategies. The resulting bias in ASR performance across accents comes at a cost to both users and providers of ASR. We present a survey of current promising approaches to accented speech recognition and highlight the key challenges in the space. Approaches mostly focus on single model generalization and accent feature engineering. Among the challenges, lack of a standard benchmark makes research and comparison especially difficult.
summary: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems generalize poorly on accented speech. The phonetic and linguistic variability of accents present hard challenges for ASR systems today in both data collection and modeling strategies. The resulting bias in ASR performance across accents comes at a cost to both users and providers of ASR. We present a survey of current promising approaches to accented speech recognition and highlight the key challenges in the space. Approaches mostly focus on single model generalization and accent feature engineering. Among the challenges, lack of a standard benchmark makes research and comparison especially difficult.
abstract_zh: 自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统对带口音的语音的泛化能力很差。口音的语音和语言变异性对当今的 ASR 系统在数据收集和建模策略方面提出了严峻的挑战。由此产生的不同口音的 ASR 性能偏差会给 ASR 用户和提供商带来损失。我们对当前有前景的重音语音识别方法进行了调查，并强调了该领域的主要挑战。方法主要关注单一模型泛化和重点特征工程。其中的挑战之一是缺乏标准基准使得研究和比较尤其困难。

AI.tldr: 综述当前口音语音识别的方法与挑战
AI.motivation: 解决ASR系统在不同口音上的性能偏差问题，提升公平性和实用性
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析现有方法，如单一模型泛化和口音特征工程，并讨论挑战如缺乏标准基准
AI.result: 总结了当前方法的局限性，强调基准缺失对研究的阻碍
AI.conclusion: 需建立统一基准并探索更优模型以解决口音识别难题

authors_text: Adrian Celaya,Jonas A. Actor,Rajarajeswari Muthusivarajan,Evan Gates,Caroline Chung,Dawid Schellingerhout,Beatrice Riviere,David Fuentes
title: PocketNet: A Smaller Neural Network for Medical Image Analysis
title_zh: PocketNet：用于医学图像分析的较小神经网络
abstract: Medical imaging deep learning models are often large and complex, requiring specialized hardware to train and evaluate these models. To address such issues, we propose the PocketNet paradigm to reduce the size of deep learning models by throttling the growth of the number of channels in convolutional neural networks. We demonstrate that, for a range of segmentation and classification tasks, PocketNet architectures produce results comparable to that of conventional neural networks while reducing the number of parameters by multiple orders of magnitude, using up to 90% less GPU memory, and speeding up training times by up to 40%, thereby allowing such models to be trained and deployed in resource-constrained settings.
summary: Medical imaging deep learning models are often large and complex, requiring specialized hardware to train and evaluate these models. To address such issues, we propose the PocketNet paradigm to reduce the size of deep learning models by throttling the growth of the number of channels in convolutional neural networks. We demonstrate that, for a range of segmentation and classification tasks, PocketNet architectures produce results comparable to that of conventional neural networks while reducing the number of parameters by multiple orders of magnitude, using up to 90% less GPU memory, and speeding up training times by up to 40%, thereby allowing such models to be trained and deployed in resource-constrained settings.
abstract_zh: 医学成像深度学习模型通常庞大且复杂，需要专门的硬件来训练和评估这些模型。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 PocketNet 范式，通过限制卷积神经网络中通道数量的增长来减小深度学习模型的大小。我们证明，对于一系列分割和分类任务，PocketNet 架构产生的结果与传统神经网络相当，同时将参数数量减少了多个数量级，使用的 GPU 内存减少了 90%，并将训练时间加快了 40%，从而允许在资源有限的环境中训练和部署此类模型。

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为PocketNet的小型神经网络架构，用于医学图像分析，以解决传统模型参数量大、资源消耗高的问题。
AI.motivation: 医学影像深度学习模型通常参数量大且复杂，需要专用硬件支持，难以在资源受限环境中部署。
AI.method: 通过限制卷积神经网络中通道数量的增长，设计PocketNet架构以显著减少模型参数和计算资源需求。
AI.result: 在分割和分类任务中，PocketNet性能与传统网络相当，参数减少多个数量级，GPU内存占用降低90%，训练加速40%。
AI.conclusion: PocketNet在保持模型性能的同时大幅降低资源消耗，适用于医疗场景中的轻量化部署需求。

authors_text: Sarath Sreedharan,Anagha Kulkarni,David E. Smith,Subbarao Kambhampati
title: A Unifying Bayesian Formulation of Measures of Interpretability in Human-AI
title_zh: 人类人工智能可解释性测量的统一贝叶斯公式
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2011.10920
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2011.10920
abstract: Existing approaches for generating human-aware agent behaviors have considered different measures of interpretability in isolation. Further, these measures have been studied under differing assumptions, thus precluding the possibility of designing a single framework that captures these measures under the same assumptions. In this paper, we present a unifying Bayesian framework that models a human observer's evolving beliefs about an agent and thereby define the problem of Generalized Human-Aware Planning. We will show that the definitions of interpretability measures like explicability, legibility and predictability from the prior literature fall out as special cases of our general framework. Through this framework, we also bring a previously ignored fact to light that the human-robot interactions are in effect open-world problems, particularly as a result of modeling the human's beliefs over the agent. Since the human may not only hold beliefs unknown to the agent but may also form new hypotheses about the agent when presented with novel or unexpected behaviors.
summary: Existing approaches for generating human-aware agent behaviors have considered different measures of interpretability in isolation. Further, these measures have been studied under differing assumptions, thus precluding the possibility of designing a single framework that captures these measures under the same assumptions. In this paper, we present a unifying Bayesian framework that models a human observer's evolving beliefs about an agent and thereby define the problem of Generalized Human-Aware Planning. We will show that the definitions of interpretability measures like explicability, legibility and predictability from the prior literature fall out as special cases of our general framework. Through this framework, we also bring a previously ignored fact to light that the human-robot interactions are in effect open-world problems, particularly as a result of modeling the human's beliefs over the agent. Since the human may not only hold beliefs unknown to the agent but may also form new hypotheses about the agent when presented with novel or unexpected behaviors.
abstract_zh: 现有的生成人类感知智能体行为的方法已经单独考虑了不同的可解释性度量。此外，这些措施是在不同的假设下进行研究的，因此排除了设计一个在相同假设下捕获这些措施的单一框架的可能性。在本文中，我们提出了一个统一的贝叶斯框架，该框架模拟了人类观察者对代理不断变化的信念，从而定义了广义人类感知规划问题。我们将证明，先前文献中的可解释性测量的定义，如可解释性、易读性和可预测性，都是我们总体框架的特例。通过这个框架，我们还揭示了一个以前被忽视的事实，即人机交互实际上是开放世界问题，特别是作为对人类对代理的信念进行建模的结果。因为人类不仅可能持有智能体未知的信念，而且在出现新颖或意外的行为时也可能形成关于智能体的新假设。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个统一的贝叶斯框架，将人类-AI系统中不同可解释性度量（如可解释性、可读性、可预测性）整合到同一假设下，并定义广义人类感知规划问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究分别在不同假设下孤立研究可解释性度量，缺乏统一框架，且忽视了人类信念动态变化导致的开放世界特性。
AI.method: 通过建模人类观察者对智能体的动态信念，构建贝叶斯框架，将多种可解释性度量作为框架特例，并分析人机交互的开放世界本质。
AI.result: 证明传统可解释性度量是框架的特例，揭示人类可能持有智能体未知的信念并生成新假设，导致人机交互本质为开放世界问题。
AI.conclusion: 统一框架为设计人类感知系统提供理论基础，强调需考虑人类信念动态性及开放世界特性以提升AI可解释性。

We will show that the definitions of interpretability measures like explicability, legibility and predictability from the prior literature fall out as special cases of our general framework. Through this framework, we also bring a previously ignored fact to light that the human-robot interactions are in effect open-world problems, particularly as a result of modeling the human's beliefs over the agent. Since the human may not only hold beliefs unknown to the agent but may also form new hypotheses about the agent when presented with novel or unexpected behaviors. 现有的生成人类感知智能体行为的方法已经单独考虑了不同的可解释性度量。此外，这些措施是在不同的假设下进行研究的，因此排除了设计一个在相同假设下捕获这些措施的单一框架的可能性。在本文中，我们提出了一个统一的贝叶斯框架，该框架模拟了人类观察者对代理不断变化的信念，从而定义了广义人类感知规划问题。我们将证明，先前文献中的可解释性测量的定义，如可解释性、易读性和可预测性，都是我们总体框架的特例。通过这个框架，我们还揭示了一个以前被忽视的事实，即人机交互实际上是开放世界问题，特别是作为对人类对代理的信念进行建模的结果。因为人类不仅可能持有智能体未知的信念，而且在出现新颖或意外的行为时也可能形成关于智能体的新假设。 本文提出一个统一的贝叶斯框架，将人类-AI系统中不同可解释性度量（如可解释性、可读性、可预测性）整合到同一假设下，并定义广义人类感知规划问题。 Sarath Sreedharan,Anagha Kulkarni,David E. Smith,Subbarao Kambhampati cs.AI

authors_text: Vance Wong,John Emanuello
title: Robustness of ML-Enhanced IDS to Stealthy Adversaries
title_zh: 机器学习增强 IDS 对隐形对手的鲁棒性
abstract: Intrusion Detection Systems (IDS) enhanced with Machine Learning (ML) have demonstrated the capacity to efficiently build a prototype of "normal" cyber behaviors in order to detect cyber threats' activity with greater accuracy than traditional rule-based IDS. Because these are largely black boxes, their acceptance requires proof of robustness to stealthy adversaries. Since it is impossible to build a baseline from activity completely clean of that of malicious cyber actors (outside of controlled experiments), the training data for deployed models will be poisoned with examples of activity that analysts would want to be alerted about. We train an autoencoder-based anomaly detection system on network activity with various proportions of malicious activity mixed in and demonstrate that they are robust to this sort of poisoning.
summary: Intrusion Detection Systems (IDS) enhanced with Machine Learning (ML) have demonstrated the capacity to efficiently build a prototype of "normal" cyber behaviors in order to detect cyber threats' activity with greater accuracy than traditional rule-based IDS. Because these are largely black boxes, their acceptance requires proof of robustness to stealthy adversaries. Since it is impossible to build a baseline from activity completely clean of that of malicious cyber actors (outside of controlled experiments), the training data for deployed models will be poisoned with examples of activity that analysts would want to be alerted about. We train an autoencoder-based anomaly detection system on network activity with various proportions of malicious activity mixed in and demonstrate that they are robust to this sort of poisoning.
abstract_zh: 通过机器学习 (ML) 增强的入侵检测系统 (IDS) 已证明能够有效构建“正常”网络行为原型，以便比传统的基于规则的 IDS 更准确地检测网络威胁活动。由于这些基本上都是黑匣子，因此它们的接受需要证明对隐形对手的鲁棒性。由于不可能从完全没有恶意网络行为者的活动中建立基线（在受控实验之外），因此部署模型的训练数据将受到分析师希望收到警报的活动示例的影响。我们对混合有不同比例恶意活动的网络活动训练基于自动编码器的异常检测系统，并证明它们对此类中毒具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 研究机器学习增强的入侵检测系统在训练数据被恶意活动污染时的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统IDS准确率不足，ML-IDS作为黑箱需证明对隐蔽对抗的鲁棒性，因训练数据可能被恶意活动污染。
AI.method: 采用自编码器构建异常检测系统，使用混合了不同比例恶意活动的数据进行训练。
AI.result: 实验表明该系统在训练数据被恶意活动污染的情况下仍保持有效性。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习增强的IDS对隐蔽对抗具有鲁棒性，适合实际部署。

authors_text: Florian Kadner,Yannik Keller,Constantin A. Rothkopf
title: AdaptiFont: Increasing Individuals' Reading Speed with a Generative Font Model and Bayesian Optimization
title_zh: AdaptiFont：通过生成字体模型和贝叶斯优化提高个人的阅读速度
abstract: Digital text has become one of the primary ways of exchanging knowledge, but text needs to be rendered to a screen to be read. We present AdaptiFont, a human-in-the-loop system that is aimed at interactively increasing readability of text displayed on a monitor. To this end, we first learn a generative font space with non-negative matrix factorization from a set of classic fonts. In this space we generate new true-type-fonts through active learning, render texts with the new font, and measure individual users' reading speed. Bayesian optimization sequentially generates new fonts on the fly to progressively increase individuals' reading speed. The results of a user study show that this adaptive font generation system finds regions in the font space corresponding to high reading speeds, that these fonts significantly increase participants' reading speed, and that the found fonts are significantly different across individual readers.
summary: Digital text has become one of the primary ways of exchanging knowledge, but text needs to be rendered to a screen to be read. We present AdaptiFont, a human-in-the-loop system that is aimed at interactively increasing readability of text displayed on a monitor. To this end, we first learn a generative font space with non-negative matrix factorization from a set of classic fonts. In this space we generate new true-type-fonts through active learning, render texts with the new font, and measure individual users' reading speed. Bayesian optimization sequentially generates new fonts on the fly to progressively increase individuals' reading speed. The results of a user study show that this adaptive font generation system finds regions in the font space corresponding to high reading speeds, that these fonts significantly increase participants' reading speed, and that the found fonts are significantly different across individual readers.
abstract_zh: 数字文本已成为交换知识的主要方式之一，但文本需要渲染到屏幕上才能阅读。我们推出了 AdaptiFont，这是一种人机交互系统，旨在以交互方式提高显示器上显示的文本的可读性。为此，我们首先从一组经典字体中学习具有非负矩阵分解的生成字体空间。在这个空间中，我们通过主动学习生成新的真实字体，用新字体渲染文本，并测量单个用户的阅读速度。贝叶斯优化连续动态生成新字体，以逐步提高个人的阅读速度。用户研究的结果表明，这种自适应字体生成系统在字体空间中找到了与高阅读速度相对应的区域，这些字体显着提高了参与者的阅读速度，并且发现的字体在各个读者之间存在显着差异。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaptiFont系统，通过生成式字体模型和贝叶斯优化技术，个性化调整字体以提高个体阅读速度。
AI.motivation: 数字文本是知识传播的主要形式，但字体渲染方式影响可读性。现有字体无法适应不同用户的阅读需求，需动态优化字体设计。
AI.method: 基于非负矩阵分解构建经典字体的生成空间，通过主动学习生成新字体并测量用户阅读速度，利用贝叶斯优化迭代生成最优字体。
AI.result: 用户实验表明，系统能发现提升阅读速度的字体区域，所生成字体使参与者阅读速度显著提高，且不同用户最优字体存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: AdaptiFont验证了通过字体空间优化提升阅读效率的可行性，展示了个性化字体设计在人机交互中的应用潜力。

authors_text: Alan G. Sanchez,William D. Smart
title: Surface Disinfection using Ultraviolet Lightwith a Mobile Manipulation Robot
title_zh: 移动操纵机器人使用紫外线进行表面消毒
abstract: Robots are being increasingly used in the fight against highly-infectious diseases such as Ebola, MERS, and SARS-COV-2. Many of the robots that are being used employ ultraviolet lights mounted on a mobile base to inactivate the pathogens. However, these lights are often mounted in a fixed configuration and do not provide adequate decontamination of horizontal surfaces, which can be a major source of cross-contamination. In the paper, we describe the design, implementation, and testing of an Ultraviolet Germicidal Irradiation (UVGI) system implemented on a mobile manipulation robot. A human supervisor designates a surface for disinfection, the robot autonomously plans and executes an end-effector trajectory to disinfect the surface to the required certainty, and then displays the results for the human supervisor to verify. We also provide some background information on UVGI and describe how we constructed and validated mathematical models of Ultraviolet (UV) radiation propagation and accumulation. Finally, we describe our implementation on a Fetch mobile manipulation platform, and discuss how the practicalities of implementation on a real robot affect our models.
summary: Robots are being increasingly used in the fight against highly-infectious diseases such as Ebola, MERS, and SARS-COV-2. Many of the robots that are being used employ ultraviolet lights mounted on a mobile base to inactivate the pathogens. However, these lights are often mounted in a fixed configuration and do not provide adequate decontamination of horizontal surfaces, which can be a major source of cross-contamination. In the paper, we describe the design, implementation, and testing of an Ultraviolet Germicidal Irradiation (UVGI) system implemented on a mobile manipulation robot. A human supervisor designates a surface for disinfection, the robot autonomously plans and executes an end-effector trajectory to disinfect the surface to the required certainty, and then displays the results for the human supervisor to verify. We also provide some background information on UVGI and describe how we constructed and validated mathematical models of Ultraviolet (UV) radiation propagation and accumulation. Finally, we describe our implementation on a Fetch mobile manipulation platform, and discuss how the practicalities of implementation on a real robot affect our models.
abstract_zh: 机器人越来越多地用于对抗埃博拉、MERS 和 SARS-COV-2 等高传染性疾病。许多正在使用的机器人都采用安装在移动底座上的紫外线灯来灭活病原体。然而，这些灯通常安装在固定配置中，并且不能对水平表面提供充分的净化，这可能是交叉污染的主要来源。在本文中，我们描述了在移动操纵机器人上实现的紫外线杀菌照射（UVGI）系统的设计、实现和测试。人类主管指定要消毒的表面，机器人自主规划并执行末端执行器轨迹，以达到所需的确定性对表面进行消毒，然后显示结果供人类主管验证。我们还提供了一些有关 UVGI 的背景信息，并描述了我们如何构建和验证紫外线 (UV) 辐射传播和积累的数学模型。最后，我们描述了在 Fetch 移动操作平台上的实现，并讨论了在真实机器人上实现的实用性如何影响我们的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于移动机械臂机器人的紫外线表面消毒系统，通过自主路径规划实现对水平表面的有效消毒。
AI.motivation: 现有紫外线消毒机器人多采用固定灯源配置，难以有效覆盖水平表面，存在交叉污染风险。
AI.method: 设计UVGI系统实现机器人自主消毒，包含表面指定、路径规划、紫外线传播数学建模及Fetch平台实施验证。
AI.result: 系统成功实现表面消毒任务，验证了紫外线传播模型，并分析了实际机器人平台对模型的影响因素。
AI.conclusion: 该系统可有效提升水平表面消毒效果，实际部署需考虑机械结构与模型参数的适配性。

method: 设计UVGI系统实现机器人自主消毒，包含表面指定、路径规划、紫外线传播数学建模及Fetch平台实施验证。
result: 系统成功实现表面消毒任务，验证了紫外线传播模型，并分析了实际机器人平台对模型的影响因素。
conclusion: 该系统可有效提升水平表面消毒效果，实际部署需考虑机械结构与模型参数的适配性。
search_text: Surface Disinfection using Ultraviolet Lightwith a Mobile Manipulation Robot 移动操纵机器人使用紫外线进行表面消毒 Robots are being increasingly used in the fight against highly-infectious diseases such as Ebola, MERS, and SARS-COV-2. Many of the robots that are being used employ ultraviolet lights mounted on a mobile base to inactivate the pathogens. However, these lights are often mounted in a fixed configuration and do not provide adequate decontamination of horizontal surfaces, which can be a major source of cross-contamination. In the paper, we describe the design, implementation, and testing of an Ultraviolet Germicidal Irradiation (UVGI) system implemented on a mobile manipulation robot. A human supervisor designates a surface for disinfection, the robot autonomously plans and executes an end-effector trajectory to disinfect the surface to the required certainty, and then displays the results for the human supervisor to verify. We also provide some background information on UVGI and describe how we constructed and validated mathematical models of Ultraviolet (UV) radiation propagation and accumulation. Finally, we describe our implementation on a Fetch mobile manipulation platform, and discuss how the practicalities of implementation on a real robot affect our models. 机器人越来越多地用于对抗埃博拉、MERS 和 SARS-COV-2 等高传染性疾病。许多正在使用的机器人都采用安装在移动底座上的紫外线灯来灭活病原体。然而，这些灯通常安装在固定配置中，并且不能对水平表面提供充分的净化，这可能是交叉污染的主要来源。在本文中，我们描述了在移动操纵机器人上实现的紫外线杀菌照射（UVGI）系统的设计、实现和测试。人类主管指定要消毒的表面，机器人自主规划并执行末端执行器轨迹，以达到所需的确定性对表面进行消毒，然后显示结果供人类主管验证。我们还提供了一些有关 UVGI 的背景信息，并描述了我们如何构建和验证紫外线 (UV) 辐射传播和积累的数学模型。最后，我们描述了在 Fetch 移动操作平台上的实现，并讨论了在真实机器人上实现的实用性如何影响我们的模型。 本文提出了一种基于移动机械臂机器人的紫外线表面消毒系统，通过自主路径规划实现对水平表面的有效消毒。 Alan G. Sanchez,William D. Smart cs.RO

authors_text: Sylvain Calinon
title: Mixture Models for the Analysis, Edition, and Synthesis of Continuous Time Series
title_zh: 用于连续时间序列分析、编辑和综合的混合模型
abstract: This chapter presents an overview of techniques used for the analysis, edition, and synthesis of time series, with a particular emphasis on motion data. The use of mixture models allows the decomposition of time signals as a superposition of basis functions. It provides a compact representation that aims at keeping the essential characteristics of the signals. Various types of basis functions have been proposed, with developments originating from different fields of research, including computer graphics, human motion science, robotics, control, and neuroscience. Examples of applications with radial, Bernstein and Fourier basis functions will be presented, with associated source codes to get familiar with these techniques.
summary: This chapter presents an overview of techniques used for the analysis, edition, and synthesis of time series, with a particular emphasis on motion data. The use of mixture models allows the decomposition of time signals as a superposition of basis functions. It provides a compact representation that aims at keeping the essential characteristics of the signals. Various types of basis functions have been proposed, with developments originating from different fields of research, including computer graphics, human motion science, robotics, control, and neuroscience. Examples of applications with radial, Bernstein and Fourier basis functions will be presented, with associated source codes to get familiar with these techniques.
abstract_zh: 本章概述了用于分析、编辑和合成时间序列的技术，特别强调运动数据。混合模型的使用允许将时间信号分解为基函数的叠加。它提供了一种紧凑的表示形式，旨在保持信号的基本特征。人们已经提出了各种类型的基函数，其发展源自不同的研究领域，包括计算机图形学、人体运动科学、机器人技术、控制和神经科学。将介绍径向基函数、伯恩斯坦基函数和傅立叶基函数的应用示例，以及相关的源代码以熟悉这些技术。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了利用混合模型对连续时间序列（尤其是运动数据）进行分析、编辑和合成的方法，通过基函数分解实现信号的紧凑表示。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以高效处理复杂时间序列，需一种通用模型实现紧凑表示与多领域应用。
AI.method: 采用混合模型将时间信号分解为多种基函数（如径向、伯恩斯坦、傅里叶）的叠加，结合不同领域技术实现紧凑表示。
AI.result: 展示了径向、伯恩斯坦和傅里叶基函数的应用实例，并提供源代码辅助技术实现。
AI.conclusion: 混合模型能有效分解时间序列，保持其特征，具有跨领域应用潜力，未来可探索更多基函数与优化方法。

authors_text: Charles C. Cossette,Mohammed Shalaby,David Saussié,James R. Forbes,Jérôme Le Ny
title: Relative Position Estimation Between Two UWB Devices with IMUs
title_zh: 两个带有 IMU 的 UWB 设备之间的相对位置估计
comment: 8 pages, 9 figures, published in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
comments: 8 pages, 9 figures, published in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
abstract: For a team of robots to work collaboratively, it is crucial that each robot have the ability to determine the position of their neighbors, relative to themselves, in order to execute tasks autonomously. This letter presents an algorithm for determining the three-dimensional relative position between two mobile robots, each using nothing more than a single ultra-wideband transceiver, an accelerometer, a rate gyro, and a magnetometer. A sliding window filter estimates the relative position at selected keypoints by combining the distance measurements with acceleration estimates, which each agent computes using an on-board attitude estimator. The algorithm is appropriate for real-time implementation, and has been tested in simulation and experiment, where it comfortably outperforms standard estimators. A positioning accuracy of less than 1 meter is achieved with inexpensive sensors.
summary: For a team of robots to work collaboratively, it is crucial that each robot have the ability to determine the position of their neighbors, relative to themselves, in order to execute tasks autonomously. This letter presents an algorithm for determining the three-dimensional relative position between two mobile robots, each using nothing more than a single ultra-wideband transceiver, an accelerometer, a rate gyro, and a magnetometer. A sliding window filter estimates the relative position at selected keypoints by combining the distance measurements with acceleration estimates, which each agent computes using an on-board attitude estimator. The algorithm is appropriate for real-time implementation, and has been tested in simulation and experiment, where it comfortably outperforms standard estimators. A positioning accuracy of less than 1 meter is achieved with inexpensive sensors.
abstract_zh: 对于机器人团队的协作工作来说，至关重要的是每个机器人都有能力确定邻居相对于自己的位置，以便自主执行任务。这封信提出了一种确定两个移动机器人之间三维相对位置的算法，每个机器人只使用一个超宽带收发器、一个加速度计、一个速率陀螺仪和一个磁力计。滑动窗口滤波器通过将距离测量与加速度估计相结合来估计所选关键点的相对位置，每个代理使用机载姿态估计器进行计算。该算法适合实时实现，并且已经在模拟和实验中进行了测试，其性能明显优于标准估计器。使用廉价的传感器可实现小于 1 米的定位精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用UWB设备和IMU实现两个移动机器人三维相对位置估计的算法。
AI.motivation: 协作机器人需要自主执行任务，必须实时准确获取邻居的相对位置信息。
AI.method: 采用滑动窗口滤波器结合UWB距离测量与IMU姿态估计，通过关键点融合加速度数据进行实时计算。
AI.result: 实验验证定位精度低于1米，且优于传统估计方法，满足实时性要求。
AI.conclusion: 该算法以低成本传感器实现高精度相对定位，为多机器人协作提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Chongyi Li,Chunle Guo,Linghao Han,Jun Jiang,Ming-Ming Cheng,Jinwei Gu,Chen Change Loy
title: Low-Light Image and Video Enhancement Using Deep Learning: A Survey
title_zh: 使用深度学习的低光图像和视频增强：调查
abstract: Low-light image enhancement (LLIE) aims at improving the perception or interpretability of an image captured in an environment with poor illumination. Recent advances in this area are dominated by deep learning-based solutions, where many learning strategies, network structures, loss functions, training data, etc. have been employed. In this paper, we provide a comprehensive survey to cover various aspects ranging from algorithm taxonomy to open issues. To examine the generalization of existing methods, we propose a low-light image and video dataset, in which the images and videos are taken by different mobile phones' cameras under diverse illumination conditions. Besides, for the first time, we provide a unified online platform that covers many popular LLIE methods, of which the results can be produced through a user-friendly web interface. In addition to qualitative and quantitative evaluation of existing methods on publicly available and our proposed datasets, we also validate their performance in face detection in the dark.This survey together with the proposed dataset and online platform could serve as a reference source for future study and promote the development of this research field. The proposed platform and dataset as well as the collected methods, datasets, and evaluation metrics are publicly available and will be regularly updated.
summary: Low-light image enhancement (LLIE) aims at improving the perception or interpretability of an image captured in an environment with poor illumination. Recent advances in this area are dominated by deep learning-based solutions, where many learning strategies, network structures, loss functions, training data, etc. have been employed. In this paper, we provide a comprehensive survey to cover various aspects ranging from algorithm taxonomy to open issues. To examine the generalization of existing methods, we propose a low-light image and video dataset, in which the images and videos are taken by different mobile phones' cameras under diverse illumination conditions. Besides, for the first time, we provide a unified online platform that covers many popular LLIE methods, of which the results can be produced through a user-friendly web interface. In addition to qualitative and quantitative evaluation of existing methods on publicly available and our proposed datasets, we also validate their performance in face detection in the dark.This survey together with the proposed dataset and online platform could serve as a reference source for future study and promote the development of this research field. The proposed platform and dataset as well as the collected methods, datasets, and evaluation metrics are publicly available and will be regularly updated.
abstract_zh: 低光图像增强（LLIE）旨在提高在照明不良的环境中捕获的图像的感知或可解释性。该领域的最新进展主要是基于深度学习的解决方案，其中采用了许多学习策略、网络结构、损失函数、训练数据等。在本文中，我们提供了全面的调查，涵盖从算法分类到开放问题的各个方面。为了检验现有方法的泛化性，我们提出了一个低光图像和视频数据集，其中图像和视频是由不同手机的摄像头在不同的照明条件下拍摄的。此外，我们首次提供了一个统一的在线平台，涵盖了许多流行的LLIE方法，并且可以通过用户友好的Web界面生成结果。除了在公开数据集和我们提出的数据集上对现有方法进行定性和定量评估外，我们还验证了它们在黑暗中人脸检测的性能。这项调查连同提出的数据集和在线平台可以作为未来研究的参考来源，并促进该研究领域的发展。拟议的平台和数据集以及收集的方法、数据集和评估指标都是公开的，并将定期更新。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于深度学习的低光图像和视频增强技术，并提出了一种新的数据集和在线平台。
AI.motivation: 低光图像增强技术在改善低光照环境下图像的感知和可解释性方面具有重要意义，但目前缺乏系统的综述和统一的评估平台。
AI.method: 本文通过分类算法、提出新的数据集和构建在线平台的方法，对现有低光图像增强方法进行综合评估。
AI.result: 提出了一种新的低光图像和视频数据集，构建了统一的在线平台，并对多种方法进行了定性和定量评估。
AI.conclusion: 本文为未来的研究提供了参考资源，并推动了低光图像增强领域的发展。

tldr: 本文综述了基于深度学习的低光图像和视频增强技术，并提出了一种新的数据集和在线平台。
motivation: 低光图像增强技术在改善低光照环境下图像的感知和可解释性方面具有重要意义，但目前缺乏系统的综述和统一的评估平台。
method: 本文通过分类算法、提出新的数据集和构建在线平台的方法，对现有低光图像增强方法进行综合评估。
result: 提出了一种新的低光图像和视频数据集，构建了统一的在线平台，并对多种方法进行了定性和定量评估。
conclusion: 本文为未来的研究提供了参考资源，并推动了低光图像增强领域的发展。
search_text: Low-Light Image and Video Enhancement Using Deep Learning: A Survey 使用深度学习的低光图像和视频增强：调查 Low-light image enhancement (LLIE) aims at improving the perception or interpretability of an image captured in an environment with poor illumination. Recent advances in this area are dominated by deep learning-based solutions, where many learning strategies, network structures, loss functions, training data, etc. have been employed. In this paper, we provide a comprehensive survey to cover various aspects ranging from algorithm taxonomy to open issues. To examine the generalization of existing methods, we propose a low-light image and video dataset, in which the images and videos are taken by different mobile phones' cameras under diverse illumination conditions. Besides, for the first time, we provide a unified online platform that covers many popular LLIE methods, of which the results can be produced through a user-friendly web interface. In addition to qualitative and quantitative evaluation of existing methods on publicly available and our proposed datasets, we also validate their performance in face detection in the dark.This survey together with the proposed dataset and online platform could serve as a reference source for future study and promote the development of this research field. The proposed platform and dataset as well as the collected methods, datasets, and evaluation metrics are publicly available and will be regularly updated. 低光图像增强（LLIE）旨在提高在照明不良的环境中捕获的图像的感知或可解释性。该领域的最新进展主要是基于深度学习的解决方案，其中采用了许多学习策略、网络结构、损失函数、训练数据等。在本文中，我们提供了全面的调查，涵盖从算法分类到开放问题的各个方面。为了检验现有方法的泛化性，我们提出了一个低光图像和视频数据集，其中图像和视频是由不同手机的摄像头在不同的照明条件下拍摄的。此外，我们首次提供了一个统一的在线平台，涵盖了许多流行的LLIE方法，并且可以通过用户友好的Web界面生成结果。除了在公开数据集和我们提出的数据集上对现有方法进行定性和定量评估外，我们还验证了它们在黑暗中人脸检测的性能。这项调查连同提出的数据集和在线平台可以作为未来研究的参考来源，并促进该研究领域的发展。拟议的平台和数据集以及收集的方法、数据集和评估指标都是公开的，并将定期更新。 本文综述了基于深度学习的低光图像和视频增强技术，并提出了一种新的数据集和在线平台。 Chongyi Li,Chunle Guo,Linghao Han,Jun Jiang,Ming-Ming Cheng,Jinwei Gu,Chen Change Loy cs.CV

authors_text: Jidong Ge,Yunyun huang,Xiaoyu Shen,Chuanyi Li,Wei Hu
title: Learning Fine-grained Fact-Article Correspondence in Legal Cases
title_zh: 学习法律案件中细粒度事实与文章的对应
comment: Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/gjdnju/MLMN
comments: Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/gjdnju/MLMN
abstract: Automatically recommending relevant law articles to a given legal case has attracted much attention as it can greatly release human labor from searching over the large database of laws. However, current researches only support coarse-grained recommendation where all relevant articles are predicted as a whole without explaining which specific fact each article is relevant with. Since one case can be formed of many supporting facts, traversing over them to verify the correctness of recommendation results can be time-consuming. We believe that learning fine-grained correspondence between each single fact and law articles is crucial for an accurate and trustworthy AI system. With this motivation, we perform a pioneering study and create a corpus with manually annotated fact-article correspondences. We treat the learning as a text matching task and propose a multi-level matching network to address it. To help the model better digest the content of law articles, we parse articles in form of premise-conclusion pairs with random forest. Experiments show that the parsed form yielded better performance and the resulting model surpassed other popular text matching baselines. Furthermore, we compare with previous researches and find that establishing the fine-grained fact-article correspondences can improve the recommendation accuracy by a large margin. Our best system reaches an F1 score of 96.3%, making it of great potential for practical use. It can also significantly boost the downstream task of legal decision prediction, increasing the F1 score by up to 12.7%.
summary: Automatically recommending relevant law articles to a given legal case has attracted much attention as it can greatly release human labor from searching over the large database of laws. However, current researches only support coarse-grained recommendation where all relevant articles are predicted as a whole without explaining which specific fact each article is relevant with. Since one case can be formed of many supporting facts, traversing over them to verify the correctness of recommendation results can be time-consuming. We believe that learning fine-grained correspondence between each single fact and law articles is crucial for an accurate and trustworthy AI system. With this motivation, we perform a pioneering study and create a corpus with manually annotated fact-article correspondences. We treat the learning as a text matching task and propose a multi-level matching network to address it. To help the model better digest the content of law articles, we parse articles in form of premise-conclusion pairs with random forest. Experiments show that the parsed form yielded better performance and the resulting model surpassed other popular text matching baselines. Furthermore, we compare with previous researches and find that establishing the fine-grained fact-article correspondences can improve the recommendation accuracy by a large margin. Our best system reaches an F1 score of 96.3%, making it of great potential for practical use. It can also significantly boost the downstream task of legal decision prediction, increasing the F1 score by up to 12.7%.
abstract_zh: 针对特定法律案例自动推荐相关法律文章受到了广泛关注，因为它可以极大地释放人类在庞大的法律数据库中搜索的劳动力。然而，目前的研究仅支持粗粒度推荐，即所有相关文章作为一个整体进行预测，而没有解释每篇文章与哪个具体事实相关。由于一个案例可能由许多支持事实组成，因此遍历它们来验证推荐结果的正确性可能非常耗时。我们相信，学习每个事实和法律文章之间的细粒度对应关系对于准确且值得信赖的人工智能系统至关重要。出于这种动机，我们进行了一项开创性的研究，并创建了一个带有手动注释的事实文章对应关系的语料库。我们将学习视为文本匹配任务，并提出了一个多级匹配网络来解决它。为了帮助模型更好地消化法律文章的内容，我们使用随机森林以前提-结论对的形式解析文章。实验表明，解析的形式产生了更好的性能，并且生成的模型超越了其他流行的文本匹配基线。此外，我们与之前的研究进行比较，发现建立细粒度的事实-文章对应关系可以大幅提高推荐准确性。我们最好的系统达到了 96.3% 的 F1 分数，使其具有巨大的实际应用潜力。它还可以显着提升下游的法律决策预测任务，将 F1 分数提高高达 12.7%。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过学习法律案例中每个具体事实与法律条文之间的细粒度对应关系，提升法律条文推荐的准确性与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有法律条文推荐方法仅支持粗粒度推荐，无法解释具体事实与条文的关联性，导致验证推荐结果耗时且缺乏可信度。
AI.method: 构建人工标注的事实-条文对应语料库，将问题建模为文本匹配任务，提出多级匹配网络，并通过随机森林解析法律条文为前提-结论对以增强模型理解。
AI.result: 模型在测试中达到96.3%的F1分数，下游法律判决预测任务的F1分数提升最高达12.7%。
AI.conclusion: 细粒度事实-条文对应关系的建立显著提升推荐准确性，该方法在实际应用中具有重要潜力。

authors_text: Biswadeep Chakraborty,Xueyuan She,Saibal Mukhopadhyay
title: A Fully Spiking Hybrid Neural Network for Energy-Efficient Object Detection
title_zh: 用于节能目标检测的全尖峰混合神经网络
abstract: This paper proposes a Fully Spiking Hybrid Neural Network (FSHNN) for energy-efficient and robust object detection in resource-constrained platforms. The network architecture is based on Convolutional SNN using leaky-integrate-fire neuron models. The model combines unsupervised Spike Time-Dependent Plasticity (STDP) learning with back-propagation (STBP) learning methods and also uses Monte Carlo Dropout to get an estimate of the uncertainty error. FSHNN provides better accuracy compared to DNN based object detectors while being 150X energy-efficient. It also outperforms these object detectors, when subjected to noisy input data and less labeled training data with a lower uncertainty error.
summary: This paper proposes a Fully Spiking Hybrid Neural Network (FSHNN) for energy-efficient and robust object detection in resource-constrained platforms. The network architecture is based on Convolutional SNN using leaky-integrate-fire neuron models. The model combines unsupervised Spike Time-Dependent Plasticity (STDP) learning with back-propagation (STBP) learning methods and also uses Monte Carlo Dropout to get an estimate of the uncertainty error. FSHNN provides better accuracy compared to DNN based object detectors while being 150X energy-efficient. It also outperforms these object detectors, when subjected to noisy input data and less labeled training data with a lower uncertainty error.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种全尖峰混合神经网络（FSHNN），用于在资源受限的平台中实现节能且鲁棒的目标检测。该网络架构基于使用泄漏积分火神经元模型的卷积 SNN。该模型将无监督尖峰瞬态可塑性 (STDP) 学习与反向传播 (STBP) 学习方法相结合，并使用蒙特卡罗 Dropout 来估计不确定性误差。与基于 DNN 的目标检测器相比，FSHNN 提供了更高的精度，同时节能 150 倍。当受到噪声输入数据和具有较低不确定性误差的标记较少的训练数据的影响时，它的性能也优于这些物体检测器。

AI.tldr: 提出一种全脉冲混合神经网络（FSHNN）用于资源受限平台的高效能物体检测。
AI.motivation: 传统深度神经网络（DNN）在物体检测中能耗高，而脉冲神经网络（SNN）虽节能但准确率不足，需兼顾能效与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于卷积SNN与漏电积分火神经元模型，融合无监督STDP学习和反向传播（STBP），结合蒙特卡洛Dropout估计不确定性误差。
AI.result: FSHNN相较DNN提升150倍能效，噪声数据与少标签场景下准确率更高且不确定性误差更低。
AI.conclusion: FSHNN在能效与鲁棒性上优于现有方法，适合部署于边缘计算等资源受限场景。

authors_text: Utkarsh Sarawgi,Rishab Khincha,Wazeer Zulfikar,Satrajit Ghosh,Pattie Maes
title: Uncertainty-Aware Boosted Ensembling in Multi-Modal Settings
title_zh: 多模态设置中的不确定性感知增强集成
comment: Accepted at IJCNN 2021, to appear in IEEE proceedings. Equal contributions from US, RK and WZ
comments: Accepted at IJCNN 2021, to appear in IEEE proceedings. Equal contributions from US, RK and WZ
abstract: Reliability of machine learning (ML) systems is crucial in safety-critical applications such as healthcare, and uncertainty estimation is a widely researched method to highlight the confidence of ML systems in deployment. Sequential and parallel ensemble techniques have shown improved performance of ML systems in multi-modal settings by leveraging the feature sets together. We propose an uncertainty-aware boosting technique for multi-modal ensembling in order to focus on the data points with higher associated uncertainty estimates, rather than the ones with higher loss values. We evaluate this method on healthcare tasks related to Dementia and Parkinson's disease which involve real-world multi-modal speech and text data, wherein our method shows an improved performance. Additional analysis suggests that introducing uncertainty-awareness into the boosted ensembles decreases the overall entropy of the system, making it more robust to heteroscedasticity in the data, as well as better calibrating each of the modalities along with high quality prediction intervals. We open-source our entire codebase at https://github.com/usarawgi911/Uncertainty-aware-boosting
summary: Reliability of machine learning (ML) systems is crucial in safety-critical applications such as healthcare, and uncertainty estimation is a widely researched method to highlight the confidence of ML systems in deployment. Sequential and parallel ensemble techniques have shown improved performance of ML systems in multi-modal settings by leveraging the feature sets together. We propose an uncertainty-aware boosting technique for multi-modal ensembling in order to focus on the data points with higher associated uncertainty estimates, rather than the ones with higher loss values. We evaluate this method on healthcare tasks related to Dementia and Parkinson's disease which involve real-world multi-modal speech and text data, wherein our method shows an improved performance. Additional analysis suggests that introducing uncertainty-awareness into the boosted ensembles decreases the overall entropy of the system, making it more robust to heteroscedasticity in the data, as well as better calibrating each of the modalities along with high quality prediction intervals. We open-source our entire codebase at https://github.com/usarawgi911/Uncertainty-aware-boosting
abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 系统的可靠性对于医疗保健等安全关键型应用至关重要，而不确定性估计是一种被广泛研究的方法，可增强 ML 系统部署的信心。顺序和并行集成技术已经表明，通过共同利用特征集，机器学习系统在多模式设置中的性能得到了提高。我们提出了一种用于多模态集成的不确定性增强技术，以便关注具有较高相关不确定性估计的数据点，而不是具有较高损失值的数据点。我们在与痴呆症和帕金森病相关的医疗保健任务上评估了这种方法，这些任务涉及现实世界的多模态语音和文本数据，其中我们的方法显示出改进的性能。额外的分析表明，将不确定性意识引入到增强型集成中会降低系统的整体熵，使其对数据中的异方差性更加鲁棒，并更好地校准每种模式以及高质量的预测区间。我们在 https://github.com/usarawgi911/Uncertainty-aware-boosting 开源了整个代码库

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于不确定性的多模态增强集成方法，通过关注高不确定性数据点提升医疗任务中的模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有集成方法侧重于高损失值数据点，但医疗等安全关键领域更需要通过不确定性估计提升系统可靠性。
AI.method: 设计不确定性感知的增强算法，结合多模态语音与文本数据，聚焦高不确定性样本进行模型迭代优化。
AI.result: 在阿尔茨海默病和帕金森病诊断任务中实现性能提升，降低系统熵值并改善预测区间校准效果。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性感知机制可增强多模态集成的鲁棒性，为医疗AI提供更可靠决策支持。

authors_text: Haowen Fang,Brady Taylor,Ziru Li,Zaidao Mei,Hai Li,Qinru Qiu
title: Neuromorphic Algorithm-hardware Codesign for Temporal Pattern Learning
title_zh: 用于时间模式学习的神经拟态算法-硬件协同设计
abstract: Neuromorphic computing and spiking neural networks (SNN) mimic the behavior of biological systems and have drawn interest for their potential to perform cognitive tasks with high energy efficiency. However, some factors such as temporal dynamics and spike timings prove critical for information processing but are often ignored by existing works, limiting the performance and applications of neuromorphic computing. On one hand, due to the lack of effective SNN training algorithms, it is difficult to utilize the temporal neural dynamics. Many existing algorithms still treat neuron activation statistically. On the other hand, utilizing temporal neural dynamics also poses challenges to hardware design. Synapses exhibit temporal dynamics, serving as memory units that hold historical information, but are often simplified as a connection with weight. Most current models integrate synaptic activations in some storage medium to represent membrane potential and institute a hard reset of membrane potential after the neuron emits a spike. This is done for its simplicity in hardware, requiring only a "clear" signal to wipe the storage medium, but destroys temporal information stored in the neuron. In this work, we derive an efficient training algorithm for Leaky Integrate and Fire neurons, which is capable of training a SNN to learn complex spatial temporal patterns. We achieved competitive accuracy on two complex datasets. We also demonstrate the advantage of our model by a novel temporal pattern association task. Codesigned with this algorithm, we have developed a CMOS circuit implementation for a memristor-based network of neuron and synapses which retains critical neural dynamics with reduced complexity. This circuit implementation of the neuron model is simulated to demonstrate its ability to react to temporal spiking patterns with an adaptive threshold.
summary: Neuromorphic computing and spiking neural networks (SNN) mimic the behavior of biological systems and have drawn interest for their potential to perform cognitive tasks with high energy efficiency. However, some factors such as temporal dynamics and spike timings prove critical for information processing but are often ignored by existing works, limiting the performance and applications of neuromorphic computing. On one hand, due to the lack of effective SNN training algorithms, it is difficult to utilize the temporal neural dynamics. Many existing algorithms still treat neuron activation statistically. On the other hand, utilizing temporal neural dynamics also poses challenges to hardware design. Synapses exhibit temporal dynamics, serving as memory units that hold historical information, but are often simplified as a connection with weight. Most current models integrate synaptic activations in some storage medium to represent membrane potential and institute a hard reset of membrane potential after the neuron emits a spike. This is done for its simplicity in hardware, requiring only a "clear" signal to wipe the storage medium, but destroys temporal information stored in the neuron. In this work, we derive an efficient training algorithm for Leaky Integrate and Fire neurons, which is capable of training a SNN to learn complex spatial temporal patterns. We achieved competitive accuracy on two complex datasets. We also demonstrate the advantage of our model by a novel temporal pattern association task. Codesigned with this algorithm, we have developed a CMOS circuit implementation for a memristor-based network of neuron and synapses which retains critical neural dynamics with reduced complexity. This circuit implementation of the neuron model is simulated to demonstrate its ability to react to temporal spiking patterns with an adaptive threshold.
abstract_zh: 神经形态计算和尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 模仿生物系统的行为，并因其以高能效执行认知任务的潜力而引起人们的兴趣。然而，时间动态和尖峰时序等一些因素被证明对信息处理至关重要，但现有的工作经常忽略这些因素，从而限制了神经形态计算的性能和应用。一方面，由于缺乏有效的SNN训练算法，很难利用时间神经动力学。许多现有算法仍然以统计学方式处理神经元激活。另一方面，利用时间神经动力学也给硬件设计带来了挑战。突触表现出时间动态，作为保存历史信息的记忆单元，但通常被简化为与权重的连接。当前的大多数模型将突触激活集成在某些存储介质中以表示膜电位，并在神经元发出尖峰后对膜电位进行硬重置。这样做是为了硬件简单，只需要一个“清晰”的信号来擦除存储介质，但会破坏存储在神经元中的时间信息。在这项工作中，我们推导了一种针对 Leaky Integrate 和 Fire 神经元的有效训练算法，该算法能够训练 SNN 来学习复杂的时空模式。我们在两个复杂的数据集上实现了有竞争力的准确性。我们还通过新颖的时间模式关联任务展示了我们的模型的优势。与该算法共同设计，我们开发了一种用于基于忆阻器的神经元和突触网络的 CMOS 电路实现，该电路保留了关键的神经动力学并降低了复杂性。模拟神经元模型的电路实现，以证明其通过自适应阈值对时间尖峰模式做出反应的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种神经形态算法与硬件协同设计方法，用于提升时空模式学习的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有脉冲神经网络（SNN）忽视了生物神经系统中的时间动态特性，导致其在处理时空信息时性能受限。
AI.method: 开发了针对漏积分放电神经元的高效训练算法，并设计了基于忆阻器的CMOS电路实现，保留神经元动态特性。
AI.result: 在两个复杂数据集上达到竞争性准确率，并通过时序模式关联任务验证了模型优势，电路仿真展示了对时序脉冲的适应性阈值响应。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过算法与硬件协同设计，有效利用神经动态特性，为复杂时空模式学习提供了低复杂度的实现方案。

authors_text: Amirsaeed Yazdani,Yung-Chen Sun,Nicholas B. Stephens,Timothy Ryan,Vishal Monga
title: Multi-Class Micro-CT Image Segmentation Using Sparse Regularized Deep Networks
title_zh: 使用稀疏正则化深度网络的多类 Micro-CT 图像分割
comment: 5 pages, 6 figures, accepted in 2020 54th Asilomar Conference on Signals, Systems, and Computers
comments: 5 pages, 6 figures, accepted in 2020 54th Asilomar Conference on Signals, Systems, and Computers
abstract: It is common in anthropology and paleontology to address questions about extant and extinct species through the quantification of osteological features observable in micro-computed tomographic (micro-CT) scans. In cases where remains were buried, the grey values present in these scans may be classified as belonging to air, dirt, or bone. While various intensity-based methods have been proposed to segment scans into these classes, it is often the case that intensity values for dirt and bone are nearly indistinguishable. In these instances, scientists resort to laborious manual segmentation, which does not scale well in practice when a large number of scans are to be analyzed. Here we present a new domain-enriched network for three-class image segmentation, which utilizes the domain knowledge of experts familiar with manually segmenting bone and dirt structures. More precisely, our novel structure consists of two components: 1) a representation network trained on special samples based on newly designed custom loss terms, which extracts discriminative bone and dirt features, 2) and a segmentation network that leverages these extracted discriminative features. These two parts are jointly trained in order to optimize the segmentation performance. A comparison of our network to that of the current state-of-the-art U-NETs demonstrates the benefits of our proposal, particularly when the number of labeled training images are limited, which is invariably the case for micro-CT segmentation.

In these instances, scientists resort to laborious manual segmentation, which does not scale well in practice when a large number of scans are to be analyzed. Here we present a new domain-enriched network for three-class image segmentation, which utilizes the domain knowledge of experts familiar with manually segmenting bone and dirt structures. More precisely, our novel structure consists of two components: 1) a representation network trained on special samples based on newly designed custom loss terms, which extracts discriminative bone and dirt features, 2) and a segmentation network that leverages these extracted discriminative features. These two parts are jointly trained in order to optimize the segmentation performance. A comparison of our network to that of the current state-of-the-art U-NETs demonstrates the benefits of our proposal, particularly when the number of labeled training images are limited, which is invariably the case for micro-CT segmentation.
abstract_zh: 在人类学和古生物学中，通过量化微计算机断层扫描 (micro-CT) 扫描中可观察到的骨学特征来解决有关现存和灭绝物种的问题是很常见的。在遗骸被掩埋的情况下，这些扫描中存在的灰度值可以被分类为属于空气、泥土或骨头。虽然已经提出了各种基于强度的方法来将扫描分割成这些类别，但通常情况下，污垢和骨头的强度值几乎无法区分。在这些情况下，科学家们求助于费力的手动分割，当要分析大量扫描时，这种方法在实践中无法很好地扩展。在这里，我们提出了一种用于三类图像分割的新领域丰富网络，它利用了熟悉手动分割骨骼和污垢结构的专家的领域知识。更准确地说，我们的新颖结构由两个部分组成：1）基于新设计的自定义损失项对特殊样本进行训练的表示网络，提取有区别的骨骼和污垢特征，2）以及利用这些提取的有区别特征的分割网络。这两部分被联合训练以优化分割性能。我们的网络与当前最先进的 U-NET 网络的比较证明了我们建议的优点，特别是当标记训练图像的数量有限时，这对于微型 CT 分割来说总是如此。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于微CT图像多类分割的稀疏正则化深度网络方法。
AI.motivation: 在人类学和古生物学中，通过微CT扫描量化骨骼特征是常见的研究方法。然而，由于泥土和骨骼的灰度值难以区分，传统的基于强度的方法无法有效分割，导致需要大量人工标注，效率低下。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种结合领域知识的网络结构，包括两个部分：1）使用定制损失函数训练的表示网络，提取骨骼和泥土的判别特征；2）利用这些特征的分割网络。这两个部分联合训练以优化分割性能。
AI.result: 与当前最先进的U-NETs相比，本文提出的网络在训练图像数量有限的情况下表现更优，验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合领域知识和稀疏正则化网络，提高了微CT图像分割的性能，尤其适用于标注数据有限的情况。

search_text: Multi-Class Micro-CT Image Segmentation Using Sparse Regularized Deep Networks 使用稀疏正则化深度网络的多类 Micro-CT 图像分割 It is common in anthropology and paleontology to address questions about extant and extinct species through the quantification of osteological features observable in micro-computed tomographic (micro-CT) scans. In cases where remains were buried, the grey values present in these scans may be classified as belonging to air, dirt, or bone. While various intensity-based methods have been proposed to segment scans into these classes, it is often the case that intensity values for dirt and bone are nearly indistinguishable. In these instances, scientists resort to laborious manual segmentation, which does not scale well in practice when a large number of scans are to be analyzed. Here we present a new domain-enriched network for three-class image segmentation, which utilizes the domain knowledge of experts familiar with manually segmenting bone and dirt structures. More precisely, our novel structure consists of two components: 1) a representation network trained on special samples based on newly designed custom loss terms, which extracts discriminative bone and dirt features, 2) and a segmentation network that leverages these extracted discriminative features. These two parts are jointly trained in order to optimize the segmentation performance. A comparison of our network to that of the current state-of-the-art U-NETs demonstrates the benefits of our proposal, particularly when the number of labeled training images are limited, which is invariably the case for micro-CT segmentation. 在人类学和古生物学中，通过量化微计算机断层扫描 (micro-CT) 扫描中可观察到的骨学特征来解决有关现存和灭绝物种的问题是很常见的。在遗骸被掩埋的情况下，这些扫描中存在的灰度值可以被分类为属于空气、泥土或骨头。虽然已经提出了各种基于强度的方法来将扫描分割成这些类别，但通常情况下，污垢和骨头的强度值几乎无法区分。在这些情况下，科学家们求助于费力的手动分割，当要分析大量扫描时，这种方法在实践中无法很好地扩展。在这里，我们提出了一种用于三类图像分割的新领域丰富网络，它利用了熟悉手动分割骨骼和污垢结构的专家的领域知识。更准确地说，我们的新颖结构由两个部分组成：1）基于新设计的自定义损失项对特殊样本进行训练的表示网络，提取有区别的骨骼和污垢特征，2）以及利用这些提取的有区别特征的分割网络。这两部分被联合训练以优化分割性能。我们的网络与当前最先进的 U-NET 网络的比较证明了我们建议的优点，特别是当标记训练图像的数量有限时，这对于微型 CT 分割来说总是如此。 本文提出了一种用于微CT图像多类分割的稀疏正则化深度网络方法。 Amirsaeed Yazdani,Yung-Chen Sun,Nicholas B. Stephens,Timothy Ryan,Vishal Monga eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Arnd Koeppe,Franz Bamer,Michael Selzer,Britta Nestler,Bernd Markert
title: Explainable artificial intelligence for mechanics: physics-informing neural networks for constitutive models
title_zh: 可解释的力学人工智能：用于本构模型的物理信息神经网络
comment: Preprint - Rev-2 (minor grammatical changes; prevent Google from archiving)
comments: Preprint - Rev-2 (minor grammatical changes; prevent Google from archiving)
abstract: (Artificial) neural networks have become increasingly popular in mechanics to accelerate computations with model order reduction techniques and as universal models for a wide variety of materials. However, the major disadvantage of neural networks remains: their numerous parameters are challenging to interpret and explain. Thus, neural networks are often labeled as black boxes, and their results often elude human interpretation. In mechanics, the new and active field of physics-informed neural networks attempts to mitigate this disadvantage by designing deep neural networks on the basis of mechanical knowledge. By using this a priori knowledge, deeper and more complex neural networks became feasible, since the mechanical assumptions could be explained. However, the internal reasoning and explanation of neural network parameters remain mysterious. Complementary to the physics-informed approach, we propose a first step towards a physics-informing approach, which explains neural networks trained on mechanical data a posteriori. This novel explainable artificial intelligence approach aims at elucidating the black box of neural networks and their high-dimensional representations. Therein, the principal component analysis decorrelates the distributed representations in cell states of RNNs and allows the comparison to known and fundamental functions. The novel approach is supported by a systematic hyperparameter search strategy that identifies the best neural network architectures and training parameters. The findings of three case studies on fundamental constitutive models (hyperelasticity, elastoplasticity, and viscoelasticity) imply that the proposed strategy can help identify numerical and analytical closed-form solutions to characterize new materials.
summary: (Artificial) neural networks have become increasingly popular in mechanics to accelerate computations with model order reduction techniques and as universal models for a wide variety of materials. However, the major disadvantage of neural networks remains: their numerous parameters are challenging to interpret and explain. Thus, neural networks are often labeled as black boxes, and their results often elude human interpretation. In mechanics, the new and active field of physics-informed neural networks attempts to mitigate this disadvantage by designing deep neural networks on the basis of mechanical knowledge. By using this a priori knowledge, deeper and more complex neural networks became feasible, since the mechanical assumptions could be explained. However, the internal reasoning and explanation of neural network parameters remain mysterious. Complementary to the physics-informed approach, we propose a first step towards a physics-informing approach, which explains neural networks trained on mechanical data a posteriori. This novel explainable artificial intelligence approach aims at elucidating the black box of neural networks and their high-dimensional representations. Therein, the principal component analysis decorrelates the distributed representations in cell states of RNNs and allows the comparison to known and fundamental functions. The novel approach is supported by a systematic hyperparameter search strategy that identifies the best neural network architectures and training parameters. The findings of three case studies on fundamental constitutive models (hyperelasticity, elastoplasticity, and viscoelasticity) imply that the proposed strategy can help identify numerical and analytical closed-form solutions to characterize new materials.
abstract_zh: （人工）神经网络在力学领域变得越来越流行，通过模型降阶技术加速计算，并作为各种材料的通用模型。然而，神经网络的主要缺点仍然存在：其众多参数难以解释和解释。因此，神经网络通常被标记为黑匣子，其结果往往无法被人类解释。在力学中，新的、活跃的物理信息神经网络领域试图通过基于机械知识设计深度神经网络来减轻这一缺点。通过使用这些先验知识，更深、更复杂的神经网络变得可行，因为机械假设可以得到解释。然而，神经网络参数的内部推理和解释仍然是神秘的。作为物理信息方法的补充，我们提出了迈向物理信息方法的第一步，该方法解释了后验机械数据训练的神经网络。这种新颖的可解释人工智能方法旨在阐明神经网络的黑匣子及其高维表示。其中，主成分分析解相关了 RNN 单元状态中的分布式表示，并允许与已知的基本函数进行比较。这种新颖的方法得到了系统性超参数搜索策略的支持，该策略可以识别最佳的神经网络架构和训练参数。关于基本本构模型（超弹性、弹塑性和粘弹性）的三个案例研究的结果表明，所提出的策略可以帮助确定数值和分析封闭式解决方案来表征新材料。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合物理知识和主成分分析的可解释AI方法，用于解释力学领域神经网络的黑箱问题，提升本构模型的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络在力学应用中存在参数不可解释的‘黑箱’问题，物理信息神经网络虽结合机械知识但内部逻辑仍难解释，需发展事后解释方法以提升模型可信度和应用价值。
AI.method: 采用主成分分析（PCA）解耦RNN隐藏状态的高维表示，并与已知基本力学函数对比；结合系统化超参数搜索策略优化网络架构与训练参数。
AI.result: 三个典型本构模型案例验证表明，该方法可有效识别材料的数值解与解析表达式，辅助新材料的表征与建模。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提出的物理事后解释方法有效揭示了神经网络在力学中的内部逻辑，为构建可解释的AI模型提供了新思路，有助于推动智能计算与物理规律融合。

authors_text: Bingyang Wen,Luis Oliveros Colon,K. P. Subbalakshmi,R. Chandramouli
title: Causal-TGAN: Generating Tabular Data Using Causal Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: Causal-TGAN：使用因果生成对抗网络生成表格数据
abstract: Synthetic data generation becomes prevalent as a solution to privacy leakage and data shortage. Generative models are designed to generate a realistic synthetic dataset, which can precisely express the data distribution for the real dataset. The generative adversarial networks (GAN), which gain great success in the computer vision fields, are doubtlessly used for synthetic data generation. Though there are prior works that have demonstrated great progress, most of them learn the correlations in the data distributions rather than the true processes in which the datasets are naturally generated. Correlation is not reliable for it is a statistical technique that only tells linear dependencies and is easily affected by the dataset's bias. Causality, which encodes all underlying factors of how the real data be naturally generated, is more reliable than correlation. In this work, we propose a causal model named Causal Tabular Generative Neural Network (Causal-TGAN) to generate synthetic tabular data using the tabular data's causal information. Extensive experiments on both simulated datasets and real datasets demonstrate the better performance of our method when given the true causal graph and a comparable performance when using the estimated causal graph.
summary: Synthetic data generation becomes prevalent as a solution to privacy leakage and data shortage. Generative models are designed to generate a realistic synthetic dataset, which can precisely express the data distribution for the real dataset. The generative adversarial networks (GAN), which gain great success in the computer vision fields, are doubtlessly used for synthetic data generation. Though there are prior works that have demonstrated great progress, most of them learn the correlations in the data distributions rather than the true processes in which the datasets are naturally generated. Correlation is not reliable for it is a statistical technique that only tells linear dependencies and is easily affected by the dataset's bias. Causality, which encodes all underlying factors of how the real data be naturally generated, is more reliable than correlation. In this work, we propose a causal model named Causal Tabular Generative Neural Network (Causal-TGAN) to generate synthetic tabular data using the tabular data's causal information. Extensive experiments on both simulated datasets and real datasets demonstrate the better performance of our method when given the true causal graph and a comparable performance when using the estimated causal graph.
abstract_zh: 合成数据生成作为隐私泄露和数据短缺的解决方案变得流行。生成模型旨在生成真实的合成数据集，它可以精确地表达真实数据集的数据分布。在计算机视觉领域取得巨大成功的生成对抗网络（GAN）无疑被用于合成数据生成。尽管之前的工作已经取得了很大的进展，但大多数都是学习数据分布中的相关性，而不是自然生成数据集的真实过程。相关性并不可靠，因为它是一种统计技术，只能说明线性依赖性，并且很容易受到数据集偏差的影响。因果关系编码了真实数据如何自然生成的所有潜在因素，比相关性更可靠。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为因果表格生成神经网络（Causal-TGAN）的因果模型，以使用表格数据的因果信息生成合成表格数据。对模拟数据集和真实数据集的大量实验证明，在给定真实因果图时，我们的方法具有更好的性能，而在使用估计的因果图时，我们的方法具有可比较的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Causal-TGAN模型，通过引入因果信息生成更可靠的合成表格数据。
AI.motivation: 传统合成数据方法依赖统计相关性，但相关性易受数据偏差影响且无法反映真实生成过程，而因果关系能更准确描述数据生成机制。
AI.method: 结合生成对抗网络（GAN）与因果图模型，利用真实或估计的因果图指导数据生成过程。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实数据集上验证了Causal-TGAN的有效性，尤其在真实因果图条件下优于现有方法，估计因果图下表现相当。
AI.conclusion: 基于因果模型的合成数据生成方法能更可靠地还原数据分布，未来需进一步优化因果图估计技术以提升适用性。

search_text: Causal-TGAN: Generating Tabular Data Using Causal Generative Adversarial Networks Causal-TGAN：使用因果生成对抗网络生成表格数据 Synthetic data generation becomes prevalent as a solution to privacy leakage and data shortage. Generative models are designed to generate a realistic synthetic dataset, which can precisely express the data distribution for the real dataset. The generative adversarial networks (GAN), which gain great success in the computer vision fields, are doubtlessly used for synthetic data generation. Though there are prior works that have demonstrated great progress, most of them learn the correlations in the data distributions rather than the true processes in which the datasets are naturally generated. Correlation is not reliable for it is a statistical technique that only tells linear dependencies and is easily affected by the dataset's bias. Causality, which encodes all underlying factors of how the real data be naturally generated, is more reliable than correlation. In this work, we propose a causal model named Causal Tabular Generative Neural Network (Causal-TGAN) to generate synthetic tabular data using the tabular data's causal information. Extensive experiments on both simulated datasets and real datasets demonstrate the better performance of our method when given the true causal graph and a comparable performance when using the estimated causal graph. 合成数据生成作为隐私泄露和数据短缺的解决方案变得流行。生成模型旨在生成真实的合成数据集，它可以精确地表达真实数据集的数据分布。在计算机视觉领域取得巨大成功的生成对抗网络（GAN）无疑被用于合成数据生成。尽管之前的工作已经取得了很大的进展，但大多数都是学习数据分布中的相关性，而不是自然生成数据集的真实过程。相关性并不可靠，因为它是一种统计技术，只能说明线性依赖性，并且很容易受到数据集偏差的影响。因果关系编码了真实数据如何自然生成的所有潜在因素，比相关性更可靠。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为因果表格生成神经网络（Causal-TGAN）的因果模型，以使用表格数据的因果信息生成合成表格数据。对模拟数据集和真实数据集的大量实验证明，在给定真实因果图时，我们的方法具有更好的性能，而在使用估计的因果图时，我们的方法具有可比较的性能。 本文提出Causal-TGAN模型，通过引入因果信息生成更可靠的合成表格数据。 Bingyang Wen,Luis Oliveros Colon,K. P. Subbalakshmi,R. Chandramouli cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Muhammad Zubair Irshad,Chih-Yao Ma,Zsolt Kira
title: Hierarchical Cross-Modal Agent for Robotics Vision-and-Language Navigation
title_zh: 用于机器人视觉和语言导航的分层跨模式代理
comment: Accepted to ICRA 2021; Code and Dataset are available at https://github.com/GT-RIPL/robo-vln
comments: Accepted to ICRA 2021; Code and Dataset are available at https://github.com/GT-RIPL/robo-vln
abstract: Deep Learning has revolutionized our ability to solve complex problems such as Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN). This task requires the agent to navigate to a goal purely based on visual sensory inputs given natural language instructions. However, prior works formulate the problem as a navigation graph with a discrete action space. In this work, we lift the agent off the navigation graph and propose a more complex VLN setting in continuous 3D reconstructed environments. Our proposed setting, Robo-VLN, more closely mimics the challenges of real world navigation. Robo-VLN tasks have longer trajectory lengths, continuous action spaces, and challenges such as obstacles. We provide a suite of baselines inspired by state-of-the-art works in discrete VLN and show that they are less effective at this task. We further propose that decomposing the task into specialized high- and low-level policies can more effectively tackle this task. With extensive experiments, we show that by using layered decision making, modularized training, and decoupling reasoning and imitation, our proposed Hierarchical Cross-Modal (HCM) agent outperforms existing baselines in all key metrics and sets a new benchmark for Robo-VLN.
summary: Deep Learning has revolutionized our ability to solve complex problems such as Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN). This task requires the agent to navigate to a goal purely based on visual sensory inputs given natural language instructions. However, prior works formulate the problem as a navigation graph with a discrete action space. In this work, we lift the agent off the navigation graph and propose a more complex VLN setting in continuous 3D reconstructed environments. Our proposed setting, Robo-VLN, more closely mimics the challenges of real world navigation. Robo-VLN tasks have longer trajectory lengths, continuous action spaces, and challenges such as obstacles. We provide a suite of baselines inspired by state-of-the-art works in discrete VLN and show that they are less effective at this task. We further propose that decomposing the task into specialized high- and low-level policies can more effectively tackle this task. With extensive experiments, we show that by using layered decision making, modularized training, and decoupling reasoning and imitation, our proposed Hierarchical Cross-Modal (HCM) agent outperforms existing baselines in all key metrics and sets a new benchmark for Robo-VLN.
abstract_zh: 深度学习彻底改变了我们解决视觉和语言导航（VLN）等复杂问题的能力。此任务要求代理纯粹基于给定自然语言指令的视觉感官输入导航到目标。然而，先前的工作将问题表述为具有离散动作空间的导航图。在这项工作中，我们将代理从导航图上解放出来，并在连续 3D 重建环境中提出了更复杂的 VLN 设置。我们提出的设置 Robo-VLN 更接近地模拟现实世界导航的挑战。 Robo-VLN 任务具有较长的轨迹长度、连续的动作空间以及障碍物等挑战。我们提供了一套受离散 VLN 最先进作品启发的基线，并表明它们在这项任务上效率较低。我们进一步建议，将任务分解为专门的高层和低层政策可以更有效地解决这一任务。通过大量的实验，我们表明，通过使用分层决策、模块化训练以及解耦推理和模仿，我们提出的分层跨模态（HCM）代理在所有关键指标上都优于现有基线，并为 Robo-VLN 设定了新的基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向机器人视觉与语言导航（VLN）的分层跨模态智能体（HCM），在连续3D重建环境中解决更接近现实世界的导航挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统VLN研究基于离散动作空间的导航图，难以模拟真实环境中的连续空间、障碍物和长轨迹问题，需更复杂的任务设置与方法。
AI.method: 提出Robo-VLN连续环境，将任务分解为高层策略（路径规划）与低层策略（动作执行），结合跨模态融合、模块化训练与推理-模仿解耦的分层决策框架。
AI.result: HCM智能体在所有关键指标上超越现有基线，建立了新的Robo-VLN基准，验证了分层架构与跨模态方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 分层跨模态框架能有效应对复杂VLN任务，未来需进一步探索更真实的环境建模与多模态交互机制。

authors_text: Yunqi Li,Hanxiong Chen,Zuohui Fu,Yingqiang Ge,Yongfeng Zhang
title: User-oriented Fairness in Recommendation
title_zh: 面向用户的推荐公平性
abstract: As a highly data-driven application, recommender systems could be affected by data bias, resulting in unfair results for different data groups, which could be a reason that affects the system performance. Therefore, it is important to identify and solve the unfairness issues in recommendation scenarios. In this paper, we address the unfairness problem in recommender systems from the user perspective. We group users into advantaged and disadvantaged groups according to their level of activity, and conduct experiments to show that current recommender systems will behave unfairly between two groups of users. Specifically, the advantaged users (active) who only account for a small proportion in data enjoy much higher recommendation quality than those disadvantaged users (inactive). Such bias can also affect the overall performance since the disadvantaged users are the majority. To solve this problem, we provide a re-ranking approach to mitigate this unfairness problem by adding constraints over evaluation metrics. The experiments we conducted on several real-world datasets with various recommendation algorithms show that our approach can not only improve group fairness of users in recommender systems, but also achieve better overall recommendation performance.
summary: As a highly data-driven application, recommender systems could be affected by data bias, resulting in unfair results for different data groups, which could be a reason that affects the system performance. Therefore, it is important to identify and solve the unfairness issues in recommendation scenarios. In this paper, we address the unfairness problem in recommender systems from the user perspective. We group users into advantaged and disadvantaged groups according to their level of activity, and conduct experiments to show that current recommender systems will behave unfairly between two groups of users. Specifically, the advantaged users (active) who only account for a small proportion in data enjoy much higher recommendation quality than those disadvantaged users (inactive). Such bias can also affect the overall performance since the disadvantaged users are the majority. To solve this problem, we provide a re-ranking approach to mitigate this unfairness problem by adding constraints over evaluation metrics. The experiments we conducted on several real-world datasets with various recommendation algorithms show that our approach can not only improve group fairness of users in recommender systems, but also achieve better overall recommendation performance.
abstract_zh: 作为一个高度数据驱动的应用程序，推荐系统可能会受到数据偏差的影响，导致不同数据组的结果不公平，这可能是影响系统性能的一个原因。因此，识别并解决推荐场景中的不公平问题非常重要。在本文中，我们从用户的角度解决推荐系统中的不公平问题。我们根据用户的活跃程度将用户分为优势组和劣势组，并进行实验来证明当前的推荐系统在两组用户之间会表现得不公平。具体来说，在数据中所占比例较小的优势用户（活跃）比劣势用户（非活跃）享有更高的推荐质量。这种偏差也会影响整体性能，因为弱势用户占大多数。为了解决这个问题，我们提供了一种重新排名的方法，通过添加对评估指标的约束来缓解这种不公平问题。我们在几个真实数据集上使用各种推荐算法进行的实验表明，我们的方法不仅可以提高推荐系统中用户的群体公平性，而且可以实现更好的整体推荐性能。

AI.tldr: 解决推荐系统中用户群体间的不公平问题，提升整体推荐性能
AI.motivation: 数据偏差导致推荐系统对活跃与不活跃用户存在不公平，影响整体性能，需改进公平性
AI.method: 提出基于重排序的方法，通过在评估指标中添加约束以减少用户群体间的不公平
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法有效提升用户群体公平性，同时提高整体推荐效果
AI.conclusion: 提出的用户导向公平性方法有效缓解推荐系统中的不公平问题，且在多个数据集上验证了其有效性

conclusion: 提出的用户导向公平性方法有效缓解推荐系统中的不公平问题，且在多个数据集上验证了其有效性
search_text: User-oriented Fairness in Recommendation 面向用户的推荐公平性 As a highly data-driven application, recommender systems could be affected by data bias, resulting in unfair results for different data groups, which could be a reason that affects the system performance. Therefore, it is important to identify and solve the unfairness issues in recommendation scenarios. In this paper, we address the unfairness problem in recommender systems from the user perspective. We group users into advantaged and disadvantaged groups according to their level of activity, and conduct experiments to show that current recommender systems will behave unfairly between two groups of users. Specifically, the advantaged users (active) who only account for a small proportion in data enjoy much higher recommendation quality than those disadvantaged users (inactive). Such bias can also affect the overall performance since the disadvantaged users are the majority. To solve this problem, we provide a re-ranking approach to mitigate this unfairness problem by adding constraints over evaluation metrics. The experiments we conducted on several real-world datasets with various recommendation algorithms show that our approach can not only improve group fairness of users in recommender systems, but also achieve better overall recommendation performance. 作为一个高度数据驱动的应用程序，推荐系统可能会受到数据偏差的影响，导致不同数据组的结果不公平，这可能是影响系统性能的一个原因。因此，识别并解决推荐场景中的不公平问题非常重要。在本文中，我们从用户的角度解决推荐系统中的不公平问题。我们根据用户的活跃程度将用户分为优势组和劣势组，并进行实验来证明当前的推荐系统在两组用户之间会表现得不公平。具体来说，在数据中所占比例较小的优势用户（活跃）比劣势用户（非活跃）享有更高的推荐质量。这种偏差也会影响整体性能，因为弱势用户占大多数。为了解决这个问题，我们提供了一种重新排名的方法，通过添加对评估指标的约束来缓解这种不公平问题。我们在几个真实数据集上使用各种推荐算法进行的实验表明，我们的方法不仅可以提高推荐系统中用户的群体公平性，而且可以实现更好的整体推荐性能。 解决推荐系统中用户群体间的不公平问题，提升整体推荐性能 Yunqi Li,Hanxiong Chen,Zuohui Fu,Yingqiang Ge,Yongfeng Zhang cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.LG,cs.SI

authors_text: Eugene Kogan
title: On the rank of Z_2-matrices with free entries on the diagonal
title_zh: 对角线上有自由项的 Z_2 矩阵的秩
abstract: For an $n \times n$ matrix $M$ with entries in $\mathbb{Z}_2$ denote by $R(M)$ the minimal rank of all the matrices obtained by changing some numbers on the main diagonal of $M$. We prove that for each non-negative integer $k$ there is a polynomial in $n$ algorithm deciding whether $R(M) \leq k$ (whose complexity may depend on $k$). We also give a polynomial in $n$ algorithm computing a number $m$ such that $m/2 \leq R(M) \leq m$. These results have applications to graph drawings on non-orientable surfaces.
summary: For an $n \times n$ matrix $M$ with entries in $\mathbb{Z}_2$ denote by $R(M)$ the minimal rank of all the matrices obtained by changing some numbers on the main diagonal of $M$. We prove that for each non-negative integer $k$ there is a polynomial in $n$ algorithm deciding whether $R(M) \leq k$ (whose complexity may depend on $k$). We also give a polynomial in $n$ algorithm computing a number $m$ such that $m/2 \leq R(M) \leq m$. These results have applications to graph drawings on non-orientable surfaces.
abstract_zh: 对于 $n \times n$ 矩阵 $M$，其条目位于 $\mathbb{Z}_2$ 中，$R(M)$ 表示通过更改 $M$ 主对角线上的一些数字而获得的所有矩阵的最小秩。我们证明，对于每个非负整数 $k$，$n$ 算法中存在一个多项式来决定是否 $R(M) \leq k$（其复杂度可能取决于 $k$）。我们还在 $n$ 算法中给出一个多项式，计算数字 $m$，使得 $m/2 \leq R(M) \leq m$。这些结果可应用于不可定向表面上的图形绘制。

AI.tldr: 研究在二元域上，通过修改矩阵主对角线元素使其秩最小化的算法问题。
AI.motivation: 确定矩阵秩的下界有助于解决非可定向曲面图嵌入等组合数学问题。
AI.method: 设计多项式时间算法，通过线性代数方法分析矩阵结构并计算秩的近似值。
AI.result: 证明存在多项式算法判断秩是否≤k，并能计算秩的2倍范围内的近似值。
AI.conclusion: 该成果为非可定向曲面图绘制等应用提供了计算理论支持。
