authors_text: Fabio Cuzzolin
title: A geometric approach to conditioning belief functions
title_zh: 调节置信函数的几何方法
abstract: Conditioning is crucial in applied science when inference involving time series is involved. Belief calculus is an effective way of handling such inference in the presence of epistemic uncertainty -- unfortunately, different approaches to conditioning in the belief function framework have been proposed in the past, leaving the matter somewhat unsettled. Inspired by the geometric approach to uncertainty, in this paper we propose an approach to the conditioning of belief functions based on geometrically projecting them onto the simplex associated with the conditioning event in the space of all belief functions. We show here that such a geometric approach to conditioning often produces simple results with straightforward interpretations in terms of degrees of belief. This raises the question of whether classical approaches, such as for instance Dempster's conditioning, can also be reduced to some form of distance minimisation in a suitable space. The study of families of combination rules generated by (geometric) conditioning rules appears to be the natural prosecution of the presented research.
summary: Conditioning is crucial in applied science when inference involving time series is involved. Belief calculus is an effective way of handling such inference in the presence of epistemic uncertainty -- unfortunately, different approaches to conditioning in the belief function framework have been proposed in the past, leaving the matter somewhat unsettled. Inspired by the geometric approach to uncertainty, in this paper we propose an approach to the conditioning of belief functions based on geometrically projecting them onto the simplex associated with the conditioning event in the space of all belief functions. We show here that such a geometric approach to conditioning often produces simple results with straightforward interpretations in terms of degrees of belief. This raises the question of whether classical approaches, such as for instance Dempster's conditioning, can also be reduced to some form of distance minimisation in a suitable space. The study of families of combination rules generated by (geometric) conditioning rules appears to be the natural prosecution of the presented research.
abstract_zh: 当涉及时间序列的推理时，条件作用在应用科学中至关重要。信念演算是在存在认知不确定性的情况下处理此类推理的有效方法——不幸的是，过去已经提出了信念函数框架中不同的调节方法，这使得问题有些不稳定。受不确定性几何方法的启发，在本文中，我们提出了一种信念函数调节方法，该方法基于将信念函数几何投影到与所有信念函数空间中的调节事件相关的单纯形上。我们在这里表明，这种调节的几何方法通常会产生简单的结果，并根据信念程度进行简单的解释。这就提出了一个问题：经典方法（例如登普斯特条件反射）是否也可以在合适的空间中简化为某种形式的距离最小化。对（几何）条件规则生成的组合规则族的研究似乎是本研究的自然执行。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于几何投影的信念函数条件方法，解决现有条件方法不统一的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有信念函数条件方法存在分歧，需更有效处理时间序列推断中的认知不确定性。
AI.method: 在信念函数空间中，将条件事件关联的单纯形进行几何投影以实现条件化。
AI.result: 该方法生成简单可解释的信念度结果，并引发对经典方法是否可转化为距离最小化的思考。
AI.conclusion: 几何条件方法有效，后续应研究其生成的组合规则家族。

authors_text: Ruiqing Yan,Lanchang Sun,Fang Wang,Xiaoming Zhang
title: K-XLNet: A General Method for Combining Explicit Knowledge with Language Model Pretraining
title_zh: K-XLNet：显性知识与语言模型预训练相结合的通用方法
abstract: Though pre-trained language models such as Bert and XLNet, have rapidly advanced the state-of-the-art on many NLP tasks, they implicit semantics only relying on surface information between words in corpus. Intuitively, background knowledge influences the efficacy of understanding. Inspired by this common sense, we focus on improving model pretraining by leveraging explicit knowledge. Different from recent research that optimize pretraining model by knowledge masking strategies, we propose a simple but general method to combine explicit knowledge with pretraining. To be specific, we first match knowledge facts from knowledge graph (KG) and then add a knowledge injunction layer to transformer directly without changing its architecture. The present study seeks to find the direct impact of explicit knowledge on transformer per-training. We conduct experiments on various datasets for different downstream tasks. The experimental results show that solely by adding external knowledge to transformer can improve the learning performance on many NLP tasks.
summary: Though pre-trained language models such as Bert and XLNet, have rapidly advanced the state-of-the-art on many NLP tasks, they implicit semantics only relying on surface information between words in corpus. Intuitively, background knowledge influences the efficacy of understanding. Inspired by this common sense, we focus on improving model pretraining by leveraging explicit knowledge. Different from recent research that optimize pretraining model by knowledge masking strategies, we propose a simple but general method to combine explicit knowledge with pretraining. To be specific, we first match knowledge facts from knowledge graph (KG) and then add a knowledge injunction layer to transformer directly without changing its architecture. The present study seeks to find the direct impact of explicit knowledge on transformer per-training. We conduct experiments on various datasets for different downstream tasks. The experimental results show that solely by adding external knowledge to transformer can improve the learning performance on many NLP tasks.
abstract_zh: 尽管 Bert 和 XLNet 等预训练语言模型在许多 NLP 任务上迅速提升了最先进的水平，但它们的隐含语义仅依赖于语料库中单词之间的表面信息。直观上，背景知识影响理解的效果。受这一常识的启发，我们专注于通过利用显性知识来改进模型预训练。与最近通过知识屏蔽策略优化预训练模型的研究不同，我们提出了一种简单但通用的方法将显性知识与预训练相结合。具体来说，我们首先匹配知识图谱（KG）中的知识事实，然后直接向 Transformer 添加知识指令层，而不改变其架构。本研究旨在找出显性知识对变压器每次训练的直接影响。我们对不同下游任务的各种数据集进行实验。实验结果表明，仅通过向 Transformer 添加外部知识就可以提高许多 NLP 任务的学习性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为K-XLNet的方法，通过将显式知识与语言模型预训练结合，提升自然语言处理任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的预训练语言模型（如BERT和XLNet）仅依赖语料中的表面信息，未充分利用背景知识，而显式知识对理解任务有重要影响。
AI.method: 从知识图谱中匹配事实知识，并直接在Transformer架构中添加知识约束层，无需修改原有结构。
AI.result: 在多个下游任务的数据集上实验表明，仅通过引入外部知识即可提升模型的学习性能。
AI.conclusion: 显式知识的直接整合能有效增强Transformer预训练模型的效果，为知识与语言模型的结合提供了通用方法。

To be specific, we first match knowledge facts from knowledge graph (KG) and then add a knowledge injunction layer to transformer directly without changing its architecture. The present study seeks to find the direct impact of explicit knowledge on transformer per-training. We conduct experiments on various datasets for different downstream tasks. The experimental results show that solely by adding external knowledge to transformer can improve the learning performance on many NLP tasks. 尽管 Bert 和 XLNet 等预训练语言模型在许多 NLP 任务上迅速提升了最先进的水平，但它们的隐含语义仅依赖于语料库中单词之间的表面信息。直观上，背景知识影响理解的效果。受这一常识的启发，我们专注于通过利用显性知识来改进模型预训练。与最近通过知识屏蔽策略优化预训练模型的研究不同，我们提出了一种简单但通用的方法将显性知识与预训练相结合。具体来说，我们首先匹配知识图谱（KG）中的知识事实，然后直接向 Transformer 添加知识指令层，而不改变其架构。本研究旨在找出显性知识对变压器每次训练的直接影响。我们对不同下游任务的各种数据集进行实验。实验结果表明，仅通过向 Transformer 添加外部知识就可以提高许多 NLP 任务的学习性能。 本文提出了一种名为K-XLNet的方法，通过将显式知识与语言模型预训练结合，提升自然语言处理任务的性能。 Ruiqing Yan,Lanchang Sun,Fang Wang,Xiaoming Zhang cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Gang Xu,Jun Xu,Zhen Li,Liang Wang,Xing Sun,Ming-Ming Cheng
title: Temporal Modulation Network for Controllable Space-Time Video Super-Resolution
title_zh: 用于可控时空视频超分辨率的时间调制网络
comment: This paper is accepted at IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2021
comments: This paper is accepted at IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2021
abstract: Space-time video super-resolution (STVSR) aims to increase the spatial and temporal resolutions of low-resolution and low-frame-rate videos. Recently, deformable convolution based methods have achieved promising STVSR performance, but they could only infer the intermediate frame pre-defined in the training stage. Besides, these methods undervalued the short-term motion cues among adjacent frames. In this paper, we propose a Temporal Modulation Network (TMNet) to interpolate arbitrary intermediate frame(s) with accurate high-resolution reconstruction. Specifically, we propose a Temporal Modulation Block (TMB) to modulate deformable convolution kernels for controllable feature interpolation. To well exploit the temporal information, we propose a Locally-temporal Feature Comparison (LFC) module, along with the Bi-directional Deformable ConvLSTM, to extract short-term and long-term motion cues in videos. Experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that our TMNet outperforms previous STVSR methods. The code is available at https://github.com/CS-GangXu/TMNet.
summary: Space-time video super-resolution (STVSR) aims to increase the spatial and temporal resolutions of low-resolution and low-frame-rate videos. Recently, deformable convolution based methods have achieved promising STVSR performance, but they could only infer the intermediate frame pre-defined in the training stage. Besides, these methods undervalued the short-term motion cues among adjacent frames. In this paper, we propose a Temporal Modulation Network (TMNet) to interpolate arbitrary intermediate frame(s) with accurate high-resolution reconstruction. Specifically, we propose a Temporal Modulation Block (TMB) to modulate deformable convolution kernels for controllable feature interpolation. To well exploit the temporal information, we propose a Locally-temporal Feature Comparison (LFC) module, along with the Bi-directional Deformable ConvLSTM, to extract short-term and long-term motion cues in videos. Experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that our TMNet outperforms previous STVSR methods. The code is available at https://github.com/CS-GangXu/TMNet.
abstract_zh: 时空视频超分辨率（STVSR）旨在提高低分辨率和低帧率视频的空间和时间分辨率。最近，基于可变形卷积的方法已经取得了令人鼓舞的 STVSR 性能，但它们只能推断在训练阶段预先定义的中间帧。此外，这些方法低估了相邻帧之间的短期运动线索。在本文中，我们提出了一种时间调制网络（TMNet）来插值任意中间帧并进行精确的高分辨率重建。具体来说，我们提出了一个时间调制块（TMB）来调制可变形卷积核以实现可控特征插值。为了充分利用时间信息，我们提出了局部时间特征比较（LFC）模块以及双向可变形ConvLSTM，以提取视频中的短期和长期运动线索。对三个基准数据集的实验表明，我们的 TMNet 优于之前的 STVSR 方法。代码可在 https://github.com/CS-GangXu/TMNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种时序调制网络（TMNet），用于实现可控的时空视频超分辨率，能够生成任意中间帧的高分辨率重建。
AI.motivation: 现有基于可变形卷积的方法只能生成预定义中间帧且忽视短期运动线索，难以灵活控制视频分辨率提升过程。
AI.method: 设计时序调制块（TMB）调节可变形卷积核实现可控插值，并结合局部时序特征比较模块（LFC）与双向可变形ConvLSTM提取短长期运动信息。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上优于现有STVSR方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: TMNet通过模块化设计有效解决了时空视频超分辨率中帧生成灵活性与运动信息利用不足的问题。

authors_text: Christopher Bradley,Adam Pacheck,Gregory J. Stein,Sebastian Castro,Hadas Kress-Gazit,Nicholas Roy
title: Learning and Planning for Temporally Extended Tasks in Unknown Environments
title_zh: 未知环境中临时扩展任务的学习和规划
abstract: We propose a novel planning technique for satisfying tasks specified in temporal logic in partially revealed environments. We define high-level actions derived from the environment and the given task itself, and estimate how each action contributes to progress towards completing the task. As the map is revealed, we estimate the cost and probability of success of each action from images and an encoding of that action using a trained neural network. These estimates guide search for the minimum-expected-cost plan within our model. Our learned model is structured to generalize across environments and task specifications without requiring retraining. We demonstrate an improvement in total cost in both simulated and real-world experiments compared to a heuristic-driven baseline.
summary: We propose a novel planning technique for satisfying tasks specified in temporal logic in partially revealed environments. We define high-level actions derived from the environment and the given task itself, and estimate how each action contributes to progress towards completing the task. As the map is revealed, we estimate the cost and probability of success of each action from images and an encoding of that action using a trained neural network. These estimates guide search for the minimum-expected-cost plan within our model. Our learned model is structured to generalize across environments and task specifications without requiring retraining. We demonstrate an improvement in total cost in both simulated and real-world experiments compared to a heuristic-driven baseline.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的规划技术，用于在部分揭示的环境中满足时序逻辑中指定的任务。我们定义源自环境和给定任务本身的高级操作，并估计每个操作如何有助于完成任务的进展。随着地图的显示，我们从图像中估计每个动作的成本和成功概率，并使用经过训练的神经网络对该动作进行编码。这些估计指导我们在模型中寻找最低预期成本计划。我们的学习模型的结构可以跨环境和任务规范进行概括，而无需重新训练。与启发式驱动的基线相比，我们在模拟和现实实验中证明了总成本的改善。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在未知环境中学习和规划时序扩展任务的新方法，通过神经网络估计动作成本和成功率以生成最低预期成本的计划。
AI.motivation: 传统规划方法在动态或部分可观测环境中难以有效处理长期时序任务，需开发适应未知环境且无需重新训练的通用解决方案。
AI.method: 定义环境与任务衍生的高层动作，利用训练好的神经网络从图像和动作编码中估计动作成本与成功率，指导模型内最小预期成本路径搜索。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实环境中均实现比启发式基线更低的总任务成本，验证了方法的有效性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过神经网络驱动的规划框架，在无需重新训练的前提下实现了跨环境和任务的高效时序任务规划。

Stein,Sebastian Castro,Hadas Kress-Gazit,Nicholas Roy cs.RO

authors_text: Chen Huang,Shuangfei Zhai,Pengsheng Guo,Josh Susskind
title: MetricOpt: Learning to Optimize Black-Box Evaluation Metrics
title_zh: MetricOpt：学习优化黑盒评估指标
abstract: We study the problem of directly optimizing arbitrary non-differentiable task evaluation metrics such as misclassification rate and recall. Our method, named MetricOpt, operates in a black-box setting where the computational details of the target metric are unknown. We achieve this by learning a differentiable value function, which maps compact task-specific model parameters to metric observations. The learned value function is easily pluggable into existing optimizers like SGD and Adam, and is effective for rapidly finetuning a pre-trained model. This leads to consistent improvements since the value function provides effective metric supervision during finetuning, and helps to correct the potential bias of loss-only supervision. MetricOpt achieves state-of-the-art performance on a variety of metrics for (image) classification, image retrieval and object detection. Solid benefits are found over competing methods, which often involve complex loss design or adaptation. MetricOpt also generalizes well to new tasks and model architectures.
summary: We study the problem of directly optimizing arbitrary non-differentiable task evaluation metrics such as misclassification rate and recall. Our method, named MetricOpt, operates in a black-box setting where the computational details of the target metric are unknown. We achieve this by learning a differentiable value function, which maps compact task-specific model parameters to metric observations. The learned value function is easily pluggable into existing optimizers like SGD and Adam, and is effective for rapidly finetuning a pre-trained model. This leads to consistent improvements since the value function provides effective metric supervision during finetuning, and helps to correct the potential bias of loss-only supervision. MetricOpt achieves state-of-the-art performance on a variety of metrics for (image) classification, image retrieval and object detection. Solid benefits are found over competing methods, which often involve complex loss design or adaptation. MetricOpt also generalizes well to new tasks and model architectures.
abstract_zh: 我们研究直接优化任意不可微任务评估指标（例如误分类率和召回率）的问题。我们的方法名为 MetricOpt，在黑盒设置中运行，其中目标指标的计算细节未知。我们通过学习可微值函数来实现这一点，该函数将紧凑的特定于任务的模型参数映射到度量观察。学习到的价值函数可以轻松插入 SGD 和 Adam 等现有优化器中，并且对于快速微调预训练模型非常有效。这会带来持续的改进，因为价值函数在微调期间提供了有效的度量监督，并有助于纠正仅损失监督的潜在偏差。 MetricOpt 在（图像）分类、图像检索和对象检测的各种指标上实现了最先进的性能。与竞争方法相比，我们发现了明显的好处，这些方法通常涉及复杂的损失设计或适应。 MetricOpt 还可以很好地推广到新任务和模型架构。

AI.tldr: 直接优化非微分任务评估指标
AI.motivation: 解决现有方法在优化非微分指标时需复杂损失设计或调整的问题，并纠正仅依赖损失监督的潜在偏差
AI.method: 通过学习可微价值函数将模型参数映射到指标观察值，结合优化器进行微调
AI.result: 在图像分类、检索和检测等任务中达到SOTA，优于复杂损失设计的方法
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效且通用，适用于多种任务和模型

motivation: 解决现有方法在优化非微分指标时需复杂损失设计或调整的问题，并纠正仅依赖损失监督的潜在偏差
method: 通过学习可微价值函数将模型参数映射到指标观察值，结合优化器进行微调
result: 在图像分类、检索和检测等任务中达到SOTA，优于复杂损失设计的方法

search_text: MetricOpt: Learning to Optimize Black-Box Evaluation Metrics MetricOpt：学习优化黑盒评估指标 We study the problem of directly optimizing arbitrary non-differentiable task evaluation metrics such as misclassification rate and recall. Our method, named MetricOpt, operates in a black-box setting where the computational details of the target metric are unknown. We achieve this by learning a differentiable value function, which maps compact task-specific model parameters to metric observations. The learned value function is easily pluggable into existing optimizers like SGD and Adam, and is effective for rapidly finetuning a pre-trained model. This leads to consistent improvements since the value function provides effective metric supervision during finetuning, and helps to correct the potential bias of loss-only supervision. MetricOpt achieves state-of-the-art performance on a variety of metrics for (image) classification, image retrieval and object detection. Solid benefits are found over competing methods, which often involve complex loss design or adaptation. MetricOpt also generalizes well to new tasks and model architectures. 我们研究直接优化任意不可微任务评估指标（例如误分类率和召回率）的问题。我们的方法名为 MetricOpt，在黑盒设置中运行，其中目标指标的计算细节未知。我们通过学习可微值函数来实现这一点，该函数将紧凑的特定于任务的模型参数映射到度量观察。学习到的价值函数可以轻松插入 SGD 和 Adam 等现有优化器中，并且对于快速微调预训练模型非常有效。这会带来持续的改进，因为价值函数在微调期间提供了有效的度量监督，并有助于纠正仅损失监督的潜在偏差。 MetricOpt 在（图像）分类、图像检索和对象检测的各种指标上实现了最先进的性能。与竞争方法相比，我们发现了明显的好处，这些方法通常涉及复杂的损失设计或适应。 MetricOpt 还可以很好地推广到新任务和模型架构。 直接优化非微分任务评估指标 Chen Huang,Shuangfei Zhai,Pengsheng Guo,Josh Susskind cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Chenlei Lv,Weisi Lin,Baoquan Zhao
title: Voxel Structure-based Mesh Reconstruction from a 3D Point Cloud
title_zh: 从 3D 点云进行基于体素结构的网格重建
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia
abstract: Mesh reconstruction from a 3D point cloud is an important topic in the fields of computer graphic, computer vision, and multimedia analysis. In this paper, we propose a voxel structure-based mesh reconstruction framework. It provides the intrinsic metric to improve the accuracy of local region detection. Based on the detected local regions, an initial reconstructed mesh can be obtained. With the mesh optimization in our framework, the initial reconstructed mesh is optimized into an isotropic one with the important geometric features such as external and internal edges. The experimental results indicate that our framework shows great advantages over peer ones in terms of mesh quality, geometric feature keeping, and processing speed.
summary: Mesh reconstruction from a 3D point cloud is an important topic in the fields of computer graphic, computer vision, and multimedia analysis. In this paper, we propose a voxel structure-based mesh reconstruction framework. It provides the intrinsic metric to improve the accuracy of local region detection. Based on the detected local regions, an initial reconstructed mesh can be obtained. With the mesh optimization in our framework, the initial reconstructed mesh is optimized into an isotropic one with the important geometric features such as external and internal edges. The experimental results indicate that our framework shows great advantages over peer ones in terms of mesh quality, geometric feature keeping, and processing speed.
abstract_zh: 3D 点云网格重建是计算机图形学、计算机视觉和多媒体分析领域的一个重要课题。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于体素结构的网格重建框架。它提供了内在的度量来提高局部区域检测的准确性。基于检测到的局部区域，可以获得初始重建网格。通过我们框架中的网格优化，初始重建网格被优化为具有重要几何特征（例如外部和内部边缘）的各向同性网格。实验结果表明，我们的框架在网格质量、几何特征保持和处理速度方面比同行表现出巨大的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于体素结构的3D点云网格重建框架，通过局部区域检测和网格优化提升重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有网格重建方法在局部区域检测精度和几何特征保持方面存在不足，需改进重建质量与效率。
AI.method: 基于体素结构设计内在度量提升局部区域检测精度，通过网格优化保留几何特征并生成各向同性网格。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在网格质量、几何特征保持及处理速度上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的体素结构框架有效提升了3D点云网格重建的精度与效率，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Markus Roland Ernst,Jochen Triesch,Thomas Burwick
title: Recurrent Feedback Improves Recognition of Partially Occluded Objects
title_zh: 循环反馈提高了对部分遮挡物体的识别
comment: 6 pages, 2 figures, 28th European Symposium on Artificial Neural Networks, Computational Intelligence and Machine Learning (ESANN 2020). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1909.06175
comments: 6 pages, 2 figures, 28th European Symposium on Artificial Neural Networks, Computational Intelligence and Machine Learning (ESANN 2020). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1909.06175
abstract: Recurrent connectivity in the visual cortex is believed to aid object recognition for challenging conditions such as occlusion. Here we investigate if and how artificial neural networks also benefit from recurrence. We compare architectures composed of bottom-up, lateral and top-down connections and evaluate their performance using two novel stereoscopic occluded object datasets. We find that classification accuracy is significantly higher for recurrent models when compared to feedforward models of matched parametric complexity. Additionally we show that for challenging stimuli, the recurrent feedback is able to correctly revise the initial feedforward guess.
summary: Recurrent connectivity in the visual cortex is believed to aid object recognition for challenging conditions such as occlusion. Here we investigate if and how artificial neural networks also benefit from recurrence. We compare architectures composed of bottom-up, lateral and top-down connections and evaluate their performance using two novel stereoscopic occluded object datasets. We find that classification accuracy is significantly higher for recurrent models when compared to feedforward models of matched parametric complexity. Additionally we show that for challenging stimuli, the recurrent feedback is able to correctly revise the initial feedforward guess.
abstract_zh: 视觉皮层中的循环连接被认为有助于识别遮挡等挑战性条件下的物体。在这里，我们研究人工神经网络是否以及如何从递归中受益。我们比较由自下而上、横向和自上而下连接组成的架构，并使用两个新颖的立体遮挡对象数据集评估其性能。我们发现，与参数复杂度匹配的前馈模型相比，循环模型的分类精度明显更高。此外，我们还表明，对于具有挑战性的刺激，循环反馈能够正确修正初始前馈猜测。

AI.tldr: 研究循环反馈机制对部分遮挡物体识别性能的提升效果
AI.motivation: 受生物视觉皮层循环连接启发，探索人工神经网络中循环反馈对遮挡物体识别的潜在优势
AI.method: 设计包含不同连接方式（自下而上、横向、自上而下）的神经网络架构，使用两个新型立体遮挡物体数据集进行性能评估
AI.result: 循环模型在参数复杂度匹配的情况下分类准确率显著高于前馈模型，且能有效修正初始错误识别
AI.conclusion: 循环反馈机制能有效提升神经网络在遮挡场景下的物体识别能力，验证了生物启发机制在人工智能中的应用价值

authors_text: Diptodip Deb,Zhenfei Jiao,Ruth Sims,Alex B. Chen,Michael Broxton,Misha B. Ahrens,Kaspar Podgorski,Srinivas C. Turaga
title: FourierNets enable the design of highly non-local optical encoders for computational imaging
title_zh: FourierNets 支持设计用于计算成像的高度非局部光学编码器
abstract: Differentiable simulations of optical systems can be combined with deep learning-based reconstruction networks to enable high performance computational imaging via end-to-end (E2E) optimization of both the optical encoder and the deep decoder. This has enabled imaging applications such as 3D localization microscopy, depth estimation, and lensless photography via the optimization of local optical encoders. More challenging computational imaging applications, such as 3D snapshot microscopy which compresses 3D volumes into single 2D images, require a highly non-local optical encoder. We show that existing deep network decoders have a locality bias which prevents the optimization of such highly non-local optical encoders. We address this with a decoder based on a shallow neural network architecture using global kernel Fourier convolutional neural networks (FourierNets). We show that FourierNets surpass existing deep network based decoders at reconstructing photographs captured by the highly non-local DiffuserCam optical encoder. Further, we show that FourierNets enable E2E optimization of highly non-local optical encoders for 3D snapshot microscopy. By combining FourierNets with a large-scale multi-GPU differentiable optical simulation, we are able to optimize non-local optical encoders 170$\times$ to 7372$\times$ larger than prior state of the art, and demonstrate the potential for ROI-type specific optical encoding with a programmable microscope.
summary: Differentiable simulations of optical systems can be combined with deep learning-based reconstruction networks to enable high performance computational imaging via end-to-end (E2E) optimization of both the optical encoder and the deep decoder. This has enabled imaging applications such as 3D localization microscopy, depth estimation, and lensless photography via the optimization of local optical encoders. More challenging computational imaging applications, such as 3D snapshot microscopy which compresses 3D volumes into single 2D images, require a highly non-local optical encoder. We show that existing deep network decoders have a locality bias which prevents the optimization of such highly non-local optical encoders. We address this with a decoder based on a shallow neural network architecture using global kernel Fourier convolutional neural networks (FourierNets). We show that FourierNets surpass existing deep network based decoders at reconstructing photographs captured by the highly non-local DiffuserCam optical encoder. Further, we show that FourierNets enable E2E optimization of highly non-local optical encoders for 3D snapshot microscopy. By combining FourierNets with a large-scale multi-GPU differentiable optical simulation, we are able to optimize non-local optical encoders 170$\times$ to 7372$\times$ larger than prior state of the art, and demonstrate the potential for ROI-type specific optical encoding with a programmable microscope.
abstract_zh: 光学系统的可微分模拟可以与基于深度学习的重建网络相结合，通过光学编码器和深度解码器的端到端（E2E）优化来实现高性能计算成像。这使得通过优化本地光学编码器实现了 3D 定位显微镜、深度估计和无镜头摄影等成像应用。更具挑战性的计算成像应用，例如将 3D 体积压缩为单个 2D 图像的 3D 快照显微镜，需要高度非局部光学编码器。我们表明，现有的深度网络解码器存在局部性偏差，这阻碍了这种高度非局部光学编码器的优化。我们使用基于浅层神经网络架构的解码器来解决这个问题，该架构使用全局内核傅立叶卷积神经网络（FourierNets）。我们表明，FourierNet 在重建由高度非本地 DiffuserCam 光学编码器捕获的照片方面超越了现有的基于深度网络的解码器。此外，我们还表明 FourierNets 能够实现 3D 快照显微镜的高度非局部光学编码器的 E2E 优化。通过将 FourierNet 与大规模多 GPU 可微分光学模拟相结合，我们能够优化比现有技术大 170$\times$ 到 7372$\times$ 的非局部光学编码器，并展示使用可编程显微镜进行 ROI 类型特定光学编码的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于傅里叶神经网络（FourierNets）的解码器，用于端到端优化高度非局部光学编码器，以实现计算成像中的复杂应用，如3D快照显微镜。
AI.motivation: 现有深度解码器存在局部性偏差，难以优化高度非局部光学编码器，而此类编码器对实现3D快照显微镜等复杂成像任务至关重要。
AI.method: 设计浅层傅里叶卷积神经网络（FourierNets）作为解码器，并结合大规模多GPU可微分光学模拟，实现高度非局部光学编码器的端到端优化。
AI.result: FourierNets在重构DiffuserCam编码器捕获的图像上优于现有解码器，优化的非局部编码器规模比之前方法大170至7372倍，并演示了可编程显微镜的ROI特定光学编码潜力。
AI.conclusion: FourierNets有效克服了解码器的局部性偏差，为计算成像中的高度非局部光学编码器优化提供了可行方案，推动了3D快照显微镜等前沿应用的发展。

ai_content_json.method: 设计浅层傅里叶卷积神经网络（FourierNets）作为解码器，并结合大规模多GPU可微分光学模拟，实现高度非局部光学编码器的端到端优化。
ai_content_json.result: FourierNets在重构DiffuserCam编码器捕获的图像上优于现有解码器，优化的非局部编码器规模比之前方法大170至7372倍，并演示了可编程显微镜的ROI特定光学编码潜力。
ai_content_json.conclusion: FourierNets有效克服了解码器的局部性偏差，为计算成像中的高度非局部光学编码器优化提供了可行方案，推动了3D快照显微镜等前沿应用的发展。

search_text: FourierNets enable the design of highly non-local optical encoders for computational imaging FourierNets 支持设计用于计算成像的高度非局部光学编码器 Differentiable simulations of optical systems can be combined with deep learning-based reconstruction networks to enable high performance computational imaging via end-to-end (E2E) optimization of both the optical encoder and the deep decoder. This has enabled imaging applications such as 3D localization microscopy, depth estimation, and lensless photography via the optimization of local optical encoders. More challenging computational imaging applications, such as 3D snapshot microscopy which compresses 3D volumes into single 2D images, require a highly non-local optical encoder. We show that existing deep network decoders have a locality bias which prevents the optimization of such highly non-local optical encoders. We address this with a decoder based on a shallow neural network architecture using global kernel Fourier convolutional neural networks (FourierNets). We show that FourierNets surpass existing deep network based decoders at reconstructing photographs captured by the highly non-local DiffuserCam optical encoder. Further, we show that FourierNets enable E2E optimization of highly non-local optical encoders for 3D snapshot microscopy. By combining FourierNets with a large-scale multi-GPU differentiable optical simulation, we are able to optimize non-local optical encoders 170$\times$ to 7372$\times$ larger than prior state of the art, and demonstrate the potential for ROI-type specific optical encoding with a programmable microscope. 光学系统的可微分模拟可以与基于深度学习的重建网络相结合，通过光学编码器和深度解码器的端到端（E2E）优化来实现高性能计算成像。这使得通过优化本地光学编码器实现了 3D 定位显微镜、深度估计和无镜头摄影等成像应用。更具挑战性的计算成像应用，例如将 3D 体积压缩为单个 2D 图像的 3D 快照显微镜，需要高度非局部光学编码器。我们表明，现有的深度网络解码器存在局部性偏差，这阻碍了这种高度非局部光学编码器的优化。我们使用基于浅层神经网络架构的解码器来解决这个问题，该架构使用全局内核傅立叶卷积神经网络（FourierNets）。我们表明，FourierNet 在重建由高度非本地 DiffuserCam 光学编码器捕获的照片方面超越了现有的基于深度网络的解码器。此外，我们还表明 FourierNets 能够实现 3D 快照显微镜的高度非局部光学编码器的 E2E 优化。通过将 FourierNet 与大规模多 GPU 可微分光学模拟相结合，我们能够优化比现有技术大 170$\times$ 到 7372$\times$ 的非局部光学编码器，并展示使用可编程显微镜进行 ROI 类型特定光学编码的潜力。 本文提出基于傅里叶神经网络（FourierNets）的解码器，用于端到端优化高度非局部光学编码器，以实现计算成像中的复杂应用，如3D快照显微镜。 Diptodip Deb,Zhenfei Jiao,Ruth Sims,Alex B. Chen,Michael Broxton,Misha B. Ahrens,Kaspar Podgorski,Srinivas C. Turaga eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Gianluca Scarpellini,Pietro Morerio,Alessio Del Bue
title: Lifting Monocular Events to 3D Human Poses
title_zh: 将单眼事件提升为 3D 人体姿势
abstract: This paper presents a novel 3D human pose estimation approach using a single stream of asynchronous events as input. Most of the state-of-the-art approaches solve this task with RGB cameras, however struggling when subjects are moving fast. On the other hand, event-based 3D pose estimation benefits from the advantages of event-cameras, especially their efficiency and robustness to appearance changes. Yet, finding human poses in asynchronous events is in general more challenging than standard RGB pose estimation, since little or no events are triggered in static scenes. Here we propose the first learning-based method for 3D human pose from a single stream of events. Our method consists of two steps. First, we process the event-camera stream to predict three orthogonal heatmaps per joint; each heatmap is the projection of of the joint onto one orthogonal plane. Next, we fuse the sets of heatmaps to estimate 3D localisation of the body joints. As a further contribution, we make available a new, challenging dataset for event-based human pose estimation by simulating events from the RGB Human3.6m dataset. Experiments demonstrate that our method achieves solid accuracy, narrowing the performance gap between standard RGB and event-based vision. The code is freely available at https://iit-pavis.github.io/lifting_events_to_3d_hpe.
summary: This paper presents a novel 3D human pose estimation approach using a single stream of asynchronous events as input. Most of the state-of-the-art approaches solve this task with RGB cameras, however struggling when subjects are moving fast. On the other hand, event-based 3D pose estimation benefits from the advantages of event-cameras, especially their efficiency and robustness to appearance changes. Yet, finding human poses in asynchronous events is in general more challenging than standard RGB pose estimation, since little or no events are triggered in static scenes. Here we propose the first learning-based method for 3D human pose from a single stream of events. Our method consists of two steps. First, we process the event-camera stream to predict three orthogonal heatmaps per joint; each heatmap is the projection of of the joint onto one orthogonal plane. Next, we fuse the sets of heatmaps to estimate 3D localisation of the body joints. As a further contribution, we make available a new, challenging dataset for event-based human pose estimation by simulating events from the RGB Human3.6m dataset. Experiments demonstrate that our method achieves solid accuracy, narrowing the performance gap between standard RGB and event-based vision. The code is freely available at https://iit-pavis.github.io/lifting_events_to_3d_hpe.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的 3D 人体姿势估计方法，使用单个异步事件流作为输入。大多数最先进的方法都使用 RGB 相机来解决此任务，但当拍摄对象快速移动时，就会遇到困难。另一方面，基于事件的 3D 姿态估计受益于事件相机的优势，特别是它们的效率和对外观变化的鲁棒性。然而，在异步事件中找到人体姿势通常比标准 RGB 姿势估计更具挑战性，因为静态场景中很少或没有事件被触发。在这里，我们提出了第一个基于学习的方法，用于从单个事件流中获取 3D 人体姿势。我们的方法包括两个步骤。首先，我们处理事件相机流以预测每个关节的三个正交热图；每个热图都是关节在一个正交平面上的投影。接下来，我们融合热图集来估计身体关节的 3D 定位。作为进一步的贡献，我们通过模拟 RGB Human3.6m 数据集的事件，为基于事件的人体姿势估计提供了一个新的、具有挑战性的数据集。实验表明，我们的方法具有可靠的准确性，缩小了标准 RGB 和基于事件的视觉之间的性能差距。该代码可在 https://iit-pavis.github.io/lifting_events_to_3d_hpe 上免费获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于单目事件相机的3D人体姿态估计方法，通过处理异步事件流实现对人体关节的3D定位。
AI.motivation: 传统RGB摄像头在快速运动场景下表现不佳，而事件相机具有高效率和鲁棒性，但现有方法难以有效处理异步事件中的姿态估计问题。
AI.method: 方法分为两步：首先从事件流生成每个关节的三个正交平面热图，再通过热图融合估计3D关节位置；同时构建了基于RGB Human3.6m数据集的事件模拟数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在准确性上接近传统RGB方法，有效缩小了事件视觉与RGB视觉的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法验证了事件相机在3D姿态估计中的可行性，为异步事件处理提供了新的学习框架，并开放了新的挑战性数据集。

authors_text: Alceu Bissoto,Eduardo Valle,Sandra Avila
title: GAN-Based Data Augmentation and Anonymization for Skin-Lesion Analysis: A Critical Review
title_zh: 基于 GAN 的皮肤病变分析数据增强和匿名化：批判性评论
comment: Accepted to the ISIC Skin Image Analysis Workshop @ CVPR 2021
comments: Accepted to the ISIC Skin Image Analysis Workshop @ CVPR 2021
abstract: Despite the growing availability of high-quality public datasets, the lack of training samples is still one of the main challenges of deep-learning for skin lesion analysis. Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) appear as an enticing alternative to alleviate the issue, by synthesizing samples indistinguishable from real images, with a plethora of works employing them for medical applications. Nevertheless, carefully designed experiments for skin-lesion diagnosis with GAN-based data augmentation show favorable results only on out-of-distribution test sets. For GAN-based data anonymization $-$ where the synthetic images replace the real ones $-$ favorable results also only appear for out-of-distribution test sets. Because of the costs and risks associated with GAN usage, those results suggest caution in their adoption for medical applications.
summary: Despite the growing availability of high-quality public datasets, the lack of training samples is still one of the main challenges of deep-learning for skin lesion analysis. Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) appear as an enticing alternative to alleviate the issue, by synthesizing samples indistinguishable from real images, with a plethora of works employing them for medical applications. Nevertheless, carefully designed experiments for skin-lesion diagnosis with GAN-based data augmentation show favorable results only on out-of-distribution test sets. For GAN-based data anonymization $-$ where the synthetic images replace the real ones $-$ favorable results also only appear for out-of-distribution test sets. Because of the costs and risks associated with GAN usage, those results suggest caution in their adoption for medical applications.
abstract_zh: 尽管高质量的公共数据集越来越多，但训练样本的缺乏仍然是皮肤病变分析深度学习的主要挑战之一。生成对抗网络（GAN）似乎是缓解这一问题的一种诱人的替代方案，它通过合成与真实图像难以区分的样本，并有大量将其用于医疗应用的作品。尽管如此，精心设计的基于 GAN 的数据增强的皮肤病变诊断实验仅在分布外测试集上显示出良好的结果。对于基于 GAN 的数据匿名化$-$，其中合成图像取代了真实图像$-$，有利的结果也仅出现在分布外的测试集上。由于与 GAN 使用相关的成本和风险，这些结果表明在医疗应用中采用 GAN 时要谨慎。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于GAN的数据增强与匿名化技术在皮肤病变分析中的应用，并评估其效果与局限性。
AI.motivation: 尽管公开数据集增多，但训练样本不足仍是皮肤病变分析的挑战，GAN被用于生成数据，但需评估其在医疗应用中的有效性与风险。
AI.method: 通过文献综述，分析GAN在数据增强和匿名化中的方法，并评估其在皮肤病变诊断中的实验效果。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，GAN在分布外测试集上表现良好，但在其他情况下效果有限，且存在成本和风险。
AI.conclusion: 结论认为，尽管GAN在特定情况下有效，但因成本和风险，医疗应用中需谨慎采用，并需进一步研究。

Nevertheless, carefully designed experiments for skin-lesion diagnosis with GAN-based data augmentation show favorable results only on out-of-distribution test sets. For GAN-based data anonymization $-$ where the synthetic images replace the real ones $-$ favorable results also only appear for out-of-distribution test sets. Because of the costs and risks associated with GAN usage, those results suggest caution in their adoption for medical applications. 尽管高质量的公共数据集越来越多，但训练样本的缺乏仍然是皮肤病变分析深度学习的主要挑战之一。生成对抗网络（GAN）似乎是缓解这一问题的一种诱人的替代方案，它通过合成与真实图像难以区分的样本，并有大量将其用于医疗应用的作品。尽管如此，精心设计的基于 GAN 的数据增强的皮肤病变诊断实验仅在分布外测试集上显示出良好的结果。对于基于 GAN 的数据匿名化$-$，其中合成图像取代了真实图像$-$，有利的结果也仅出现在分布外的测试集上。由于与 GAN 使用相关的成本和风险，这些结果表明在医疗应用中采用 GAN 时要谨慎。 本文综述了基于GAN的数据增强与匿名化技术在皮肤病变分析中的应用，并评估其效果与局限性。 Alceu Bissoto,Eduardo Valle,Sandra Avila eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Yunzhong Hou,Liang Zheng
title: Visualizing Adapted Knowledge in Domain Transfer
title_zh: 可视化领域转移中的适应知识
abstract: A source model trained on source data and a target model learned through unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) usually encode different knowledge. To understand the adaptation process, we portray their knowledge difference with image translation. Specifically, we feed a translated image and its original version to the two models respectively, formulating two branches. Through updating the translated image, we force similar outputs from the two branches. When such requirements are met, differences between the two images can compensate for and hence represent the knowledge difference between models. To enforce similar outputs from the two branches and depict the adapted knowledge, we propose a source-free image translation method that generates source-style images using only target images and the two models. We visualize the adapted knowledge on several datasets with different UDA methods and find that generated images successfully capture the style difference between the two domains. For application, we show that generated images enable further tuning of the target model without accessing source data. Code available at https://github.com/hou-yz/DA_visualization.
summary: A source model trained on source data and a target model learned through unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) usually encode different knowledge. To understand the adaptation process, we portray their knowledge difference with image translation. Specifically, we feed a translated image and its original version to the two models respectively, formulating two branches. Through updating the translated image, we force similar outputs from the two branches. When such requirements are met, differences between the two images can compensate for and hence represent the knowledge difference between models. To enforce similar outputs from the two branches and depict the adapted knowledge, we propose a source-free image translation method that generates source-style images using only target images and the two models. We visualize the adapted knowledge on several datasets with different UDA methods and find that generated images successfully capture the style difference between the two domains. For application, we show that generated images enable further tuning of the target model without accessing source data. Code available at https://github.com/hou-yz/DA_visualization.
abstract_zh: 在源数据上训练的源模型和通过无监督域适应（UDA）学习的目标模型通常编码不同的知识。为了理解适应过程，我们用图像翻译来描绘他们的知识差异。具体来说，我们将翻译后的图像及其原始版本分别提供给两个模型，形成两个分支。通过更新翻译后的图像，我们强制两个分支输出相似的输出。当满足这样的要求时，两个图像之间的差异可以补偿，从而代表模型之间的知识差异。为了强制两个分支的相似输出并描述适应的知识，我们提出了一种无源图像翻译方法，该方法仅使用目标图像和两个模型生成源样式图像。我们使用不同的 UDA 方法对几个数据集上的适应知识进行可视化，并发现生成的图像成功地捕捉了两个领域之间的风格差异。对于应用，我们表明生成的图像可以在不访问源数据的情况下进一步调整目标模型。代码可在 https://github.com/hou-yz/DA_visualization 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需源数据的图像翻译方法，通过可视化领域迁移中源模型与目标模型的知识差异，生成源风格图像以辅助目标模型调优。
AI.motivation: 源模型与无监督领域自适应（UDA）目标模型编码的知识存在差异，但现有方法难以直观展示这种差异，阻碍了对领域迁移过程的理解与优化。
AI.method: 通过构建双分支网络，强制翻译图像与原图像在两个模型中的输出一致，利用生成的源风格图像反映知识差异，并提出无需源数据的图像翻译框架。
AI.result: 生成图像成功捕捉领域风格差异，且可应用于无源数据条件下对目标模型的进一步调优，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为领域迁移中的知识差异提供了可视化分析工具，验证了生成图像在模型优化中的有效性，为UDA研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Nazanin Beheshti,Lennart Johnsson
title: Using CNNs for AD classification based on spatial correlation of BOLD signals during the observation
title_zh: 使用 CNN 根据观察期间 BOLD 信号的空间相关性进行 AD 分类
abstract: Resting state functional magnetic resonance images (fMRI) are commonly used for classification of patients as having Alzheimer's disease (AD), mild cognitive impairment (MCI), or being cognitive normal (CN). Most methods use time-series correlation of voxels signals during the observation period as a basis for the classification. In this paper we show that Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) classification based on spatial correlation of time-averaged signals yield a classification accuracy of up to 82% (sensitivity 86%, specificity 80%)for a data set with 429 subjects (246 cognitive normal and 183 Alzheimer patients). For the spatial correlation of time-averaged signal values we use voxel subdomains around center points of the 90 regions AAL atlas. We form the subdomains as sets of voxels along a Hilbert curve of a bounding box in which the brain is embedded with the AAL regions center points serving as subdomain seeds. The matrix resulting from the spatial correlation of the 90 arrays formed by the subdomain segments of the Hilbert curve yields a symmetric 90x90 matrix that is used for the classification based on two different CNN networks, a 4-layer CNN network with 3x3 filters and with 4, 8, 16, and 32 output channels respectively, and a 2-layer CNN network with 3x3 filters and with 4 and 8 output channels respectively. The results of the two networks are reported and compared.
summary: Resting state functional magnetic resonance images (fMRI) are commonly used for classification of patients as having Alzheimer's disease (AD), mild cognitive impairment (MCI), or being cognitive normal (CN). Most methods use time-series correlation of voxels signals during the observation period as a basis for the classification. In this paper we show that Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) classification based on spatial correlation of time-averaged signals yield a classification accuracy of up to 82% (sensitivity 86%, specificity 80%)for a data set with 429 subjects (246 cognitive normal and 183 Alzheimer patients). For the spatial correlation of time-averaged signal values we use voxel subdomains around center points of the 90 regions AAL atlas. We form the subdomains as sets of voxels along a Hilbert curve of a bounding box in which the brain is embedded with the AAL regions center points serving as subdomain seeds. The matrix resulting from the spatial correlation of the 90 arrays formed by the subdomain segments of the Hilbert curve yields a symmetric 90x90 matrix that is used for the classification based on two different CNN networks, a 4-layer CNN network with 3x3 filters and with 4, 8, 16, and 32 output channels respectively, and a 2-layer CNN network with 3x3 filters and with 4 and 8 output channels respectively. The results of the two networks are reported and compared.
abstract_zh: 静息态功能磁共振成像 (fMRI) 通常用于将患者分类为阿尔茨海默病 (AD)、轻度认知障碍 (MCI) 或认知正常 (CN)。大多数方法使用观察期间体素信号的时间序列相关性作为分类的基础。在本文中，我们展示了基于时间平均信号的空间相关性的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 分类，对于包含 429 名受试者（246 名认知正常患者和 183 名阿尔茨海默病患者）的数据集，分类准确率高达 82%（敏感性 86%，特异性 80%）。对于时间平均信号值的空间相关性，我们使用 90 个区域 AAL 图集中心点周围的体素子域。我们将子域形成为沿着边界框的希尔伯特曲线的体素集，其中大脑嵌入了作为子域种子的 AAL 区域中心点。由希尔伯特曲线的子域段形成的 90 个阵列的空间相关性产生的矩阵产生对称的 90x90 矩阵，用于基于两个不同的 CNN 网络进行分类，即具有 3x3 滤波器且分别具有 4、8、16 和 32 个输出通道的 4 层 CNN 网络，以及具有 3x3 滤波器且分别具有 4 和 8 个输出通道的 2 层 CNN 网络。报告并比较了两个网络的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于卷积神经网络（CNN）和BOLD信号空间相关性的方法，用于阿尔茨海默病（AD）的分类。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖于时间序列的体素相关性，但未能充分利用空间结构信息，而空间相关性可能更有效捕捉脑区间的病理特征。
AI.method: 利用AAL图谱的90个脑区中心点构建希尔伯特曲线子域，计算时间平均信号的空间相关性矩阵，输入4层或2层CNN网络进行分类。
AI.result: 在429名受试者数据集上达到82%分类准确率（灵敏度86%，特异性80%），两种CNN结构均优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于空间相关性的CNN方法能有效提升AD分类性能，为神经影像学分析提供新思路。

authors_text: Christoph Brause,Petr Golovach,Barnaby Martin,Pascal Ochem,Daniël Paulusma,Siani Smith
title: Acyclic, Star, and Injective Colouring: Bounding the Diameter
title_zh: 非循环、星形和单射着色：限制直径
abstract: We examine the effect of bounding the diameter for well-studied variants of the Colouring problem. A colouring is acyclic, star, or injective if any two colour classes induce a forest, star forest or disjoint union of vertices and edges, respectively. The corresponding decision problems are Acyclic Colouring, Star Colouring and Injective Colouring. The last problem is also known as $L(1,1)$-Labelling and we also consider the framework of $L(a,b)$-Labelling. We prove a number of (almost-)complete complexity classifications. In particular, we show that for graphs of diameter at most $d$, Acyclic $3$-Colouring is polynomial-time solvable if $d\leq 2$ but NP-complete if $d\geq 4$, and Star $3$-Colouring is polynomial-time solvable if $d\leq 3$ but NP-complete for $d\geq 8$. As far as we are aware, Star $3$-Colouring is the first problem that exhibits a complexity jump for some $d\geq 3$. Our third main result is that $L(1,2)$-Labelling is NP-complete for graphs of diameter $2$; we relate the latter problem to a special case of Hamiltonian Path.
summary: We examine the effect of bounding the diameter for well-studied variants of the Colouring problem. A colouring is acyclic, star, or injective if any two colour classes induce a forest, star forest or disjoint union of vertices and edges, respectively. The corresponding decision problems are Acyclic Colouring, Star Colouring and Injective Colouring. The last problem is also known as $L(1,1)$-Labelling and we also consider the framework of $L(a,b)$-Labelling. We prove a number of (almost-)complete complexity classifications. In particular, we show that for graphs of diameter at most $d$, Acyclic $3$-Colouring is polynomial-time solvable if $d\leq 2$ but NP-complete if $d\geq 4$, and Star $3$-Colouring is polynomial-time solvable if $d\leq 3$ but NP-complete for $d\geq 8$. As far as we are aware, Star $3$-Colouring is the first problem that exhibits a complexity jump for some $d\geq 3$. Our third main result is that $L(1,2)$-Labelling is NP-complete for graphs of diameter $2$; we relate the latter problem to a special case of Hamiltonian Path.
abstract_zh: 我们检查了限制直径对着色问题的经过充分研究的变体的影响。如果任何两个颜色类分别导致森林、星形森林或顶点和边的不相交并集，则着色是非循环的、星形的或单射的。相应的决策问题是非循环着色、星形着色和内射着色。最后一个问题也称为$L(1,1)$-Labeling，我们也考虑$L(a,b)$-Labeling的框架。我们证明了一些（几乎）完整的复杂性分类。特别是，我们证明，对于直径至多$d$的图，非循环$3$-着色在$d\leq 2$时是多项式时间可解的，但在$d\geq 4$时是NP完全的，而星形$3$-着色在$d\leq 3$时是多项式时间可解的，但在$d\geq 8$时是NP完全的。据我们所知，Star $3$-Colouring 是第一个对 $d\geq 3$ 表现出复杂性跳跃的问题。我们的第三个主要结果是，对于直径为 $2$ 的图，$L(1,2)$ 标记是 NP 完全的；我们将后一个问题与哈密顿路径的特殊情况联系起来。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在直径受限的图中，循环着色、星型着色和注入着色等变体问题的计算复杂性。
AI.motivation: 通过限制图的直径，探讨经典着色问题变体的复杂性边界，为算法设计提供理论依据。
AI.method: 采用复杂性分类方法，结合图论中的直径约束条件，证明多项式时间可解性与NP难性的临界点。
AI.result: 发现当直径≤2时循环3着色多项式可解，直径≥4时NP难；星型3着色在直径≤3时易解，直径≥8时困难；L(1,2)-标号在直径2时即为NP难。
AI.conclusion: 直径约束显著影响着色问题复杂性，首次揭示星型3着色在d≥3时的复杂度跃迁现象。

search_text: Acyclic, Star, and Injective Colouring: Bounding the Diameter 非循环、星形和单射着色：限制直径 We examine the effect of bounding the diameter for well-studied variants of the Colouring problem. A colouring is acyclic, star, or injective if any two colour classes induce a forest, star forest or disjoint union of vertices and edges, respectively. The corresponding decision problems are Acyclic Colouring, Star Colouring and Injective Colouring. The last problem is also known as $L(1,1)$-Labelling and we also consider the framework of $L(a,b)$-Labelling. We prove a number of (almost-)complete complexity classifications. In particular, we show that for graphs of diameter at most $d$, Acyclic $3$-Colouring is polynomial-time solvable if $d\leq 2$ but NP-complete if $d\geq 4$, and Star $3$-Colouring is polynomial-time solvable if $d\leq 3$ but NP-complete for $d\geq 8$. As far as we are aware, Star $3$-Colouring is the first problem that exhibits a complexity jump for some $d\geq 3$. Our third main result is that $L(1,2)$-Labelling is NP-complete for graphs of diameter $2$; we relate the latter problem to a special case of Hamiltonian Path. 我们检查了限制直径对着色问题的经过充分研究的变体的影响。如果任何两个颜色类分别导致森林、星形森林或顶点和边的不相交并集，则着色是非循环的、星形的或单射的。相应的决策问题是非循环着色、星形着色和内射着色。最后一个问题也称为$L(1,1)$-Labeling，我们也考虑$L(a,b)$-Labeling的框架。我们证明了一些（几乎）完整的复杂性分类。特别是，我们证明，对于直径至多$d$的图，非循环$3$-着色在$d\leq 2$时是多项式时间可解的，但在$d\geq 4$时是NP完全的，而星形$3$-着色在$d\leq 3$时是多项式时间可解的，但在$d\geq 8$时是NP完全的。据我们所知，Star $3$-Colouring 是第一个对 $d\geq 3$ 表现出复杂性跳跃的问题。我们的第三个主要结果是，对于直径为 $2$ 的图，$L(1,2)$ 标记是 NP 完全的；我们将后一个问题与哈密顿路径的特殊情况联系起来。 本文研究了在直径受限的图中，循环着色、星型着色和注入着色等变体问题的计算复杂性。 Christoph Brause,Petr Golovach,Barnaby Martin,Pascal Ochem,Daniël Paulusma,Siani Smith cs.DS,cs.CC,cs.DM,math.CO

authors_text: Mohammadreza Kasaei,Miguel Abreu,Nuno Lau,Artur Pereira,Luis Paulo Reis
title: Robust Biped Locomotion Using Deep Reinforcement Learning on Top of an Analytical Control Approach
title_zh: 在分析控制方法之上使用深度强化学习实现稳健的双足运动
abstract: This paper proposes a modular framework to generate robust biped locomotion using a tight coupling between an analytical walking approach and deep reinforcement learning. This framework is composed of six main modules which are hierarchically connected to reduce the overall complexity and increase its flexibility. The core of this framework is a specific dynamics model which abstracts a humanoid's dynamics model into two masses for modeling upper and lower body. This dynamics model is used to design an adaptive reference trajectories planner and an optimal controller which are fully parametric. Furthermore, a learning framework is developed based on Genetic Algorithm (GA) and Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) to find the optimum parameters and to learn how to improve the stability of the robot by moving the arms and changing its center of mass (COM) height. A set of simulations are performed to validate the performance of the framework using the official RoboCup 3D League simulation environment. The results validate the performance of the framework, not only in creating a fast and stable gait but also in learning to improve the upper body efficiency.
summary: This paper proposes a modular framework to generate robust biped locomotion using a tight coupling between an analytical walking approach and deep reinforcement learning. This framework is composed of six main modules which are hierarchically connected to reduce the overall complexity and increase its flexibility. The core of this framework is a specific dynamics model which abstracts a humanoid's dynamics model into two masses for modeling upper and lower body. This dynamics model is used to design an adaptive reference trajectories planner and an optimal controller which are fully parametric. Furthermore, a learning framework is developed based on Genetic Algorithm (GA) and Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) to find the optimum parameters and to learn how to improve the stability of the robot by moving the arms and changing its center of mass (COM) height. A set of simulations are performed to validate the performance of the framework using the official RoboCup 3D League simulation environment. The results validate the performance of the framework, not only in creating a fast and stable gait but also in learning to improve the upper body efficiency.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种模块化框架，利用分析行走方法和深度强化学习之间的紧密耦合来生成稳健的双足运动。该框架由六个主要模块组成，这些模块分层连接，以降低整体复杂性并增加其灵活性。该框架的核心是一个特定的动力学模型，它将人形的动力学模型抽象为两个质量体，用于建模上半身和下半身。该动力学模型用于设计全参数化的自适应参考轨迹规划器和最优控制器。此外，还开发了基于遗传算法（GA）和近端策略优化（PPO）的学习框架，以找到最佳参数并学习如何通过移动手臂和改变其质心（COM）高度来提高机器人的稳定性。使用官方 RoboCup 3D League 模拟环境执行一组模拟来验证框架的性能。结果验证了该框架的性能，不仅在创建快速稳定的步态方面，而且在学习提高上身效率方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合分析控制与深度强化学习的模块化框架，用于生成稳健的双足行走控制策略。
AI.motivation: 传统控制方法在复杂地形中难以兼顾稳定性与灵活性，需通过深度强化学习提升适应性，但需结合分析模型降低学习复杂度。
AI.method: 构建包含六个层级模块的框架，核心为简化的人形动力学模型（分上下两质量块），结合遗传算法与PPO算法优化参数并学习调整质心高度与肢体动作。
AI.result: 仿真结果验证了框架可生成快速稳定步态，并通过上肢运动优化提升整体能量效率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效融合了分析控制的精确性与深度强化学习的自适应性，为复杂环境下的双足机器人控制提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jian Jiang,Edoardo Cetin,Oya Celiktutan
title: IB-DRR: Incremental Learning with Information-Back Discrete Representation Replay
title_zh: IB-DRR：带有信息返回离散表示重放的增量学习
abstract: Incremental learning aims to enable machine learning models to continuously acquire new knowledge given new classes, while maintaining the knowledge already learned for old classes. Saving a subset of training samples of previously seen classes in the memory and replaying them during new training phases is proven to be an efficient and effective way to fulfil this aim. It is evident that the larger number of exemplars the model inherits the better performance it can achieve. However, finding a trade-off between the model performance and the number of samples to save for each class is still an open problem for replay-based incremental learning and is increasingly desirable for real-life applications. In this paper, we approach this open problem by tapping into a two-step compression approach. The first step is a lossy compression, we propose to encode input images and save their discrete latent representations in the form of codes that are learned using a hierarchical Vector Quantised Variational Autoencoder (VQ-VAE). In the second step, we further compress codes losslessly by learning a hierarchical latent variable model with bits-back asymmetric numeral systems (BB-ANS). To compensate for the information lost in the first step compression, we introduce an Information Back (IB) mechanism that utilizes real exemplars for a contrastive learning loss to regularize the training of a classifier. By maintaining all seen exemplars' representations in the format of `codes', Discrete Representation Replay (DRR) outperforms the state-of-art method on CIFAR-100 by a margin of 4% accuracy with a much less memory cost required for saving samples. Incorporated with IB and saving a small set of old raw exemplars as well, the accuracy of DRR can be further improved by 2% accuracy.
summary: Incremental learning aims to enable machine learning models to continuously acquire new knowledge given new classes, while maintaining the knowledge already learned for old classes. Saving a subset of training samples of previously seen classes in the memory and replaying them during new training phases is proven to be an efficient and effective way to fulfil this aim. It is evident that the larger number of exemplars the model inherits the better performance it can achieve. However, finding a trade-off between the model performance and the number of samples to save for each class is still an open problem for replay-based incremental learning and is increasingly desirable for real-life applications. In this paper, we approach this open problem by tapping into a two-step compression approach. The first step is a lossy compression, we propose to encode input images and save their discrete latent representations in the form of codes that are learned using a hierarchical Vector Quantised Variational Autoencoder (VQ-VAE). In the second step, we further compress codes losslessly by learning a hierarchical latent variable model with bits-back asymmetric numeral systems (BB-ANS). To compensate for the information lost in the first step compression, we introduce an Information Back (IB) mechanism that utilizes real exemplars for a contrastive learning loss to regularize the training of a classifier. By maintaining all seen exemplars' representations in the format of `codes', Discrete Representation Replay (DRR) outperforms the state-of-art method on CIFAR-100 by a margin of 4% accuracy with a much less memory cost required for saving samples. Incorporated with IB and saving a small set of old raw exemplars as well, the accuracy of DRR can be further improved by 2% accuracy.
abstract_zh: 增量学习旨在使机器学习模型能够不断获取新课程的新知识，同时保留旧课程已经学到的知识。事实证明，将先前见过的类的训练样本子集保存在内存中并在新的训练阶段重放它们是实现这一目标的一种高效且有效的方法。很明显，模型继承的样本数量越多，它所能达到的性能就越好。然而，对于基于重放的增量学习来说，在模型性能和为每个类别保存的样本数量之间找到权衡仍然是一个悬而未决的问题，并且对于现实生活应用程序来说越来越受欢迎。在本文中，我们通过利用两步压缩方法来解决这个开放问题。第一步是有损压缩，我们建议对输入图像进行编码，并以使用分层矢量量化变分自动编码器（VQ-VAE）学习的代码形式保存其离散潜在表示。在第二步中，我们通过学习具有位回非对称数字系统（BB-ANS）的分层潜变量模型来进一步无损压缩代码。为了补偿第一步压缩中丢失的信息，我们引入了信息回溯（IB）机制，该机制利用真实样本进行对比学习损失来规范分类器的训练。通过以“代码”格式维护所有可见样本的表示，离散表示重放 (DRR) 的性能优于 CIFAR-100 上最先进的方法，精度高出 4%，并且保存样本所需的内存成本要少得多。与IB结合并保存一小部分旧的原始样本，DRR的精度可以进一步提高2%的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种增量学习方法IB-DRR，通过离散表示重放和信息回传机制，在减少样本存储量的同时提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 基于重放的增量学习方法需在模型性能与样本存储数量间寻求平衡，现有方法存储开销大且难以兼顾效果。
AI.method: 采用两步压缩策略：1) 使用分层VQ-VAE进行有损压缩生成离散码；2) 用BB-ANS进行无损压缩。结合信息回传机制（IB）通过对比学习损失优化分类器，并保留少量原始样本辅助训练。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100数据集上，DRR方法在存储成本降低的情况下比现有方法准确率提升4%，结合原始样本后进一步提升2%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过高效压缩与信息补偿机制，在增量学习任务中实现了性能与存储需求的优化平衡。

search_text: IB-DRR: Incremental Learning with Information-Back Discrete Representation Replay IB-DRR：带有信息返回离散表示重放的增量学习 Incremental learning aims to enable machine learning models to continuously acquire new knowledge given new classes, while maintaining the knowledge already learned for old classes. Saving a subset of training samples of previously seen classes in the memory and replaying them during new training phases is proven to be an efficient and effective way to fulfil this aim. It is evident that the larger number of exemplars the model inherits the better performance it can achieve. However, finding a trade-off between the model performance and the number of samples to save for each class is still an open problem for replay-based incremental learning and is increasingly desirable for real-life applications. In this paper, we approach this open problem by tapping into a two-step compression approach. The first step is a lossy compression, we propose to encode input images and save their discrete latent representations in the form of codes that are learned using a hierarchical Vector Quantised Variational Autoencoder (VQ-VAE). In the second step, we further compress codes losslessly by learning a hierarchical latent variable model with bits-back asymmetric numeral systems (BB-ANS). To compensate for the information lost in the first step compression, we introduce an Information Back (IB) mechanism that utilizes real exemplars for a contrastive learning loss to regularize the training of a classifier. By maintaining all seen exemplars' representations in the format of `codes', Discrete Representation Replay (DRR) outperforms the state-of-art method on CIFAR-100 by a margin of 4% accuracy with a much less memory cost required for saving samples. Incorporated with IB and saving a small set of old raw exemplars as well, the accuracy of DRR can be further improved by 2% accuracy. 增量学习旨在使机器学习模型能够不断获取新课程的新知识，同时保留旧课程已经学到的知识。事实证明，将先前见过的类的训练样本子集保存在内存中并在新的训练阶段重放它们是实现这一目标的一种高效且有效的方法。很明显，模型继承的样本数量越多，它所能达到的性能就越好。然而，对于基于重放的增量学习来说，在模型性能和为每个类别保存的样本数量之间找到权衡仍然是一个悬而未决的问题，并且对于现实生活应用程序来说越来越受欢迎。在本文中，我们通过利用两步压缩方法来解决这个开放问题。第一步是有损压缩，我们建议对输入图像进行编码，并以使用分层矢量量化变分自动编码器（VQ-VAE）学习的代码形式保存其离散潜在表示。在第二步中，我们通过学习具有位回非对称数字系统（BB-ANS）的分层潜变量模型来进一步无损压缩代码。为了补偿第一步压缩中丢失的信息，我们引入了信息回溯（IB）机制，该机制利用真实样本进行对比学习损失来规范分类器的训练。通过以“代码”格式维护所有可见样本的表示，离散表示重放 (DRR) 的性能优于 CIFAR-100 上最先进的方法，精度高出 4%，并且保存样本所需的内存成本要少得多。与IB结合并保存一小部分旧的原始样本，DRR的精度可以进一步提高2%的精度。 本文提出一种增量学习方法IB-DRR，通过离散表示重放和信息回传机制，在减少样本存储量的同时提升模型性能。 Jian Jiang,Edoardo Cetin,Oya Celiktutan cs.CV

authors_text: Hao Cheng,Kaidi Xu,Chenan Wang,Bhavya Kailkhura,Xue Lin,Ryan Goldhahn
title: Mixture of Robust Experts (MoRE):A Robust Denoising Method towards multiple perturbations
title_zh: 鲁棒专家混合（MoRE）：一种针对多重扰动的鲁棒去噪方法
comment: This paper is accepted by ICLR 2021 Robust and reliable machine learning in the real world Workshop
comments: This paper is accepted by ICLR 2021 Robust and reliable machine learning in the real world Workshop
abstract: To tackle the susceptibility of deep neural networks to adversarial examples, the adversarial training has been proposed which provides a notion of security through an inner maximization problem presenting the first-order adversaries embedded within the outer minimization of the training loss. To generalize the adversarial robustness over different perturbation types, the adversarial training method has been augmented with the improved inner maximization presenting a union of multiple perturbations e.g., various $\ell_p$ norm-bounded perturbations. However, the improved inner maximization only enjoys limited flexibility in terms of the allowable perturbation types. In this work, through a gating mechanism, we assemble a set of expert networks, each one either adversarially trained to deal with a particular perturbation type or normally trained for boosting accuracy on clean data. The gating module assigns weights dynamically to each expert to achieve superior accuracy under various data types e.g., adversarial examples, adverse weather perturbations, and clean input. In order to deal with the obfuscated gradients issue, the training of the gating module is conducted together with fine-tuning of the last fully connected layers of expert networks through adversarial training approach. Using extensive experiments, we show that our Mixture of Robust Experts (MoRE) approach enables a flexible integration of a broad range of robust experts with superior performance.
summary: To tackle the susceptibility of deep neural networks to adversarial examples, the adversarial training has been proposed which provides a notion of security through an inner maximization problem presenting the first-order adversaries embedded within the outer minimization of the training loss. To generalize the adversarial robustness over different perturbation types, the adversarial training method has been augmented with the improved inner maximization presenting a union of multiple perturbations e.g., various $\ell_p$ norm-bounded perturbations. However, the improved inner maximization only enjoys limited flexibility in terms of the allowable perturbation types. In this work, through a gating mechanism, we assemble a set of expert networks, each one either adversarially trained to deal with a particular perturbation type or normally trained for boosting accuracy on clean data. The gating module assigns weights dynamically to each expert to achieve superior accuracy under various data types e.g., adversarial examples, adverse weather perturbations, and clean input. In order to deal with the obfuscated gradients issue, the training of the gating module is conducted together with fine-tuning of the last fully connected layers of expert networks through adversarial training approach. Using extensive experiments, we show that our Mixture of Robust Experts (MoRE) approach enables a flexible integration of a broad range of robust experts with superior performance.
abstract_zh: 为了解决深度神经网络对对抗性示例的敏感性，提出了对抗性训练，它通过内部最大化问题提供安全概念，该内部最大化问题将一阶对手嵌入到训练损失的外部最小化中。为了概括不同扰动类型的对抗鲁棒性，对抗训练方法得到了增强，改进了内部最大化，呈现出多个扰动的联合，例如各种 $\ell_p$ 范数范围的扰动。然而，改进的内部最大化在允许的扰动类型方面仅具有有限的灵活性。在这项工作中，通过门控机制，我们组装了一组专家网络，每个网络要么经过对抗性训练以处理特定的扰动类型，要么经过正常训练以提高干净数据的准确性。门控模块动态地为每位专家分配权重，以在各种数据类型（例如对抗性示例、恶劣天气扰动和干净输入）下实现卓越的准确性。为了解决梯度模糊问题，门模块的训练与通过对抗训练方法对专家网络最后全连接层的微调一起进行。通过大量实验，我们表明，我们的稳健专家混合 (MoRE) 方法能够灵活集成具有卓越性能的广泛稳健专家。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MoRE的去噪方法，通过集成多个专家网络以应对多种扰动类型，提升深度神经网络的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练方法在处理多种扰动类型时灵活性不足，难以有效应对不同类型的对抗样本和环境扰动。
AI.method: 通过门控机制动态组合多个专家网络，部分专家网络针对特定扰动类型进行对抗训练，另一部分用于提升干净数据的准确性，并联合训练门控模块与专家网络的全连接层以解决梯度混淆问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，MoRE方法能够灵活集成多种鲁棒专家网络，在对抗样本、恶劣天气扰动及干净数据下均取得优越性能。
AI.conclusion: MoRE通过动态集成不同专家网络，为应对多种扰动类型的鲁棒性问题提供了灵活且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Ron Alford,Andy Applebaum
title: Towards Causal Models for Adversary Distractions
title_zh: 建立对手干扰的因果模型
comment: To be presented in the AI/ML for Cybersecurity workshop at SDM 2021
comments: To be presented in the AI/ML for Cybersecurity workshop at SDM 2021
abstract: Automated adversary emulation is becoming an indispensable tool of network security operators in testing and evaluating their cyber defenses. At the same time, it has exposed how quickly adversaries can propagate through the network. While research has greatly progressed on quality decoy generation to fool human adversaries, we may need different strategies to slow computer agents. In this paper, we show that decoy generation can slow an automated agent's decision process, but that the degree to which it is inhibited is greatly dependent on the types of objects used. This points to the need to explicitly evaluate decoy generation and placement strategies against fast moving, automated adversaries.
summary: Automated adversary emulation is becoming an indispensable tool of network security operators in testing and evaluating their cyber defenses. At the same time, it has exposed how quickly adversaries can propagate through the network. While research has greatly progressed on quality decoy generation to fool human adversaries, we may need different strategies to slow computer agents. In this paper, we show that decoy generation can slow an automated agent's decision process, but that the degree to which it is inhibited is greatly dependent on the types of objects used. This points to the need to explicitly evaluate decoy generation and placement strategies against fast moving, automated adversaries.
abstract_zh: 自动对手模拟正在成为网络安全运营商测试和评估网络防御不可或缺的工具。同时，它也暴露了对手通过网络传播的速度。虽然在欺骗人类对手的高质量诱饵生成方面的研究取得了很大进展，但我们可能需要不同的策略来减慢计算机代理的速度。在本文中，我们表明诱饵生成可以减慢自动化代理的决策过程，但其被抑制的程度很大程度上取决于所使用的对象的类型。这表明需要明确评估针对快速移动的自动化对手的诱饵生成和放置策略。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何通过设计有效的诱饵生成和放置策略来减缓自动化对手的决策过程，特别是在面对快速移动的自动化对手时。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要针对欺骗人类对手的高质量诱饵生成，但自动化对手的传播速度极快，需要新的策略来应对这一挑战。
AI.method: 通过实验测试不同类型的诱饵对自动化代理决策过程的影响，分析其抑制效果与诱饵类型之间的关系。
AI.result: 发现诱饵生成确实能减缓自动化代理，但抑制效果高度依赖于所使用的对象类型。
AI.conclusion: 需要专门评估和设计针对自动化对手的诱饵生成与放置策略，以提升网络防御的有效性。

While research has greatly progressed on quality decoy generation to fool human adversaries, we may need different strategies to slow computer agents. In this paper, we show that decoy generation can slow an automated agent's decision process, but that the degree to which it is inhibited is greatly dependent on the types of objects used. This points to the need to explicitly evaluate decoy generation and placement strategies against fast moving, automated adversaries. 自动对手模拟正在成为网络安全运营商测试和评估网络防御不可或缺的工具。同时，它也暴露了对手通过网络传播的速度。虽然在欺骗人类对手的高质量诱饵生成方面的研究取得了很大进展，但我们可能需要不同的策略来减慢计算机代理的速度。在本文中，我们表明诱饵生成可以减慢自动化代理的决策过程，但其被抑制的程度很大程度上取决于所使用的对象的类型。这表明需要明确评估针对快速移动的自动化对手的诱饵生成和放置策略。 本文研究了如何通过设计有效的诱饵生成和放置策略来减缓自动化对手的决策过程，特别是在面对快速移动的自动化对手时。 Ron Alford,Andy Applebaum cs.CR,cs.AI

authors_text: Yueming Lyu,Jing Dong,Bo Peng,Wei Wang,Tieniu Tan
title: SOGAN: 3D-Aware Shadow and Occlusion Robust GAN for Makeup Transfer
title_zh: SOGAN：用于化妆传输的 3D 感知阴影和遮挡鲁棒 GAN
abstract: In recent years, virtual makeup applications have become more and more popular. However, it is still challenging to propose a robust makeup transfer method in the real-world environment. Current makeup transfer methods mostly work well on good-conditioned clean makeup images, but transferring makeup that exhibits shadow and occlusion is not satisfying. To alleviate it, we propose a novel makeup transfer method, called 3D-Aware Shadow and Occlusion Robust GAN (SOGAN). Given the source and the reference faces, we first fit a 3D face model and then disentangle the faces into shape and texture. In the texture branch, we map the texture to the UV space and design a UV texture generator to transfer the makeup. Since human faces are symmetrical in the UV space, we can conveniently remove the undesired shadow and occlusion from the reference image by carefully designing a Flip Attention Module (FAM). After obtaining cleaner makeup features from the reference image, a Makeup Transfer Module (MTM) is introduced to perform accurate makeup transfer. The qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate that our SOGAN not only achieves superior results in shadow and occlusion situations but also performs well in large pose and expression variations.
summary: In recent years, virtual makeup applications have become more and more popular. However, it is still challenging to propose a robust makeup transfer method in the real-world environment. Current makeup transfer methods mostly work well on good-conditioned clean makeup images, but transferring makeup that exhibits shadow and occlusion is not satisfying. To alleviate it, we propose a novel makeup transfer method, called 3D-Aware Shadow and Occlusion Robust GAN (SOGAN). Given the source and the reference faces, we first fit a 3D face model and then disentangle the faces into shape and texture. In the texture branch, we map the texture to the UV space and design a UV texture generator to transfer the makeup. Since human faces are symmetrical in the UV space, we can conveniently remove the undesired shadow and occlusion from the reference image by carefully designing a Flip Attention Module (FAM). After obtaining cleaner makeup features from the reference image, a Makeup Transfer Module (MTM) is introduced to perform accurate makeup transfer. The qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate that our SOGAN not only achieves superior results in shadow and occlusion situations but also performs well in large pose and expression variations.
abstract_zh: 近年来，虚拟化妆应用程序越来越流行。然而，在现实环境中提出一种稳健的化妆转移方法仍然具有挑战性。目前的化妆转移方法大多适用于条件良好的干净化妆图像，但转移表现出阴影和遮挡的化妆效果并不令人满意。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的化妆转移方法，称为 3D 感知阴影和遮挡鲁棒 GAN (SOGAN)。给定源面部和参考面部，我们首先拟合 3D 面部模型，然后将面部分解为形状和纹理。在纹理分支中，我们将纹理映射到UV空间并设计UV纹理生成器来转移化妆。由于人脸在 UV 空间中是对称的，因此我们可以通过仔细设计翻转注意力模块（FAM），方便地从参考图像中去除不需要的阴影和遮挡。从参考图像中获得更清晰的化妆特征后，引入化妆传输模块（MTM）来执行准确的化妆传输。定性和定量实验表明，我们的 SOGAN 不仅在阴影和遮挡情况下取得了优异的结果，而且在大的姿势和表情变化中也表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SOGAN的3D感知阴影和遮挡鲁棒生成对抗网络，用于在真实环境中实现更鲁棒的化妆迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有化妆迁移方法在阴影和遮挡等复杂真实场景下效果不佳，需开发能处理这些挑战的鲁棒方法。
AI.method: 通过拟合3D面部模型分离形状与纹理，在UV空间设计纹理生成器并引入翻转注意力模块（FAM）去除阴影遮挡，最后通过化妆迁移模块（MTM）实现精准迁移。
AI.result: 实验表明SOGAN在阴影遮挡场景及大姿态表情变化下均优于现有方法，定性和定量结果均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: SOGAN通过3D感知与UV空间处理有效解决了化妆迁移中的阴影遮挡问题，为真实场景应用提供了新方案。

authors_text: Samim Ahmadi,Linh Kästner,Jan Christian Hauffen,Peter Jung,Mathias Ziegler
title: Photothermal-SR-Net: A Customized Deep Unfolding Neural Network for Photothermal Super Resolution Imaging
title_zh: Photo Thermal-SR-Net：用于光热超分辨率成像的定制深度展开神经网络
abstract: This paper presents deep unfolding neural networks to handle inverse problems in photothermal radiometry enabling super resolution (SR) imaging. Photothermal imaging is a well-known technique in active thermography for nondestructive inspection of defects in materials such as metals or composites. A grand challenge of active thermography is to overcome the spatial resolution limitation imposed by heat diffusion in order to accurately resolve each defect. The photothermal SR approach enables to extract high-frequency spatial components based on the deconvolution with the thermal point spread function. However, stable deconvolution can only be achieved by using the sparse structure of defect patterns, which often requires tedious, hand-crafted tuning of hyperparameters and results in computationally intensive algorithms. On this account, Photothermal-SR-Net is proposed in this paper, which performs deconvolution by deep unfolding considering the underlying physics. This enables to super resolve 2D thermal images for nondestructive testing with a substantially improved convergence rate. Since defects appear sparsely in materials, Photothermal-SR-Net applies trained block-sparsity thresholding to the acquired thermal images in each convolutional layer. The performance of the proposed approach is evaluated and discussed using various deep unfolding and thresholding approaches applied to 2D thermal images. Subsequently, studies are conducted on how to increase the reconstruction quality and the computational performance of Photothermal-SR-Net is evaluated. Thereby, it was found that the computing time for creating high-resolution images could be significantly reduced without decreasing the reconstruction quality by using pixel binning as a preprocessing step.
summary: This paper presents deep unfolding neural networks to handle inverse problems in photothermal radiometry enabling super resolution (SR) imaging. Photothermal imaging is a well-known technique in active thermography for nondestructive inspection of defects in materials such as metals or composites. A grand challenge of active thermography is to overcome the spatial resolution limitation imposed by heat diffusion in order to accurately resolve each defect. The photothermal SR approach enables to extract high-frequency spatial components based on the deconvolution with the thermal point spread function. However, stable deconvolution can only be achieved by using the sparse structure of defect patterns, which often requires tedious, hand-crafted tuning of hyperparameters and results in computationally intensive algorithms. On this account, Photothermal-SR-Net is proposed in this paper, which performs deconvolution by deep unfolding considering the underlying physics. This enables to super resolve 2D thermal images for nondestructive testing with a substantially improved convergence rate. Since defects appear sparsely in materials, Photothermal-SR-Net applies trained block-sparsity thresholding to the acquired thermal images in each convolutional layer. The performance of the proposed approach is evaluated and discussed using various deep unfolding and thresholding approaches applied to 2D thermal images. Subsequently, studies are conducted on how to increase the reconstruction quality and the computational performance of Photothermal-SR-Net is evaluated. Thereby, it was found that the computing time for creating high-resolution images could be significantly reduced without decreasing the reconstruction quality by using pixel binning as a preprocessing step.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了深度展开神经网络来处理光热辐射测量中的逆问题，从而实现超分辨率（SR）成像。光热成像是主动热成像中众所周知的技术，用于对金属或复合材料等材料的缺陷进行无损检查。主动热成像的一大挑战是克服热扩散带来的空间分辨率限制，以准确地解决每个缺陷。光热 SR 方法能够基于热点扩散函数的反卷积提取高频空间分量。然而，稳定的反卷积只能通过使用缺陷模式的稀疏结构来实现，这通常需要对超参数进行繁琐的手工调整，并导致计算密集型算法。鉴于此，本文提出了光热-SR-Net，它考虑底层物理原理，通过深度展开进行反卷积。这使得能够超分辨率二维热图像进行无损检测，并显着提高收敛速度。由于缺陷在材料中稀疏出现，Photo Thermal-SR-Net 对每个卷积层中获取的热图像应用经过训练的块稀疏阈值。使用应用于二维热图像的各种深度展开和阈值方法来评估和讨论所提出方法的性能。随后，研究了如何提高重建质量，并对光热-SR-Net的计算性能进行了评估。因此，我们发现，通过使用像素合并作为预处理步骤，可以显着减少创建高分辨率图像的计算时间，而不会降低重建质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度解卷积的神经网络Photothermal-SR-Net，用于光热超分辨率成像以提升无损检测的缺陷分辨能力。
AI.motivation: 主动热成像技术受热扩散限制难以精确分辨缺陷，传统反卷积方法依赖手工调参且计算复杂度高，亟需高效物理感知的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计深度解卷积网络框架，结合热成像物理特性，在卷积层中嵌入块稀疏阈值处理，并通过像素合并预处理降低计算量。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持重建质量的同时将高分辨率图像生成时间减少显著，且收敛速度优于传统深度展开和阈值方法。
AI.conclusion: Photothermal-SR-Net通过融合物理模型与深度学习，在缺陷超分辨率成像中实现了计算效率与重建精度的平衡，适用于工业无损检测场景。

Thereby, it was found that the computing time for creating high-resolution images could be significantly reduced without decreasing the reconstruction quality by using pixel binning as a preprocessing step. 本文提出了深度展开神经网络来处理光热辐射测量中的逆问题，从而实现超分辨率（SR）成像。光热成像是主动热成像中众所周知的技术，用于对金属或复合材料等材料的缺陷进行无损检查。主动热成像的一大挑战是克服热扩散带来的空间分辨率限制，以准确地解决每个缺陷。光热 SR 方法能够基于热点扩散函数的反卷积提取高频空间分量。然而，稳定的反卷积只能通过使用缺陷模式的稀疏结构来实现，这通常需要对超参数进行繁琐的手工调整，并导致计算密集型算法。鉴于此，本文提出了光热-SR-Net，它考虑底层物理原理，通过深度展开进行反卷积。这使得能够超分辨率二维热图像进行无损检测，并显着提高收敛速度。由于缺陷在材料中稀疏出现，Photo Thermal-SR-Net 对每个卷积层中获取的热图像应用经过训练的块稀疏阈值。使用应用于二维热图像的各种深度展开和阈值方法来评估和讨论所提出方法的性能。随后，研究了如何提高重建质量，并对光热-SR-Net的计算性能进行了评估。因此，我们发现，通过使用像素合并作为预处理步骤，可以显着减少创建高分辨率图像的计算时间，而不会降低重建质量。 本文提出一种基于深度解卷积的神经网络Photothermal-SR-Net，用于光热超分辨率成像以提升无损检测的缺陷分辨能力。 Samim Ahmadi,Linh Kästner,Jan Christian Hauffen,Peter Jung,Mathias Ziegler cs.CV,cs.AI,eess.IV,physics.app-ph,physics.comp-ph

authors_text: Nicholas Rhinehart,Jeff He,Charles Packer,Matthew A. Wright,Rowan McAllister,Joseph E. Gonzalez,Sergey Levine
title: Contingencies from Observations: Tractable Contingency Planning with Learned Behavior Models
title_zh: 观察中的突发事件：利用学习行为模型制定易于处理的应急计划
comment: To be published at ICRA 2021. Project page: https://sites.google.com/view/contingency-planning
comments: To be published at ICRA 2021. Project page: https://sites.google.com/view/contingency-planning
abstract: Humans have a remarkable ability to make decisions by accurately reasoning about future events, including the future behaviors and states of mind of other agents. Consider driving a car through a busy intersection: it is necessary to reason about the physics of the vehicle, the intentions of other drivers, and their beliefs about your own intentions. If you signal a turn, another driver might yield to you, or if you enter the passing lane, another driver might decelerate to give you room to merge in front. Competent drivers must plan how they can safely react to a variety of potential future behaviors of other agents before they make their next move. This requires contingency planning: explicitly planning a set of conditional actions that depend on the stochastic outcome of future events. In this work, we develop a general-purpose contingency planner that is learned end-to-end using high-dimensional scene observations and low-dimensional behavioral observations. We use a conditional autoregressive flow model to create a compact contingency planning space, and show how this model can tractably learn contingencies from behavioral observations. We developed a closed-loop control benchmark of realistic multi-agent scenarios in a driving simulator (CARLA), on which we compare our method to various noncontingent methods that reason about multi-agent future behavior, including several state-of-the-art deep learning-based planning approaches. We illustrate that these noncontingent planning methods fundamentally fail on this benchmark, and find that our deep contingency planning method achieves significantly superior performance. Code to run our benchmark and reproduce our results is available at https://sites.google.com/view/contingency-planning

Consider driving a car through a busy intersection: it is necessary to reason about the physics of the vehicle, the intentions of other drivers, and their beliefs about your own intentions. If you signal a turn, another driver might yield to you, or if you enter the passing lane, another driver might decelerate to give you room to merge in front. Competent drivers must plan how they can safely react to a variety of potential future behaviors of other agents before they make their next move. This requires contingency planning: explicitly planning a set of conditional actions that depend on the stochastic outcome of future events. In this work, we develop a general-purpose contingency planner that is learned end-to-end using high-dimensional scene observations and low-dimensional behavioral observations. We use a conditional autoregressive flow model to create a compact contingency planning space, and show how this model can tractably learn contingencies from behavioral observations. We developed a closed-loop control benchmark of realistic multi-agent scenarios in a driving simulator (CARLA), on which we compare our method to various noncontingent methods that reason about multi-agent future behavior, including several state-of-the-art deep learning-based planning approaches. We illustrate that these noncontingent planning methods fundamentally fail on this benchmark, and find that our deep contingency planning method achieves significantly superior performance. Code to run our benchmark and reproduce our results is available at https://sites.google.com/view/contingency-planning
abstract_zh: 人类具有通过准确推理未来事件（包括其他智能体的未来行为和心态）来做出决策的非凡能力。考虑驾驶汽车通过繁忙的十字路口：有必要推理车辆的物理特性、其他驾驶员的意图以及他们对您自己意图的看法。如果您发出转弯信号，另一位驾驶员可能会为您让行，或者如果您进入超车道，另一位驾驶员可能会减速，为您留出在前面并道的空间。有能力的驾驶员必须在采取下一步行动之前计划如何安全地对其他智能体未来的各种潜在行为做出反应。这需要应急计划：明确计划一组取决于未来事件的随机结果的条件行动。在这项工作中，我们开发了一个通用的应急计划程序，它使用高维场景观察和低维行为观察进行端到端学习。我们使用条件自回归流模型来创建紧凑的应急计划空间，并展示该模型如何轻松地从行为观察中学习应急情况。我们开发了驾驶模拟器（CARLA）中真实多智能体场景的闭环控制基准，在此基础上我们将我们的方法与推理多智能体未来行为的各种非偶然方法进行比较，包括几种最先进的基于深度学习的规划方法。我们说明这些非应急计划方法从根本上失败了这个基准，并发现我们的深度应急计划方法实现了显着优越的性能。运行我们的基准测试并重现结果的代码可在 https://sites.google.com/view/contingency-planning 上找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习行为模型的可处理的条件规划方法，用于多智能体场景中的安全决策，特别是在自动驾驶场景中。
AI.motivation: 人类能通过推理其他智能体的未来行为和意图做出安全决策，而现有非条件规划方法在复杂多智能体场景中表现不足，需开发能处理不确定性的条件规划方法。
AI.method: 使用条件自回归流模型构建紧凑的条件规划空间，通过高维场景观测和低维行为观测端到端学习条件规划策略，并在CARLA模拟器中验证。
AI.result: 在多智能体驾驶基准测试中，本文方法显著优于非条件规划方法及现有深度学习规划方法，证明了条件规划的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 条件规划方法能有效处理多智能体场景中的不确定性，为安全自动驾驶提供了新的解决方案。
