authors_text: Luyang Luo,Hao Chen,Yongjie Xiao,Yanning Zhou,Xi Wang,Varut Vardhanabhuti,Mingxiang Wu,Chu Han,Zaiyi Liu,Xin Hao Benjamin Fang,Efstratios Tsougenis,Huangjing Lin,Pheng-Ann Heng
title: Rethinking Annotation Granularity for Overcoming Shortcuts in Deep Learning-based Radiograph Diagnosis: A Multicenter Study
title_zh: 重新思考注释粒度以克服基于深度学习的放射线诊断中的捷径：一项多中心研究
abstract: Two DL models were developed using radiograph-level annotations (yes or no disease) and fine-grained lesion-level annotations (lesion bounding boxes), respectively named CheXNet and CheXDet. The models' internal classification performance and lesion localization performance were compared on a testing set (n=2,922), external classification performance was compared on NIH-Google (n=4,376) and PadChest (n=24,536) datasets, and external lesion localization performance was compared on NIH-ChestX-ray14 dataset (n=880). The models were also compared to radiologists on a subset of the internal testing set (n=496). Given sufficient training data, both models performed comparably to radiologists. CheXDet achieved significant improvement for external classification, such as in classifying fracture on NIH-Google (CheXDet area under the ROC curve [AUC]: 0.67, CheXNet AUC: 0.51; p<.001) and PadChest (CheXDet AUC: 0.78, CheXNet AUC: 0.55; p<.001). CheXDet achieved higher lesion detection performance than CheXNet for most abnormalities on all datasets, such as in detecting pneumothorax on the internal set (CheXDet jacknife alternative free-response ROC-figure of merit [JAFROC-FOM]: 0.87, CheXNet JAFROC-FOM: 0.13; p<.001) and NIH-ChestX-ray14 (CheXDet JAFROC-FOM: 0.55, CheXNet JAFROC-FOM: 0.04; p<.001). To summarize, fine-grained annotations overcame shortcut learning and enabled DL models to identify correct lesion patterns, improving the models' generalizability.
summary: Two DL models were developed using radiograph-level annotations (yes or no disease) and fine-grained lesion-level annotations (lesion bounding boxes), respectively named CheXNet and CheXDet. The models' internal classification performance and lesion localization performance were compared on a testing set (n=2,922), external classification performance was compared on NIH-Google (n=4,376) and PadChest (n=24,536) datasets, and external lesion localization performance was compared on NIH-ChestX-ray14 dataset (n=880). The models were also compared to radiologists on a subset of the internal testing set (n=496). Given sufficient training data, both models performed comparably to radiologists. CheXDet achieved significant improvement for external classification, such as in classifying fracture on NIH-Google (CheXDet area under the ROC curve [AUC]: 0.67, CheXNet AUC: 0.51; p<.001) and PadChest (CheXDet AUC: 0.78, CheXNet AUC: 0.55; p<.001). CheXDet achieved higher lesion detection performance than CheXNet for most abnormalities on all datasets, such as in detecting pneumothorax on the internal set (CheXDet jacknife alternative free-response ROC-figure of merit [JAFROC-FOM]: 0.87, CheXNet JAFROC-FOM: 0.13; p<.001) and NIH-ChestX-ray14 (CheXDet JAFROC-FOM: 0.55, CheXNet JAFROC-FOM: 0.04; p<.001). To summarize, fine-grained annotations overcame shortcut learning and enabled DL models to identify correct lesion patterns, improving the models' generalizability.
abstract_zh: 使用射线照片级注释（是或无疾病）和细粒度病变级注释（病变边界框）开发了两个深度学习模型，分别命名为 CheXNet 和 CheXDet。在测试集（n=2,922）上比较模型的内部分类性能和病变定位性能，在NIH-Google（n=4,376）和PadChest（n=24,536）数据集上比较外部分类性能，在NIH-ChestX-ray14数据集（n=880）上比较外部病变定位性能。这些模型还与放射科医生在内部测试集的子集上进行了比较（n=496）。如果有足够的训练数据，这两个模型的表现与放射科医生相当。 CheXDet 在外部分类方面取得了显着改进，例如在 NIH-Google 上对骨折进行分类（CheXDet ROC 曲线下面积 [AUC]：0.67，CheXNet AUC：0.51；p<.001）和 PadChest（CheXDet AUC：0.78，CheXNet AUC：0.55；p<.001）。对于所有数据集上的大多数异常，CheXDet 都实现了比 CheXNet 更高的病变检测性能，例如在内部集上检测气胸（CheXDet jacknife 替代自由响应 ROC 品质因数 [JAFROC-FOM]：0.87，CheXNet JAFROC-FOM：0.13；p<.001）和 NIH-ChestX-ray14 (CheXDet) JAFROC-FOM：0.55，CheXNet JAFROC-FOM：0.04；p<.001）。总而言之，细粒度注释克服了快捷学习，使深度学习模型能够识别正确的病变模式，从而提高了模型的通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了基于放射影像级别注释和细粒度病灶级别注释的两种深度学习模型在放射影像诊断中的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 解决深度学习模型在医学影像诊断中依赖表面特征（shortcut learning）而非真实病灶模式的问题，提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 开发两种模型：CheXNet（使用影像级别注释）和CheXDet（使用细粒度病灶边界框注释），在内部测试集和多个外部数据集上比较分类与病灶定位性能，并与放射科医生对比。
AI.result: CheXDet在外部数据集分类（如骨折AUC提升至0.67-0.78）和病灶检测（如气胸JAFROC-FOM达0.87）上显著优于CheXNet，且性能接近放射科医生。
AI.conclusion: 细粒度注释能克服模型shortcut learning，使其更准确识别病灶模式，从而提升模型泛化能力与诊断可靠性。

result: CheXDet在外部数据集分类（如骨折AUC提升至0.67-0.78）和病灶检测（如气胸JAFROC-FOM达0.87）上显著优于CheXNet，且性能接近放射科医生。
conclusion: 细粒度注释能克服模型shortcut learning，使其更准确识别病灶模式，从而提升模型泛化能力与诊断可靠性。
search_text: Rethinking Annotation Granularity for Overcoming Shortcuts in Deep Learning-based Radiograph Diagnosis: A Multicenter Study 重新思考注释粒度以克服基于深度学习的放射线诊断中的捷径：一项多中心研究 Two DL models were developed using radiograph-level annotations (yes or no disease) and fine-grained lesion-level annotations (lesion bounding boxes), respectively named CheXNet and CheXDet. The models' internal classification performance and lesion localization performance were compared on a testing set (n=2,922), external classification performance was compared on NIH-Google (n=4,376) and PadChest (n=24,536) datasets, and external lesion localization performance was compared on NIH-ChestX-ray14 dataset (n=880). The models were also compared to radiologists on a subset of the internal testing set (n=496). Given sufficient training data, both models performed comparably to radiologists. CheXDet achieved significant improvement for external classification, such as in classifying fracture on NIH-Google (CheXDet area under the ROC curve [AUC]: 0.67, CheXNet AUC: 0.51; p<.001) and PadChest (CheXDet AUC: 0.78, CheXNet AUC: 0.55; p<.001). CheXDet achieved higher lesion detection performance than CheXNet for most abnormalities on all datasets, such as in detecting pneumothorax on the internal set (CheXDet jacknife alternative free-response ROC-figure of merit [JAFROC-FOM]: 0.87, CheXNet JAFROC-FOM: 0.13; p<.001) and NIH-ChestX-ray14 (CheXDet JAFROC-FOM: 0.55, CheXNet JAFROC-FOM: 0.04; p<.001). To summarize, fine-grained annotations overcame shortcut learning and enabled DL models to identify correct lesion patterns, improving the models' generalizability. 使用射线照片级注释（是或无疾病）和细粒度病变级注释（病变边界框）开发了两个深度学习模型，分别命名为 CheXNet 和 CheXDet。在测试集（n=2,922）上比较模型的内部分类性能和病变定位性能，在NIH-Google（n=4,376）和PadChest（n=24,536）数据集上比较外部分类性能，在NIH-ChestX-ray14数据集（n=880）上比较外部病变定位性能。这些模型还与放射科医生在内部测试集的子集上进行了比较（n=496）。如果有足够的训练数据，这两个模型的表现与放射科医生相当。 CheXDet 在外部分类方面取得了显着改进，例如在 NIH-Google 上对骨折进行分类（CheXDet ROC 曲线下面积 [AUC]：0.67，CheXNet AUC：0.51；p<.001）和 PadChest（CheXDet AUC：0.78，CheXNet AUC：0.55；p<.001）。对于所有数据集上的大多数异常，CheXDet 都实现了比 CheXNet 更高的病变检测性能，例如在内部集上检测气胸（CheXDet jacknife 替代自由响应 ROC 品质因数 [JAFROC-FOM]：0.87，CheXNet JAFROC-FOM：0.13；p<.001）和 NIH-ChestX-ray14 (CheXDet) JAFROC-FOM：0.55，CheXNet JAFROC-FOM：0.04；p<.001）。总而言之，细粒度注释克服了快捷学习，使深度学习模型能够识别正确的病变模式，从而提高了模型的通用性。 本文比较了基于放射影像级别注释和细粒度病灶级别注释的两种深度学习模型在放射影像诊断中的性能差异。 Luyang Luo,Hao Chen,Yongjie Xiao,Yanning Zhou,Xi Wang,Varut Vardhanabhuti,Mingxiang Wu,Chu Han,Zaiyi Liu,Xin Hao Benjamin Fang,Efstratios Tsougenis,Huangjing Lin,Pheng-Ann Heng eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Felix Beierle,Uttam Dhakal,Caroline Cohrdes,Sophie Eicher,Rüdiger Pryss
title: Public Perception of the German COVID-19 Contact-Tracing App Corona-Warn-App
title_zh: 公众对德国 COVID-19 接触者追踪应用程序 Corona-Warn-App 的看法
comment: Accepted for publication at the 34th IEEE International Symposium on Computer-Based Medical Systems (IEEE CBMS 2021)
comments: Accepted for publication at the 34th IEEE International Symposium on Computer-Based Medical Systems (IEEE CBMS 2021)
abstract: Several governments introduced or promoted the use of contact-tracing apps during the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic. In Germany, the related app is called Corona-Warn-App, and by end of 2020, it had 22.8 million downloads. Contact tracing is a promising approach for containing the spread of the novel coronavirus. It is only effective if there is a large user base, which brings new challenges like app users unfamiliar with using smartphones or apps. As Corona-Warn-App is voluntary to use, reaching many users and gaining a positive public perception is crucial for its effectiveness. Based on app reviews and tweets, we are analyzing the public perception of Corona-Warn-App. We collected and analyzed all 78,963 app reviews for the Android and iOS versions from release (June 2020) to beginning of February 2021, as well as all original tweets until February 2021 containing #CoronaWarnApp (43,082). For the reviews, the most common words and n-grams point towards technical issues, but it remains unclear, to what extent this is due to the app itself, the used Exposure Notification Framework, system settings on the user's phone, or the user's misinterpretations of app content. For Twitter data, overall, based on tweet content, frequent hashtags, and interactions with tweets, we conclude that the German Twitter-sphere widely reports adopting the app and promotes its use.
summary: Several governments introduced or promoted the use of contact-tracing apps during the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic. In Germany, the related app is called Corona-Warn-App, and by end of 2020, it had 22.8 million downloads. Contact tracing is a promising approach for containing the spread of the novel coronavirus. It is only effective if there is a large user base, which brings new challenges like app users unfamiliar with using smartphones or apps. As Corona-Warn-App is voluntary to use, reaching many users and gaining a positive public perception is crucial for its effectiveness. Based on app reviews and tweets, we are analyzing the public perception of Corona-Warn-App. We collected and analyzed all 78,963 app reviews for the Android and iOS versions from release (June 2020) to beginning of February 2021, as well as all original tweets until February 2021 containing #CoronaWarnApp (43,082). For the reviews, the most common words and n-grams point towards technical issues, but it remains unclear, to what extent this is due to the app itself, the used Exposure Notification Framework, system settings on the user's phone, or the user's misinterpretations of app content. For Twitter data, overall, based on tweet content, frequent hashtags, and interactions with tweets, we conclude that the German Twitter-sphere widely reports adopting the app and promotes its use.
abstract_zh: 在持续的 COVID-19 大流行期间，一些政府引入或推广了接触者追踪应用程序的使用。在德国，相关应用程序名为 Corona-Warn-App，截至 2020 年底，下载量为 2280 万次。接触者追踪是遏制新型冠状病毒传播的一种有前景的方法。只有拥有庞大的用户群才有效，这会带来新的挑战，例如应用程序用户不熟悉使用智能手机或应用程序。由于 Corona-Warn-App 是自愿使用的，因此接触到许多用户并获得积极的公众认知对于其有效性至关重要。根据应用程序评论和推文，我们正在分析公众对 Corona-Warn-App 的看法。我们收集并分析了从发布（2020 年 6 月）到 2021 年 2 月开始的 Android 和 iOS 版本的所有 78,963 条应用评论，以及截至 2021 年 2 月的所有包含 #CoronaWarnApp 的原始推文 (43,082)。对于评论，最常见的单词和 n-gram 都指向技术问题，但目前尚不清楚这在多大程度上是由于应用程序本身、所使用的暴露通知框架、用户手机上的系统设置或用户对应用程序内容的误解造成的。对于 Twitter 数据，总体而言，根据推文内容、频繁的主题标签以及与推文的交互，我们得出的结论是，德国 Twitter 领域广泛报道了该应用程序的采用并推广了其使用。

AI.tldr: 分析德国新冠接触追踪应用Corona-Warn-App的公众感知，通过分析应用评论和推文数据评估其接受度与问题。
AI.motivation: 由于该应用使用自愿原则，需了解公众接受度及潜在问题以提升其防疫效果。
AI.method: 收集Android和iOS平台78,963条应用评论及43,082条含#CoronaWarnApp标签的推文，通过关键词、n-gram和互动数据进行分析。
AI.result: 应用评论显示技术问题频发但原因不明；推文数据表明德国公众普遍采用并推广该应用。
AI.conclusion: 公众对应用接受度较高，但需解决技术问题及用户教育以提升使用体验和效果。

authors_text: Yang Liu,Zhenyue Qin,Saeed Anwar,Pan Ji,Dongwoo Kim,Sabrina Caldwell,Tom Gedeon
title: Invertible Denoising Network: A Light Solution for Real Noise Removal
title_zh: 可逆去噪网络：真正消除噪音的轻型解决方案
abstract: Invertible networks have various benefits for image denoising since they are lightweight, information-lossless, and memory-saving during back-propagation. However, applying invertible models to remove noise is challenging because the input is noisy, and the reversed output is clean, following two different distributions. We propose an invertible denoising network, InvDN, to address this challenge. InvDN transforms the noisy input into a low-resolution clean image and a latent representation containing noise. To discard noise and restore the clean image, InvDN replaces the noisy latent representation with another one sampled from a prior distribution during reversion. The denoising performance of InvDN is better than all the existing competitive models, achieving a new state-of-the-art result for the SIDD dataset while enjoying less run time. Moreover, the size of InvDN is far smaller, only having 4.2% of the number of parameters compared to the most recently proposed DANet. Further, via manipulating the noisy latent representation, InvDN is also able to generate noise more similar to the original one. Our code is available at: https://github.com/Yang-Liu1082/InvDN.git.
summary: Invertible networks have various benefits for image denoising since they are lightweight, information-lossless, and memory-saving during back-propagation. However, applying invertible models to remove noise is challenging because the input is noisy, and the reversed output is clean, following two different distributions. We propose an invertible denoising network, InvDN, to address this challenge. InvDN transforms the noisy input into a low-resolution clean image and a latent representation containing noise. To discard noise and restore the clean image, InvDN replaces the noisy latent representation with another one sampled from a prior distribution during reversion. The denoising performance of InvDN is better than all the existing competitive models, achieving a new state-of-the-art result for the SIDD dataset while enjoying less run time. Moreover, the size of InvDN is far smaller, only having 4.2% of the number of parameters compared to the most recently proposed DANet. Further, via manipulating the noisy latent representation, InvDN is also able to generate noise more similar to the original one. Our code is available at: https://github.com/Yang-Liu1082/InvDN.git.
abstract_zh: 可逆网络对于图像去噪具有多种优势，因为它们轻量级、信息无损并且在反向传播过程中节省内存。然而，应用可逆模型来消除噪声具有挑战性，因为输入是有噪声的，而反转的输出是干净的，遵循两种不同的分布。我们提出了一种可逆去噪网络 InvDN 来应对这一挑战。 InvDN 将噪声输入转换为低分辨率的干净图像和包含噪声的潜在表示。为了丢弃噪声并恢复干净的图像，InvDN 将噪声潜在表示替换为在回归过程中从先验分布中采样的另一种表示。 InvDN 的去噪性能优于所有现有竞争模型，在 SIDD 数据集上实现了新的最先进结果，同时运行时间更短。此外，与最近提出的 DANet 相比，InvDN 的规模要小得多，参数数量仅为 4.2%。此外，通过操纵噪声潜在表示，InvDN 还能够生成与原始噪声更相似的噪声。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/Yang-Liu1082/InvDN.git。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可逆去噪网络InvDN，用于解决真实噪声去除问题。
AI.motivation: 可逆网络在图像去噪中具有轻量、无信息损失和节省内存的优点，但将可逆模型应用于去噪存在挑战，因为输入是噪声图像，而反转输出是干净图像，遵循不同的分布。
AI.method: InvDN将噪声输入转换为低分辨率的干净图像和包含噪声的潜在表示。在反转过程中，InvDN用从先验分布中采样的潜在表示替换噪声潜在表示，以去除噪声并恢复干净图像。
AI.result: InvDN在SIDD数据集上实现了最先进的去噪性能，运行时间更短，模型大小仅为DANet的4.2%。此外，通过操纵噪声潜在表示，InvDN还能生成与原始噪声更相似的噪声。
AI.conclusion: InvDN在去噪任务中表现出色，具有更小的模型大小和更优的性能，为真实噪声去除提供了一种轻量级解决方案。

Moreover, the size of InvDN is far smaller, only having 4.2% of the number of parameters compared to the most recently proposed DANet. Further, via manipulating the noisy latent representation, InvDN is also able to generate noise more similar to the original one. Our code is available at: https://github.com/Yang-Liu1082/InvDN.git. 可逆网络对于图像去噪具有多种优势，因为它们轻量级、信息无损并且在反向传播过程中节省内存。然而，应用可逆模型来消除噪声具有挑战性，因为输入是有噪声的，而反转的输出是干净的，遵循两种不同的分布。我们提出了一种可逆去噪网络 InvDN 来应对这一挑战。 InvDN 将噪声输入转换为低分辨率的干净图像和包含噪声的潜在表示。为了丢弃噪声并恢复干净的图像，InvDN 将噪声潜在表示替换为在回归过程中从先验分布中采样的另一种表示。 InvDN 的去噪性能优于所有现有竞争模型，在 SIDD 数据集上实现了新的最先进结果，同时运行时间更短。此外，与最近提出的 DANet 相比，InvDN 的规模要小得多，参数数量仅为 4.2%。此外，通过操纵噪声潜在表示，InvDN 还能够生成与原始噪声更相似的噪声。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/Yang-Liu1082/InvDN.git。 本文提出了一种可逆去噪网络InvDN，用于解决真实噪声去除问题。 Yang Liu,Zhenyue Qin,Saeed Anwar,Pan Ji,Dongwoo Kim,Sabrina Caldwell,Tom Gedeon eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: James Townsend
title: Lossless Compression with Latent Variable Models
title_zh: 使用潜变量模型进行无损压缩
abstract: We develop a simple and elegant method for lossless compression using latent variable models, which we call 'bits back with asymmetric numeral systems' (BB-ANS). The method involves interleaving encode and decode steps, and achieves an optimal rate when compressing batches of data. We demonstrate it firstly on the MNIST test set, showing that state-of-the-art lossless compression is possible using a small variational autoencoder (VAE) model. We then make use of a novel empirical insight, that fully convolutional generative models, trained on small images, are able to generalize to images of arbitrary size, and extend BB-ANS to hierarchical latent variable models, enabling state-of-the-art lossless compression of full-size colour images from the ImageNet dataset. We describe 'Craystack', a modular software framework which we have developed for rapid prototyping of compression using deep generative models.
summary: We develop a simple and elegant method for lossless compression using latent variable models, which we call 'bits back with asymmetric numeral systems' (BB-ANS). The method involves interleaving encode and decode steps, and achieves an optimal rate when compressing batches of data. We demonstrate it firstly on the MNIST test set, showing that state-of-the-art lossless compression is possible using a small variational autoencoder (VAE) model. We then make use of a novel empirical insight, that fully convolutional generative models, trained on small images, are able to generalize to images of arbitrary size, and extend BB-ANS to hierarchical latent variable models, enabling state-of-the-art lossless compression of full-size colour images from the ImageNet dataset. We describe 'Craystack', a modular software framework which we have developed for rapid prototyping of compression using deep generative models.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了一种使用潜在变量模型进行无损压缩的简单而优雅的方法，我们将其称为“非对称数字系统的比特返回”（BB-ANS）。该方法涉及交错编码和解码步骤，并在压缩批量数据时实现最佳速率。我们首先在 MNIST 测试集上进行了演示，表明使用小型变分自动编码器 (VAE) 模型可以实现最先进的无损压缩。然后，我们利用一种新颖的经验见解，即在小图像上训练的完全卷积生成模型能够泛化到任意大小的图像，并将 BB-ANS 扩展到分层潜变量模型，从而能够对 ImageNet 数据集中的全尺寸彩色图像进行最先进的无损压缩。我们描述了“Craystack”，这是一个模块化软件框架，我们开发该框架是为了使用深度生成模型快速构建压缩原型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于潜在变量模型的无损压缩方法'bits back with asymmetric numeral systems'(BB-ANS)，并展示其在图像压缩中的应用。
AI.motivation: 传统压缩方法难以兼顾压缩效率与模型灵活性，需探索更高效的深度生成模型压缩方案。
AI.method: 开发BB-ANS方法，通过交错编码解码步骤实现最优压缩率，并扩展至分层潜在变量模型，结合全卷积生成网络实现图像泛化。
AI.result: 在MNIST数据集上验证小型VAE的有效性，进一步实现ImageNet全尺寸彩色图像的无损压缩，开发Craystack框架支持快速原型开发。
AI.conclusion: BB-ANS方法结合深度生成模型可实现高效无损压缩，分层结构与软件框架为大规模图像压缩提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Khurram Azeem Hashmi,Didier Stricker,Marcus Liwicki,Muhammad Noman Afzal,Muhammad Zeshan Afzal
title: Guided Table Structure Recognition through Anchor Optimization
title_zh: 通过锚点优化引导表结构识别
comment: 13 pages, 8 figures, 5 tables. Submitted to IEEE Access Journal
comments: 13 pages, 8 figures, 5 tables. Submitted to IEEE Access Journal
abstract: This paper presents the novel approach towards table structure recognition by leveraging the guided anchors. The concept differs from current state-of-the-art approaches for table structure recognition that naively apply object detection methods. In contrast to prior techniques, first, we estimate the viable anchors for table structure recognition. Subsequently, these anchors are exploited to locate the rows and columns in tabular images. Furthermore, the paper introduces a simple and effective method that improves the results by using tabular layouts in realistic scenarios. The proposed method is exhaustively evaluated on the two publicly available datasets of table structure recognition i.e ICDAR-2013 and TabStructDB. We accomplished state-of-the-art results on the ICDAR-2013 dataset with an average F-Measure of 95.05$\%$ (94.6$\%$ for rows and 96.32$\%$ for columns) and surpassed the baseline results on the TabStructDB dataset with an average F-Measure of 94.17$\%$ (94.08$\%$ for rows and 95.06$\%$ for columns).
summary: This paper presents the novel approach towards table structure recognition by leveraging the guided anchors. The concept differs from current state-of-the-art approaches for table structure recognition that naively apply object detection methods. In contrast to prior techniques, first, we estimate the viable anchors for table structure recognition. Subsequently, these anchors are exploited to locate the rows and columns in tabular images. Furthermore, the paper introduces a simple and effective method that improves the results by using tabular layouts in realistic scenarios. The proposed method is exhaustively evaluated on the two publicly available datasets of table structure recognition i.e ICDAR-2013 and TabStructDB. We accomplished state-of-the-art results on the ICDAR-2013 dataset with an average F-Measure of 95.05$\%$ (94.6$\%$ for rows and 96.32$\%$ for columns) and surpassed the baseline results on the TabStructDB dataset with an average F-Measure of 94.17$\%$ (94.08$\%$ for rows and 95.06$\%$ for columns).
abstract_zh: 本文提出了利用引导锚点进行表格结构识别的新方法。该概念不同于当前最先进的表结构识别方法，后者简单地应用了对象检测方法。与现有技术相比，首先，我们估计表结构识别的可行锚点。随后，利用这些锚点来定位表格图像中的行和列。此外，本文还介绍了一种简单有效的方法，可以在现实场景中使用表格布局来改善结果。所提出的方法在两个公开可用的表结构识别数据集（即 ICDAR-2013 和 TabStructDB）上进行了详尽的评估。我们在 ICDAR-2013 数据集上取得了最先进的结果，平均 F 测量为 95.05$\%$（行为 94.6$\%$，列为 96.32$\%$），并超越了 TabStructDB 数据集上的基线结果，平均 F 测量为 94.17$\%$（行为 94.08$\%$，行为 94.08$\%$，列为 95.06$\%$）对于列）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过锚点优化引导的表格结构识别方法，旨在提高表格结构识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有表格结构识别方法直接应用目标检测技术效果不佳，需探索更有效的锚点引导机制以提升识别性能。
AI.method: 首先估计表格结构的可行锚点，再利用锚点定位表格行和列，并通过真实场景下的表格布局优化方法提升结果。
AI.result: 在ICDAR-2013数据集上达到95.05%的平均F值（行94.6%，列96.32%），在TabStructDB数据集上达到94.17%的平均F值（行94.08%，列95.06%）。
AI.conclusion: 锚点优化方法显著优于基线模型，在公开数据集上实现了最先进的表格结构识别效果。

authors_text: Pablo Araneda,Matias Greco,Jorge A. Baier
title: Exploiting Learned Policies in Focal Search
title_zh: 在焦点搜索中利用学到的策略
abstract: Recent machine-learning approaches to deterministic search and domain-independent planning employ policy learning to speed up search. Unfortunately, when attempting to solve a search problem by successively applying a policy, no guarantees can be given on solution quality. The problem of how to effectively use a learned policy within a bounded-suboptimal search algorithm remains largely as an open question. In this paper, we propose various ways in which such policies can be integrated into Focal Search, assuming that the policy is a neural network classifier. Furthermore, we provide mathematical foundations for some of the resulting algorithms. To evaluate the resulting algorithms over a number of policies with varying accuracy, we use synthetic policies which can be generated for a target accuracy for problems where the search space can be held in memory. We evaluate our focal search variants over three benchmark domains using our synthetic approach, and on the 15-puzzle using a neural network learned using 1.5 million examples. We observe that Discrepancy Focal Search, which we show expands the node which maximizes an approximation of the probability that its corresponding path is a prefix of an optimal path, obtains, in general, the best results in terms of runtime and solution quality.
summary: Recent machine-learning approaches to deterministic search and domain-independent planning employ policy learning to speed up search. Unfortunately, when attempting to solve a search problem by successively applying a policy, no guarantees can be given on solution quality. The problem of how to effectively use a learned policy within a bounded-suboptimal search algorithm remains largely as an open question. In this paper, we propose various ways in which such policies can be integrated into Focal Search, assuming that the policy is a neural network classifier. Furthermore, we provide mathematical foundations for some of the resulting algorithms. To evaluate the resulting algorithms over a number of policies with varying accuracy, we use synthetic policies which can be generated for a target accuracy for problems where the search space can be held in memory. We evaluate our focal search variants over three benchmark domains using our synthetic approach, and on the 15-puzzle using a neural network learned using 1.5 million examples. We observe that Discrepancy Focal Search, which we show expands the node which maximizes an approximation of the probability that its corresponding path is a prefix of an optimal path, obtains, in general, the best results in terms of runtime and solution quality.
abstract_zh: 最近的确定性搜索和领域独立规划的机器学习方法采用策略学习来加速搜索。不幸的是，当尝试通过连续应用策略来解决搜索问题时，无法保证解决方案的质量。如何在有界次优搜索算法中有效地使用学习策略的问题在很大程度上仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们提出了将此类策略集成到焦点搜索中的各种方法，假设该策略是神经网络分类器。此外，我们为一些由此产生的算法提供了数学基础。为了评估具有不同精度的多种策略的结果算法，我们使用合成策略，可以为搜索空间可以保存在内存中的问题生成目标精度。我们使用我们的合成方法在三个基准域上评估我们的焦点搜索变体，并使用使用 150 万个示例学习的神经网络评估 15 个谜题。我们观察到，我们展示的差异焦点搜索扩展了节点，该节点最大化了其相应路径是最佳路径的前缀的概率的近似值，通常在运行时间和解决方案质量方面获得了最佳结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将学习到的神经网络策略集成到焦点搜索（Focal Search）中，以提升确定性搜索和领域无关规划的效率，同时保证解的质量。
AI.motivation: 现有基于策略学习的搜索方法在连续应用策略时无法保证解的质量，如何将学习策略有效结合到有界次优搜索算法中仍是一个开放问题。
AI.method: 假设策略为神经网络分类器，提出多种集成方式并建立数学基础；通过合成策略（针对可存储搜索空间的问题）和实际神经网络（如15-puzzle的1.5百万样本训练模型）进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于节点扩展概率逼近最优路径前缀的Discrepancy Focal Search在运行时间和解质量上表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法为在焦点搜索中有效利用学习策略提供了理论支持和实践验证，其中Discrepancy变体在效率与质量间取得最佳平衡。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出将学习到的神经网络策略集成到焦点搜索（Focal Search）中，以提升确定性搜索和领域无关规划的效率，同时保证解的质量。

search_text: Exploiting Learned Policies in Focal Search 在焦点搜索中利用学到的策略 Recent machine-learning approaches to deterministic search and domain-independent planning employ policy learning to speed up search. Unfortunately, when attempting to solve a search problem by successively applying a policy, no guarantees can be given on solution quality. The problem of how to effectively use a learned policy within a bounded-suboptimal search algorithm remains largely as an open question. In this paper, we propose various ways in which such policies can be integrated into Focal Search, assuming that the policy is a neural network classifier. Furthermore, we provide mathematical foundations for some of the resulting algorithms. To evaluate the resulting algorithms over a number of policies with varying accuracy, we use synthetic policies which can be generated for a target accuracy for problems where the search space can be held in memory. We evaluate our focal search variants over three benchmark domains using our synthetic approach, and on the 15-puzzle using a neural network learned using 1.5 million examples. We observe that Discrepancy Focal Search, which we show expands the node which maximizes an approximation of the probability that its corresponding path is a prefix of an optimal path, obtains, in general, the best results in terms of runtime and solution quality. 最近的确定性搜索和领域独立规划的机器学习方法采用策略学习来加速搜索。不幸的是，当尝试通过连续应用策略来解决搜索问题时，无法保证解决方案的质量。如何在有界次优搜索算法中有效地使用学习策略的问题在很大程度上仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们提出了将此类策略集成到焦点搜索中的各种方法，假设该策略是神经网络分类器。此外，我们为一些由此产生的算法提供了数学基础。为了评估具有不同精度的多种策略的结果算法，我们使用合成策略，可以为搜索空间可以保存在内存中的问题生成目标精度。我们使用我们的合成方法在三个基准域上评估我们的焦点搜索变体，并使用使用 150 万个示例学习的神经网络评估 15 个谜题。我们观察到，我们展示的差异焦点搜索扩展了节点，该节点最大化了其相应路径是最佳路径的前缀的概率的近似值，通常在运行时间和解决方案质量方面获得了最佳结果。 本文提出将学习到的神经网络策略集成到焦点搜索（Focal Search）中，以提升确定性搜索和领域无关规划的效率，同时保证解的质量。 Pablo Araneda,Matias Greco,Jorge A. Baier cs.AI

authors_text: Li Yang,Abdallah Shami
title: A Lightweight Concept Drift Detection and Adaptation Framework for IoT Data Streams
title_zh: 物联网数据流的轻量级概念漂移检测和适应框架
comment: Accepted and to appear in IEEE Internet of Things Magazine; Code is available at Github link:https://github.com/Western-OC2-Lab/OASW-Concept-Drift-Detection-and-Adaptation
comments: Accepted and to appear in IEEE Internet of Things Magazine; Code is available at Github link:https://github.com/Western-OC2-Lab/OASW-Concept-Drift-Detection-and-Adaptation
abstract: In recent years, with the increasing popularity of "Smart Technology", the number of Internet of Things (IoT) devices and systems have surged significantly. Various IoT services and functionalities are based on the analytics of IoT streaming data. However, IoT data analytics faces concept drift challenges due to the dynamic nature of IoT systems and the ever-changing patterns of IoT data streams. In this article, we propose an adaptive IoT streaming data analytics framework for anomaly detection use cases based on optimized LightGBM and concept drift adaptation. A novel drift adaptation method named Optimized Adaptive and Sliding Windowing (OASW) is proposed to adapt to the pattern changes of online IoT data streams. Experiments on two public datasets show the high accuracy and efficiency of our proposed adaptive LightGBM model compared against other state-of-the-art approaches. The proposed adaptive LightGBM model can perform continuous learning and drift adaptation on IoT data streams without human intervention.
summary: In recent years, with the increasing popularity of "Smart Technology", the number of Internet of Things (IoT) devices and systems have surged significantly. Various IoT services and functionalities are based on the analytics of IoT streaming data. However, IoT data analytics faces concept drift challenges due to the dynamic nature of IoT systems and the ever-changing patterns of IoT data streams. In this article, we propose an adaptive IoT streaming data analytics framework for anomaly detection use cases based on optimized LightGBM and concept drift adaptation. A novel drift adaptation method named Optimized Adaptive and Sliding Windowing (OASW) is proposed to adapt to the pattern changes of online IoT data streams. Experiments on two public datasets show the high accuracy and efficiency of our proposed adaptive LightGBM model compared against other state-of-the-art approaches. The proposed adaptive LightGBM model can perform continuous learning and drift adaptation on IoT data streams without human intervention.
abstract_zh: 近年来，随着“智能科技”的日益普及，物联网（IoT）设备和系统的数量大幅激增。各种物联网服务和功能都基于物联网流数据的分析。然而，由于物联网系统的动态性质和物联网数据流不断变化的模式，物联网数据分析面临概念漂移的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于优化的 LightGBM 和概念漂移适应的自适应物联网流数据分析框架，用于异常检测用例。提出了一种名为优化自适应和滑动窗口（OASW）的新颖漂移自适应方法来适应在线物联网数据流的模式变化。对两个公共数据集的实验表明，与其他最先进的方法相比，我们提出的自适应 LightGBM 模型具有较高的准确性和效率。所提出的自适应 LightGBM 模型可以在无需人工干预的情况下对物联网数据流执行持续学习和漂移适应。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级的概念漂移检测与适应框架，用于物联网数据流的异常检测，结合优化的LightGBM模型和OASW方法。
AI.motivation: 物联网数据流因系统动态性和模式变化面临概念漂移挑战，传统方法难以高效适应实时数据变化，需改进模型以提升分析准确性与自动化水平。
AI.method: 提出优化的LightGBM模型与新型OASW方法，通过自适应滑动窗口机制实现数据流的连续学习与漂移适应，无需人工干预。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上的实验表明，该模型在准确率和效率上优于现有先进方法，能有效应对物联网数据流的概念漂移问题。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的框架通过结合优化模型与自适应机制，为物联网实时数据流分析提供了高效、自动化的概念漂移解决方案。

authors_text: Mike Huisman,Aske Plaat,Jan N. van Rijn
title: Stateless Neural Meta-Learning using Second-Order Gradients
title_zh: 使用二阶梯度的无状态神经元学习
abstract: Deep learning typically requires large data sets and much compute power for each new problem that is learned. Meta-learning can be used to learn a good prior that facilitates quick learning, thereby relaxing these requirements so that new tasks can be learned quicker; two popular approaches are MAML and the meta-learner LSTM. In this work, we compare the two and formally show that the meta-learner LSTM subsumes MAML. Combining this insight with recent empirical findings, we construct a new algorithm (dubbed TURTLE) which is simpler than the meta-learner LSTM yet more expressive than MAML. TURTLE outperforms both techniques at few-shot sine wave regression and image classification on miniImageNet and CUB without any additional hyperparameter tuning, at a computational cost that is comparable with second-order MAML. The key to TURTLE's success lies in the use of second-order gradients, which also significantly increases the performance of the meta-learner LSTM by 1-6% accuracy.
summary: Deep learning typically requires large data sets and much compute power for each new problem that is learned. Meta-learning can be used to learn a good prior that facilitates quick learning, thereby relaxing these requirements so that new tasks can be learned quicker; two popular approaches are MAML and the meta-learner LSTM. In this work, we compare the two and formally show that the meta-learner LSTM subsumes MAML. Combining this insight with recent empirical findings, we construct a new algorithm (dubbed TURTLE) which is simpler than the meta-learner LSTM yet more expressive than MAML. TURTLE outperforms both techniques at few-shot sine wave regression and image classification on miniImageNet and CUB without any additional hyperparameter tuning, at a computational cost that is comparable with second-order MAML. The key to TURTLE's success lies in the use of second-order gradients, which also significantly increases the performance of the meta-learner LSTM by 1-6% accuracy.
abstract_zh: 深度学习通常需要大量数据集和大量计算能力来解决每个学习的新问题。元学习可以用来学习一个有利于快速学习的良好先验，从而放宽这些要求，以便可以更快地学习新任务；两种流行的方法是 MAML 和元学习器 LSTM。在这项工作中，我们比较了两者，并正式表明元学习器 LSTM 包含 MAML。将这一见解与最近的实证研究结果相结合，我们构建了一种新算法（称为 TURTLE），它比元学习器 LSTM 更简单，但比 MAML 更具表现力。 TURTLE 在 miniImageNet 和 CUB 上的少样本正弦波回归和图像分类方面优于这两种技术，无需任何额外的超参数调整，计算成本与二阶 MAML 相当。 TURTLE 成功的关键在于二阶梯度的使用，这也使元学习器 LSTM 的性能显着提高了 1-6% 的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于二阶梯度的无状态神经元元学习算法TURTLE，旨在提升元学习在少量样本任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习依赖大量数据和计算资源，而现有元学习方法（如MAML和元学习LSTM）存在表达能力或效率的局限，需探索更优解决方案。
AI.method: 通过理论分析证明元学习LSTM可覆盖MAML，结合二阶梯度优化设计出更简洁且表达能力更强的TURTLE算法。
AI.result: TURTLE在少样本正弦波回归及miniImageNet/CUB图像分类任务中超越MAML和元学习LSTM，且计算成本与二阶MAML相当，同时使LSTM性能提升1-6%。
AI.conclusion: 二阶梯度是TURTLE成功的关键，证明了其作为元学习新范式的潜力，为后续研究提供了理论与实践方向。

In this work, we compare the two and formally show that the meta-learner LSTM subsumes MAML. Combining this insight with recent empirical findings, we construct a new algorithm (dubbed TURTLE) which is simpler than the meta-learner LSTM yet more expressive than MAML. TURTLE outperforms both techniques at few-shot sine wave regression and image classification on miniImageNet and CUB without any additional hyperparameter tuning, at a computational cost that is comparable with second-order MAML. The key to TURTLE's success lies in the use of second-order gradients, which also significantly increases the performance of the meta-learner LSTM by 1-6% accuracy. 深度学习通常需要大量数据集和大量计算能力来解决每个学习的新问题。元学习可以用来学习一个有利于快速学习的良好先验，从而放宽这些要求，以便可以更快地学习新任务；两种流行的方法是 MAML 和元学习器 LSTM。在这项工作中，我们比较了两者，并正式表明元学习器 LSTM 包含 MAML。将这一见解与最近的实证研究结果相结合，我们构建了一种新算法（称为 TURTLE），它比元学习器 LSTM 更简单，但比 MAML 更具表现力。 TURTLE 在 miniImageNet 和 CUB 上的少样本正弦波回归和图像分类方面优于这两种技术，无需任何额外的超参数调整，计算成本与二阶 MAML 相当。 TURTLE 成功的关键在于二阶梯度的使用，这也使元学习器 LSTM 的性能显着提高了 1-6% 的精度。 本文提出了一种基于二阶梯度的无状态神经元元学习算法TURTLE，旨在提升元学习在少量样本任务中的表现。 Mike Huisman,Aske Plaat,Jan N. van Rijn cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Max Hermann,Boitumelo Ruf,Martin Weinmann
title: Real-time dense 3D Reconstruction from monocular video data captured by low-cost UAVs
title_zh: 利用低成本无人机捕获的单目视频数据进行实时密集 3D 重建
abstract: Real-time 3D reconstruction enables fast dense mapping of the environment which benefits numerous applications, such as navigation or live evaluation of an emergency. In contrast to most real-time capable approaches, our approach does not need an explicit depth sensor. Instead, we only rely on a video stream from a camera and its intrinsic calibration. By exploiting the self-motion of the unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) flying with oblique view around buildings, we estimate both camera trajectory and depth for selected images with enough novel content. To create a 3D model of the scene, we rely on a three-stage processing chain. First, we estimate the rough camera trajectory using a simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) algorithm. Once a suitable constellation is found, we estimate depth for local bundles of images using a Multi-View Stereo (MVS) approach and then fuse this depth into a global surfel-based model. For our evaluation, we use 55 video sequences with diverse settings, consisting of both synthetic and real scenes. We evaluate not only the generated reconstruction but also the intermediate products and achieve competitive results both qualitatively and quantitatively. At the same time, our method can keep up with a 30 fps video for a resolution of 768x448 pixels.
summary: Real-time 3D reconstruction enables fast dense mapping of the environment which benefits numerous applications, such as navigation or live evaluation of an emergency. In contrast to most real-time capable approaches, our approach does not need an explicit depth sensor. Instead, we only rely on a video stream from a camera and its intrinsic calibration. By exploiting the self-motion of the unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) flying with oblique view around buildings, we estimate both camera trajectory and depth for selected images with enough novel content. To create a 3D model of the scene, we rely on a three-stage processing chain. First, we estimate the rough camera trajectory using a simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) algorithm. Once a suitable constellation is found, we estimate depth for local bundles of images using a Multi-View Stereo (MVS) approach and then fuse this depth into a global surfel-based model. For our evaluation, we use 55 video sequences with diverse settings, consisting of both synthetic and real scenes. We evaluate not only the generated reconstruction but also the intermediate products and achieve competitive results both qualitatively and quantitatively. At the same time, our method can keep up with a 30 fps video for a resolution of 768x448 pixels.
abstract_zh: 实时 3D 重建可实现快速密集的环境测绘，这有利于众多应用，例如导航或紧急情况的实时评估。与大多数实时方法相比，我们的方法不需要明确的深度传感器。相反，我们只依赖来自摄像机的视频流及其内在校准。通过利用无人机（UAV）在建筑物周围以斜视飞行的自运动，我们估计了具有足够新颖内容的选定图像的相机轨迹和深度。为了创建场景的 3D 模型，我们依靠三阶段处理链。首先，我们使用同步定位与建图（SLAM）算法估计粗略的相机轨迹。一旦找到合适的星座，我们就会使用多视图立体（MVS）方法估计局部图像束的深度，然后将该深度融合到基于面元的全局模型中。为了进行评估，我们使用了 55 个具有不同设置的视频序列，其中包括合成场景和真实场景。我们不仅评估生成的重建，还评估中间产品，并在定性和定量上取得有竞争力的结果。同时，我们的方法可以跟上分辨率为 768x448 像素的 30 fps 视频。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需深度传感器的实时密集三维重建方法，利用低成本无人机单目视频数据实现环境建模。
AI.motivation: 现有实时三维重建方法依赖昂贵深度传感器，而本文旨在通过低成本单目摄像头结合无人机运动实现高效重建。
AI.method: 采用三阶段处理链：1) SLAM算法估计相机轨迹；2) 多视角立体视觉(MVS)计算局部图像深度；3) 将深度信息融合至全局surfel模型。
AI.result: 在55个合成与真实场景数据集上实现定性和定量竞争力，可处理768x448分辨率30fps视频流。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保证重建精度的同时实现实时性能，为无人机自主导航和应急响应提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Qiuchen Zhu,Tran Hiep Dinh,Manh Duong Phung,Quang Phuc Ha
title: Hierarchical Convolutional Neural Network with Feature Preservation and Autotuned Thresholding for Crack Detection
title_zh: 用于裂纹检测的具有特征保留和自动调整阈值的分层卷积神经网络
abstract: Drone imagery is increasingly used in automated inspection for infrastructure surface defects, especially in hazardous or unreachable environments. In machine vision, the key to crack detection rests with robust and accurate algorithms for image processing. To this end, this paper proposes a deep learning approach using hierarchical convolutional neural networks with feature preservation (HCNNFP) and an intercontrast iterative thresholding algorithm for image binarization. First, a set of branch networks is proposed, wherein the output of previous convolutional blocks is half-sizedly concatenated to the current ones to reduce the obscuration in the down-sampling stage taking into account the overall information loss. Next, to extract the feature map generated from the enhanced HCNN, a binary contrast-based autotuned thresholding (CBAT) approach is developed at the post-processing step, where patterns of interest are clustered within the probability map of the identified features. The proposed technique is then applied to identify surface cracks on the surface of roads, bridges or pavements. An extensive comparison with existing techniques is conducted on various datasets and subject to a number of evaluation criteria including the average F-measure (AF\b{eta}) introduced here for dynamic quantification of the performance. Experiments on crack images, including those captured by unmanned aerial vehicles inspecting a monorail bridge. The proposed technique outperforms the existing methods on various tested datasets especially for GAPs dataset with an increase of about 1.4% in terms of AF\b{eta} while the mean percentage error drops by 2.2%. Such performance demonstrates the merits of the proposed HCNNFP architecture for surface defect inspection.
summary: Drone imagery is increasingly used in automated inspection for infrastructure surface defects, especially in hazardous or unreachable environments. In machine vision, the key to crack detection rests with robust and accurate algorithms for image processing. To this end, this paper proposes a deep learning approach using hierarchical convolutional neural networks with feature preservation (HCNNFP) and an intercontrast iterative thresholding algorithm for image binarization. First, a set of branch networks is proposed, wherein the output of previous convolutional blocks is half-sizedly concatenated to the current ones to reduce the obscuration in the down-sampling stage taking into account the overall information loss. Next, to extract the feature map generated from the enhanced HCNN, a binary contrast-based autotuned thresholding (CBAT) approach is developed at the post-processing step, where patterns of interest are clustered within the probability map of the identified features. The proposed technique is then applied to identify surface cracks on the surface of roads, bridges or pavements. An extensive comparison with existing techniques is conducted on various datasets and subject to a number of evaluation criteria including the average F-measure (AF\b{eta}) introduced here for dynamic quantification of the performance. Experiments on crack images, including those captured by unmanned aerial vehicles inspecting a monorail bridge. The proposed technique outperforms the existing methods on various tested datasets especially for GAPs dataset with an increase of about 1.4% in terms of AF\b{eta} while the mean percentage error drops by 2.2%. Such performance demonstrates the merits of the proposed HCNNFP architecture for surface defect inspection.
abstract_zh: 无人机图像越来越多地用于基础设施表面缺陷的自动检查，特别是在危险或无法到达的环境中。在机器视觉中，裂纹检测的关键在于强大而准确的图像处理算法。为此，本文提出了一种使用具有特征保留的分层卷积神经网络（HCNNFP）的深度学习方法和用于图像二值化的相互对比迭代阈值算法。首先，提出了一组分支网络，其中先前卷积块的输出被连接到当前卷积块的一半，以减少下采样阶段的遮挡，同时考虑到整体信息损失。接下来，为了提取从增强型 HCNN 生成的特征图，在后处理步骤中开发了一种基于二进制对比度的自动调整阈值 (CBAT) 方法，其中感兴趣的模式在已识别特征的概率图中进行聚类。然后应用所提出的技术来识别道路、桥梁或人行道表面的表面裂缝。我们在各种数据集上与现有技术进行了广泛的比较，并遵循许多评估标准，包括此处引入的用于动态量化性能的平均 F 测量 (AF\b{eta})。对裂纹图像进行实验，包括无人机检查单轨铁路桥时捕获的图像。所提出的技术在各种测试数据集上优于现有方法，特别是对于 GAPs 数据集，在 AF\b{eta} 方面增加了约 1.4%，而平均百分比误差下降了 2.2%。这样的性能证明了所提出的用于表面缺陷检测的 HCNNFP 架构的优点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合特征保留和自适应阈值调整的分层卷积神经网络（HCNNFP）用于裂缝检测。
AI.motivation: 无人机图像在基础设施表面缺陷检测中应用广泛，但现有算法在准确性和鲁棒性方面仍有不足，因此需要改进的深度学习方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种分层卷积神经网络（HCNNFP），通过在卷积块之间进行半尺寸拼接减少下采样过程中的信息损失，并结合基于二值对比的自适应阈值（CBAT）算法进行图像二值化处理。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，该方法在AFβ指标上比现有方法提高了约1.4%，同时平均百分比误差降低了2.2%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在表面缺陷检测任务中表现出优越的性能，验证了HCNNFP架构的有效性。

authors_text: Shaoyu Zhang,Chen Chen,Xiyuan Hu,Silong Peng
title: Balanced Knowledge Distillation for Long-tailed Learning
title_zh: 长尾学习的平衡知识蒸馏
abstract: Deep models trained on long-tailed datasets exhibit unsatisfactory performance on tail classes. Existing methods usually modify the classification loss to increase the learning focus on tail classes, which unexpectedly sacrifice the performance on head classes. In fact, this scheme leads to a contradiction between the two goals of long-tailed learning, i.e., learning generalizable representations and facilitating learning for tail classes. In this work, we explore knowledge distillation in long-tailed scenarios and propose a novel distillation framework, named Balanced Knowledge Distillation (BKD), to disentangle the contradiction between the two goals and achieve both simultaneously. Specifically, given a vanilla teacher model, we train the student model by minimizing the combination of an instance-balanced classification loss and a class-balanced distillation loss. The former benefits from the sample diversity and learns generalizable representation, while the latter considers the class priors and facilitates learning mainly for tail classes. The student model trained with BKD obtains significant performance gain even compared with its teacher model. We conduct extensive experiments on several long-tailed benchmark datasets and demonstrate that the proposed BKD is an effective knowledge distillation framework in long-tailed scenarios, as well as a new state-of-the-art method for long-tailed learning. Code is available at https://github.com/EricZsy/BalancedKnowledgeDistillation .

abstract_zh: 在长尾数据集上训练的深度模型在尾类上表现出不令人满意的性能。现有的方法通常会修改分类损失以增加对尾类的学习重点，这意外地牺牲了头类的性能。事实上，这种方案导致了长尾学习的两个目标之间的矛盾，即学习可泛化的表示和促进尾类的学习。在这项工作中，我们探索了长尾场景中的知识蒸馏，并提出了一种新颖的蒸馏框架，称为平衡知识蒸馏（BKD），以消除两个目标之间的矛盾并同时实现这两个目标。具体来说，给定一个普通的教师模型，我们通过最小化实例平衡分类损失和类平衡蒸馏损失的组合来训练学生模型。前者受益于样本多样性并学习可泛化表示，而后者考虑类先验并主要促进尾类的学习。即使与教师模型相比，使用 BKD 训练的学生模型也获得了显着的性能提升。我们对几个长尾基准数据集进行了广泛的实验，并证明所提出的 BKD 是长尾场景中有效的知识蒸馏框架，也是长尾学习的一种新的最先进的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/EricZsy/BalancedKnowledgeDistillation 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为平衡知识蒸馏（BKD）的新框架，用于解决长尾学习中头类与尾类性能矛盾的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过调整分类损失提升尾类性能时，会牺牲头类性能，导致长尾学习中两个目标（通用表示学习与尾类学习）的矛盾。
AI.method: 设计BKD框架，结合实例平衡分类损失（学习通用表示）与类平衡蒸馏损失（侧重尾类学习），利用教师模型指导学生模型训练。
AI.result: 在多个长尾数据集上，BKD方法显著优于教师模型及现有方法，成为长尾学习的新SOTA技术。
AI.conclusion: BKD通过解耦长尾学习的两个目标，有效平衡头尾类性能，为知识蒸馏在长尾场景的应用提供了新思路。

search_text: Balanced Knowledge Distillation for Long-tailed Learning 长尾学习的平衡知识蒸馏 Deep models trained on long-tailed datasets exhibit unsatisfactory performance on tail classes. Existing methods usually modify the classification loss to increase the learning focus on tail classes, which unexpectedly sacrifice the performance on head classes. In fact, this scheme leads to a contradiction between the two goals of long-tailed learning, i.e., learning generalizable representations and facilitating learning for tail classes. In this work, we explore knowledge distillation in long-tailed scenarios and propose a novel distillation framework, named Balanced Knowledge Distillation (BKD), to disentangle the contradiction between the two goals and achieve both simultaneously. Specifically, given a vanilla teacher model, we train the student model by minimizing the combination of an instance-balanced classification loss and a class-balanced distillation loss. The former benefits from the sample diversity and learns generalizable representation, while the latter considers the class priors and facilitates learning mainly for tail classes. The student model trained with BKD obtains significant performance gain even compared with its teacher model. We conduct extensive experiments on several long-tailed benchmark datasets and demonstrate that the proposed BKD is an effective knowledge distillation framework in long-tailed scenarios, as well as a new state-of-the-art method for long-tailed learning. authors_text: Yingbo Gao,David Thulke,Alexander Gerstenberger,Khoa Viet Tran,Ralf Schlüter,Hermann Ney
title: On Sampling-Based Training Criteria for Neural Language Modeling
title_zh: 基于采样的神经语言模型训练标准
abstract: As the vocabulary size of modern word-based language models becomes ever larger, many sampling-based training criteria are proposed and investigated. The essence of these sampling methods is that the softmax-related traversal over the entire vocabulary can be simplified, giving speedups compared to the baseline. A problem we notice about the current landscape of such sampling methods is the lack of a systematic comparison and some myths about preferring one over another. In this work, we consider Monte Carlo sampling, importance sampling, a novel method we call compensated partial summation, and noise contrastive estimation. Linking back to the three traditional criteria, namely mean squared error, binary cross-entropy, and cross-entropy, we derive the theoretical solutions to the training problems. Contrary to some common belief, we show that all these sampling methods can perform equally well, as long as we correct for the intended class posterior probabilities. Experimental results in language modeling and automatic speech recognition on Switchboard and LibriSpeech support our claim, with all sampling-based methods showing similar perplexities and word error rates while giving the expected speedups.
summary: As the vocabulary size of modern word-based language models becomes ever larger, many sampling-based training criteria are proposed and investigated. The essence of these sampling methods is that the softmax-related traversal over the entire vocabulary can be simplified, giving speedups compared to the baseline. A problem we notice about the current landscape of such sampling methods is the lack of a systematic comparison and some myths about preferring one over another. In this work, we consider Monte Carlo sampling, importance sampling, a novel method we call compensated partial summation, and noise contrastive estimation. Linking back to the three traditional criteria, namely mean squared error, binary cross-entropy, and cross-entropy, we derive the theoretical solutions to the training problems. Contrary to some common belief, we show that all these sampling methods can perform equally well, as long as we correct for the intended class posterior probabilities. Experimental results in language modeling and automatic speech recognition on Switchboard and LibriSpeech support our claim, with all sampling-based methods showing similar perplexities and word error rates while giving the expected speedups.
abstract_zh: 随着现代基于单词的语言模型的词汇量变得越来越大，提出并研究了许多基于采样的训练标准。这些采样方法的本质是可以简化整个词汇表上与 softmax 相关的遍历，从而与基线相比提供加速。我们注意到目前此类抽样方法的一个问题是缺乏系统比较，并且存在一些关于更喜欢其中一种方法的误解。在这项工作中，我们考虑了蒙特卡洛采样、重要性采样、一种我们称之为补偿部分求和的新方法，以及噪声对比估计。回到三个传统标准，即均方误差、二元交叉熵和交叉熵，我们得出了训练问题的理论解决方案。与一些普遍看法相反，我们表明，只要我们纠正预期的类后验概率，所有这些采样方法都可以表现得同样好。 Switchboard 和 LibriSpeech 上的语言建模和自动语音识别的实验结果支持了我们的主张，所有基于采样的方法都显示出相似的困惑和单词错误率，同时给出了预期的加速。

AI.tldr: 本文研究神经语言模型中基于采样的训练准则，提出新方法并比较不同采样技术的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有采样方法缺乏系统比较且存在误区，需验证不同方法在调整后验概率下的性能差异。
AI.method: 分析蒙特卡洛采样、重要性采样、补偿部分求和及噪声对比估计，并结合传统损失函数推导理论解。
AI.result: 实验表明所有采样方法在调整后验概率后表现相近，且均实现预期加速效果。
AI.conclusion: 正确调整类后验概率可使各类采样方法性能相当，推翻原有方法优劣的刻板印象。

authors_text: Jiehan Zhou,Shouhua Zhang,Qinghua Lu,Wenbin Dai,Min Chen,Xin Liu,Susanna Pirttikangas,Yang Shi,Weishan Zhang,Enrique Herrera-Viedma
title: A Survey on Federated Learning and its Applications for Accelerating Industrial Internet of Things
title_zh: 联邦学习及其加速工业物联网应用的调查
abstract: Federated learning (FL) brings collaborative intelligence into industries without centralized training data to accelerate the process of Industry 4.0 on the edge computing level. FL solves the dilemma in which enterprises wish to make the use of data intelligence with security concerns. To accelerate industrial Internet of things with the further leverage of FL, existing achievements on FL are developed from three aspects: 1) define terminologies and elaborate a general framework of FL for accommodating various scenarios; 2) discuss the state-of-the-art of FL on fundamental researches including data partitioning, privacy preservation, model optimization, local model transportation, personalization, motivation mechanism, platform & tools, and benchmark; 3) discuss the impacts of FL from the economic perspective. To attract more attention from industrial academia and practice, a FL-transformed manufacturing paradigm is presented, and future research directions of FL are given and possible immediate applications in Industry 4.0 domain are also proposed.
summary: Federated learning (FL) brings collaborative intelligence into industries without centralized training data to accelerate the process of Industry 4.0 on the edge computing level. FL solves the dilemma in which enterprises wish to make the use of data intelligence with security concerns. To accelerate industrial Internet of things with the further leverage of FL, existing achievements on FL are developed from three aspects: 1) define terminologies and elaborate a general framework of FL for accommodating various scenarios; 2) discuss the state-of-the-art of FL on fundamental researches including data partitioning, privacy preservation, model optimization, local model transportation, personalization, motivation mechanism, platform & tools, and benchmark; 3) discuss the impacts of FL from the economic perspective. To attract more attention from industrial academia and practice, a FL-transformed manufacturing paradigm is presented, and future research directions of FL are given and possible immediate applications in Industry 4.0 domain are also proposed.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）将协作智能带入没有集中训练数据的行业，以加速边缘计算层面的工业4.0进程。 FL解决了企业在使用数据智能的同时又担心安全的困境。为了进一步利用FL加速工业物联网，FL的现有成果从三个方面发展：1）定义术语并详细阐述适应各种场景的FL总体框架； 2）讨论FL在数据划分、隐私保护、模型优化、本地模型传输、个性化、激励机制、平台和工具以及基准等基础研究方面的最新进展； 3）从经济角度讨论FL的影响。为了吸引工业学术界和实践的更多关注，提出了一种基于 FL 的制造范式，给出了 FL 的未来研究方向，并提出了在工业 4.0 领域可能的直接应用。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了联邦学习（FL）在工业物联网中的应用，探讨其如何加速工业4.0进程，并提出FL转化的制造范式及未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 解决企业数据安全与协作智能需求的矛盾，推动工业4.0在边缘计算层面的高效发展。
AI.method: 从三个维度系统梳理FL研究：1）定义术语与通用框架；2）分析数据划分、隐私保护等核心技术；3）评估经济影响并提出制造范式。
AI.result: 提出FL驱动的制造新范式，明确未来研究方向（如个性化机制、经济模型），并规划工业4.0场景下的落地应用。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习为工业物联网提供安全协作框架，需进一步解决模型优化与经济激励等挑战以实现规模化应用。

search_text: A Survey on Federated Learning and its Applications for Accelerating Industrial Internet of Things 联邦学习及其加速工业物联网应用的调查 Federated learning (FL) brings collaborative intelligence into industries without centralized training data to accelerate the process of Industry 4.0 on the edge computing level. FL solves the dilemma in which enterprises wish to make the use of data intelligence with security concerns. To accelerate industrial Internet of things with the further leverage of FL, existing achievements on FL are developed from three aspects: 1) define terminologies and elaborate a general framework of FL for accommodating various scenarios; 2) discuss the state-of-the-art of FL on fundamental researches including data partitioning, privacy preservation, model optimization, local model transportation, personalization, motivation mechanism, platform & tools, and benchmark; 3) discuss the impacts of FL from the economic perspective. To attract more attention from industrial academia and practice, a FL-transformed manufacturing paradigm is presented, and future research directions of FL are given and possible immediate applications in Industry 4.0 domain are also proposed. 联邦学习（FL）将协作智能带入没有集中训练数据的行业，以加速边缘计算层面的工业4.0进程。 FL解决了企业在使用数据智能的同时又担心安全的困境。为了进一步利用FL加速工业物联网，FL的现有成果从三个方面发展：1）定义术语并详细阐述适应各种场景的FL总体框架； 2）讨论FL在数据划分、隐私保护、模型优化、本地模型传输、个性化、激励机制、平台和工具以及基准等基础研究方面的最新进展； 3）从经济角度讨论FL的影响。为了吸引工业学术界和实践的更多关注，提出了一种基于 FL 的制造范式，给出了 FL 的未来研究方向，并提出了在工业 4.0 领域可能的直接应用。 本文综述了联邦学习（FL）在工业物联网中的应用，探讨其如何加速工业4.0进程，并提出FL转化的制造范式及未来研究方向。 Jiehan Zhou,Shouhua Zhang,Qinghua Lu,Wenbin Dai,Min Chen,Xin Liu,Susanna Pirttikangas,Yang Shi,Weishan Zhang,Enrique Herrera-Viedma cs.DC,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yunyan Hong,Ailing Zeng,Min Li,Cewu Lu,Li Jiang,Qiang Xu
title: Skimming and Scanning for Untrimmed Video Action Recognition
title_zh: 浏览和扫描未修剪的视频动作识别
abstract: Video action recognition (VAR) is a primary task of video understanding, and untrimmed videos are more common in real-life scenes. Untrimmed videos have redundant and diverse clips containing contextual information, so sampling dense clips is essential. Recently, some works attempt to train a generic model to select the N most representative clips. However, it is difficult to model the complex relations from intra-class clips and inter-class videos within a single model and fixed selected number, and the entanglement of multiple relations is also hard to explain. Thus, instead of "only look once", we argue "divide and conquer" strategy will be more suitable in untrimmed VAR. Inspired by the speed reading mechanism, we propose a simple yet effective clip-level solution based on skim-scan techniques. Specifically, the proposed Skim-Scan framework first skims the entire video and drops those uninformative and misleading clips. For the remaining clips, it scans clips with diverse features gradually to drop redundant clips but cover essential content. The above strategies can adaptively select the necessary clips according to the difficulty of the different videos. To trade off the computational complexity and performance, we observe the similar statistical expression between lightweight and heavy networks, thus it supports us to explore the combination of them. Comprehensive experiments are performed on ActivityNet and mini-FCVID datasets, and results demonstrate that our solution surpasses the state-of-the-art performance in terms of both accuracy and efficiency.
summary: Video action recognition (VAR) is a primary task of video understanding, and untrimmed videos are more common in real-life scenes. Untrimmed videos have redundant and diverse clips containing contextual information, so sampling dense clips is essential. However, it is difficult to model the complex relations from intra-class clips and inter-class videos within a single model and fixed selected number, and the entanglement of multiple relations is also hard to explain. Thus, instead of "only look once", we argue "divide and conquer" strategy will be more suitable in untrimmed VAR. Inspired by the speed reading mechanism, we propose a simple yet effective clip-level solution based on skim-scan techniques. Specifically, the proposed Skim-Scan framework first skims the entire video and drops those uninformative and misleading clips. For the remaining clips, it scans clips with diverse features gradually to drop redundant clips but cover essential content. The above strategies can adaptively select the necessary clips according to the difficulty of the different videos. To trade off the computational complexity and performance, we observe the similar statistical expression between lightweight and heavy networks, thus it supports us to explore the combination of them. Comprehensive experiments are performed on ActivityNet and mini-FCVID datasets, and results demonstrate that our solution surpasses the state-of-the-art performance in terms of both accuracy and efficiency.
abstract_zh: 视频动作识别（VAR）是视频理解的首要任务，未经修剪的视频在现实生活场景中更为常见。未经修剪的视频具有包含上下文信息的冗余且多样化的剪辑，因此对密集剪辑进行采样至关重要。最近，一些工作尝试训练通用模型来选择 N 个最具代表性的剪辑。然而，很难在单个模型和固定选定数量内对类内剪辑和类间视频的复杂关系进行建模，并且多个关系的纠缠也很难解释。因此，我们认为“分而治之”策略更适合未修剪的VAR，而不是“只看一次”。受快速阅读机制的启发，我们提出了一种基于略读扫描技术的简单而有效的剪辑级解决方案。具体来说，所提出的 Skim-Scan 框架首先浏览整个视频并删除那些无信息和误导性的剪辑。对于剩余的剪辑，它会逐渐扫描具有不同特征的剪辑，以丢弃多余的剪辑，但覆盖必要的内容。上述策略可以根据不同视频的难度自适应地选择必要的片段。为了权衡计算复杂度和性能，我们观察到轻量级网络和重型网络之间相似的统计表达式，从而支持我们探索它们的组合。在 ActivityNet 和 mini-FCVID 数据集上进行了全面的实验，结果表明我们的解决方案在准确性和效率方面都超越了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于跳读和扫读技术的未剪辑视频动作识别方法，通过自适应选择关键片段提升识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理未剪辑视频中复杂的类内/类间关系及固定片段数量选择时存在建模困难和可解释性不足的问题。
AI.method: 设计Skim-Scan框架，分两阶段处理视频：1）跳过无信息片段；2）逐步扫描保留多样化片段，结合轻量与重型网络结构平衡计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在ActivityNet和mini-FCVID数据集上，该方法在准确率和效率指标上均超越现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: 分而治之策略有效解决了未剪辑视频动作识别中的片段选择难题，框架设计兼顾性能与计算效率。

authors_text: Anthony Hu,Zak Murez,Nikhil Mohan,Sofía Dudas,Jeffrey Hawke,Vijay Badrinarayanan,Roberto Cipolla,Alex Kendall
title: FIERY: Future Instance Prediction in Bird's-Eye View from Surround Monocular Cameras
title_zh: FIERY：通过环绕单目相机鸟瞰未来实例预测
abstract: Driving requires interacting with road agents and predicting their future behaviour in order to navigate safely. We present FIERY: a probabilistic future prediction model in bird's-eye view from monocular cameras. Our model predicts future instance segmentation and motion of dynamic agents that can be transformed into non-parametric future trajectories. Our approach combines the perception, sensor fusion and prediction components of a traditional autonomous driving stack by estimating bird's-eye-view prediction directly from surround RGB monocular camera inputs. FIERY learns to model the inherent stochastic nature of the future solely from camera driving data in an end-to-end manner, without relying on HD maps, and predicts multimodal future trajectories. We show that our model outperforms previous prediction baselines on the NuScenes and Lyft datasets. The code and trained models are available at https://github.com/wayveai/fiery.
summary: Driving requires interacting with road agents and predicting their future behaviour in order to navigate safely. We present FIERY: a probabilistic future prediction model in bird's-eye view from monocular cameras. Our model predicts future instance segmentation and motion of dynamic agents that can be transformed into non-parametric future trajectories. Our approach combines the perception, sensor fusion and prediction components of a traditional autonomous driving stack by estimating bird's-eye-view prediction directly from surround RGB monocular camera inputs. FIERY learns to model the inherent stochastic nature of the future solely from camera driving data in an end-to-end manner, without relying on HD maps, and predicts multimodal future trajectories. We show that our model outperforms previous prediction baselines on the NuScenes and Lyft datasets. The code and trained models are available at https://github.com/wayveai/fiery.
abstract_zh: 驾驶需要与道路工作人员互动并预测他们未来的行为，以便安全驾驶。我们提出 FIERY：单目相机鸟瞰的概率未来预测模型。我们的模型预测未来的实例分割和动态代理的运动，这些动态代理可以转化为非参数的未来轨迹。我们的方法通过直接从环绕 RGB 单目摄像头输入估计鸟瞰图预测，将传统自动驾驶堆栈的感知、传感器融合和预测组件结合在一起。 FIERY 学习仅通过摄像头驾驶数据以端到端的方式对未来固有的随机性进行建模，而不依赖于高清地图，并预测多模式的未来轨迹。我们表明，我们的模型优于之前在 NuScenes 和 Lyft 数据集上的预测基线。代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/wayveai/fiery 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FIERY模型，通过单目摄像头输入直接预测鸟瞰视角下的动态代理未来实例分割和运动轨迹，无需依赖高精度地图。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶需要预测道路代理的未来行为以实现安全导航，但传统方法依赖高精度地图和复杂传感器融合，限制了实际应用。本文旨在开发一种无需地图、仅通过摄像头数据实现端到端预测的模型。
AI.method: FIERY将感知、传感器融合与预测模块结合，直接从环绕单目摄像头RGB输入生成鸟瞰视角预测。模型通过端到端学习模拟未来行为的随机性，输出非参数化多模态轨迹。
AI.result: 在NuScenes和Lyft数据集上，FIERY优于现有预测基线方法，且代码与训练模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: FIERY通过整合感知与预测功能，无需高精度地图即可实现高效多模态未来轨迹预测，为自动驾驶提供了更轻量化的解决方案。

conclusion: FIERY通过整合感知与预测功能，无需高精度地图即可实现高效多模态未来轨迹预测，为自动驾驶提供了更轻量化的解决方案。
search_text: FIERY: Future Instance Prediction in Bird's-Eye View from Surround Monocular Cameras FIERY：通过环绕单目相机鸟瞰未来实例预测 Driving requires interacting with road agents and predicting their future behaviour in order to navigate safely. We present FIERY: a probabilistic future prediction model in bird's-eye view from monocular cameras. Our model predicts future instance segmentation and motion of dynamic agents that can be transformed into non-parametric future trajectories. Our approach combines the perception, sensor fusion and prediction components of a traditional autonomous driving stack by estimating bird's-eye-view prediction directly from surround RGB monocular camera inputs. FIERY learns to model the inherent stochastic nature of the future solely from camera driving data in an end-to-end manner, without relying on HD maps, and predicts multimodal future trajectories. We show that our model outperforms previous prediction baselines on the NuScenes and Lyft datasets. The code and trained models are available at https://github.com/wayveai/fiery. 驾驶需要与道路工作人员互动并预测他们未来的行为，以便安全驾驶。我们提出 FIERY：单目相机鸟瞰的概率未来预测模型。我们的模型预测未来的实例分割和动态代理的运动，这些动态代理可以转化为非参数的未来轨迹。我们的方法通过直接从环绕 RGB 单目摄像头输入估计鸟瞰图预测，将传统自动驾驶堆栈的感知、传感器融合和预测组件结合在一起。 FIERY 学习仅通过摄像头驾驶数据以端到端的方式对未来固有的随机性进行建模，而不依赖于高清地图，并预测多模式的未来轨迹。我们表明，我们的模型优于之前在 NuScenes 和 Lyft 数据集上的预测基线。代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/wayveai/fiery 获取。 本文提出FIERY模型，通过单目摄像头输入直接预测鸟瞰视角下的动态代理未来实例分割和运动轨迹，无需依赖高精度地图。 Anthony Hu,Zak Murez,Nikhil Mohan,Sofía Dudas,Jeffrey Hawke,Vijay Badrinarayanan,Roberto Cipolla,Alex Kendall cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Dillon Lohr,Henry Griffith,Oleg V Komogortsev
title: Eye Know You: Metric Learning for End-to-end Biometric Authentication Using Eye Movements from a Longitudinal Dataset
title_zh: Eye Know You：使用纵向数据集中的眼球运动进行端到端生物特征认证的度量学习
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: The permanence of eye movements as a biometric modality remains largely unexplored in the literature. The present study addresses this limitation by evaluating a novel exponentially-dilated convolutional neural network for eye movement authentication using a recently proposed longitudinal dataset known as GazeBase. The network is trained using multi-similarity loss, which directly enables the enrollment and authentication of out-of-sample users. In addition, this study includes an exhaustive analysis of the effects of evaluating on various tasks and downsampling from 1000 Hz to several lower sampling rates. Our results reveal that reasonable authentication accuracy may be achieved even during both a low-cognitive-load task and at low sampling rates. Moreover, we find that eye movements are quite resilient against template aging after as long as 3 years.
summary: The permanence of eye movements as a biometric modality remains largely unexplored in the literature. The present study addresses this limitation by evaluating a novel exponentially-dilated convolutional neural network for eye movement authentication using a recently proposed longitudinal dataset known as GazeBase. The network is trained using multi-similarity loss, which directly enables the enrollment and authentication of out-of-sample users. In addition, this study includes an exhaustive analysis of the effects of evaluating on various tasks and downsampling from 1000 Hz to several lower sampling rates. Our results reveal that reasonable authentication accuracy may be achieved even during both a low-cognitive-load task and at low sampling rates. Moreover, we find that eye movements are quite resilient against template aging after as long as 3 years.
abstract_zh: 眼球运动作为一种生物识别方式的持久性在文献中很大程度上仍未得到探索。本研究通过使用最近提出的称为 GazeBase 的纵向数据集来评估一种用于眼动认证的新型指数扩张卷积神经网络，从而解决了这一局限性。该网络使用多重相似性损失进行训练，可直接实现样本外用户的注册和身份验证。此外，本研究还对各种任务的评估效果以及从 1000 Hz 降采样到几个较低采样率的影响进行了详尽的分析。我们的结果表明，即使在低认知负荷任务和低采样率下也可以实现合理的身份验证准确性。此外，我们发现，在长达 3 年后，眼球运动对于模板老化具有相当的弹性。

AI.tldr: 本研究利用眼动数据进行端到端生物特征认证，提出了一种新的指数扩张卷积神经网络方法。
AI.motivation: 眼动作为生物特征模态的持久性在文献中研究不足，需探索其在长期认证中的可行性。
AI.method: 设计指数扩张卷积神经网络，结合多相似性损失函数，并在GazeBase纵向数据集上进行训练与评估。
AI.result: 在低认知负荷任务和低采样率下仍能达到合理认证准确率，且眼动特征在3年后仍具稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 眼动生物特征可通过所提方法实现有效认证，具有实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Jiqing Zhang,Chengjiang Long,Yuxin Wang,Haiyin Piao,Haiyang Mei,Xin Yang,Baocai Yin
title: A Two-Stage Attentive Network for Single Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: 用于单图像超分辨率的两级注意力网络
abstract: Recently, deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been widely explored in single image super-resolution (SISR) and contribute remarkable progress. However, most of the existing CNNs-based SISR methods do not adequately explore contextual information in the feature extraction stage and pay little attention to the final high-resolution (HR) image reconstruction step, hence hindering the desired SR performance. To address the above two issues, in this paper, we propose a two-stage attentive network (TSAN) for accurate SISR in a coarse-to-fine manner. Specifically, we design a novel multi-context attentive block (MCAB) to make the network focus on more informative contextual features. Moreover, we present an essential refined attention block (RAB) which could explore useful cues in HR space for reconstructing fine-detailed HR image. Extensive evaluations on four benchmark datasets demonstrate the efficacy of our proposed TSAN in terms of quantitative metrics and visual effects. Code is available at https://github.com/Jee-King/TSAN.
summary: Recently, deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been widely explored in single image super-resolution (SISR) and contribute remarkable progress. However, most of the existing CNNs-based SISR methods do not adequately explore contextual information in the feature extraction stage and pay little attention to the final high-resolution (HR) image reconstruction step, hence hindering the desired SR performance. To address the above two issues, in this paper, we propose a two-stage attentive network (TSAN) for accurate SISR in a coarse-to-fine manner. Specifically, we design a novel multi-context attentive block (MCAB) to make the network focus on more informative contextual features. Moreover, we present an essential refined attention block (RAB) which could explore useful cues in HR space for reconstructing fine-detailed HR image. Extensive evaluations on four benchmark datasets demonstrate the efficacy of our proposed TSAN in terms of quantitative metrics and visual effects. Code is available at https://github.com/Jee-King/TSAN.
abstract_zh: 最近，深度卷积神经网络（CNN）在单图像超分辨率（SISR）领域得到了广泛的探索，并取得了显着的进展。然而，大多数现有的基于 CNN 的 SISR 方法在特征提取阶段没有充分探索上下文信息，并且很少关注最终的高分辨率（HR）图像重建步骤，因此阻碍了所需的 SR 性能。为了解决上述两个问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种两阶段注意力网络（TSAN），以从粗到细的方式实现精确的 SISR。具体来说，我们设计了一种新颖的多上下文注意块（MCAB），使网络专注于信息更丰富的上下文特征。此外，我们提出了一个基本的精细注意力块（RAB），它可以探索 HR 空间中的有用线索，以重建精细的 HR 图像。对四个基准数据集的广泛评估证明了我们提出的 TSAN 在定量指标和视觉效果方面的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/Jee-King/TSAN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段注意力网络（TSAN），用于单图像超分辨率任务，通过分阶段提取上下文信息和重建高分辨率细节以提升超分效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CNN的超分方法在特征提取阶段未充分挖掘上下文信息，且对高分辨率图像重建步骤关注不足，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 设计两阶段网络：第一阶段采用多上下文注意力模块（MCAB）强化特征提取，第二阶段引入精细注意力模块（RAB）优化高分辨率图像重建。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上实验表明，TSAN在定量指标和视觉效果上均优于现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: TSAN通过分阶段注意力机制有效提升了单图像超分辨率性能，验证了上下文建模与细节重建联合优化的可行性。

However, most of the existing CNNs-based SISR methods do not adequately explore contextual information in the feature extraction stage and pay little attention to the final high-resolution (HR) image reconstruction step, hence hindering the desired SR performance. To address the above two issues, in this paper, we propose a two-stage attentive network (TSAN) for accurate SISR in a coarse-to-fine manner. Specifically, we design a novel multi-context attentive block (MCAB) to make the network focus on more informative contextual features. Moreover, we present an essential refined attention block (RAB) which could explore useful cues in HR space for reconstructing fine-detailed HR image. Extensive evaluations on four benchmark datasets demonstrate the efficacy of our proposed TSAN in terms of quantitative metrics and visual effects. authors_text: Siladittya Manna,Saumik Bhattacharya,Umapada Pal
title: SKID: Self-Supervised Learning for Knee Injury Diagnosis from MRI Data
title_zh: SKID：通过 MRI 数据进行膝关节损伤诊断的自我监督学习
abstract: In medical image analysis, the cost of acquiring high-quality data and their annotation by experts is a barrier in many medical applications. Most of the techniques used are based on supervised learning framework and need a large amount of annotated data to achieve satisfactory performance. As an alternative, in this paper, we propose a self-supervised learning (SSL) approach to learn the spatial anatomical representations from the frames of magnetic resonance (MR) video clips for the diagnosis of knee medical conditions. The pretext model learns meaningful spatial context-invariant representations. The downstream task in our paper is a class imbalanced multi-label classification. Different experiments show that the features learnt by the pretext model provide competitive performance in the downstream task. Moreover, the efficiency and reliability of the proposed pretext model in learning representations of minority classes without applying any strategy towards imbalance in the dataset can be seen from the results. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first work of its kind in showing the effectiveness and reliability of self-supervised learning algorithms in class imbalanced multi-label classification tasks on MR videos. The code for evaluation of the proposed work is available at https://github.com/sadimanna/skid.
summary: In medical image analysis, the cost of acquiring high-quality data and their annotation by experts is a barrier in many medical applications. Most of the techniques used are based on supervised learning framework and need a large amount of annotated data to achieve satisfactory performance. As an alternative, in this paper, we propose a self-supervised learning (SSL) approach to learn the spatial anatomical representations from the frames of magnetic resonance (MR) video clips for the diagnosis of knee medical conditions. The pretext model learns meaningful spatial context-invariant representations. The downstream task in our paper is a class imbalanced multi-label classification. Different experiments show that the features learnt by the pretext model provide competitive performance in the downstream task. Moreover, the efficiency and reliability of the proposed pretext model in learning representations of minority classes without applying any strategy towards imbalance in the dataset can be seen from the results. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first work of its kind in showing the effectiveness and reliability of self-supervised learning algorithms in class imbalanced multi-label classification tasks on MR videos. The code for evaluation of the proposed work is available at https://github.com/sadimanna/skid.
abstract_zh: 在医学图像分析中，获取高质量数据及其专家注释的成本是许多医学应用中的障碍。大多数使用的技术都是基于监督学习框架，需要大量的注释数据才能达到令人满意的性能。作为替代方案，在本文中，我们提出了一种自监督学习（SSL）方法，从磁共振（MR）视频剪辑的帧中学习空间解剖学表征，以诊断膝关节疾病。借口模型学习有意义的空间上下文不变表示。我们论文中的下游任务是类别不平衡的多标签分类。不同的实验表明，借口模型学习到的特征在下游任务中提供了有竞争力的性能。此外，从结果中可以看出所提出的借口模型在学习少数类表示方面的效率和可靠性，而无需应用任何针对数据集中不平衡的策略。据我们所知，这项工作是同类中第一个展示自监督学习算法在 MR 视频上的类不平衡多标签分类任务中的有效性和可靠性的工作。拟议工作的评估代码可在 https://github.com/sadimanna/skid 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督学习方法SKID，用于从MRI视频中学习膝关节损伤的解剖空间表示，解决医疗图像分析中数据标注成本高和类别不平衡的问题。
AI.motivation: 医疗图像分析中高质量数据获取和专家标注成本高昂，且现有监督学习方法依赖大量标注数据，难以处理类别不平衡的多标签分类任务。
AI.method: 通过自监督学习框架从MRI视频帧中学习空间解剖表示，设计预训练模型捕捉不变特征，直接在类别不平衡的多标签分类任务中评估下游性能，无需平衡数据集策略。
AI.result: 实验表明预训练模型在少数类上表现优异，且在类别不平衡的多标签任务中达到竞争性性能，为MRI视频的自监督学习提供了首个有效方法。
AI.conclusion: SKID验证了自监督学习在医疗图像类别不平衡场景中的有效性，为减少对标注数据依赖提供了新思路，代码已开源。

search_text: SKID: Self-Supervised Learning for Knee Injury Diagnosis from MRI Data SKID：通过 MRI 数据进行膝关节损伤诊断的自我监督学习 In medical image analysis, the cost of acquiring high-quality data and their annotation by experts is a barrier in many medical applications. Most of the techniques used are based on supervised learning framework and need a large amount of annotated data to achieve satisfactory performance. As an alternative, in this paper, we propose a self-supervised learning (SSL) approach to learn the spatial anatomical representations from the frames of magnetic resonance (MR) video clips for the diagnosis of knee medical conditions. The pretext model learns meaningful spatial context-invariant representations. The downstream task in our paper is a class imbalanced multi-label classification. Different experiments show that the features learnt by the pretext model provide competitive performance in the downstream task. Moreover, the efficiency and reliability of the proposed pretext model in learning representations of minority classes without applying any strategy towards imbalance in the dataset can be seen from the results. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first work of its kind in showing the effectiveness and reliability of self-supervised learning algorithms in class imbalanced multi-label classification tasks on MR videos. The code for evaluation of the proposed work is available at https://github.com/sadimanna/skid. 在医学图像分析中，获取高质量数据及其专家注释的成本是许多医学应用中的障碍。大多数使用的技术都是基于监督学习框架，需要大量的注释数据才能达到令人满意的性能。作为替代方案，在本文中，我们提出了一种自监督学习（SSL）方法，从磁共振（MR）视频剪辑的帧中学习空间解剖学表征，以诊断膝关节疾病。借口模型学习有意义的空间上下文不变表示。我们论文中的下游任务是类别不平衡的多标签分类。不同的实验表明，借口模型学习到的特征在下游任务中提供了有竞争力的性能。此外，从结果中可以看出所提出的借口模型在学习少数类表示方面的效率和可靠性，而无需应用任何针对数据集中不平衡的策略。据我们所知，这项工作是同类中第一个展示自监督学习算法在 MR 视频上的类不平衡多标签分类任务中的有效性和可靠性的工作。拟议工作的评估代码可在 https://github.com/sadimanna/skid 获取。 本文提出一种自监督学习方法SKID，用于从MRI视频中学习膝关节损伤的解剖空间表示，解决医疗图像分析中数据标注成本高和类别不平衡的问题。 Siladittya Manna,Saumik Bhattacharya,Umapada Pal cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Chenhang Zhou,Yu Chen,Roger Wattenhofer,Ye Wang
title: Print Your Money: Cash-Like Experiences with Digital Money
title_zh: 印钞：数字货币带来类似现金的体验
abstract: The use of digital money has become increasingly popular, but it comes with certain drawbacks. For instance, it can be challenging to make payments during power outages or internet failures. Additionally, some groups may find it difficult to use digital money. To address these concerns, we propose a design for a central bank digital currency (CBDC) similar to physical cash but also integrates with digital payment systems. This would enable users to access digital money without needing a third party. Our design also addresses technical and security concerns by implementing a trust-level model and ensuring that the system meets users' security needs. Ultimately, our design has the potential to replace physical banknotes and coins.
summary: The use of digital money has become increasingly popular, but it comes with certain drawbacks. For instance, it can be challenging to make payments during power outages or internet failures. Additionally, some groups may find it difficult to use digital money. To address these concerns, we propose a design for a central bank digital currency (CBDC) similar to physical cash but also integrates with digital payment systems. This would enable users to access digital money without needing a third party. Our design also addresses technical and security concerns by implementing a trust-level model and ensuring that the system meets users' security needs. Ultimately, our design has the potential to replace physical banknotes and coins.
abstract_zh: 数字货币的使用变得越来越流行，但它也有一定的缺点。例如，在停电或互联网故障期间付款可能会很困难。此外，一些群体可能会发现很难使用数字货币。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种类似于实物现金但也与数字支付系统集成的中央银行数字货币（CBDC）的设计。这将使用户无需第三方即可访问数字货币。我们的设计还通过实施信任级别模型并确保系统满足用户的安全需求来解决技术和安全问题。最终，我们的设计有潜力取代实体纸币和硬币。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种类似实体现金的央行数字货币（CBDC）设计方案，旨在解决数字支付的局限性。
AI.motivation: 数字支付在断网或停电时无法使用，且部分群体难以操作，需兼顾安全性与便捷性。
AI.method: 设计集成数字支付系统的CBDC架构，引入信任等级模型保障安全，无需第三方参与。
AI.result: 实现无需依赖第三方的数字现金体验，潜在替代实体货币。
AI.conclusion: 该设计可提供安全、普惠的数字现金解决方案，推动货币形式革新。
