authors_text: Haiyang Mei,Ge-Peng Ji,Ziqi Wei,Xin Yang,Xiaopeng Wei,Deng-Ping Fan
title: Camouflaged Object Segmentation with Distraction Mining
title_zh: 通过干扰挖掘进行伪装对象分割
abstract: Camouflaged object segmentation (COS) aims to identify objects that are "perfectly" assimilate into their surroundings, which has a wide range of valuable applications. The key challenge of COS is that there exist high intrinsic similarities between the candidate objects and noise background. In this paper, we strive to embrace challenges towards effective and efficient COS. To this end, we develop a bio-inspired framework, termed Positioning and Focus Network (PFNet), which mimics the process of predation in nature. Specifically, our PFNet contains two key modules, i.e., the positioning module (PM) and the focus module (FM). The PM is designed to mimic the detection process in predation for positioning the potential target objects from a global perspective and the FM is then used to perform the identification process in predation for progressively refining the coarse prediction via focusing on the ambiguous regions. Notably, in the FM, we develop a novel distraction mining strategy for distraction discovery and removal, to benefit the performance of estimation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our PFNet runs in real-time (72 FPS) and significantly outperforms 18 cutting-edge models on three challenging datasets under four standard metrics.
summary: Camouflaged object segmentation (COS) aims to identify objects that are "perfectly" assimilate into their surroundings, which has a wide range of valuable applications. The key challenge of COS is that there exist high intrinsic similarities between the candidate objects and noise background. In this paper, we strive to embrace challenges towards effective and efficient COS. To this end, we develop a bio-inspired framework, termed Positioning and Focus Network (PFNet), which mimics the process of predation in nature. Specifically, our PFNet contains two key modules, i.e., the positioning module (PM) and the focus module (FM). The PM is designed to mimic the detection process in predation for positioning the potential target objects from a global perspective and the FM is then used to perform the identification process in predation for progressively refining the coarse prediction via focusing on the ambiguous regions. Notably, in the FM, we develop a novel distraction mining strategy for distraction discovery and removal, to benefit the performance of estimation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our PFNet runs in real-time (72 FPS) and significantly outperforms 18 cutting-edge models on three challenging datasets under four standard metrics.
abstract_zh: 伪装对象分割（COS）旨在识别“完美”融入周围环境的对象，这具有广泛的有价值的应用。 COS 的关键挑战是候选对象与噪声背景之间存在高度的内在相似性。在本文中，我们努力迎接有效和高效 COS 的挑战。为此，我们开发了一个仿生框架，称为定位和聚焦网络（PFNet），它模仿了自然界的捕食过程。具体来说，我们的PFNet包含两个关键模块，即定位模块（PM）和聚焦模块（FM）。 PM 旨在模仿捕食中的检测过程，从全局角度定位潜在的目标对象，然后使用 FM 执行捕食中的识别过程，通过关注模糊区域来逐步细化粗略预测。值得注意的是，在 FM 中，我们开发了一种新颖的干扰挖掘策略，用于干扰发现和消除，以提高估计的性能。大量实验表明，我们的 PFNet 可以实时运行（72 FPS），并且在四个标准指标下的三个具有挑战性的数据集上显着优于 18 个尖端模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生物启发的框架PFNet，用于解决伪装目标分割（COS）问题，通过定位模块和聚焦模块结合干扰挖掘策略提升分割效果。
AI.motivation: 伪装目标与背景具有高度相似性，导致传统方法难以准确分割，需探索更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计PFNet框架，包含定位模块（PM）从全局定位目标和聚焦模块（FM）通过干扰挖掘策略精炼分割结果，利用生物捕食过程启发模型设计。
AI.result: PFNet实现实时运行（72 FPS），在三个数据集上显著优于18种先进模型，四类标准指标表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 生物启发的PFNet通过干扰挖掘有效解决伪装目标分割难题，为COS任务提供高效且精确的解决方案。

Extensive experiments demonstrate that our PFNet runs in real-time (72 FPS) and significantly outperforms 18 cutting-edge models on three challenging datasets under four standard metrics. 伪装对象分割（COS）旨在识别“完美”融入周围环境的对象，这具有广泛的有价值的应用。 COS 的关键挑战是候选对象与噪声背景之间存在高度的内在相似性。在本文中，我们努力迎接有效和高效 COS 的挑战。为此，我们开发了一个仿生框架，称为定位和聚焦网络（PFNet），它模仿了自然界的捕食过程。具体来说，我们的PFNet包含两个关键模块，即定位模块（PM）和聚焦模块（FM）。 PM 旨在模仿捕食中的检测过程，从全局角度定位潜在的目标对象，然后使用 FM 执行捕食中的识别过程，通过关注模糊区域来逐步细化粗略预测。值得注意的是，在 FM 中，我们开发了一种新颖的干扰挖掘策略，用于干扰发现和消除，以提高估计的性能。大量实验表明，我们的 PFNet 可以实时运行（72 FPS），并且在四个标准指标下的三个具有挑战性的数据集上显着优于 18 个尖端模型。 本文提出一种生物启发的框架PFNet，用于解决伪装目标分割（COS）问题，通过定位模块和聚焦模块结合干扰挖掘策略提升分割效果。 Haiyang Mei,Ge-Peng Ji,Ziqi Wei,Xin Yang,Xiaopeng Wei,Deng-Ping Fan cs.CV

authors_text: Arian Bakhtiarnia,Qi Zhang,Alexandros Iosifidis
title: Improving the Accuracy of Early Exits in Multi-Exit Architectures via Curriculum Learning
title_zh: 通过课程学习提高多出口架构中提前退出的准确性
comment: Accepted by the 2021 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2021)
comments: Accepted by the 2021 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2021)
abstract: Deploying deep learning services for time-sensitive and resource-constrained settings such as IoT using edge computing systems is a challenging task that requires dynamic adjustment of inference time. Multi-exit architectures allow deep neural networks to terminate their execution early in order to adhere to tight deadlines at the cost of accuracy. To mitigate this cost, in this paper we introduce a novel method called Multi-Exit Curriculum Learning that utilizes curriculum learning, a training strategy for neural networks that imitates human learning by sorting the training samples based on their difficulty and gradually introducing them to the network. Experiments on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 datasets and various configurations of multi-exit architectures show that our method consistently improves the accuracy of early exits compared to the standard training approach.
summary: Deploying deep learning services for time-sensitive and resource-constrained settings such as IoT using edge computing systems is a challenging task that requires dynamic adjustment of inference time. Multi-exit architectures allow deep neural networks to terminate their execution early in order to adhere to tight deadlines at the cost of accuracy. To mitigate this cost, in this paper we introduce a novel method called Multi-Exit Curriculum Learning that utilizes curriculum learning, a training strategy for neural networks that imitates human learning by sorting the training samples based on their difficulty and gradually introducing them to the network. Experiments on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 datasets and various configurations of multi-exit architectures show that our method consistently improves the accuracy of early exits compared to the standard training approach.
abstract_zh: 使用边缘计算系统为时间敏感和资源受限的环境（例如物联网）部署深度学习服务是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要动态调整推理时间。多出口架构允许深度神经网络提前终止其执行，以便以牺牲准确性为代价来遵守紧迫的期限。为了减轻这种成本，在本文中，我们引入了一种称为多出口课程学习的新方法，该方法利用课程学习，这是一种模仿人类学习的神经网络训练策略，通过根据训练样本的难度对训练样本进行排序并逐渐将它们引入网络来模仿人类学习。在 CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 数据集以及多出口架构的各种配置上进行的实验表明，与标准训练方法相比，我们的方法持续提高了早期退出的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过课程学习方法提升多退出架构中早期退出的准确性，以应对资源受限环境下的动态推理需求。
AI.motivation: 在物联网等资源受限场景中，多退出架构虽能缩短推理时间，但早期退出会导致精度下降，亟需有效解决方案。
AI.method: 设计多退出课程学习方法，按样本难度排序并逐步训练网络，使模型在渐进式学习中优化早期退出决策。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100数据集上，该方法显著优于传统训练方式，有效提升多退出架构的早期退出精度。
AI.conclusion: 课程学习策略可有效缓解多退出架构的精度损失问题，为边缘计算场景下的模型优化提供新思路。

authors_text: Kenneth T. Co,David Martinez Rego,Emil C. Lupu
title: Jacobian Regularization for Mitigating Universal Adversarial Perturbations
title_zh: 用于减轻普遍对抗性扰动的雅可比正则化
comment: In Proceedings of the 30th International Conference on Artificial Neural Networks (ICANN 2021), related code available at: https://github.com/kenny-co/sgd-uap-torch
comments: In Proceedings of the 30th International Conference on Artificial Neural Networks (ICANN 2021), related code available at: https://github.com/kenny-co/sgd-uap-torch
abstract: Universal Adversarial Perturbations (UAPs) are input perturbations that can fool a neural network on large sets of data. They are a class of attacks that represents a significant threat as they facilitate realistic, practical, and low-cost attacks on neural networks. In this work, we derive upper bounds for the effectiveness of UAPs based on norms of data-dependent Jacobians. We empirically verify that Jacobian regularization greatly increases model robustness to UAPs by up to four times whilst maintaining clean performance. Our theoretical analysis also allows us to formulate a metric for the strength of shared adversarial perturbations between pairs of inputs. We apply this metric to benchmark datasets and show that it is highly correlated with the actual observed robustness. This suggests that realistic and practical universal attacks can be reliably mitigated without sacrificing clean accuracy, which shows promise for the robustness of machine learning systems.
summary: Universal Adversarial Perturbations (UAPs) are input perturbations that can fool a neural network on large sets of data. They are a class of attacks that represents a significant threat as they facilitate realistic, practical, and low-cost attacks on neural networks. In this work, we derive upper bounds for the effectiveness of UAPs based on norms of data-dependent Jacobians. We empirically verify that Jacobian regularization greatly increases model robustness to UAPs by up to four times whilst maintaining clean performance. Our theoretical analysis also allows us to formulate a metric for the strength of shared adversarial perturbations between pairs of inputs. We apply this metric to benchmark datasets and show that it is highly correlated with the actual observed robustness. This suggests that realistic and practical universal attacks can be reliably mitigated without sacrificing clean accuracy, which shows promise for the robustness of machine learning systems.
abstract_zh: 通用对抗性扰动 (UAP) 是一种输入扰动，可以在大量数据上欺骗神经网络。它们是一类代表重大威胁的攻击，因为它们促进了对神经网络的现实、实用和低成本攻击。在这项工作中，我们根据数据依赖的雅可比行列式的规范推导了 UAP 有效性的上限。我们凭经验验证雅可比正则化极大地将模型对 UAP 的鲁棒性提高了四倍，同时保持了干净的性能。我们的理论分析还使我们能够制定一个衡量输入对之间共享对抗性扰动强度的指标。我们将该指标应用于基准数据集，并表明它与实际观察到的稳健性高度相关。这表明，可以在不牺牲准确率的情况下可靠地缓解现实和实用的通用攻击，这为机器学习系统的稳健性带来了希望。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过雅可比矩阵正则化方法来缓解通用对抗扰动（UAP）对神经网络的影响，提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 通用对抗扰动（UAP）能以低成本、高实用性攻击神经网络，对机器学习系统构成重大威胁，亟需有效防御方法。
AI.method: 基于数据依赖的雅可比矩阵范数推导UAP效果的上界，通过雅可比正则化增强模型鲁棒性，并提出衡量输入间共享对抗扰动强度的指标。
AI.result: 实验表明雅可比正则化使模型抗UAP能力提升4倍且保持干净数据性能，提出的指标与实际鲁棒性高度相关。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在不牺牲准确率的前提下可靠防御现实UAP攻击，为提升机器学习系统鲁棒性提供有效途径。

authors_text: Alvaro Cabrejas-Egea,Raymond Zhang,Neil Walton
title: Reinforcement Learning for Traffic Signal Control: Comparison with Commercial Systems
title_zh: 交通信号控制的强化学习：与商业系统的比较
abstract: Recently, Intelligent Transportation Systems are leveraging the power of increased sensory coverage and computing power to deliver data-intensive solutions achieving higher levels of performance than traditional systems. Within Traffic Signal Control (TSC), this has allowed the emergence of Machine Learning (ML) based systems. Among this group, Reinforcement Learning (RL) approaches have performed particularly well. Given the lack of industry standards in ML for TSC, literature exploring RL often lacks comparison against commercially available systems and straightforward formulations of how the agents operate. Here we attempt to bridge that gap. We propose three different architectures for TSC RL agents and compare them against the currently used commercial systems MOVA, SurTrac and Cyclic controllers and provide pseudo-code for them. The agents use variations of Deep Q-Learning and Actor Critic, using states and rewards based on queue lengths. Their performance is compared in across different map scenarios with variable demand, assessing them in terms of the global delay and average queue length. We find that the RL-based systems can significantly and consistently achieve lower delays when compared with existing commercial systems.
summary: Recently, Intelligent Transportation Systems are leveraging the power of increased sensory coverage and computing power to deliver data-intensive solutions achieving higher levels of performance than traditional systems. Within Traffic Signal Control (TSC), this has allowed the emergence of Machine Learning (ML) based systems. Among this group, Reinforcement Learning (RL) approaches have performed particularly well. Given the lack of industry standards in ML for TSC, literature exploring RL often lacks comparison against commercially available systems and straightforward formulations of how the agents operate. Here we attempt to bridge that gap. We propose three different architectures for TSC RL agents and compare them against the currently used commercial systems MOVA, SurTrac and Cyclic controllers and provide pseudo-code for them. The agents use variations of Deep Q-Learning and Actor Critic, using states and rewards based on queue lengths. Their performance is compared in across different map scenarios with variable demand, assessing them in terms of the global delay and average queue length. We find that the RL-based systems can significantly and consistently achieve lower delays when compared with existing commercial systems.
abstract_zh: 最近，智能交通系统正在利用增加的传感覆盖范围和计算能力来提供数据密集型解决方案，实现比传统系统更高的性能水平。在交通信号控制 (TSC) 中，这使得基于机器学习 (ML) 的系统出现。在这组中，强化学习（RL）方法表现得特别好。鉴于 TSC 的 ML 缺乏行业标准，探索 RL 的文献通常缺乏与商用系统的比较以及代理如何运作的简单表述。在这里，我们试图弥合这一差距。我们为 TSC RL 代理提出了三种不同的架构，并将它们与当前使用的商业系统 MOVA、SurTrac 和 Cyclic 控制器进行比较，并为它们提供伪代码。这些代理使用 Deep Q-Learning 和 Actor Critic 的变体，使用基于队列长度的状态和奖励。在具有可变需求的不同地图场景中比较它们的性能，并根据全局延迟和平均队列长度对其进行评估。我们发现，与现有的商业系统相比，基于强化学习的系统可以显着且持续地实现更低的延迟。

AI.tldr: 本文提出三种基于强化学习的交通信号控制（TSC）代理架构，并与现有商业系统（MOVA、SurTrac和循环控制器）进行对比，验证其性能优势。
AI.motivation: 当前机器学习在交通信号控制领域的研究缺乏与商业系统的直接对比，且代理运行机制描述不够明确，需填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 设计三种RL代理架构，采用深度Q学习和Actor Critic算法，以队列长度为状态和奖励函数，在不同交通场景下评估全局延迟和平均队列长度。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于RL的系统在降低交通延迟方面显著优于现有商业系统，且表现稳定一致。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习在交通信号控制中展现出优于商业系统的潜力，为未来智能交通系统优化提供了新方向。

search_text: Reinforcement Learning for Traffic Signal Control: Comparison with Commercial Systems 交通信号控制的强化学习：与商业系统的比较 Recently, Intelligent Transportation Systems are leveraging the power of increased sensory coverage and computing power to deliver data-intensive solutions achieving higher levels of performance than traditional systems. Within Traffic Signal Control (TSC), this has allowed the emergence of Machine Learning (ML) based systems. Among this group, Reinforcement Learning (RL) approaches have performed particularly well. Given the lack of industry standards in ML for TSC, literature exploring RL often lacks comparison against commercially available systems and straightforward formulations of how the agents operate. Here we attempt to bridge that gap. We propose three different architectures for TSC RL agents and compare them against the currently used commercial systems MOVA, SurTrac and Cyclic controllers and provide pseudo-code for them. The agents use variations of Deep Q-Learning and Actor Critic, using states and rewards based on queue lengths. Their performance is compared in across different map scenarios with variable demand, assessing them in terms of the global delay and average queue length. We find that the RL-based systems can significantly and consistently achieve lower delays when compared with existing commercial systems. 最近，智能交通系统正在利用增加的传感覆盖范围和计算能力来提供数据密集型解决方案，实现比传统系统更高的性能水平。在交通信号控制 (TSC) 中，这使得基于机器学习 (ML) 的系统出现。在这组中，强化学习（RL）方法表现得特别好。鉴于 TSC 的 ML 缺乏行业标准，探索 RL 的文献通常缺乏与商用系统的比较以及代理如何运作的简单表述。在这里，我们试图弥合这一差距。我们为 TSC RL 代理提出了三种不同的架构，并将它们与当前使用的商业系统 MOVA、SurTrac 和 Cyclic 控制器进行比较，并为它们提供伪代码。这些代理使用 Deep Q-Learning 和 Actor Critic 的变体，使用基于队列长度的状态和奖励。在具有可变需求的不同地图场景中比较它们的性能，并根据全局延迟和平均队列长度对其进行评估。我们发现，与现有的商业系统相比，基于强化学习的系统可以显着且持续地实现更低的延迟。 本文提出三种基于强化学习的交通信号控制（TSC）代理架构，并与现有商业系统（MOVA、SurTrac和循环控制器）进行对比，验证其性能优势。 Alvaro Cabrejas-Egea,Raymond Zhang,Neil Walton cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Petr Marek,Štěpán Müller,Jakub Konrád,Petr Lorenc,Jan Pichl,Jan Šedivý
title: Text Summarization of Czech News Articles Using Named Entities
title_zh: 使用命名实体对捷克新闻文章进行文本摘要
comment: ef:The Prague Bulletin of Mathematical Linguistics 2021 116
comments: ef:The Prague Bulletin of Mathematical Linguistics 2021 116
abstract: The foundation for the research of summarization in the Czech language was laid by the work of Straka et al. (2018). They published the SumeCzech, a large Czech news-based summarization dataset, and proposed several baseline approaches. However, it is clear from the achieved results that there is a large space for improvement. In our work, we focus on the impact of named entities on the summarization of Czech news articles. First, we annotate SumeCzech with named entities. We propose a new metric ROUGE_NE that measures the overlap of named entities between the true and generated summaries, and we show that it is still challenging for summarization systems to reach a high score in it. We propose an extractive summarization approach Named Entity Density that selects a sentence with the highest ratio between a number of entities and the length of the sentence as the summary of the article. The experiments show that the proposed approach reached results close to the solid baseline in the domain of news articles selecting the first sentence. Moreover, we demonstrate that the selected sentence reflects the style of reports concisely identifying to whom, when, where, and what happened. We propose that such a summary is beneficial in combination with the first sentence of an article in voice applications presenting news articles. We propose two abstractive summarization approaches based on Seq2Seq architecture. The first approach uses the tokens of the article. The second approach has access to the named entity annotations. The experiments show that both approaches exceed state-of-the-art results previously reported by Straka et al. (2018), with the latter achieving slightly better results on SumeCzech's out-of-domain testing set.
summary: The foundation for the research of summarization in the Czech language was laid by the work of Straka et al. (2018). They published the SumeCzech, a large Czech news-based summarization dataset, and proposed several baseline approaches. However, it is clear from the achieved results that there is a large space for improvement. In our work, we focus on the impact of named entities on the summarization of Czech news articles. First, we annotate SumeCzech with named entities. We propose a new metric ROUGE_NE that measures the overlap of named entities between the true and generated summaries, and we show that it is still challenging for summarization systems to reach a high score in it. We propose an extractive summarization approach Named Entity Density that selects a sentence with the highest ratio between a number of entities and the length of the sentence as the summary of the article. The experiments show that the proposed approach reached results close to the solid baseline in the domain of news articles selecting the first sentence. Moreover, we demonstrate that the selected sentence reflects the style of reports concisely identifying to whom, when, where, and what happened. We propose that such a summary is beneficial in combination with the first sentence of an article in voice applications presenting news articles. We propose two abstractive summarization approaches based on Seq2Seq architecture. The first approach uses the tokens of the article. The second approach has access to the named entity annotations. The experiments show that both approaches exceed state-of-the-art results previously reported by Straka et al. (2018), with the latter achieving slightly better results on SumeCzech's out-of-domain testing set.
abstract_zh: Straka 等人的工作奠定了捷克语摘要研究的基础。 （2018）。他们发布了 SumeCzech，一个基于捷克新闻的大型摘要数据集，并提出了几种基线方法。但从取得的成果来看，显然还有很大的改进空间。在我们的工作中，我们关注命名实体对捷克新闻文章摘要的影响。首先，我们用命名实体注释 SumeCzech。我们提出了一个新的指标 ROUGE_NE 来测量真实摘要和生成摘要之间命名实体的重叠，并且我们表明摘要系统要在其中获得高分仍然具有挑战性。我们提出了一种名为实体密度的提取摘要方法，该方法选择实体数量与句子长度之间比率最高的句子作为文章的摘要。实验表明，所提出的方法在选择第一句的新闻文章领域达到了接近可靠基线的结果。此外，我们证明所选句子反映了报告的风格，简洁地识别了谁、何时、何地以及发生了什么。我们建议，这样的摘要与呈现新闻文章的语音应用程序中的文章的第一句话相结合是有益的。我们提出了两种基于 Seq2Seq 架构的抽象摘要方法。第一种方法使用文章的标记。第二种方法可以访问命名实体注释。实验表明，这两种方法都超过了 Straka 等人之前报道的最先进的结果。 (2018)，后者在 SumeCzech 的域外测试集上取得了稍微更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 研究命名实体在捷克新闻摘要中的影响，并提出新的评估指标和摘要方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基线方法在捷克语新闻摘要任务中存在改进空间，需探索命名实体对摘要效果的影响。
AI.method: 标注SumeCzech数据集的命名实体，提出ROUGE_NE指标，开发基于Seq2Seq的两种抽象摘要方法（含命名实体信息），并设计基于实体密度的抽取式方法。
AI.result: 提出的摘要方法在SumeCzech数据集上超越了现有基线，结合命名实体的模型在测试集上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 命名实体信息能有效提升捷克语新闻摘要质量，结合首句的摘要适合语音应用。

authors_text: Kimberly T. Mai,Toby Davies,Lewis D. Griffin
title: Brittle Features May Help Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 脆弱的特征可能有助于异常检测
comment: Accepted to Women in Computer Vision workshop at CVPR (2021)
comments: Accepted to Women in Computer Vision workshop at CVPR (2021)
abstract: One-class anomaly detection is challenging. A representation that clearly distinguishes anomalies from normal data is ideal, but arriving at this representation is difficult since only normal data is available at training time. We examine the performance of representations, transferred from auxiliary tasks, for anomaly detection. Our results suggest that the choice of representation is more important than the anomaly detector used with these representations, although knowledge distillation can work better than using the representations directly. In addition, separability between anomalies and normal data is important but not the sole factor for a good representation, as anomaly detection performance is also correlated with more adversarially brittle features in the representation space. Finally, we show our configuration can detect 96.4% of anomalies in a genuine X-ray security dataset, outperforming previous results.
summary: One-class anomaly detection is challenging. A representation that clearly distinguishes anomalies from normal data is ideal, but arriving at this representation is difficult since only normal data is available at training time. We examine the performance of representations, transferred from auxiliary tasks, for anomaly detection. Our results suggest that the choice of representation is more important than the anomaly detector used with these representations, although knowledge distillation can work better than using the representations directly. In addition, separability between anomalies and normal data is important but not the sole factor for a good representation, as anomaly detection performance is also correlated with more adversarially brittle features in the representation space. Finally, we show our configuration can detect 96.4% of anomalies in a genuine X-ray security dataset, outperforming previous results.
abstract_zh: 一类异常检测具有挑战性。清楚地区分异常数据和正常数据的表示是理想的，但达到这种表示很困难，因为在训练时只有正常数据可用。我们检查从辅助任务转移的表示的性能，以进行异常检测。我们的结果表明，表示的选择比与这些表示一起使用的异常检测器更重要，尽管知识蒸馏比直接使用表示效果更好。此外，异常数据和正常数据之间的可分离性很重要，但并不是良好表示的唯一因素，因为异常检测性能还与表示空间中更具对抗性的脆弱特征相关。最后，我们展示了我们的配置可以检测到真正的 X 射线安全数据集中 96.4% 的异常，优于之前的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用从辅助任务中迁移的特征表示提升单类异常检测性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 单类异常检测面临仅能使用正常数据训练的挑战，如何构建能区分异常与正常数据的表征是核心问题。
AI.method: 通过迁移学习获取辅助任务的特征表示，对比不同表征对检测的影响，结合知识蒸馏优化模型，并分析表征空间中对抗脆弱性特征的作用。
AI.result: 实验表明表征选择比检测器更重要，知识蒸馏优于直接使用表征；在X光安检数据集上达到96.4%的异常检测率，超越先前结果。
AI.conclusion: 优质表征需兼顾类间可分性与对抗脆弱性，本文方法在真实场景中展现出显著的异常检测优势。

A representation that clearly distinguishes anomalies from normal data is ideal, but arriving at this representation is difficult since only normal data is available at training time. Our results suggest that the choice of representation is more important than the anomaly detector used with these representations, although knowledge distillation can work better than using the representations directly. In addition, separability between anomalies and normal data is important but not the sole factor for a good representation, as anomaly detection performance is also correlated with more adversarially brittle features in the representation space. Finally, we show our configuration can detect 96.4% of anomalies in a genuine X-ray security dataset, outperforming previous results. 一类异常检测具有挑战性。清楚地区分异常数据和正常数据的表示是理想的，但达到这种表示很困难，因为在训练时只有正常数据可用。我们检查从辅助任务转移的表示的性能，以进行异常检测。我们的结果表明，表示的选择比与这些表示一起使用的异常检测器更重要，尽管知识蒸馏比直接使用表示效果更好。此外，异常数据和正常数据之间的可分离性很重要，但并不是良好表示的唯一因素，因为异常检测性能还与表示空间中更具对抗性的脆弱特征相关。最后，我们展示了我们的配置可以检测到真正的 X 射线安全数据集中 96.4% 的异常，优于之前的结果。 本文研究利用从辅助任务中迁移的特征表示提升单类异常检测性能的方法。 Kimberly T. Mai,Toby Davies,Lewis D. Griffin cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Heejung Park,Gyeong Min Lee,Soopil Kim,Ga Hyung Ryu,Areum Jeong,Sang Hyun Park,Min Sagong
title: A Meta-Learning Approach for Medical Image Registration
title_zh: 医学图像配准的元学习方法
abstract: Non-rigid registration is a necessary but challenging task in medical imaging studies. Recently, unsupervised registration models have shown good performance, but they often require a large-scale training dataset and long training times. Therefore, in real world application where only dozens to hundreds of image pairs are available, existing models cannot be practically used. To address these limitations, we propose a novel unsupervised registration model which is integrated with a gradient-based meta learning framework. In particular, we train a meta learner which finds an initialization point of parameters by utilizing a variety of existing registration datasets. To quickly adapt to various tasks, the meta learner was updated to get close to the center of parameters which are fine-tuned for each registration task. Thereby, our model can adapt to unseen domain tasks via a short fine-tuning process and perform accurate registration. To verify the superiority of our model, we train the model for various 2D medical image registration tasks such as retinal choroid Optical Coherence Tomography Angiography (OCTA), CT organs, and brain MRI scans and test on registration of retinal OCTA Superficial Capillary Plexus (SCP). In our experiments, the proposed model obtained significantly improved performance in terms of accuracy and training time compared to other registration models.
summary: Non-rigid registration is a necessary but challenging task in medical imaging studies. Recently, unsupervised registration models have shown good performance, but they often require a large-scale training dataset and long training times. Therefore, in real world application where only dozens to hundreds of image pairs are available, existing models cannot be practically used. To address these limitations, we propose a novel unsupervised registration model which is integrated with a gradient-based meta learning framework. In particular, we train a meta learner which finds an initialization point of parameters by utilizing a variety of existing registration datasets. To quickly adapt to various tasks, the meta learner was updated to get close to the center of parameters which are fine-tuned for each registration task. Thereby, our model can adapt to unseen domain tasks via a short fine-tuning process and perform accurate registration. To verify the superiority of our model, we train the model for various 2D medical image registration tasks such as retinal choroid Optical Coherence Tomography Angiography (OCTA), CT organs, and brain MRI scans and test on registration of retinal OCTA Superficial Capillary Plexus (SCP). In our experiments, the proposed model obtained significantly improved performance in terms of accuracy and training time compared to other registration models.
abstract_zh: 非刚性配准是医学影像研究中一项必要但具有挑战性的任务。最近，无监督配准模型表现出了良好的性能，但它们往往需要大规模的训练数据集和较长的训练时间。因此，在只有数十到数百个图像对可用的现实应用中，现有模型无法实际使用。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种新颖的无监督注册模型，该模型与基于梯度的元学习框架集成。特别是，我们训练一个元学习器，它通过利用各种现有的注册数据集找到参数的初始化点。为了快速适应各种任务，元学习器进行了更新，以接近针对每个注册任务进行微调的参数中心。因此，我们的模型可以通过简短的微调过程适应看不见的领域任务并执行准确的配准。为了验证我们模型的优越性，我们针对各种 2D 医学图像配准任务训练模型，例如视网膜脉络膜光学相干断层扫描血管造影 (OCTA)、CT 器官和脑 MRI 扫描，并测试视网膜 OCTA 浅表毛细血管丛 (SCP) 的配准。在我们的实验中，与其他配准模型相比，所提出的模型在准确性和训练时间方面获得了显着提高的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于元学习的医学图像配准方法，解决小样本场景下传统模型训练数据需求大、耗时长的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督配准模型需依赖大规模数据集且训练时间长，在实际应用中因图像对数量有限（数十至数百对）而难以使用。
AI.method: 构建梯度元学习框架，通过多数据集训练元学习器获取参数初始化点，使模型能通过短期微调快速适应新任务。
AI.result: 在视网膜OCTA、CT器官和脑部MRI等2D医学图像配准任务中，相较其他模型精度显著提升且训练时间缩短。
AI.conclusion: 元学习方法有效缓解了传统配准模型的数据与时间限制，为小样本医学图像配准提供了可行方案。

Therefore, in real world application where only dozens to hundreds of image pairs are available, existing models cannot be practically used. To address these limitations, we propose a novel unsupervised registration model which is integrated with a gradient-based meta learning framework. In particular, we train a meta learner which finds an initialization point of parameters by utilizing a variety of existing registration datasets. To quickly adapt to various tasks, the meta learner was updated to get close to the center of parameters which are fine-tuned for each registration task. Thereby, our model can adapt to unseen domain tasks via a short fine-tuning process and perform accurate registration. To verify the superiority of our model, we train the model for various 2D medical image registration tasks such as retinal choroid Optical Coherence Tomography Angiography (OCTA), CT organs, and brain MRI scans and test on registration of retinal OCTA Superficial Capillary Plexus (SCP). authors_text: Yiqin Zhu,Jianyong Chen,Lingyu Liang,Zhanghui Kuang,Lianwen Jin,Wayne Zhang
title: Fourier Contour Embedding for Arbitrary-Shaped Text Detection
title_zh: 用于任意形状文本检测的傅里叶轮廓嵌入
abstract: One of the main challenges for arbitrary-shaped text detection is to design a good text instance representation that allows networks to learn diverse text geometry variances. Most of existing methods model text instances in image spatial domain via masks or contour point sequences in the Cartesian or the polar coordinate system. However, the mask representation might lead to expensive post-processing, while the point sequence one may have limited capability to model texts with highly-curved shapes. To tackle these problems, we model text instances in the Fourier domain and propose one novel Fourier Contour Embedding (FCE) method to represent arbitrary shaped text contours as compact signatures. We further construct FCENet with a backbone, feature pyramid networks (FPN) and a simple post-processing with the Inverse Fourier Transformation (IFT) and Non-Maximum Suppression (NMS). Different from previous methods, FCENet first predicts compact Fourier signatures of text instances, and then reconstructs text contours via IFT and NMS during test. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FCE is accurate and robust to fit contours of scene texts even with highly-curved shapes, and also validate the effectiveness and the good generalization of FCENet for arbitrary-shaped text detection. Furthermore, experimental results show that our FCENet is superior to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods on CTW1500 and Total-Text, especially on challenging highly-curved text subset.
summary: One of the main challenges for arbitrary-shaped text detection is to design a good text instance representation that allows networks to learn diverse text geometry variances. Most of existing methods model text instances in image spatial domain via masks or contour point sequences in the Cartesian or the polar coordinate system. However, the mask representation might lead to expensive post-processing, while the point sequence one may have limited capability to model texts with highly-curved shapes. To tackle these problems, we model text instances in the Fourier domain and propose one novel Fourier Contour Embedding (FCE) method to represent arbitrary shaped text contours as compact signatures. We further construct FCENet with a backbone, feature pyramid networks (FPN) and a simple post-processing with the Inverse Fourier Transformation (IFT) and Non-Maximum Suppression (NMS). Different from previous methods, FCENet first predicts compact Fourier signatures of text instances, and then reconstructs text contours via IFT and NMS during test. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FCE is accurate and robust to fit contours of scene texts even with highly-curved shapes, and also validate the effectiveness and the good generalization of FCENet for arbitrary-shaped text detection. Furthermore, experimental results show that our FCENet is superior to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods on CTW1500 and Total-Text, especially on challenging highly-curved text subset.
abstract_zh: 任意形状文本检测的主要挑战之一是设计良好的文本实例表示，使网络能够学习不同的文本几何差异。大多数现有方法通过笛卡尔或极坐标系中的掩模或轮廓点序列对图像空间域中的文本实例进行建模。然而，掩模表示可能会导致昂贵的后处理，而点序列对具有高度弯曲形状的文本进行建模的能力可能有限。为了解决这些问题，我们在傅里叶域中对文本实例进行建模，并提出了一种新颖的傅里叶轮廓嵌入（FCE）方法，将任意形状的文本轮廓表示为紧凑签名。我们进一步构建了具有骨干网络、特征金字塔网络（FPN）以及带有傅立叶逆变换（IFT）和非极大值抑制（NMS）的简单后处理的FCENet。与之前的方法不同，FCENet 首先预测文本实例的紧凑傅里叶签名，然后在测试过程中通过 IFT 和 NMS 重建文本轮廓。大量实验表明，即使具有高度弯曲的形状，FCE 也能准确且鲁棒地拟合场景文本的轮廓，并验证了 FCENet 对于任意形状文本检测的有效性和良好泛化性。此外，实验结果表明，我们的 FCENet 优于 CTW1500 和 Total-Text 上最先进的 (SOTA) 方法，特别是在具有挑战性的高度弯曲的文本子集上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于傅里叶轮廓嵌入（FCE）的任意形状文本检测方法FCENet，通过傅里叶域建模解决现有方法在复杂曲率文本检测中的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有方法使用掩码或点序列表示文本实例，存在后处理成本高或对高度弯曲文本建模能力有限的问题，需设计更高效的文本轮廓表示方法。
AI.method: 在傅里叶域建模文本实例，提出FCE方法将任意形状文本轮廓表示为紧凑的傅里叶签名，结合FPN主干网络与逆傅里叶变换（IFT）和非极大值抑制（NMS）的简单后处理构建FCENet。
AI.result: 实验表明FCE能准确拟合高度弯曲场景文本，FCENet在CTW1500和Total-Text数据集上优于现有SOTA方法，尤其在挑战性弯曲文本子集上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: FCENet通过傅里叶域紧凑表示与高效网络结构，在任意形状文本检测任务中展现出优越性与良好的泛化能力。

authors_text: Sergey I. Kruzhilov
title: Unification of computer reality
title_zh: 计算机现实的统一
abstract: The work attempts to unify the conceptual model of the user's virtual computer environment, with the aim of combining the local environments of operating systems and the global Internet environment into a single virtual environment built on general principles. To solve this problem, it is proposed to unify the conceptual basis of these environments. The existing conceptual basis of operating systems, built on the "desktop" metaphor, contains redundant concepts associated with computer architecture. The use of the spatial conceptual basis "object - place" with the concepts of "domain", "site", and "data object" allows to completely virtualize the user environment, separating it from the hardware concepts. The virtual concept "domain" is becoming a universal way of structuring the user's space. The introduction of this concept to describe the environments of operating systems provides at the mental level the integration of the structures of the local and global space. The use of the concept of "personal domain" will allow replacing the concept of "personal computer" in the mind of the user. The virtual concept of "site" as an environment for activities and data storage will allow abandoning such concepts as "application" (program), or "memory device". The site in the mind of the user is a virtual environment that includes both places for storing data objects and places for working with them. The introduction of the concept "site" into the structure of operating systems environments and the concept of "data site" into the structure of the global network integrates the structure of the global and local space in the user's mind. The introduction of the concept of "portal" as a means of integrating information necessary for interaction, allows ensuring the methodological homogeneity of the user's work in a single virtual environment.

The introduction of the concept of "portal" as a means of integrating information necessary for interaction, allows ensuring the methodological homogeneity of the user's work in a single virtual environment.
abstract_zh: 这项工作试图统一用户虚拟计算机环境的概念模型，旨在将操作系统的本地环境和全球互联网环境结合成一个基于通用原则构建的单一虚拟环境。为了解决这个问题，建议统一这些环境的概念基础。操作系统的现有概念基础建立在“桌面”隐喻之上，包含与计算机体系结构相关的冗余概念。使用空间概念基础“对象-地点”以及“域”、“站点”和“数据对象”的概念可以完全虚拟化用户环境，将其与硬件概念分开。虚拟概念“域”正在成为构建用户空间的通用方式。引入这个概念来描述操作系统的环境，在心理层面上提供了本地和全局空间结构的集成。 “个人域”概念的使用将允许取代用户心目中的“个人计算机”的概念。作为活动和数据存储环境的“站点”虚拟概念将允许放弃诸如“应用程序”（程序）或“存储设备”等概念。用户心目中的站点是一个虚拟环境，包括存储数据对象的位置和使用数据对象的位置。将“站点”概念引入到操作系统环境结构中，将“数据站点”概念引入到全球网络结构中，将用户心目中的全局空间结构和局部空间结构融为一体。引入“门户”概念作为集成交互所需信息的手段，可以确保用户在单个虚拟环境中工作的方法上的同质性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过统一概念模型，将用户的虚拟计算机环境与全球互联网环境整合为单一虚拟环境。
AI.motivation: 现有操作系统基于‘桌面’隐喻的概念模型存在冗余，且与硬件紧密耦合，难以适应虚拟化需求。
AI.method: 引入‘领域-场所’空间概念模型，用‘领域’‘场所’‘数据场所’及‘门户’替代传统‘个人电脑’‘应用’等概念，实现环境虚拟化。
AI.result: 用户环境与硬件解耦，本地与全球空间结构在认知层面实现统一，形成方法论一致的虚拟环境。
AI.conclusion: 新概念体系可有效整合局部与全局空间，为未来统一虚拟计算环境提供理论基础。

authors_text: Jaejun Lee,Donmoon Lee,Hyeong-Seok Choi,Kyogu Lee
title: Room adaptive conditioning method for sound event classification in reverberant environments
title_zh: 用于混响环境中声音事件分类的房间自适应调节方法
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, In Proceedings of the 2021 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP)
comments: 5 pages, 3 figures, In Proceedings of the 2021 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP)
abstract: Ensuring performance robustness for a variety of situations that can occur in real-world environments is one of the challenging tasks in sound event classification. One of the unpredictable and detrimental factors in performance, especially in indoor environments, is reverberation. To alleviate this problem, we propose a conditioning method that provides room impulse response (RIR) information to help the network become less sensitive to environmental information and focus on classifying the desired sound. Experimental results show that the proposed method successfully reduced performance degradation caused by the reverberation of the room. In particular, our proposed method works even with similar RIR that can be inferred from the room type rather than the exact one, which has the advantage of potentially being used in real-world applications.
summary: Ensuring performance robustness for a variety of situations that can occur in real-world environments is one of the challenging tasks in sound event classification. One of the unpredictable and detrimental factors in performance, especially in indoor environments, is reverberation. To alleviate this problem, we propose a conditioning method that provides room impulse response (RIR) information to help the network become less sensitive to environmental information and focus on classifying the desired sound. Experimental results show that the proposed method successfully reduced performance degradation caused by the reverberation of the room. In particular, our proposed method works even with similar RIR that can be inferred from the room type rather than the exact one, which has the advantage of potentially being used in real-world applications.
abstract_zh: 确保现实环境中可能发生的各种情况的性能鲁棒性是声音事件分类中具有挑战性的任务之一。混响是性能中不可预测的有害因素之一，尤其是在室内环境中。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种调节方法，该方法提供房间脉冲响应（RIR）信息，以帮助网络降低对环境信息的敏感度，并专注于对所需声音进行分类。实验结果表明，该方法成功减少了房间混响引起的性能下降。特别是，我们提出的方法甚至适用于可以从房间类型而不是确切的房间类型推断出的类似 RIR，这具有在实际应用中潜在使用的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种房间自适应条件方法，通过引入房间脉冲响应（RIR）信息提升混响环境中声音事件分类的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现实环境中混响会导致声音事件分类性能下降，传统方法难以适应不同房间的声学特性，需开发更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计条件网络模块，将RIR信息作为输入条件，使模型减少对环境混响的依赖，聚焦于目标声音特征分类，并验证使用房间类型推断的近似RIR的有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著缓解了混响导致的性能退化，且在仅使用房间类型推断的RIR时仍能保持良好效果，验证了其实际应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入房间自适应条件机制，模型在未知混响环境下的分类性能得到提升，为实际部署提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Alexander Dockhorn,Jorge Hurtado-Grueso,Dominik Jeurissen,Linjie Xu,Diego Perez-Liebana
title: Portfolio Search and Optimization for General Strategy Game-Playing
title_zh: 一般策略游戏的投资组合搜索和优化
abstract: Portfolio methods represent a simple but efficient type of action abstraction which has shown to improve the performance of search-based agents in a range of strategy games. We first review existing portfolio techniques and propose a new algorithm for optimization and action-selection based on the Rolling Horizon Evolutionary Algorithm. Moreover, a series of variants are developed to solve problems in different aspects. We further analyze the performance of discussed agents in a general strategy game-playing task. For this purpose, we run experiments on three different game-modes of the Stratega framework. For the optimization of the agents' parameters and portfolio sets we study the use of the N-tuple Bandit Evolutionary Algorithm. The resulting portfolio sets suggest a high diversity in play-styles while being able to consistently beat the sample agents. An analysis of the agents' performance shows that the proposed algorithm generalizes well to all game-modes and is able to outperform other portfolio methods.
summary: Portfolio methods represent a simple but efficient type of action abstraction which has shown to improve the performance of search-based agents in a range of strategy games. We first review existing portfolio techniques and propose a new algorithm for optimization and action-selection based on the Rolling Horizon Evolutionary Algorithm. Moreover, a series of variants are developed to solve problems in different aspects. We further analyze the performance of discussed agents in a general strategy game-playing task. For this purpose, we run experiments on three different game-modes of the Stratega framework. For the optimization of the agents' parameters and portfolio sets we study the use of the N-tuple Bandit Evolutionary Algorithm. The resulting portfolio sets suggest a high diversity in play-styles while being able to consistently beat the sample agents. An analysis of the agents' performance shows that the proposed algorithm generalizes well to all game-modes and is able to outperform other portfolio methods.
abstract_zh: 组合方法代表了一种简单但有效的动作抽象类型，它已被证明可以提高基于搜索的代理在一系列策略游戏中的性能。我们首先回顾现有的投资组合技术，并提出一种基于滚动地平线进化算法的新优化和动作选择算法。此外，还开发了一系列变体来解决不同方面的问题。我们进一步分析了所讨论的代理在一般策略游戏任务中的表现。为此，我们对 Stratega 框架的三种不同游戏模式进行了实验。为了优化代理参数和投资组合集，我们研究了 N 元组 Bandit 进化算法的使用。由此产生的投资组合表明游戏风格具有高度多样性，同时能够持续击败样本代理。对代理性能的分析表明，所提出的算法可以很好地推广到所有游戏模式，并且能够优于其他组合方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于滚动地平线进化算法的组合搜索与优化方法，以提升策略游戏AI的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有组合方法虽能提升搜索型代理性能，但缺乏针对参数优化和多样化策略生成的有效算法。
AI.method: 提出基于滚动地平线进化算法的新组合优化算法，并开发多个变体；通过N元组老虎机进化算法优化代理参数，在Stratega框架的三种游戏模式中进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明新组合策略在保持高策略多样性的同时，能稳定击败基准代理，并在所有游戏模式中优于其他组合方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法在通用策略游戏场景中具有良好泛化能力，为搜索型代理的组合优化提供了有效解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出基于滚动地平线进化算法的组合搜索与优化方法，以提升策略游戏AI的性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有组合方法虽能提升搜索型代理性能，但缺乏针对参数优化和多样化策略生成的有效算法。
ai_content.method: 提出基于滚动地平线进化算法的新组合优化算法，并开发多个变体；通过N元组老虎机进化算法优化代理参数，在Stratega框架的三种游戏模式中进行实验验证。
ai_content.result: 实验表明新组合策略在保持高策略多样性的同时，能稳定击败基准代理，并在所有游戏模式中优于其他组合方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 所提算法在通用策略游戏场景中具有良好泛化能力，为搜索型代理的组合优化提供了有效解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出基于滚动地平线进化算法的组合搜索与优化方法，以提升策略游戏AI的性能。
motivation: 现有组合方法虽能提升搜索型代理性能，但缺乏针对参数优化和多样化策略生成的有效算法。
method: 提出基于滚动地平线进化算法的新组合优化算法，并开发多个变体；通过N元组老虎机进化算法优化代理参数，在Stratega框架的三种游戏模式中进行实验验证。
result: 实验表明新组合策略在保持高策略多样性的同时，能稳定击败基准代理，并在所有游戏模式中优于其他组合方法。
conclusion: 所提算法在通用策略游戏场景中具有良好泛化能力，为搜索型代理的组合优化提供了有效解决方案。
search_text: Portfolio Search and Optimization for General Strategy Game-Playing 一般策略游戏的投资组合搜索和优化 Portfolio methods represent a simple but efficient type of action abstraction which has shown to improve the performance of search-based agents in a range of strategy games. We first review existing portfolio techniques and propose a new algorithm for optimization and action-selection based on the Rolling Horizon Evolutionary Algorithm. Moreover, a series of variants are developed to solve problems in different aspects. We further analyze the performance of discussed agents in a general strategy game-playing task. For this purpose, we run experiments on three different game-modes of the Stratega framework. For the optimization of the agents' parameters and portfolio sets we study the use of the N-tuple Bandit Evolutionary Algorithm. The resulting portfolio sets suggest a high diversity in play-styles while being able to consistently beat the sample agents. An analysis of the agents' performance shows that the proposed algorithm generalizes well to all game-modes and is able to outperform other portfolio methods. 组合方法代表了一种简单但有效的动作抽象类型，它已被证明可以提高基于搜索的代理在一系列策略游戏中的性能。我们首先回顾现有的投资组合技术，并提出一种基于滚动地平线进化算法的新优化和动作选择算法。此外，还开发了一系列变体来解决不同方面的问题。我们进一步分析了所讨论的代理在一般策略游戏任务中的表现。为此，我们对 Stratega 框架的三种不同游戏模式进行了实验。为了优化代理参数和投资组合集，我们研究了 N 元组 Bandit 进化算法的使用。由此产生的投资组合表明游戏风格具有高度多样性，同时能够持续击败样本代理。对代理性能的分析表明，所提出的算法可以很好地推广到所有游戏模式，并且能够优于其他组合方法。 本文提出基于滚动地平线进化算法的组合搜索与优化方法，以提升策略游戏AI的性能。 Alexander Dockhorn,Jorge Hurtado-Grueso,Dominik Jeurissen,Linjie Xu,Diego Perez-Liebana cs.AI

authors_text: Andreas Panteli,Jonas Teuwen,Hugo Horlings,Efstratios Gavves
title: Sparse-shot Learning with Exclusive Cross-Entropy for Extremely Many Localisations
title_zh: 针对多种本地化的具有独特交叉熵的稀疏样本学习
abstract: Object localisation, in the context of regular images, often depicts objects like people or cars. In these images, there is typically a relatively small number of objects per class, which usually is manageable to annotate. However, outside the setting of regular images, we are often confronted with a different situation. In computational pathology, digitised tissue sections are extremely large images, whose dimensions quickly exceed 250'000x250'000 pixels, where relevant objects, such as tumour cells or lymphocytes can quickly number in the millions. Annotating them all is practically impossible and annotating sparsely a few, out of many more, is the only possibility. Unfortunately, learning from sparse annotations, or sparse-shot learning, clashes with standard supervised learning because what is not annotated is treated as a negative. However, assigning negative labels to what are true positives leads to confusion in the gradients and biased learning. To this end, we present exclusive cross-entropy, which slows down the biased learning by examining the second-order loss derivatives in order to drop the loss terms corresponding to likely biased terms. Experiments on nine datasets and two different localisation tasks, detection with YOLLO and segmentation with Unet, show that we obtain considerable improvements compared to cross-entropy or focal loss, while often reaching the best possible performance for the model with only 10-40% of annotations.
summary: Object localisation, in the context of regular images, often depicts objects like people or cars. In these images, there is typically a relatively small number of objects per class, which usually is manageable to annotate. However, outside the setting of regular images, we are often confronted with a different situation. In computational pathology, digitised tissue sections are extremely large images, whose dimensions quickly exceed 250'000x250'000 pixels, where relevant objects, such as tumour cells or lymphocytes can quickly number in the millions. Annotating them all is practically impossible and annotating sparsely a few, out of many more, is the only possibility. Unfortunately, learning from sparse annotations, or sparse-shot learning, clashes with standard supervised learning because what is not annotated is treated as a negative. However, assigning negative labels to what are true positives leads to confusion in the gradients and biased learning. To this end, we present exclusive cross-entropy, which slows down the biased learning by examining the second-order loss derivatives in order to drop the loss terms corresponding to likely biased terms. Experiments on nine datasets and two different localisation tasks, detection with YOLLO and segmentation with Unet, show that we obtain considerable improvements compared to cross-entropy or focal loss, while often reaching the best possible performance for the model with only 10-40% of annotations.
abstract_zh: 在常规图像的背景下，对象定位通常描绘人或汽车等对象。在这些图像中，每个类的对象数量通常相对较少，通常易于注释。然而，在常规图像的设定之外，我们常常面临着不同的情况。在计算病理学中，数字化组织切片是非常大的图像，其尺寸很快超过 250'000x250'000 像素，其中相关对象（例如肿瘤细胞或淋巴细胞）的数量可能很快达到数百万。对它们全部进行注释实际上是不可能的，而对更多的中的一些进行稀疏注释是唯一的可能性。不幸的是，从稀疏注释或稀疏样本学习中学习与标准监督学习发生冲突，因为未注释的内容被视为负数。然而，给真正的积极因素分配消极标签会导致梯度混乱和学习偏差。为此，我们提出了排他性交叉熵，它通过检查二阶损失导数来减慢有偏差的学习，以删除与可能的有偏差项相对应的损失项。对九个数据集和两个不同的定位任务（使用 YOLLO 进行检测和使用 Unet 进行分割）的实验表明，与交叉熵或焦点损失相比，我们获得了相当大的改进，同时通常仅使用 10-40% 的注释即可达到模型的最佳性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'独家交叉熵'的新方法，用于解决在极大规模图像中进行稀疏标注的目标定位问题。
AI.motivation: 在常规图像中目标数量有限且易于标注，但在计算病理学等场景中，单张图像可能包含数百万个目标，密集标注不现实。传统方法将未标注区域视为负样本会导致梯度混淆和偏差学习。
AI.method: 通过分析二阶损失导数识别潜在偏差项，动态排除可能产生偏差的损失项，从而优化交叉熵损失函数。
AI.result: 在九个数据集上进行检测(YOLLO)和分割(Unet)任务实验，仅用10-40%标注量即可超越交叉熵和焦点损失，达到最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: 独家交叉熵有效缓解了稀疏标注下的偏差问题，在极大规模目标定位任务中展现出显著优势。

authors_text: Saiping Guan,Xiaolong Jin,Jiafeng Guo,Yuanzhuo Wang,Xueqi Cheng
title: Link Prediction on N-ary Relational Data Based on Relatedness Evaluation
title_zh: 基于相关性评价的N元关系数据链接预测
abstract: With the overwhelming popularity of Knowledge Graphs (KGs), researchers have poured attention to link prediction to fill in missing facts for a long time. However, they mainly focus on link prediction on binary relational data, where facts are usually represented as triples in the form of (head entity, relation, tail entity). In practice, n-ary relational facts are also ubiquitous. When encountering such facts, existing studies usually decompose them into triples by introducing a multitude of auxiliary virtual entities and additional triples. These conversions result in the complexity of carrying out link prediction on n-ary relational data. It has even proven that they may cause loss of structure information. To overcome these problems, in this paper, we represent each n-ary relational fact as a set of its role and role-value pairs. We then propose a method called NaLP to conduct link prediction on n-ary relational data, which explicitly models the relatedness of all the role and role-value pairs in an n-ary relational fact. We further extend NaLP by introducing type constraints of roles and role-values without any external type-specific supervision, and proposing a more reasonable negative sampling mechanism. Experimental results validate the effectiveness and merits of the proposed methods.
summary: With the overwhelming popularity of Knowledge Graphs (KGs), researchers have poured attention to link prediction to fill in missing facts for a long time. However, they mainly focus on link prediction on binary relational data, where facts are usually represented as triples in the form of (head entity, relation, tail entity). In practice, n-ary relational facts are also ubiquitous. When encountering such facts, existing studies usually decompose them into triples by introducing a multitude of auxiliary virtual entities and additional triples. These conversions result in the complexity of carrying out link prediction on n-ary relational data. It has even proven that they may cause loss of structure information. To overcome these problems, in this paper, we represent each n-ary relational fact as a set of its role and role-value pairs. We then propose a method called NaLP to conduct link prediction on n-ary relational data, which explicitly models the relatedness of all the role and role-value pairs in an n-ary relational fact. We further extend NaLP by introducing type constraints of roles and role-values without any external type-specific supervision, and proposing a more reasonable negative sampling mechanism. Experimental results validate the effectiveness and merits of the proposed methods.
abstract_zh: 随着知识图（KG）的普及，研究人员长期以来一直将注意力集中在链接预测上，以填补缺失的事实。然而，它们主要关注二元关系数据的链接预测，其中事实通常表示为（头实体、关系、尾实体）形式的三元组。在实践中，n元关系事实也普遍存在。当遇到此类事实时，现有研究通常通过引入大量辅助虚拟实体和附加三元组将其分解为三元组。这些转换导致对n元关系数据进行链接预测的复杂性。甚至证明它们可能会导致结构信息丢失。为了克服这些问题，在本文中，我们将每个 n 元关系事实表示为其角色和角色值对的集合。然后，我们提出了一种名为 NaLP 的方法来对 n 元关系数据进行链接预测，该方法显式地建模 n 元关系事实中所有角色和角色值对的相关性。我们通过引入角色和角色值的类型约束而无需任何外部特定类型的监督，进一步扩展了 NaLP，并提出了更合理的负采样机制。实验结果验证了所提方法的有效性和优点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于相关性评估的n元关系数据链接预测方法NaLP，解决现有方法在处理n元事实时的信息丢失问题。
AI.motivation: 现有链接预测方法多针对二元关系数据，处理n元关系时需引入虚拟实体分解，导致结构信息丢失且复杂度增加。
AI.method: 将n元事实表示为角色-角色值对集合，通过建模所有角色对的相关性进行链接预测，并引入类型约束和改进的负采样机制。
AI.result: 实验验证了NaLP方法在n元关系数据链接预测任务中的有效性，优于传统分解方法。
AI.conclusion: 直接建模n元事实的角色相关性可提升链接预测性能，类型约束和负采样改进进一步增强了方法合理性。

In practice, n-ary relational facts are also ubiquitous. When encountering such facts, existing studies usually decompose them into triples by introducing a multitude of auxiliary virtual entities and additional triples. These conversions result in the complexity of carrying out link prediction on n-ary relational data. It has even proven that they may cause loss of structure information. To overcome these problems, in this paper, we represent each n-ary relational fact as a set of its role and role-value pairs. We then propose a method called NaLP to conduct link prediction on n-ary relational data, which explicitly models the relatedness of all the role and role-value pairs in an n-ary relational fact. We further extend NaLP by introducing type constraints of roles and role-values without any external type-specific supervision, and proposing a more reasonable negative sampling mechanism. Experimental results validate the effectiveness and merits of the proposed methods. 随着知识图（KG）的普及，研究人员长期以来一直将注意力集中在链接预测上，以填补缺失的事实。然而，它们主要关注二元关系数据的链接预测，其中事实通常表示为（头实体、关系、尾实体）形式的三元组。在实践中，n元关系事实也普遍存在。当遇到此类事实时，现有研究通常通过引入大量辅助虚拟实体和附加三元组将其分解为三元组。这些转换导致对n元关系数据进行链接预测的复杂性。甚至证明它们可能会导致结构信息丢失。为了克服这些问题，在本文中，我们将每个 n 元关系事实表示为其角色和角色值对的集合。然后，我们提出了一种名为 NaLP 的方法来对 n 元关系数据进行链接预测，该方法显式地建模 n 元关系事实中所有角色和角色值对的相关性。我们通过引入角色和角色值的类型约束而无需任何外部特定类型的监督，进一步扩展了 NaLP，并提出了更合理的负采样机制。实验结果验证了所提方法的有效性和优点。 本文提出一种基于相关性评估的n元关系数据链接预测方法NaLP，解决现有方法在处理n元事实时的信息丢失问题。 Saiping Guan,Xiaolong Jin,Jiafeng Guo,Yuanzhuo Wang,Xueqi Cheng cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Zeyu Chen,Xinhang Zhang,Juan Li,Jingxuan Ni,Gang Chen,Shaohua Wang,Fangfang Fan,Changfeng Charles Wang,Xiaotao Li
title: Machine vision detection to daily facial fatigue with a nonlocal 3D attention network
title_zh: 使用非局部 3D 注意网络对日常面部疲劳进行机器视觉检测
abstract: Fatigue detection is valued for people to keep mental health and prevent safety accidents. However, detecting facial fatigue, especially mild fatigue in the real world via machine vision is still a challenging issue due to lack of non-lab dataset and well-defined algorithms. In order to improve the detection capability on facial fatigue that can be used widely in daily life, this paper provided an audiovisual dataset named DLFD (daily-life fatigue dataset) which reflected people's facial fatigue state in the wild. A framework using 3D-ResNet along with non-local attention mechanism was training for extraction of local and long-range features in spatial and temporal dimensions. Then, a compacted loss function combining mean squared error and cross-entropy was designed to predict both continuous and categorical fatigue degrees. Our proposed framework has reached an average accuracy of 90.8% on validation set and 72.5% on test set for binary classification, standing a good position compared to other state-of-the-art methods. The analysis of feature map visualization revealed that our framework captured facial dynamics and attempted to build a connection with fatigue state. Our experimental results in multiple metrics proved that our framework captured some typical, micro and dynamic facial features along spatiotemporal dimensions, contributing to the mild fatigue detection in the wild.
summary: Fatigue detection is valued for people to keep mental health and prevent safety accidents. However, detecting facial fatigue, especially mild fatigue in the real world via machine vision is still a challenging issue due to lack of non-lab dataset and well-defined algorithms. In order to improve the detection capability on facial fatigue that can be used widely in daily life, this paper provided an audiovisual dataset named DLFD (daily-life fatigue dataset) which reflected people's facial fatigue state in the wild. A framework using 3D-ResNet along with non-local attention mechanism was training for extraction of local and long-range features in spatial and temporal dimensions. Then, a compacted loss function combining mean squared error and cross-entropy was designed to predict both continuous and categorical fatigue degrees. Our proposed framework has reached an average accuracy of 90.8% on validation set and 72.5% on test set for binary classification, standing a good position compared to other state-of-the-art methods. The analysis of feature map visualization revealed that our framework captured facial dynamics and attempted to build a connection with fatigue state. Our experimental results in multiple metrics proved that our framework captured some typical, micro and dynamic facial features along spatiotemporal dimensions, contributing to the mild fatigue detection in the wild.
abstract_zh: 疲劳检测对于人们保持心理健康、预防安全事故具有重要意义。然而，由于缺乏非实验室数据集和明确的算法，通过机器视觉检测现实世界中的面部疲劳，尤其是轻度疲劳仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。为了提高在日常生活中广泛使用的面部疲劳检测能力，本文提供了一个反映人们在野外面部疲劳状态的视听数据集DLFD（daily-life pain dataset）。使用 3D-ResNet 和非局部注意力机制的框架用于训练提取空间和时间维度的局部和远程特征。然后，设计了结合均方误差和交叉熵的压缩损失函数来预测连续疲劳度和分类疲劳度。我们提出的框架在二元分类的验证集上达到了 90.8% 的平均准确率，在测试集上达到了 72.5% 的平均准确率，与其他最先进的方法相比，处于良好的位置。特征图可视化分析表明，我们的框架捕获了面部动态并试图与疲劳状态建立联系。我们在多个指标上的实验结果证明，我们的框架沿着时空维度捕获了一些典型的、微观的和动态的面部特征，有助于野外的轻度疲劳检测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于非局部3D注意力网络的机器视觉框架，用于检测日常场景中的面部疲劳状态，并构建了名为DLFD的音频视觉数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有算法难以有效检测真实场景下的轻度面部疲劳，缺乏非实验室环境数据集及精准算法，需开发适用于日常生活的广泛适用检测方法。
AI.method: 融合3D-ResNet与非局部注意力机制提取时空特征，设计结合均方误差与交叉熵的复合损失函数，实现连续值与分类疲劳程度的联合预测。
AI.result: 二分类任务在验证集和测试集上分别达到90.8%和72.5%的平均准确率，可视化分析表明框架能捕捉微动态面部特征与疲劳状态关联。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过时空特征建模有效提升真实场景轻度疲劳检测能力，DLFD数据集与非局部3D注意力方法为疲劳检测领域提供新思路。

authors_text: Xin Huang,Xinxin Wang,Wenyu Lv,Xiaying Bai,Xiang Long,Kaipeng Deng,Qingqing Dang,Shumin Han,Qiwen Liu,Xiaoguang Hu,Dianhai Yu,Yanjun Ma,Osamu Yoshie
title: PP-YOLOv2: A Practical Object Detector
title_zh: PP-YOLOv2：实用的物体检测器
abstract: Being effective and efficient is essential to an object detector for practical use. To meet these two concerns, we comprehensively evaluate a collection of existing refinements to improve the performance of PP-YOLO while almost keep the infer time unchanged. This paper will analyze a collection of refinements and empirically evaluate their impact on the final model performance through incremental ablation study. Things we tried that didn't work will also be discussed. By combining multiple effective refinements, we boost PP-YOLO's performance from 45.9% mAP to 49.5% mAP on COCO2017 test-dev. Since a significant margin of performance has been made, we present PP-YOLOv2. In terms of speed, PP-YOLOv2 runs in 68.9FPS at 640x640 input size. Paddle inference engine with TensorRT, FP16-precision, and batch size = 1 further improves PP-YOLOv2's infer speed, which achieves 106.5 FPS. Such a performance surpasses existing object detectors with roughly the same amount of parameters (i.e., YOLOv4-CSP, YOLOv5l). Besides, PP-YOLOv2 with ResNet101 achieves 50.3% mAP on COCO2017 test-dev. Source code is at https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleDetection.
summary: Being effective and efficient is essential to an object detector for practical use. To meet these two concerns, we comprehensively evaluate a collection of existing refinements to improve the performance of PP-YOLO while almost keep the infer time unchanged. This paper will analyze a collection of refinements and empirically evaluate their impact on the final model performance through incremental ablation study. Things we tried that didn't work will also be discussed. By combining multiple effective refinements, we boost PP-YOLO's performance from 45.9% mAP to 49.5% mAP on COCO2017 test-dev. Since a significant margin of performance has been made, we present PP-YOLOv2. In terms of speed, PP-YOLOv2 runs in 68.9FPS at 640x640 input size. Paddle inference engine with TensorRT, FP16-precision, and batch size = 1 further improves PP-YOLOv2's infer speed, which achieves 106.5 FPS. Such a performance surpasses existing object detectors with roughly the same amount of parameters (i.e., YOLOv4-CSP, YOLOv5l). Besides, PP-YOLOv2 with ResNet101 achieves 50.3% mAP on COCO2017 test-dev. Source code is at https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleDetection.
abstract_zh: 有效和高效对于物体检测器的实际应用至关重要。为了解决这两个问题，我们综合评估了一系列现有的改进，以提高 PP-YOLO 的性能，同时几乎保持推理时间不变。本文将分析一系列改进，并通过增量消融研究实证评估它们对最终模型性能的影响。我们尝试过但不起作用的事情也将被讨论。通过结合多种有效的改进，我们将 PP-YOLO 在 COCO2017 测试开发上的性能从 45.9% mAP 提高到 49.5% mAP。由于已经取得了显着的性能提升，我们提出了 PP-YOLOv2。在速度方面，PP-YOLOv2 在 640x640 输入尺寸下运行速度为 68.9FPS。具有 TensorRT、FP16 精度和批量大小 = 1 的 Paddle 推理引擎进一步提高了 PP-YOLOv2 的推理速度，达到 106.5 FPS。这样的性能超越了参数数量大致相同的现有目标检测器（即 YOLOv4-CSP、YOLOv5l）。此外，PP-YOLOv2 与 ResNet101 在 COCO2017 测试开发上实现了 50.3% mAP。源代码位于 https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleDetection。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PP-YOLOv2目标检测器，在保持推理速度不变的前提下通过多改进方法提升性能，并验证其在COCO2017数据集上的效果。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中目标检测需兼顾效率与性能，现有PP-YOLO在速度与精度间存在优化空间，需系统评估改进方法并验证其有效性。
AI.method: 通过增量消融实验分析多种改进方法的影响，筛选有效方案并组合优化，结合PaddlePaddle推理引擎的TensorRT、FP16等技术提升推理速度。
AI.result: PP-YOLOv2在COCO2017测试集上mAP从45.9%提升至49.5%，640x640输入下达68.9FPS，使用优化后推理速度达106.5FPS，性能优于YOLOv4-CSP等同类模型。
AI.conclusion: PP-YOLOv2在保持参数量级相近的情况下实现了更高的检测精度与推理速度，验证了改进方法的有效性，代码已开源供实际应用部署。

Such a performance surpasses existing object detectors with roughly the same amount of parameters (i.e., YOLOv4-CSP, YOLOv5l). Source code is at https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleDetection. 有效和高效对于物体检测器的实际应用至关重要。为了解决这两个问题，我们综合评估了一系列现有的改进，以提高 PP-YOLO 的性能，同时几乎保持推理时间不变。本文将分析一系列改进，并通过增量消融研究实证评估它们对最终模型性能的影响。我们尝试过但不起作用的事情也将被讨论。通过结合多种有效的改进，我们将 PP-YOLO 在 COCO2017 测试开发上的性能从 45.9% mAP 提高到 49.5% mAP。由于已经取得了显着的性能提升，我们提出了 PP-YOLOv2。在速度方面，PP-YOLOv2 在 640x640 输入尺寸下运行速度为 68.9FPS。具有 TensorRT、FP16 精度和批量大小 = 1 的 Paddle 推理引擎进一步提高了 PP-YOLOv2 的推理速度，达到 106.5 FPS。这样的性能超越了参数数量大致相同的现有目标检测器（即 YOLOv4-CSP、YOLOv5l）。此外，PP-YOLOv2 与 ResNet101 在 COCO2017 测试开发上实现了 50.3% mAP。源代码位于 https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleDetection。 本文提出PP-YOLOv2目标检测器，在保持推理速度不变的前提下通过多改进方法提升性能，并验证其在COCO2017数据集上的效果。 Xin Huang,Xinxin Wang,Wenyu Lv,Xiaying Bai,Xiang Long,Kaipeng Deng,Qingqing Dang,Shumin Han,Qiwen Liu,Xiaoguang Hu,Dianhai Yu,Yanjun Ma,Osamu Yoshie cs.CV

authors_text: Zhong-Qiu Zhao,Yao Gao,Yuchen Ge,Weidong Tian
title: Orderly Dual-Teacher Knowledge Distillation for Lightweight Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: 轻量级人体姿态估计的有序双师知识蒸馏
abstract: Although deep convolution neural networks (DCNN) have achieved excellent performance in human pose estimation, these networks often have a large number of parameters and computations, leading to the slow inference speed. For this issue, an effective solution is knowledge distillation, which transfers knowledge from a large pre-trained network (teacher) to a small network (student). However, there are some defects in the existing approaches: (I) Only a single teacher is adopted, neglecting the potential that a student can learn from multiple teachers. (II) The human segmentation mask can be regarded as additional prior information to restrict the location of keypoints, which is never utilized. (III) A student with a small number of parameters cannot fully imitate heatmaps provided by datasets and teachers. (IV) There exists noise in heatmaps generated by teachers, which causes model degradation. To overcome these defects, we propose an orderly dual-teacher knowledge distillation (ODKD) framework, which consists of two teachers with different capabilities. Specifically, the weaker one (primary teacher, PT) is used to teach keypoints information, the stronger one (senior teacher, ST) is utilized to transfer segmentation and keypoints information by adding the human segmentation mask. Taking dual-teacher together, an orderly learning strategy is proposed to promote knowledge absorbability. Moreover, we employ a binarization operation which further improves the learning ability of the student and reduces noise in heatmaps. Experimental results on COCO and OCHuman keypoints datasets show that our proposed ODKD can improve the performance of different lightweight models by a large margin, and HRNet-W16 equipped with ODKD achieves state-of-the-art performance for lightweight human pose estimation.
summary: Although deep convolution neural networks (DCNN) have achieved excellent performance in human pose estimation, these networks often have a large number of parameters and computations, leading to the slow inference speed. For this issue, an effective solution is knowledge distillation, which transfers knowledge from a large pre-trained network (teacher) to a small network (student). However, there are some defects in the existing approaches: (I) Only a single teacher is adopted, neglecting the potential that a student can learn from multiple teachers. (II) The human segmentation mask can be regarded as additional prior information to restrict the location of keypoints, which is never utilized. (III) A student with a small number of parameters cannot fully imitate heatmaps provided by datasets and teachers. (IV) There exists noise in heatmaps generated by teachers, which causes model degradation. To overcome these defects, we propose an orderly dual-teacher knowledge distillation (ODKD) framework, which consists of two teachers with different capabilities. Specifically, the weaker one (primary teacher, PT) is used to teach keypoints information, the stronger one (senior teacher, ST) is utilized to transfer segmentation and keypoints information by adding the human segmentation mask. Taking dual-teacher together, an orderly learning strategy is proposed to promote knowledge absorbability. Moreover, we employ a binarization operation which further improves the learning ability of the student and reduces noise in heatmaps. Experimental results on COCO and OCHuman keypoints datasets show that our proposed ODKD can improve the performance of different lightweight models by a large margin, and HRNet-W16 equipped with ODKD achieves state-of-the-art performance for lightweight human pose estimation.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）在人体姿态估计方面取得了优异的性能，但这些网络往往具有大量参数和计算量，导致推理速度缓慢。对于这个问题，一个有效的解决方案是知识蒸馏，它将知识从大型预训练网络（教师）转移到小型网络（学生）。然而，现有方法存在一些缺陷：（一）仅采用单一教师，忽视了学生向多个教师学习的潜力。 （II）人体分割掩模可以被视为限制关键点位置的附加先验信息，但从未被利用。 (III) 参数数量较少的学生无法完全模仿数据集和教师提供的热图。 （IV）教师生成的热图中存在噪声，导致模型退化。为了克服这些缺陷，我们提出了一种有序的双教师知识蒸馏（ODKD）框架，该框架由两名具有不同能力的教师组成。具体来说，较弱的教师（初级教师，PT）用于教授关键点信息，较强的教师（高级教师，ST）用于通过添加人体分割掩模来传输分割和关键点信息。双师结合，提出有序学习策略，促进知识吸收。此外，我们采用二值化操作，进一步提高了学生的学习能力并减少了热图中的噪声。 COCO 和 OCHuman 关键点数据集上的实验结果表明，我们提出的 ODKD 可以大幅提高不同轻量级模型的性能，并且配备 ODKD 的 HRNet-W16 实现了轻量级人体姿态估计的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种有序双教师知识蒸馏框架（ODKD），用于提升轻量级人体姿态估计的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法存在单教师限制、未利用分割掩码、学生网络无法完全模仿热图及教师热图噪声等问题。
AI.method: 采用双教师（初级教师负责关键点信息，高级教师结合分割掩码传递信息），设计有序学习策略并引入二值化操作减少热图噪声。
AI.result: 在COCO和OCHuman数据集上，ODKD显著提升轻量模型性能，其中HRNet-W16达到轻量人体姿态估计的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: ODKD通过双教师协同与二值化优化，有效解决了轻量模型在姿态估计中的性能瓶颈问题。

authors_text: Kanishk Jain,Vineet Gandhi
title: Comprehensive Multi-Modal Interactions for Referring Image Segmentation
title_zh: 用于参考图像分割的综合多模态交互
abstract: We investigate Referring Image Segmentation (RIS), which outputs a segmentation map corresponding to the natural language description. Addressing RIS efficiently requires considering the interactions happening across visual and linguistic modalities and the interactions within each modality. Existing methods are limited because they either compute different forms of interactions sequentially (leading to error propagation) or ignore intramodal interactions. We address this limitation by performing all three interactions simultaneously through a Synchronous Multi-Modal Fusion Module (SFM). Moreover, to produce refined segmentation masks, we propose a novel Hierarchical Cross-Modal Aggregation Module (HCAM), where linguistic features facilitate the exchange of contextual information across the visual hierarchy. We present thorough ablation studies and validate our approach's performance on four benchmark datasets, showing considerable performance gains over the existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods.
summary: We investigate Referring Image Segmentation (RIS), which outputs a segmentation map corresponding to the natural language description. Addressing RIS efficiently requires considering the interactions happening across visual and linguistic modalities and the interactions within each modality. Existing methods are limited because they either compute different forms of interactions sequentially (leading to error propagation) or ignore intramodal interactions. We address this limitation by performing all three interactions simultaneously through a Synchronous Multi-Modal Fusion Module (SFM). Moreover, to produce refined segmentation masks, we propose a novel Hierarchical Cross-Modal Aggregation Module (HCAM), where linguistic features facilitate the exchange of contextual information across the visual hierarchy. We present thorough ablation studies and validate our approach's performance on four benchmark datasets, showing considerable performance gains over the existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods.
abstract_zh: 我们研究参考图像分割（RIS），它输出与自然语言描述相对应的分割图。有效解决 RIS 需要考虑视觉和语言模态之间发生的交互以及每种模态内的交互。现有方法受到限制，因为它们要么顺序计算不同形式的相互作用（导致错误传播），要么忽略模态内相互作用。我们通过同步多模态融合模块（SFM）同时执行所有三种交互来解决此限制。此外，为了产生精细的分割掩模，我们提出了一种新颖的分层跨模态聚合模块（HCAM），其中语言特征促进了跨视觉层次结构的上下文信息的交换。我们提出了彻底的消融研究，并在四个基准数据集上验证了我们的方法的性能，显示出比现有最先进（SOTA）方法有相当大的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 研究指涉图像分割，通过多模态交互提升分割精度
AI.motivation: 现有方法顺序处理交互导致误差传播或忽略模态内交互，需同步处理提升效果
AI.method: 提出同步多模态融合模块（SFM）同时处理跨模态和模态内交互，结合分层跨模态聚合模块（HCAM）优化分割掩码
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上验证，性能显著优于现有最先进方法
AI.conclusion: 通过同步多模态交互和分层聚合模块，有效提升指涉图像分割性能

authors_text: Shiyang Yan,Li Yu,Yuan Xie
title: Discrete-continuous Action Space Policy Gradient-based Attention for Image-Text Matching
title_zh: 基于梯度的图像文本匹配的离散连续动作空间策略注意
abstract: Image-text matching is an important multi-modal task with massive applications. It tries to match the image and the text with similar semantic information. Existing approaches do not explicitly transform the different modalities into a common space. Meanwhile, the attention mechanism which is widely used in image-text matching models does not have supervision. We propose a novel attention scheme which projects the image and text embedding into a common space and optimises the attention weights directly towards the evaluation metrics. The proposed attention scheme can be considered as a kind of supervised attention and requiring no additional annotations. It is trained via a novel Discrete-continuous action space policy gradient algorithm, which is more effective in modelling complex action space than previous continuous action space policy gradient. We evaluate the proposed methods on two widely-used benchmark datasets: Flickr30k and MS-COCO, outperforming the previous approaches by a large margin.
summary: Image-text matching is an important multi-modal task with massive applications. It tries to match the image and the text with similar semantic information. Existing approaches do not explicitly transform the different modalities into a common space. Meanwhile, the attention mechanism which is widely used in image-text matching models does not have supervision. We propose a novel attention scheme which projects the image and text embedding into a common space and optimises the attention weights directly towards the evaluation metrics. The proposed attention scheme can be considered as a kind of supervised attention and requiring no additional annotations. It is trained via a novel Discrete-continuous action space policy gradient algorithm, which is more effective in modelling complex action space than previous continuous action space policy gradient. We evaluate the proposed methods on two widely-used benchmark datasets: Flickr30k and MS-COCO, outperforming the previous approaches by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 图文匹配是一项重要的多模态任务，具有广泛的应用前景。它试图将具有相似语义信息的图像和文本进行匹配。现有的方法没有明确地将不同的模式转变为公共空间。同时，图像文本匹配模型中广泛使用的注意力机制没有监督。我们提出了一种新颖的注意力方案，它将图像和文本嵌入投影到一个公共空间中，并直接针对评估指标优化注意力权重。所提出的注意力方案可以被视为一种监督注意力并且不需要额外的注释。它通过一种新颖的离散连续动作空间策略梯度算法进行训练，该算法在建模复杂动作空间方面比以前的连续动作空间策略梯度更有效。我们在两个广泛使用的基准数据集：Flickr30k 和 MS-COCO 上评估了所提出的方法，大大优于以前的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于离散-连续动作空间策略梯度的注意力机制，用于改进图像-文本匹配任务中的跨模态对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未显式将不同模态映射到公共空间，且广泛使用的注意力机制缺乏监督信号，导致匹配效果受限。
AI.method: 设计一种监督式注意力方案，通过离散-连续动作空间策略梯度算法联合优化图像/文本嵌入的公共空间投影与注意力权重。
AI.result: 在Flickr30k和MS-COCO数据集上显著优于现有方法，验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过显式跨模态对齐与监督注意力机制，有效提升了图像-文本匹配性能。

search_text: Discrete-continuous Action Space Policy Gradient-based Attention for Image-Text Matching 基于梯度的图像文本匹配的离散连续动作空间策略注意 Image-text matching is an important multi-modal task with massive applications. It tries to match the image and the text with similar semantic information. Existing approaches do not explicitly transform the different modalities into a common space. Meanwhile, the attention mechanism which is widely used in image-text matching models does not have supervision. We propose a novel attention scheme which projects the image and text embedding into a common space and optimises the attention weights directly towards the evaluation metrics. The proposed attention scheme can be considered as a kind of supervised attention and requiring no additional annotations. It is trained via a novel Discrete-continuous action space policy gradient algorithm, which is more effective in modelling complex action space than previous continuous action space policy gradient. We evaluate the proposed methods on two widely-used benchmark datasets: Flickr30k and MS-COCO, outperforming the previous approaches by a large margin. 图文匹配是一项重要的多模态任务，具有广泛的应用前景。它试图将具有相似语义信息的图像和文本进行匹配。现有的方法没有明确地将不同的模式转变为公共空间。同时，图像文本匹配模型中广泛使用的注意力机制没有监督。我们提出了一种新颖的注意力方案，它将图像和文本嵌入投影到一个公共空间中，并直接针对评估指标优化注意力权重。所提出的注意力方案可以被视为一种监督注意力并且不需要额外的注释。它通过一种新颖的离散连续动作空间策略梯度算法进行训练，该算法在建模复杂动作空间方面比以前的连续动作空间策略梯度更有效。我们在两个广泛使用的基准数据集：Flickr30k 和 MS-COCO 上评估了所提出的方法，大大优于以前的方法。 本文提出一种基于离散-连续动作空间策略梯度的注意力机制，用于改进图像-文本匹配任务中的跨模态对齐。 Shiyang Yan,Li Yu,Yuan Xie cs.CV

authors_text: Giulio Ermanno Pibiri,Roberto Trani
title: PTHash: Revisiting FCH Minimal Perfect Hashing
title_zh: PTHash：重新审视 FCH 最小完美哈希
abstract: Given a set $S$ of $n$ distinct keys, a function $f$ that bijectively maps the keys of $S$ into the range $\{0,\ldots,n-1\}$ is called a minimal perfect hash function for $S$. Algorithms that find such functions when $n$ is large and retain constant evaluation time are of practical interest; for instance, search engines and databases typically use minimal perfect hash functions to quickly assign identifiers to static sets of variable-length keys such as strings. The challenge is to design an algorithm which is efficient in three different aspects: time to find $f$ (construction time), time to evaluate $f$ on a key of $S$ (lookup time), and space of representation for $f$. Several algorithms have been proposed to trade-off between these aspects. In 1992, Fox, Chen, and Heath (FCH) presented an algorithm at SIGIR providing very fast lookup evaluation. However, the approach received little attention because of its large construction time and higher space consumption compared to other subsequent techniques. Almost thirty years later we revisit their framework and present an improved algorithm that scales well to large sets and reduces space consumption altogether, without compromising the lookup time. We conduct an extensive experimental assessment and show that the algorithm finds functions that are competitive in space with state-of-the art techniques and provide $2-4\times$ better lookup time.
summary: Given a set $S$ of $n$ distinct keys, a function $f$ that bijectively maps the keys of $S$ into the range $\{0,\ldots,n-1\}$ is called a minimal perfect hash function for $S$. Algorithms that find such functions when $n$ is large and retain constant evaluation time are of practical interest; for instance, search engines and databases typically use minimal perfect hash functions to quickly assign identifiers to static sets of variable-length keys such as strings. The challenge is to design an algorithm which is efficient in three different aspects: time to find $f$ (construction time), time to evaluate $f$ on a key of $S$ (lookup time), and space of representation for $f$. Several algorithms have been proposed to trade-off between these aspects. In 1992, Fox, Chen, and Heath (FCH) presented an algorithm at SIGIR providing very fast lookup evaluation. However, the approach received little attention because of its large construction time and higher space consumption compared to other subsequent techniques. Almost thirty years later we revisit their framework and present an improved algorithm that scales well to large sets and reduces space consumption altogether, without compromising the lookup time. We conduct an extensive experimental assessment and show that the algorithm finds functions that are competitive in space with state-of-the art techniques and provide $2-4\times$ better lookup time.
abstract_zh: 给定 $n$ 个不同键的集合 $S$，将 $S$ 的键双射映射到范围 $\{0,\ldots,n-1\}$ 的函数 $f$ 被称为 $S$ 的最小完美哈希函数。当 $n$ 很大时找到此类函数并保持恒定评估时间的算法具有实际意义；例如，搜索引擎和数据库通常使用最小完美散列函数来快速将标识符分配给静态的可变长度键集（例如字符串）。挑战在于设计一种在三个不同方面高效的算法：查找 $f$ 的时间（构造时间）、在 $S$ 的键上评估 $f$ 的时间（查找时间）以及 $f$ 的表示空间。已经提出了几种算法来在这些方面之间进行权衡。 1992 年，Fox、Chen 和 Heath (FCH) 在 SIGIR 上提出了一种算法，可提供非常快速的查找评估。然而，由于与其他后续技术相比，该方法的构建时间较长且占用空间较高，因此很少受到关注。大约三十年后，我们重新审视了他们的框架，并提出了一种改进的算法，可以很好地扩展到大型集合并完全减少空间消耗，而不会影响查找时间。我们进行了广泛的实验评估，结果表明该算法找到的函数在空间上与最先进的技术具有竞争力，并提供了 2-4 倍的更好的查找时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的FCH最小完美哈希算法PTHash，旨在高效处理大规模数据集，同时优化空间和时间效率。
AI.motivation: FCH算法虽具有快速查找性能，但因构造时间长且空间消耗大而应用受限，需在不牺牲查找速度的前提下优化其效率。
AI.method: 通过改进FCH框架，优化算法构造时间和空间消耗，同时保持快速查找时间。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，PTHash算法在空间效率上与先进方法相当，查找时间提升了2-4倍，且适用于大规模数据集。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了FCH框架的改进潜力，提出的PTHash算法在保持快速查找的同时优化了构造时间和空间效率，适用于需要高效静态集合标识符分配的场景。
