authors_text: Sangrok Lee,Taekang Woo,Sang Hun Lee
title: Multi-Attention-Based Soft Partition Network for Vehicle Re-Identification
title_zh: 基于多注意力的车辆重识别软划分网络
abstract: Vehicle re-identification helps in distinguishing between images of the same and other vehicles. It is a challenging process because of significant intra-instance differences between identical vehicles from different views and subtle inter-instance differences between similar vehicles. To solve this issue, researchers have extracted view-aware or part-specific features via spatial attention mechanisms, which usually result in noisy attention maps or otherwise require expensive additional annotation for metadata, such as key points, to improve the quality. Meanwhile, based on the researchers' insights, various handcrafted multi-attention architectures for specific viewpoints or vehicle parts have been proposed. However, this approach does not guarantee that the number and nature of attention branches will be optimal for real-world re-identification tasks. To address these problems, we proposed a new vehicle re-identification network based on a multiple soft attention mechanism for capturing various discriminative regions from different viewpoints more efficiently. Furthermore, this model can significantly reduce the noise in spatial attention maps by devising a new method for creating an attention map for insignificant regions and then excluding it from generating the final result. We also combined a channel-wise attention mechanism with a spatial attention mechanism for the efficient selection of important semantic attributes for vehicle re-identification. Our experiments showed that our proposed model achieved a state-of-the-art performance among the attention-based methods without metadata and was comparable to the approaches using metadata for the VehicleID and VERI-Wild datasets.
summary: Vehicle re-identification helps in distinguishing between images of the same and other vehicles. It is a challenging process because of significant intra-instance differences between identical vehicles from different views and subtle inter-instance differences between similar vehicles. To solve this issue, researchers have extracted view-aware or part-specific features via spatial attention mechanisms, which usually result in noisy attention maps or otherwise require expensive additional annotation for metadata, such as key points, to improve the quality. Meanwhile, based on the researchers' insights, various handcrafted multi-attention architectures for specific viewpoints or vehicle parts have been proposed. However, this approach does not guarantee that the number and nature of attention branches will be optimal for real-world re-identification tasks. To address these problems, we proposed a new vehicle re-identification network based on a multiple soft attention mechanism for capturing various discriminative regions from different viewpoints more efficiently. Furthermore, this model can significantly reduce the noise in spatial attention maps by devising a new method for creating an attention map for insignificant regions and then excluding it from generating the final result. We also combined a channel-wise attention mechanism with a spatial attention mechanism for the efficient selection of important semantic attributes for vehicle re-identification. Our experiments showed that our proposed model achieved a state-of-the-art performance among the attention-based methods without metadata and was comparable to the approaches using metadata for the VehicleID and VERI-Wild datasets.
abstract_zh: 车辆重新识别有助于区分同一车辆和其他车辆的图像。这是一个具有挑战性的过程，因为不同视图下的相同车辆之间存在显着的实例内差异，而相似车辆之间存在细微的实例间差异。为了解决这个问题，研究人员通过空间注意机制提取了视图感知或特定部分的特征，这通常会导致嘈杂的注意图，或者需要对元数据（例如关键点）进行昂贵的附加注释以提高质量。同时，根据研究人员的见解，针对特定视点或车辆部件提出了各种手工制作的多注意架构。然而，这种方法并不能保证注意力分支的数量和性质对于现实世界的重新识别任务来说是最佳的。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于多重软注意机制的新车辆重新识别网络，用于更有效地从不同角度捕获各种判别区域。此外，该模型可以通过设计一种新方法来为不重要区域创建注意图，然后将其排除在生成最终结果之外，从而显着减少空间注意图中的噪声。我们还将通道注意机制与空间注意机制相结合，以有效选择车辆重新识别的重要语义属性。我们的实验表明，我们提出的模型在没有元数据的基于注意力的方法中实现了最先进的性能，并且与使用 VehicleID 和 VERI-Wild 数据集元数据的方法相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多注意机制的软分区网络，用于提高车辆重识别的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理车辆不同视角下的外观差异和相似车辆的细微差别时存在噪声注意力图或依赖额外标注的问题，亟需一种无需元数据且能自适应优化注意力分支的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计多软注意力机制以高效捕捉多视角下的判别区域，通过生成无意义区域注意力图并排除其干扰来降低噪声，同时结合通道注意力与空间注意力机制筛选关键语义属性。
AI.result: 在VehicleID和VERI-Wild数据集上，该模型在无元数据情况下达到基于注意力方法的最先进性能，且效果与使用元数据的方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型通过优化注意力机制有效解决了车辆重识别中的关键挑战，在无需额外标注的情况下实现了具有竞争力的性能。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多注意机制的软分区网络，用于提高车辆重识别的准确性和鲁棒性。
motivation: 现有方法在处理车辆不同视角下的外观差异和相似车辆的细微差别时存在噪声注意力图或依赖额外标注的问题，亟需一种无需元数据且能自适应优化注意力分支的解决方案。
method: 设计多软注意力机制以高效捕捉多视角下的判别区域，通过生成无意义区域注意力图并排除其干扰来降低噪声，同时结合通道注意力与空间注意力机制筛选关键语义属性。
result: 在VehicleID和VERI-Wild数据集上，该模型在无元数据情况下达到基于注意力方法的最先进性能，且效果与使用元数据的方法相当。
conclusion: 所提模型通过优化注意力机制有效解决了车辆重识别中的关键挑战，在无需额外标注的情况下实现了具有竞争力的性能。
search_text: Multi-Attention-Based Soft Partition Network for Vehicle Re-Identification 基于多注意力的车辆重识别软划分网络 Vehicle re-identification helps in distinguishing between images of the same and other vehicles. It is a challenging process because of significant intra-instance differences between identical vehicles from different views and subtle inter-instance differences between similar vehicles. To solve this issue, researchers have extracted view-aware or part-specific features via spatial attention mechanisms, which usually result in noisy attention maps or otherwise require expensive additional annotation for metadata, such as key points, to improve the quality. Meanwhile, based on the researchers' insights, various handcrafted multi-attention architectures for specific viewpoints or vehicle parts have been proposed. However, this approach does not guarantee that the number and nature of attention branches will be optimal for real-world re-identification tasks. To address these problems, we proposed a new vehicle re-identification network based on a multiple soft attention mechanism for capturing various discriminative regions from different viewpoints more efficiently. Furthermore, this model can significantly reduce the noise in spatial attention maps by devising a new method for creating an attention map for insignificant regions and then excluding it from generating the final result. We also combined a channel-wise attention mechanism with a spatial attention mechanism for the efficient selection of important semantic attributes for vehicle re-identification. Our experiments showed that our proposed model achieved a state-of-the-art performance among the attention-based methods without metadata and was comparable to the approaches using metadata for the VehicleID and VERI-Wild datasets. 车辆重新识别有助于区分同一车辆和其他车辆的图像。这是一个具有挑战性的过程，因为不同视图下的相同车辆之间存在显着的实例内差异，而相似车辆之间存在细微的实例间差异。为了解决这个问题，研究人员通过空间注意机制提取了视图感知或特定部分的特征，这通常会导致嘈杂的注意图，或者需要对元数据（例如关键点）进行昂贵的附加注释以提高质量。同时，根据研究人员的见解，针对特定视点或车辆部件提出了各种手工制作的多注意架构。然而，这种方法并不能保证注意力分支的数量和性质对于现实世界的重新识别任务来说是最佳的。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于多重软注意机制的新车辆重新识别网络，用于更有效地从不同角度捕获各种判别区域。此外，该模型可以通过设计一种新方法来为不重要区域创建注意图，然后将其排除在生成最终结果之外，从而显着减少空间注意图中的噪声。我们还将通道注意机制与空间注意机制相结合，以有效选择车辆重新识别的重要语义属性。我们的实验表明，我们提出的模型在没有元数据的基于注意力的方法中实现了最先进的性能，并且与使用 VehicleID 和 VERI-Wild 数据集元数据的方法相当。 本文提出了一种基于多注意机制的软分区网络，用于提高车辆重识别的准确性和鲁棒性。 Sangrok Lee,Taekang Woo,Sang Hun Lee cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Chenxin Xu,Rong Xia,Yong Xiao,Yingyu Li,Guangming Shi,Kwang-cheng Chen
title: Federated Traffic Synthesizing and Classification Using Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: 使用生成对抗网络进行联合流量合成和分类
abstract: With the fast growing demand on new services and applications as well as the increasing awareness of data protection, traditional centralized traffic classification approaches are facing unprecedented challenges. This paper introduces a novel framework, Federated Generative Adversarial Networks and Automatic Classification (FGAN-AC), which integrates decentralized data synthesizing with traffic classification. FGAN-AC is able to synthesize and classify multiple types of service data traffic from decentralized local datasets without requiring a large volume of manually labeled dataset or causing any data leakage. Two types of data synthesizing approaches have been proposed and compared: computation-efficient FGAN (FGAN-\uppercase\expandafter{\romannumeral1}) and communication-efficient FGAN (FGAN-\uppercase\expandafter{\romannumeral2}). The former only implements a single CNN model for processing each local dataset and the later only requires coordination of intermediate model training parameters. An automatic data classification and model updating framework has been proposed to automatically identify unknown traffic from the synthesized data samples and create new pseudo-labels for model training. Numerical results show that our proposed framework has the ability to synthesize highly mixed service data traffic and can significantly improve the traffic classification performance compared to existing solutions.
summary: With the fast growing demand on new services and applications as well as the increasing awareness of data protection, traditional centralized traffic classification approaches are facing unprecedented challenges. This paper introduces a novel framework, Federated Generative Adversarial Networks and Automatic Classification (FGAN-AC), which integrates decentralized data synthesizing with traffic classification. FGAN-AC is able to synthesize and classify multiple types of service data traffic from decentralized local datasets without requiring a large volume of manually labeled dataset or causing any data leakage. Two types of data synthesizing approaches have been proposed and compared: computation-efficient FGAN (FGAN-\uppercase\expandafter{\romannumeral1}) and communication-efficient FGAN (FGAN-\uppercase\expandafter{\romannumeral2}). The former only implements a single CNN model for processing each local dataset and the later only requires coordination of intermediate model training parameters. An automatic data classification and model updating framework has been proposed to automatically identify unknown traffic from the synthesized data samples and create new pseudo-labels for model training. Numerical results show that our proposed framework has the ability to synthesize highly mixed service data traffic and can significantly improve the traffic classification performance compared to existing solutions.
abstract_zh: 随着新业务、新应用需求的快速增长以及数据保护意识的不断增强，传统的集中式流量分类方法面临着前所未有的挑战。本文介绍了一种新颖的框架——联合生成对抗网络和自动分类（FGAN-AC），它将去中心化数据合成与流量分类相结合。 FGAN-AC能够从分散的本地数据集中合成和分类多种类型的服务数据流量，而不需要大量的手动标记数据集或导致任何数据泄漏。提出并比较了两种类型的数据合成方法：计算高效的 FGAN (FGAN-\uppercase\expandafter{\romannumeral1}) 和通信高效的 FGAN (FGAN-\uppercase\expandafter{\romannumeral2})。前者仅实现单个 CNN 模型来处理每个本地数据集，后者仅需要协调中间模型训练参数。提出了一种自动数据分类和模型更新框架，可以从合成的数据样本中自动识别未知流量，并为模型训练创建新的伪标签。数值结果表明，我们提出的框架能够合成高度混合的服务数据流量，并且与现有解决方案相比可以显着提高流量分类性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络的联邦流量合成与分类框架FGAN-AC，解决传统集中式流量分类方法在数据隐私和标注需求方面的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统集中式流量分类需要大量标注数据且存在数据泄露风险，而数据保护需求和新服务应用的快速增长使得现有方法难以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 设计联邦生成对抗网络框架FGAN-AC，包含计算高效型FGAN-I（单CNN模型处理本地数据）和通信高效型FGAN-II（仅协调中间参数），结合自动分类机制生成伪标签实现模型迭代优化。
AI.result: 实验表明框架能合成高度混合的流量数据，相比现有方案显著提升分类性能，同时避免数据泄露且减少标注依赖。
AI.conclusion: FGAN-AC通过联邦学习与生成对抗网络的结合，在保障数据隐私的前提下实现了高效准确的流量分类，为未来网络服务提供新解决方案。

authors_text: Gian Maria Campedelli,Mihovil Bartulovic,Kathleen M. Carley
title: Learning future terrorist targets through temporal meta-graphs
title_zh: 通过时间元图学习未来的恐怖分子目标
abstract: In the last 20 years, terrorism has led to hundreds of thousands of deaths and massive economic, political, and humanitarian crises in several regions of the world. Using real-world data on attacks occurred in Afghanistan and Iraq from 2001 to 2018, we propose the use of temporal meta-graphs and deep learning to forecast future terrorist targets. Focusing on three event dimensions, i.e., employed weapons, deployed tactics and chosen targets, meta-graphs map the connections among temporally close attacks, capturing their operational similarities and dependencies. From these temporal meta-graphs, we derive 2-day-based time series that measure the centrality of each feature within each dimension over time. Formulating the problem in the context of the strategic behavior of terrorist actors, these multivariate temporal sequences are then utilized to learn what target types are at the highest risk of being chosen. The paper makes two contributions. First, it demonstrates that engineering the feature space via temporal meta-graphs produces richer knowledge than shallow time-series that only rely on frequency of feature occurrences. Second, the performed experiments reveal that bi-directional LSTM networks achieve superior forecasting performance compared to other algorithms, calling for future research aiming at fully discovering the potential of artificial intelligence to counter terrorist violence.
summary: In the last 20 years, terrorism has led to hundreds of thousands of deaths and massive economic, political, and humanitarian crises in several regions of the world. Using real-world data on attacks occurred in Afghanistan and Iraq from 2001 to 2018, we propose the use of temporal meta-graphs and deep learning to forecast future terrorist targets. Focusing on three event dimensions, i.e., employed weapons, deployed tactics and chosen targets, meta-graphs map the connections among temporally close attacks, capturing their operational similarities and dependencies. From these temporal meta-graphs, we derive 2-day-based time series that measure the centrality of each feature within each dimension over time. Formulating the problem in the context of the strategic behavior of terrorist actors, these multivariate temporal sequences are then utilized to learn what target types are at the highest risk of being chosen. The paper makes two contributions. First, it demonstrates that engineering the feature space via temporal meta-graphs produces richer knowledge than shallow time-series that only rely on frequency of feature occurrences. Second, the performed experiments reveal that bi-directional LSTM networks achieve superior forecasting performance compared to other algorithms, calling for future research aiming at fully discovering the potential of artificial intelligence to counter terrorist violence.
abstract_zh: 过去20年来，恐怖主义在世界多个地区造成数十万人死亡，并引发大规模经济、政治和人道主义危机。利用 2001 年至 2018 年阿富汗和伊拉克发生的袭击的真实数据，我们建议使用时间元图和深度学习来预测未来的恐怖分子目标。元图聚焦于三个事件维度，即使用的武器、部署的战术和选定的目标，绘制了时间上接近的攻击之间的联系，捕捉它们的操作相似性和依赖性。从这些时间元图中，我们得出基于 2 天的时间序列，用于衡量每个特征随时间在每个维度内的中心性。在恐怖分子战略行为的背景下制定问题，然后利用这些多元时间序列来了解哪些目标类型被选择的风险最高。该论文做出了两个贡献。首先，它表明通过时间元图设计特征空间比仅依赖于特征出现频率的浅层时间序列产生更丰富的知识。其次，所进行的实验表明，与其他算法相比，双向 LSTM 网络具有优异的预测性能，呼吁未来的研究旨在充分发现人工智能对抗恐怖主义暴力的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用时间元图和深度学习方法预测未来恐怖袭击的目标。
AI.motivation: 由于恐怖主义导致大量伤亡和危机，现有方法难以有效预测目标，需更精准的预测模型以预防袭击。
AI.method: 通过构建时间元图分析攻击间的时序关联，提取多维特征时间序列，并采用双向LSTM网络进行目标预测。
AI.result: 实验显示双向LSTM在预测性能上优于其他算法，时间元图方法比传统方法能提取更丰富的特征信息。
AI.conclusion: 时间元图结合深度学习能有效预测恐怖袭击目标，未来需进一步挖掘AI在反恐中的潜力。

The paper makes two contributions. First, it demonstrates that engineering the feature space via temporal meta-graphs produces richer knowledge than shallow time-series that only rely on frequency of feature occurrences. Second, the performed experiments reveal that bi-directional LSTM networks achieve superior forecasting performance compared to other algorithms, calling for future research aiming at fully discovering the potential of artificial intelligence to counter terrorist violence. 过去20年来，恐怖主义在世界多个地区造成数十万人死亡，并引发大规模经济、政治和人道主义危机。利用 2001 年至 2018 年阿富汗和伊拉克发生的袭击的真实数据，我们建议使用时间元图和深度学习来预测未来的恐怖分子目标。元图聚焦于三个事件维度，即使用的武器、部署的战术和选定的目标，绘制了时间上接近的攻击之间的联系，捕捉它们的操作相似性和依赖性。从这些时间元图中，我们得出基于 2 天的时间序列，用于衡量每个特征随时间在每个维度内的中心性。在恐怖分子战略行为的背景下制定问题，然后利用这些多元时间序列来了解哪些目标类型被选择的风险最高。该论文做出了两个贡献。首先，它表明通过时间元图设计特征空间比仅依赖于特征出现频率的浅层时间序列产生更丰富的知识。其次，所进行的实验表明，与其他算法相比，双向 LSTM 网络具有优异的预测性能，呼吁未来的研究旨在充分发现人工智能对抗恐怖主义暴力的潜力。 本文提出利用时间元图和深度学习方法预测未来恐怖袭击的目标。 Gian Maria Campedelli,Mihovil Bartulovic,Kathleen M. Carley cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yuk Heo,Yeong Jun Koh,Chang-Su Kim
title: Guided Interactive Video Object Segmentation Using Reliability-Based Attention Maps
title_zh: 使用基于可靠性的注意力图进行引导交互式视频对象分割
abstract: We propose a novel guided interactive segmentation (GIS) algorithm for video objects to improve the segmentation accuracy and reduce the interaction time. First, we design the reliability-based attention module to analyze the reliability of multiple annotated frames. Second, we develop the intersection-aware propagation module to propagate segmentation results to neighboring frames. Third, we introduce the GIS mechanism for a user to select unsatisfactory frames quickly with less effort. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed algorithm provides more accurate segmentation results at a faster speed than conventional algorithms. Codes are available at https://github.com/yuk6heo/GIS-RAmap.
summary: We propose a novel guided interactive segmentation (GIS) algorithm for video objects to improve the segmentation accuracy and reduce the interaction time. First, we design the reliability-based attention module to analyze the reliability of multiple annotated frames. Second, we develop the intersection-aware propagation module to propagate segmentation results to neighboring frames. Third, we introduce the GIS mechanism for a user to select unsatisfactory frames quickly with less effort. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed algorithm provides more accurate segmentation results at a faster speed than conventional algorithms. Codes are available at https://github.com/yuk6heo/GIS-RAmap.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的视频对象引导交互式分割（GIS）算法，以提高分割精度并减少交互时间。首先，我们设计了基于可靠性的注意力模块来分析多个注释帧的可靠性。其次，我们开发了交叉感知传播模块，将分割结果传播到相邻帧。第三，我们引入了GIS机制，让用户可以轻松快速地选择不满意的帧。实验结果表明，与传统算法相比，该算法以更快的速度提供了更准确的分割结果。代码可在 https://github.com/yuk6heo/GIS-RAmap 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可靠性注意力图的引导交互式视频对象分割算法，旨在提高分割精度并减少交互时间。
AI.motivation: 传统视频分割方法存在分割精度不足和交互操作耗时的问题，需通过智能引导机制优化用户体验。
AI.method: 设计可靠性注意力模块分析多帧标注可靠性，交集感知传播模块实现帧间结果传递，GIS机制允许用户快速标记不满意帧。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法在分割精度和处理速度上均优于传统方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过可靠性注意力与交互引导结合，有效提升了视频对象分割的效率与准确性。

authors_text: Yujing Jiang,Xingjun Ma,Sarah Monazam Erfani,James Bailey
title: Dual Head Adversarial Training
title_zh: 双头对抗训练
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are known to be vulnerable to adversarial examples/attacks, raising concerns about their reliability in safety-critical applications. A number of defense methods have been proposed to train robust DNNs resistant to adversarial attacks, among which adversarial training has so far demonstrated the most promising results. However, recent studies have shown that there exists an inherent tradeoff between accuracy and robustness in adversarially-trained DNNs. In this paper, we propose a novel technique Dual Head Adversarial Training (DH-AT) to further improve the robustness of existing adversarial training methods. Different from existing improved variants of adversarial training, DH-AT modifies both the architecture of the network and the training strategy to seek more robustness. Specifically, DH-AT first attaches a second network head (or branch) to one intermediate layer of the network, then uses a lightweight convolutional neural network (CNN) to aggregate the outputs of the two heads. The training strategy is also adapted to reflect the relative importance of the two heads. We empirically show, on multiple benchmark datasets, that DH-AT can bring notable robustness improvements to existing adversarial training methods. Compared with TRADES, one state-of-the-art adversarial training method, our DH-AT can improve the robustness by 3.4% against PGD40 and 2.3% against AutoAttack, and also improve the clean accuracy by 1.8%.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are known to be vulnerable to adversarial examples/attacks, raising concerns about their reliability in safety-critical applications. A number of defense methods have been proposed to train robust DNNs resistant to adversarial attacks, among which adversarial training has so far demonstrated the most promising results. However, recent studies have shown that there exists an inherent tradeoff between accuracy and robustness in adversarially-trained DNNs. In this paper, we propose a novel technique Dual Head Adversarial Training (DH-AT) to further improve the robustness of existing adversarial training methods. Different from existing improved variants of adversarial training, DH-AT modifies both the architecture of the network and the training strategy to seek more robustness. Specifically, DH-AT first attaches a second network head (or branch) to one intermediate layer of the network, then uses a lightweight convolutional neural network (CNN) to aggregate the outputs of the two heads. The training strategy is also adapted to reflect the relative importance of the two heads. We empirically show, on multiple benchmark datasets, that DH-AT can bring notable robustness improvements to existing adversarial training methods. Compared with TRADES, one state-of-the-art adversarial training method, our DH-AT can improve the robustness by 3.4% against PGD40 and 2.3% against AutoAttack, and also improve the clean accuracy by 1.8%.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，深度神经网络 (DNN) 容易受到对抗性示例/攻击的影响，这引起了人们对其在安全关键型应用中的可靠性的担忧。人们提出了许多防御方法来训练鲁棒的 DNN 来抵抗对抗性攻击，其中对抗性训练迄今为止已经证明了最有希望的结果。然而，最近的研究表明，对抗训练的 DNN 的准确性和鲁棒性之间存在固有的权衡。在本文中，我们提出了一种新技术双头对抗训练（DH-AT），以进一步提高现有对抗训练方法的鲁棒性。与现有的对抗性训练的改进变体不同，DH-AT 修改了网络架构和训练策略以寻求更强的鲁棒性。具体来说，DH-AT 首先将第二个网络头（或分支）附加到网络的一个中间层，然后使用轻量级卷积神经网络 (CNN) 聚合两个头的输出。培训策略也进行了调整，以反映两位负责人的相对重要性。我们在多个基准数据集上凭经验证明，DH-AT 可以为现有对抗训练方法带来显着的鲁棒性改进。与最先进的对抗训练方法之一 TRADES 相比，我们的 DH-AT 针对 PGD40 的鲁棒性提高了 3.4%，针对 AutoAttack 的鲁棒性提高了 2.3%，并且干净精度提高了 1.8%。

AI.tldr: 提出双头对抗训练（DH-AT）方法以提升对抗样本下的模型鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练方法存在准确率与鲁棒性之间的权衡问题，需进一步提升模型鲁棒性
AI.method: 在中间层添加第二个网络头，使用轻量CNN聚合双头输出，并调整训练策略以平衡两者重要性
AI.result: 相比TRADES方法，在PGD40下鲁棒性提升3.4%，AutoAttack下提升2.3%，同时清洁准确率提升1.8%
AI.conclusion: DH-AT通过结构改进与训练策略优化，有效提升了现有对抗训练方法的鲁棒性且保持较高准确率

authors_text: Yifan Xu,Kekai Sheng,Weiming Dong,Baoyuan Wu,Changsheng Xu,Bao-Gang Hu
title: Towards Corruption-Agnostic Robust Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 迈向与腐败无关的鲁棒域适应
comment: The first literature to investigate the topic of corruption-agnostic robust domain adaptation, a new practical and challenging domain adaptation setting
comments: The first literature to investigate the topic of corruption-agnostic robust domain adaptation, a new practical and challenging domain adaptation setting
abstract: Big progress has been achieved in domain adaptation in decades. Existing works are always based on an ideal assumption that testing target domain are i.i.d. with training target domains. However, due to unpredictable corruptions (e.g., noise and blur) in real data like web images, domain adaptation methods are increasingly required to be corruption robust on target domains. In this paper, we investigate a new task, Corruption-agnostic Robust Domain Adaptation (CRDA): to be accurate on original data and robust against unavailable-for-training corruptions on target domains. This task is non-trivial due to large domain discrepancy and unsupervised target domains. We observe that simple combinations of popular methods of domain adaptation and corruption robustness have sub-optimal CRDA results. We propose a new approach based on two technical insights into CRDA: 1) an easy-to-plug module called Domain Discrepancy Generator (DDG) that generates samples that enlarge domain discrepancy to mimic unpredictable corruptions; 2) a simple but effective teacher-student scheme with contrastive loss to enhance the constraints on target domains. Experiments verify that DDG keeps or even improves performance on original data and achieves better corruption robustness that baselines.
summary: Big progress has been achieved in domain adaptation in decades. Existing works are always based on an ideal assumption that testing target domain are i.i.d. with training target domains. However, due to unpredictable corruptions (e.g., noise and blur) in real data like web images, domain adaptation methods are increasingly required to be corruption robust on target domains. In this paper, we investigate a new task, Corruption-agnostic Robust Domain Adaptation (CRDA): to be accurate on original data and robust against unavailable-for-training corruptions on target domains. This task is non-trivial due to large domain discrepancy and unsupervised target domains. We observe that simple combinations of popular methods of domain adaptation and corruption robustness have sub-optimal CRDA results. We propose a new approach based on two technical insights into CRDA: 1) an easy-to-plug module called Domain Discrepancy Generator (DDG) that generates samples that enlarge domain discrepancy to mimic unpredictable corruptions; 2) a simple but effective teacher-student scheme with contrastive loss to enhance the constraints on target domains. Experiments verify that DDG keeps or even improves performance on original data and achieves better corruption robustness that baselines.
abstract_zh: 几十年来，领域适应取得了巨大进展。现有的工作总是基于一个理想的假设，即测试目标域是独立同分布的。与训练目标域。然而，由于网络图像等实际数据中不可预测的损坏（例如噪声和模糊），域适应方法越来越需要在目标域上具有损坏鲁棒性。在本文中，我们研究了一项新任务，即与损坏无关的鲁棒域适应（CRDA）：在原始数据上保持准确，并针对目标域上不可训练的损坏具有鲁棒性。由于域差异较大且目标域不受监督，因此这项任务并不简单。我们观察到流行的领域适应方法和腐败鲁棒性的简单组合具有次优的 CRDA 结果。我们基于对 CRDA 的两个技术见解提出了一种新方法：1）一个名为域差异生成器（DDG）的易于插入的模块，它生成放大域差异以模拟不可预测的损坏的样本； 2）一种简单但有效的师生方案，具有对比损失，以增强对目标域的约束。实验验证 DDG 保持甚至提高了原始数据的性能，并实现了比基线更好的损坏鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的领域自适应任务（CRDA），旨在使模型在目标域上对不可预测的损坏（如噪声、模糊）具有鲁棒性，同时保持对原始数据的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有领域自适应方法假设目标域数据独立同分布，但实际数据常存在不可预测的损坏，导致模型鲁棒性不足，需解决训练时无法获取损坏数据的挑战。
AI.method: 提出Domain Discrepancy Generator（DDG）模块生成扩大领域差异的样本以模拟损坏，并结合教师-学生框架与对比损失增强目标域约束。
AI.result: 实验表明，DDG在保持或提升原始数据性能的同时，显著优于基线方法的抗损坏能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过DDG与教师-学生方案，本文有效解决了CRDA任务中领域差异大和目标域无监督的挑战，为鲁棒领域自适应提供了新思路。

search_text: Towards Corruption-Agnostic Robust Domain Adaptation 迈向与腐败无关的鲁棒域适应 Big progress has been achieved in domain adaptation in decades. Existing works are always based on an ideal assumption that testing target domain are i.i.d. with training target domains. However, due to unpredictable corruptions (e.g., noise and blur) in real data like web images, domain adaptation methods are increasingly required to be corruption robust on target domains. In this paper, we investigate a new task, Corruption-agnostic Robust Domain Adaptation (CRDA): to be accurate on original data and robust against unavailable-for-training corruptions on target domains. This task is non-trivial due to large domain discrepancy and unsupervised target domains. We observe that simple combinations of popular methods of domain adaptation and corruption robustness have sub-optimal CRDA results. We propose a new approach based on two technical insights into CRDA: 1) an easy-to-plug module called Domain Discrepancy Generator (DDG) that generates samples that enlarge domain discrepancy to mimic unpredictable corruptions; 2) a simple but effective teacher-student scheme with contrastive loss to enhance the constraints on target domains. Experiments verify that DDG keeps or even improves performance on original data and achieves better corruption robustness that baselines. 几十年来，领域适应取得了巨大进展。现有的工作总是基于一个理想的假设，即测试目标域是独立同分布的。与训练目标域。然而，由于网络图像等实际数据中不可预测的损坏（例如噪声和模糊），域适应方法越来越需要在目标域上具有损坏鲁棒性。在本文中，我们研究了一项新任务，即与损坏无关的鲁棒域适应（CRDA）：在原始数据上保持准确，并针对目标域上不可训练的损坏具有鲁棒性。由于域差异较大且目标域不受监督，因此这项任务并不简单。我们观察到流行的领域适应方法和腐败鲁棒性的简单组合具有次优的 CRDA 结果。我们基于对 CRDA 的两个技术见解提出了一种新方法：1）一个名为域差异生成器（DDG）的易于插入的模块，它生成放大域差异以模拟不可预测的损坏的样本； 2）一种简单但有效的师生方案，具有对比损失，以增强对目标域的约束。实验验证 DDG 保持甚至提高了原始数据的性能，并实现了比基线更好的损坏鲁棒性。 本文提出一种新的领域自适应任务（CRDA），旨在使模型在目标域上对不可预测的损坏（如噪声、模糊）具有鲁棒性，同时保持对原始数据的准确性。 Yifan Xu,Kekai Sheng,Weiming Dong,Baoyuan Wu,Changsheng Xu,Bao-Gang Hu cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Shuyi Xie,Jian Ma,Haiqin Yang,Lianxin Jiang,Yang Mo,Jianping Shen
title: PALI at SemEval-2021 Task 2: Fine-Tune XLM-RoBERTa for Word in Context Disambiguation
title_zh: SemEval-2021 任务 2 上的 PALI：针对上下文中的单词消歧微调 XLM-RoBERTa
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables, winning solution on En-Ar, En-Fr, En-Ru, and En-Zh cross-lingual tasks of SemEval'21 Task 2
comments: 7 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables, winning solution on En-Ar, En-Fr, En-Ru, and En-Zh cross-lingual tasks of SemEval'21 Task 2
abstract: This paper presents the PALI team's winning system for SemEval-2021 Task 2: Multilingual and Cross-lingual Word-in-Context Disambiguation. We fine-tune XLM-RoBERTa model to solve the task of word in context disambiguation, i.e., to determine whether the target word in the two contexts contains the same meaning or not. In the implementation, we first specifically design an input tag to emphasize the target word in the contexts. Second, we construct a new vector on the fine-tuned embeddings from XLM-RoBERTa and feed it to a fully-connected network to output the probability of whether the target word in the context has the same meaning or not. The new vector is attained by concatenating the embedding of the [CLS] token and the embeddings of the target word in the contexts. In training, we explore several tricks, such as the Ranger optimizer, data augmentation, and adversarial training, to improve the model prediction. Consequently, we attain first place in all four cross-lingual tasks.
summary: This paper presents the PALI team's winning system for SemEval-2021 Task 2: Multilingual and Cross-lingual Word-in-Context Disambiguation. We fine-tune XLM-RoBERTa model to solve the task of word in context disambiguation, i.e., to determine whether the target word in the two contexts contains the same meaning or not. In the implementation, we first specifically design an input tag to emphasize the target word in the contexts. Second, we construct a new vector on the fine-tuned embeddings from XLM-RoBERTa and feed it to a fully-connected network to output the probability of whether the target word in the context has the same meaning or not. The new vector is attained by concatenating the embedding of the [CLS] token and the embeddings of the target word in the contexts. In training, we explore several tricks, such as the Ranger optimizer, data augmentation, and adversarial training, to improve the model prediction. Consequently, we attain first place in all four cross-lingual tasks.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 PALI 团队在 SemEval-2021 任务 2：多语言和跨语言上下文词消歧中的获胜系统。我们微调XLM-RoBERTa模型来解决上下文消歧任务，即确定两个上下文中的目标词是否包含相同的含义。在实现中，我们首先专门设计一个输入标签来强调上下文中的目标单词。其次，我们在 XLM-RoBERTa 的微调嵌入上构建一个新向量，并将其输入到全连接网络，以输出上下文中的目标单词是否具有相同含义的概率。新的向量是通过连接 [CLS] 标记的嵌入和上下文中目标单词的嵌入来获得的。在训练中，我们探索了多种技巧，例如 Ranger 优化器、数据增强和对抗训练，以改进模型预测。因此，我们在所有四项跨语言任务中均获得第一名。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于XLM-RoBERTa微调的跨语言词义消歧系统，在SemEval-2021任务2中获得冠军。
AI.motivation: 解决多语言和跨语言环境下上下文词义消歧的挑战，提升模型对目标词语义一致性的判断能力。
AI.method: 设计目标词强调输入标签，融合[CLS]嵌入与目标词嵌入构建新向量，结合全连接网络输出概率，并采用Ranger优化器、数据增强和对抗训练等技术优化模型。
AI.result: 在SemEval-2021任务2的四个跨语言子任务中均取得第一名。
AI.conclusion: 通过改进输入表示和训练策略，微调的XLM-RoBERTa模型在跨语言词义消歧任务中表现出色，技术细节为相关研究提供参考。

Second, we construct a new vector on the fine-tuned embeddings from XLM-RoBERTa and feed it to a fully-connected network to output the probability of whether the target word in the context has the same meaning or not. authors_text: Jun Zhou,Wei Jin,Mingjie Wang,Xiuping Liu,Zhiyang Li,Zhaobin Liu
title: Improvement of Normal Estimation for PointClouds via Simplifying Surface Fitting
title_zh: 通过简化曲面拟合改进点云法线估计
abstract: With the burst development of neural networks in recent years, the task of normal estimation has once again become a concern. By introducing the neural networks to classic methods based on problem-specific knowledge, the adaptability of the normal estimation algorithm to noise and scale has been greatly improved. However, the compatibility between neural networks and the traditional methods has not been considered. Similar to the principle of Occam's razor, that is, the simpler is better. We observe that a more simplified process of surface fitting can significantly improve the accuracy of the normal estimation. In this paper, two simple-yet-effective strategies are proposed to address the compatibility between the neural networks and surface fitting process to improve normal estimation. Firstly, a dynamic top-k selection strategy is introduced to better focus on the most critical points of a given patch, and the points selected by our learning method tend to fit a surface by way of a simple tangent plane, which can dramatically improve the normal estimation results of patches with sharp corners or complex patterns. Then, we propose a point update strategy before local surface fitting, which smooths the sharp boundary of the patch to simplify the surface fitting process, significantly reducing the fitting distortion and improving the accuracy of the predicted point normal. The experiments analyze the effectiveness of our proposed strategies and demonstrate that our method achieves SOTA results with the advantage of higher estimation accuracy over most existed approaches.
summary: With the burst development of neural networks in recent years, the task of normal estimation has once again become a concern. By introducing the neural networks to classic methods based on problem-specific knowledge, the adaptability of the normal estimation algorithm to noise and scale has been greatly improved. However, the compatibility between neural networks and the traditional methods has not been considered. Similar to the principle of Occam's razor, that is, the simpler is better. We observe that a more simplified process of surface fitting can significantly improve the accuracy of the normal estimation. In this paper, two simple-yet-effective strategies are proposed to address the compatibility between the neural networks and surface fitting process to improve normal estimation. Firstly, a dynamic top-k selection strategy is introduced to better focus on the most critical points of a given patch, and the points selected by our learning method tend to fit a surface by way of a simple tangent plane, which can dramatically improve the normal estimation results of patches with sharp corners or complex patterns. Then, we propose a point update strategy before local surface fitting, which smooths the sharp boundary of the patch to simplify the surface fitting process, significantly reducing the fitting distortion and improving the accuracy of the predicted point normal. The experiments analyze the effectiveness of our proposed strategies and demonstrate that our method achieves SOTA results with the advantage of higher estimation accuracy over most existed approaches.
abstract_zh: 近年来，随着神经网络的爆发式发展，正常估计任务再次成为人们关注的问题。通过将神经网络引入基于问题特定知识的经典方法，普通估计算法对噪声和尺度的适应性得到了极大的提高。然而，尚未考虑神经网络与传统方法之间的兼容性。类似于奥卡姆剃刀原理，即越简单越好。我们观察到，更简化的曲面拟合过程可以显着提高法线估计的准确性。在本文中，提出了两种简单但有效的策略来解决神经网络和曲面拟合过程之间的兼容性，以改进法线估计。首先，引入动态top-k选择策略，以更好地关注给定面片的最关键点，并且我们的学习方法选择的点倾向于通过简单的切平面来拟合表面，这可以显着改善具有尖角或复杂图案的面片的法线估计结果。然后，我们在局部曲面拟合之前提出了点更新策略，平滑面片的尖锐边界以简化曲面拟合过程，显着减少拟合失真并提高预测点法线的准确性。实验分析了我们提出的策略的有效性，并证明我们的方法取得了 SOTA 结果，并且比大多数现有方法具有更高的估计精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过简化表面拟合过程来改进点云法线估计的方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管神经网络在法线估计任务中表现出色，但其与传统表面拟合方法的兼容性尚未被充分考虑。通过简化表面拟合过程，可以显著提高法线估计的准确性。
AI.method: 本文提出了两种策略：一种是动态top-k选择策略，用于聚焦于关键点并拟合简单切平面；另一种是点更新策略，在局部表面拟合前平滑边界以简化拟合过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在估计准确性方面优于大多数现有方法，取得了SOTA结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过简化表面拟合过程，本文提出的策略显著提升了点云法线估计的准确性，并在多个实验中验证了其有效性。

search_text: Improvement of Normal Estimation for PointClouds via Simplifying Surface Fitting 通过简化曲面拟合改进点云法线估计 With the burst development of neural networks in recent years, the task of normal estimation has once again become a concern. By introducing the neural networks to classic methods based on problem-specific knowledge, the adaptability of the normal estimation algorithm to noise and scale has been greatly improved. However, the compatibility between neural networks and the traditional methods has not been considered. Similar to the principle of Occam's razor, that is, the simpler is better. We observe that a more simplified process of surface fitting can significantly improve the accuracy of the normal estimation. In this paper, two simple-yet-effective strategies are proposed to address the compatibility between the neural networks and surface fitting process to improve normal estimation. Firstly, a dynamic top-k selection strategy is introduced to better focus on the most critical points of a given patch, and the points selected by our learning method tend to fit a surface by way of a simple tangent plane, which can dramatically improve the normal estimation results of patches with sharp corners or complex patterns. Then, we propose a point update strategy before local surface fitting, which smooths the sharp boundary of the patch to simplify the surface fitting process, significantly reducing the fitting distortion and improving the accuracy of the predicted point normal. The experiments analyze the effectiveness of our proposed strategies and demonstrate that our method achieves SOTA results with the advantage of higher estimation accuracy over most existed approaches. 近年来，随着神经网络的爆发式发展，正常估计任务再次成为人们关注的问题。通过将神经网络引入基于问题特定知识的经典方法，普通估计算法对噪声和尺度的适应性得到了极大的提高。然而，尚未考虑神经网络与传统方法之间的兼容性。类似于奥卡姆剃刀原理，即越简单越好。我们观察到，更简化的曲面拟合过程可以显着提高法线估计的准确性。在本文中，提出了两种简单但有效的策略来解决神经网络和曲面拟合过程之间的兼容性，以改进法线估计。首先，引入动态top-k选择策略，以更好地关注给定面片的最关键点，并且我们的学习方法选择的点倾向于通过简单的切平面来拟合表面，这可以显着改善具有尖角或复杂图案的面片的法线估计结果。然后，我们在局部曲面拟合之前提出了点更新策略，平滑面片的尖锐边界以简化曲面拟合过程，显着减少拟合失真并提高预测点法线的准确性。实验分析了我们提出的策略的有效性，并证明我们的方法取得了 SOTA 结果，并且比大多数现有方法具有更高的估计精度。 本文提出了一种通过简化表面拟合过程来改进点云法线估计的方法。 Jun Zhou,Wei Jin,Mingjie Wang,Xiuping Liu,Zhiyang Li,Zhaobin Liu cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Min Dai,Xiaobin Xiong,Aaron Ames
title: Bipedal Walking on Constrained Footholds: Momentum Regulation via Vertical COM Control
title_zh: 在受限立足点上双足行走：通过垂直 COM 控制进行动量调节
abstract: This paper presents an online walking synthesis methodology to enable dynamic and stable walking on constrained footholds for underactuated bipedal robots. Our approach modulates the change of angular momentum about the foot-ground contact pivot at discrete impact using pre-impact vertical center of mass (COM) velocity. To this end, we utilize the underactuated Linear Inverted Pendulum (LIP) model for approximating the underactuated walking dynamics to provide the desired post-impact angular momentum for each step. Desired outputs are constructed via online optimization combined with closed-form polynomials and tracked via a quadratic program (QP) based controller. This method is demonstrated on two robots, AMBER and 3D Cassie, for which stable walking behaviors with constrained footholds are realized on flat ground, stairs, and randomly located stepping stones.
summary: This paper presents an online walking synthesis methodology to enable dynamic and stable walking on constrained footholds for underactuated bipedal robots. Our approach modulates the change of angular momentum about the foot-ground contact pivot at discrete impact using pre-impact vertical center of mass (COM) velocity. To this end, we utilize the underactuated Linear Inverted Pendulum (LIP) model for approximating the underactuated walking dynamics to provide the desired post-impact angular momentum for each step. Desired outputs are constructed via online optimization combined with closed-form polynomials and tracked via a quadratic program (QP) based controller. This method is demonstrated on two robots, AMBER and 3D Cassie, for which stable walking behaviors with constrained footholds are realized on flat ground, stairs, and randomly located stepping stones.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种在线行走综合方法，使欠驱动双足机器人能够在受限立足点上动态稳定行走。我们的方法使用预碰撞垂直质心 (COM) 速度来调节离散碰撞时脚与地面接触枢轴周围角动量的变化。为此，我们利用欠驱动线性倒立摆 (LIP) 模型来近似欠驱动行走动力学，为每一步提供所需的冲击后角动量。所需的输出是通过在线优化与封闭式多项式相结合构建的，并通过基于二次规划 (QP) 的控制器进行跟踪。该方法在两个机器人 AMBER 和 3D Cassie 上进行了演示，这两个机器人在平坦的地面、楼梯和随机放置的踏脚石上实现了具有受限立足点的稳定行走行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在线行走合成方法，通过垂直质心控制实现欠驱动双足机器人在受限脚踏点上的动态稳定行走。
AI.motivation: 欠驱动双足机器人在复杂地形（如楼梯、随机分布的踏石）上行走时，如何保持动态稳定性与足端约束条件的平衡是当前研究难点。
AI.method: 利用欠驱动倒立摆模型近似行走动力学，通过预冲击垂直质心速度调节角动量，结合在线优化与二次规划控制器实现轨迹跟踪。
AI.result: 在AMBER和3D Cassie双足机器人上验证了方法有效性，成功实现了在平坦地面、楼梯和随机踏石上的稳定行走。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过垂直质心控制与优化算法，为欠驱动双足机器人在受限脚踏点的动态行走提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Xiaoyi Ruan,Meizhi Jin,Jian Ma,Haiqin Yang,Lianxin Jiang,Yang Mo,Mengyuan Zhou
title: Sattiy at SemEval-2021 Task 9: An Ensemble Solution for Statement Verification and Evidence Finding with Tables
title_zh: Sattiy 在 SemEval-2021 任务 9：使用表格进行语句验证和证据查找的集成解决方案
comment: 7 pages, 1 figure, 3 tables, the champion solution for SemEval-21 Task 9
comments: 7 pages, 1 figure, 3 tables, the champion solution for SemEval-21 Task 9
abstract: Question answering from semi-structured tables can be seen as a semantic parsing task and is significant and practical for pushing the boundary of natural language understanding. Existing research mainly focuses on understanding contents from unstructured evidence, e.g., news, natural language sentences, and documents. The task of verification from structured evidence, such as tables, charts, and databases, is still less explored. This paper describes sattiy team's system in SemEval-2021 task 9: Statement Verification and Evidence Finding with Tables (SEM-TAB-FACT). This competition aims to verify statements and to find evidence from tables for scientific articles and to promote the proper interpretation of the surrounding article. In this paper, we exploited ensemble models of pre-trained language models over tables, TaPas and TaBERT, for Task A and adjust the result based on some rules extracted for Task B. Finally, in the leaderboard, we attain the F1 scores of 0.8496 and 0.7732 in Task A for the 2-way and 3-way evaluation, respectively, and the F1 score of 0.4856 in Task B.
summary: Question answering from semi-structured tables can be seen as a semantic parsing task and is significant and practical for pushing the boundary of natural language understanding. Existing research mainly focuses on understanding contents from unstructured evidence, e.g., news, natural language sentences, and documents. The task of verification from structured evidence, such as tables, charts, and databases, is still less explored. This paper describes sattiy team's system in SemEval-2021 task 9: Statement Verification and Evidence Finding with Tables (SEM-TAB-FACT). This competition aims to verify statements and to find evidence from tables for scientific articles and to promote the proper interpretation of the surrounding article. In this paper, we exploited ensemble models of pre-trained language models over tables, TaPas and TaBERT, for Task A and adjust the result based on some rules extracted for Task B. Finally, in the leaderboard, we attain the F1 scores of 0.8496 and 0.7732 in Task A for the 2-way and 3-way evaluation, respectively, and the F1 score of 0.4856 in Task B.
abstract_zh: 半结构化表的问答可以被视为语义解析任务，对于突破自然语言理解的边界具有重要意义和实用性。现有的研究主要集中在理解非结构化证据的内容，例如新闻、自然语言句子和文档。从结构化证据（例如表格、图表和数据库）进行验证的任务仍然较少被探索。本文描述了 sattiy 团队在 SemEval-2021 任务 9：使用表格进行陈述验证和证据查找 (SEM-TAB-FACT) 中的系统。本次竞赛旨在验证陈述并从科学文章的表格中寻找证据，并促进对相关文章的正确解释。在本文中，我们在任务 A 中利用了表、TaPas 和 TaBERT 上预先训练的语言模型的集成模型，并根据为任务 B 提取的一些规则调整结果。最终，在排行榜中，我们在任务 A 中的 2 路和 3 路评估中分别获得了 0.8496 和 0.7732 的 F1 分数，在任务 B 中获得了 0.4856 的 F1 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于集成预训练模型的解决方案，用于表格中的陈述验证和证据查找任务。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注非结构化文本的语义理解，而针对表格等结构化数据的验证与证据查找研究较少，需探索该领域方法。
AI.method: 采用TaPas和TaBERT预训练模型处理表格数据，通过集成模型完成任务A，并结合规则调整优化任务B结果。
AI.result: 任务A在2-way和3-way评估中分别达到0.8496和0.7732的F1分数，任务B获得0.4856的F1分数。
AI.conclusion: 集成预训练模型与规则调整在表格验证任务中有效，但任务B表现仍有提升空间，需进一步研究结构化数据的处理方法。

authors_text: Jihyung Kil,Wei-Lun Chao
title: Revisiting Document Representations for Large-Scale Zero-Shot Learning
title_zh: 重新审视大规模零样本学习的文档表示
abstract: Zero-shot learning aims to recognize unseen objects using their semantic representations. Most existing works use visual attributes labeled by humans, not suitable for large-scale applications. In this paper, we revisit the use of documents as semantic representations. We argue that documents like Wikipedia pages contain rich visual information, which however can easily be buried by the vast amount of non-visual sentences. To address this issue, we propose a semi-automatic mechanism for visual sentence extraction that leverages the document section headers and the clustering structure of visual sentences. The extracted visual sentences, after a novel weighting scheme to distinguish similar classes, essentially form semantic representations like visual attributes but need much less human effort. On the ImageNet dataset with over 10,000 unseen classes, our representations lead to a 64% relative improvement against the commonly used ones.
summary: Zero-shot learning aims to recognize unseen objects using their semantic representations. Most existing works use visual attributes labeled by humans, not suitable for large-scale applications. In this paper, we revisit the use of documents as semantic representations. We argue that documents like Wikipedia pages contain rich visual information, which however can easily be buried by the vast amount of non-visual sentences. To address this issue, we propose a semi-automatic mechanism for visual sentence extraction that leverages the document section headers and the clustering structure of visual sentences. The extracted visual sentences, after a novel weighting scheme to distinguish similar classes, essentially form semantic representations like visual attributes but need much less human effort. On the ImageNet dataset with over 10,000 unseen classes, our representations lead to a 64% relative improvement against the commonly used ones.
abstract_zh: 零样本学习旨在使用未见过的对象的语义表示来识别它们。现有作品大多使用人类标记的视觉属性，不适合大规模应用。在本文中，我们重新审视文档作为语义表示的使用。我们认为像维基百科页面这样的文档包含丰富的视觉信息，但这些信息很容易被大量的非视觉句子所掩盖。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种利用文档节标题和视觉句子的聚类结构进行视觉句子提取的半自动机制。提取的视觉句子，在采用新颖的加权方案来区分相似类别之后，本质上形成了诸如视觉属性之类的语义表示，但需要更少的人力。在具有超过 10,000 个未见过的类的 ImageNet 数据集上，我们的表示比常用的表示相对提高了 64%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于文档语义表示的大规模零样本学习方法，通过自动提取和加权文档中的视觉句子来生成更有效的语义表示。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本学习方法依赖人工标注的视觉属性，难以适应大规模应用，而文档中蕴含的视觉信息常被冗余文本淹没，需更高效利用。
AI.method: 设计半自动视觉句子提取机制，结合文档标题结构和视觉句子聚类，通过新型加权方案生成类视觉属性的语义表示。
AI.result: 在包含超10,000个未见类别的ImageNet数据集上，相较常用方法实现64%的相对性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 文档语义表示能有效替代人工标注属性，在减少人工干预的同时显著提升大规模零样本学习效果。

search_text: Revisiting Document Representations for Large-Scale Zero-Shot Learning 重新审视大规模零样本学习的文档表示 Zero-shot learning aims to recognize unseen objects using their semantic representations. Most existing works use visual attributes labeled by humans, not suitable for large-scale applications. In this paper, we revisit the use of documents as semantic representations. We argue that documents like Wikipedia pages contain rich visual information, which however can easily be buried by the vast amount of non-visual sentences. To address this issue, we propose a semi-automatic mechanism for visual sentence extraction that leverages the document section headers and the clustering structure of visual sentences. The extracted visual sentences, after a novel weighting scheme to distinguish similar classes, essentially form semantic representations like visual attributes but need much less human effort. On the ImageNet dataset with over 10,000 unseen classes, our representations lead to a 64% relative improvement against the commonly used ones. 零样本学习旨在使用未见过的对象的语义表示来识别它们。现有作品大多使用人类标记的视觉属性，不适合大规模应用。在本文中，我们重新审视文档作为语义表示的使用。我们认为像维基百科页面这样的文档包含丰富的视觉信息，但这些信息很容易被大量的非视觉句子所掩盖。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种利用文档节标题和视觉句子的聚类结构进行视觉句子提取的半自动机制。提取的视觉句子，在采用新颖的加权方案来区分相似类别之后，本质上形成了诸如视觉属性之类的语义表示，但需要更少的人力。在具有超过 10,000 个未见过的类的 ImageNet 数据集上，我们的表示比常用的表示相对提高了 64%。 本文提出一种基于文档语义表示的大规模零样本学习方法，通过自动提取和加权文档中的视觉句子来生成更有效的语义表示。 Jihyung Kil,Wei-Lun Chao cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Zixuan Li,Xiaolong Jin,Wei Li,Saiping Guan,Jiafeng Guo,Huawei Shen,Yuanzhuo Wang,Xueqi Cheng
title: Temporal Knowledge Graph Reasoning Based on Evolutional Representation Learning
title_zh: 基于进化表示学习的时态知识图推理
abstract: Knowledge Graph (KG) reasoning that predicts missing facts for incomplete KGs has been widely explored. However, reasoning over Temporal KG (TKG) that predicts facts in the future is still far from resolved. The key to predict future facts is to thoroughly understand the historical facts. A TKG is actually a sequence of KGs corresponding to different timestamps, where all concurrent facts in each KG exhibit structural dependencies and temporally adjacent facts carry informative sequential patterns. To capture these properties effectively and efficiently, we propose a novel Recurrent Evolution network based on Graph Convolution Network (GCN), called RE-GCN, which learns the evolutional representations of entities and relations at each timestamp by modeling the KG sequence recurrently. Specifically, for the evolution unit, a relation-aware GCN is leveraged to capture the structural dependencies within the KG at each timestamp. In order to capture the sequential patterns of all facts in parallel, the historical KG sequence is modeled auto-regressively by the gate recurrent components. Moreover, the static properties of entities such as entity types, are also incorporated via a static graph constraint component to obtain better entity representations. Fact prediction at future timestamps can then be realized based on the evolutional entity and relation representations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the RE-GCN model obtains substantial performance and efficiency improvement for the temporal reasoning tasks on six benchmark datasets. Especially, it achieves up to 11.46\% improvement in MRR for entity prediction with up to 82 times speedup comparing to the state-of-the-art baseline.
summary: Knowledge Graph (KG) reasoning that predicts missing facts for incomplete KGs has been widely explored. However, reasoning over Temporal KG (TKG) that predicts facts in the future is still far from resolved. The key to predict future facts is to thoroughly understand the historical facts. A TKG is actually a sequence of KGs corresponding to different timestamps, where all concurrent facts in each KG exhibit structural dependencies and temporally adjacent facts carry informative sequential patterns. To capture these properties effectively and efficiently, we propose a novel Recurrent Evolution network based on Graph Convolution Network (GCN), called RE-GCN, which learns the evolutional representations of entities and relations at each timestamp by modeling the KG sequence recurrently. Specifically, for the evolution unit, a relation-aware GCN is leveraged to capture the structural dependencies within the KG at each timestamp. In order to capture the sequential patterns of all facts in parallel, the historical KG sequence is modeled auto-regressively by the gate recurrent components. Moreover, the static properties of entities such as entity types, are also incorporated via a static graph constraint component to obtain better entity representations. Fact prediction at future timestamps can then be realized based on the evolutional entity and relation representations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the RE-GCN model obtains substantial performance and efficiency improvement for the temporal reasoning tasks on six benchmark datasets. Especially, it achieves up to 11.46\% improvement in MRR for entity prediction with up to 82 times speedup comparing to the state-of-the-art baseline.
abstract_zh: 预测不完整 KG 缺失事实的知识图 (KG) 推理已被广泛探索。然而，预测未来事实的时间知识图谱（TKG）的推理仍远未解决。预测未来事实的关键是透彻了解历史事实。 TKG 实际上是对应于不同时间戳的 KG 序列，其中每个 KG 中的所有并发事实都表现出结构依赖性，并且时间上相邻的事实携带信息丰富的顺序模式。为了有效且高效地捕获这些属性，我们提出了一种基于图卷积网络（GCN）的新型循环进化网络，称为 RE-GCN，它通过对 KG 序列进行循环建模来学习每个时间戳处实体和关系的进化表示。具体来说，对于进化单元，利用关系感知 GCN 来捕获每个时间戳的 KG 内的结构依赖关系。为了并行捕获所有事实的顺序模式，历史 KG 序列通过门循环组件进行自回归建模。此外，还通过静态图约束组件合并实体的静态属性（例如实体类型）以获得更好的实体表示。然后可以基于进化实体和关系表示来实现未来时间戳的事实预测。大量实验表明，RE-GCN 模型在六个基准数据集上的时间推理任务中获得了显着的性能和效率提升。特别是，与最先进的基线相比，它在实体预测的 MRR 方面实现了高达 11.46% 的改进，加速高达 82 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于进化表示学习的时序知识图谱推理方法，用于预测未来事实。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效捕捉时序知识图谱中实体和关系的动态演化规律，导致未来事实预测效果不佳。
AI.method: 设计RE-GCN模型，结合图卷积网络（GCN）与循环神经网络，通过关系感知GCN建模结构依赖，利用门控循环组件捕捉时序模式，并引入静态图约束增强实体表示。
AI.result: 在六个基准数据集上实现显著性能提升，实体预测任务MRR最高提升11.46%，速度较先进基线快82倍。
AI.conclusion: RE-GCN通过融合结构化与时序信息，有效解决了时序知识图谱未来事实预测难题，具有较高的实用价值。

authors_text: Feifei Shao,Yawei Luo,Li Zhang,Lu Ye,Siliang Tang,Yi Yang,Jun Xiao
title: Improving Weakly-supervised Object Localization via Causal Intervention
title_zh: 通过因果干预改进弱监督对象定位
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures. This paper was accepted by ACM Multimedia 2021. The code can be available at https://github.com/shaofeifei11/CI-CAM
comments: 9 pages, 5 figures. This paper was accepted by ACM Multimedia 2021. The code can be available at https://github.com/shaofeifei11/CI-CAM
abstract: The recent emerged weakly supervised object localization (WSOL) methods can learn to localize an object in the image only using image-level labels. Previous works endeavor to perceive the interval objects from the small and sparse discriminative attention map, yet ignoring the co-occurrence confounder (e.g., bird and sky), which makes the model inspection (e.g., CAM) hard to distinguish between the object and context. In this paper, we make an early attempt to tackle this challenge via causal intervention (CI). Our proposed method, dubbed CI-CAM, explores the causalities among images, contexts, and categories to eliminate the biased co-occurrence in the class activation maps thus improving the accuracy of object localization. Extensive experiments on several benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of CI-CAM in learning the clear object boundaries from confounding contexts. Particularly, in CUB-200-2011 which severely suffers from the co-occurrence confounder, CI-CAM significantly outperforms the traditional CAM-based baseline (58.39% vs 52.4% in top-1 localization accuracy). While in more general scenarios such as ImageNet, CI-CAM can also perform on par with the state of the arts.
summary: The recent emerged weakly supervised object localization (WSOL) methods can learn to localize an object in the image only using image-level labels. Previous works endeavor to perceive the interval objects from the small and sparse discriminative attention map, yet ignoring the co-occurrence confounder (e.g., bird and sky), which makes the model inspection (e.g., CAM) hard to distinguish between the object and context. In this paper, we make an early attempt to tackle this challenge via causal intervention (CI). Our proposed method, dubbed CI-CAM, explores the causalities among images, contexts, and categories to eliminate the biased co-occurrence in the class activation maps thus improving the accuracy of object localization. Extensive experiments on several benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of CI-CAM in learning the clear object boundaries from confounding contexts. Particularly, in CUB-200-2011 which severely suffers from the co-occurrence confounder, CI-CAM significantly outperforms the traditional CAM-based baseline (58.39% vs 52.4% in top-1 localization accuracy). While in more general scenarios such as ImageNet, CI-CAM can also perform on par with the state of the arts.
abstract_zh: 最近出现的弱监督对象定位（WSOL）方法可以学习仅使用图像级标签来定位图像中的对象。以前的工作试图从小而稀疏的判别性注意图中感知间隔对象，但忽略了共现混杂因素（例如鸟和天空），这使得模型检查（例如 CAM）难以区分对象和上下文。在本文中，我们早期尝试通过因果干预（CI）来应对这一挑战。我们提出的方法称为 CI-CAM，探索图像、上下文和类别之间的因果关系，以消除类激活图中的有偏差共现，从而提高对象定位的准确性。对多个基准的大量实验证明了 CI-CAM 在从混杂的上下文中学习清晰的对象边界方面的有效性。特别是，在严重遭受共现混杂因素影响的 CUB-200-2011 中，CI-CAM 显着优于传统的基于 CAM 的基线（top-1 定位精度分别为 58.39% 和 52.4%）。而在 ImageNet 等更一般的场景中，CI-CAM 也可以与最先进的技术相媲美。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过因果干预改进弱监督目标定位方法，解决共现混淆问题以提高定位准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督目标定位方法在利用图像级标签生成注意力图时，忽视了共现混淆因素（如鸟与天空），导致难以区分目标与背景。
AI.method: 提出CI-CAM方法，通过探索图像、上下文和类别间的因果关系，消除类别激活图中的共现偏差。
AI.result: 在CUB-200-2011数据集上，CI-CAM的top-1定位准确率较传统方法提升5.99%（58.39% vs 52.4%），在ImageNet上表现与最先进方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 因果干预有效解决了共现混淆问题，在复杂场景下显著提升弱监督目标定位性能。

search_text: Improving Weakly-supervised Object Localization via Causal Intervention 通过因果干预改进弱监督对象定位 The recent emerged weakly supervised object localization (WSOL) methods can learn to localize an object in the image only using image-level labels. Previous works endeavor to perceive the interval objects from the small and sparse discriminative attention map, yet ignoring the co-occurrence confounder (e.g., bird and sky), which makes the model inspection (e.g., CAM) hard to distinguish between the object and context. In this paper, we make an early attempt to tackle this challenge via causal intervention (CI). Our proposed method, dubbed CI-CAM, explores the causalities among images, contexts, and categories to eliminate the biased co-occurrence in the class activation maps thus improving the accuracy of object localization. Extensive experiments on several benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of CI-CAM in learning the clear object boundaries from confounding contexts. Particularly, in CUB-200-2011 which severely suffers from the co-occurrence confounder, CI-CAM significantly outperforms the traditional CAM-based baseline (58.39% vs 52.4% in top-1 localization accuracy). While in more general scenarios such as ImageNet, CI-CAM can also perform on par with the state of the arts. 最近出现的弱监督对象定位（WSOL）方法可以学习仅使用图像级标签来定位图像中的对象。以前的工作试图从小而稀疏的判别性注意图中感知间隔对象，但忽略了共现混杂因素（例如鸟和天空），这使得模型检查（例如 CAM）难以区分对象和上下文。在本文中，我们早期尝试通过因果干预（CI）来应对这一挑战。我们提出的方法称为 CI-CAM，探索图像、上下文和类别之间的因果关系，以消除类激活图中的有偏差共现，从而提高对象定位的准确性。对多个基准的大量实验证明了 CI-CAM 在从混杂的上下文中学习清晰的对象边界方面的有效性。特别是，在严重遭受共现混杂因素影响的 CUB-200-2011 中，CI-CAM 显着优于传统的基于 CAM 的基线（top-1 定位精度分别为 58.39% 和 52.4%）。而在 ImageNet 等更一般的场景中，CI-CAM 也可以与最先进的技术相媲美。 本文提出通过因果干预改进弱监督目标定位方法，解决共现混淆问题以提高定位准确性。 Feifei Shao,Yawei Luo,Li Zhang,Lu Ye,Siliang Tang,Yi Yang,Jun Xiao cs.CV

authors_text: Pravin Nair,Ruturaj G. Gavaskar,Kunal N. Chaudhury
title: Fixed-Point and Objective Convergence of Plug-and-Play Algorithms
title_zh: 即插即用算法的定点和目标收敛
comment: Published in IEEE Transactions on Computational Imaging
comments: Published in IEEE Transactions on Computational Imaging
abstract: A standard model for image reconstruction involves the minimization of a data-fidelity term along with a regularizer, where the optimization is performed using proximal algorithms such as ISTA and ADMM. In plug-and-play (PnP) regularization, the proximal operator (associated with the regularizer) in ISTA and ADMM is replaced by a powerful image denoiser. Although PnP regularization works surprisingly well in practice, its theoretical convergence -- whether convergence of the PnP iterates is guaranteed and if they minimize some objective function -- is not completely understood even for simple linear denoisers such as nonlocal means. In particular, while there are works where either iterate or objective convergence is established separately, a simultaneous guarantee on iterate and objective convergence is not available for any denoiser to our knowledge. In this paper, we establish both forms of convergence for a special class of linear denoisers. Notably, unlike existing works where the focus is on symmetric denoisers, our analysis covers non-symmetric denoisers such as nonlocal means and almost any convex data-fidelity. The novelty in this regard is that we make use of the convergence theory of averaged operators and we work with a special inner product (and norm) derived from the linear denoiser; the latter requires us to appropriately define the gradient and proximal operators associated with the data-fidelity term. We validate our convergence results using image reconstruction experiments.
summary: A standard model for image reconstruction involves the minimization of a data-fidelity term along with a regularizer, where the optimization is performed using proximal algorithms such as ISTA and ADMM. In plug-and-play (PnP) regularization, the proximal operator (associated with the regularizer) in ISTA and ADMM is replaced by a powerful image denoiser. Although PnP regularization works surprisingly well in practice, its theoretical convergence -- whether convergence of the PnP iterates is guaranteed and if they minimize some objective function -- is not completely understood even for simple linear denoisers such as nonlocal means. In particular, while there are works where either iterate or objective convergence is established separately, a simultaneous guarantee on iterate and objective convergence is not available for any denoiser to our knowledge. In this paper, we establish both forms of convergence for a special class of linear denoisers. Notably, unlike existing works where the focus is on symmetric denoisers, our analysis covers non-symmetric denoisers such as nonlocal means and almost any convex data-fidelity. The novelty in this regard is that we make use of the convergence theory of averaged operators and we work with a special inner product (and norm) derived from the linear denoiser; the latter requires us to appropriately define the gradient and proximal operators associated with the data-fidelity term. We validate our convergence results using image reconstruction experiments.
abstract_zh: 图像重建的标准模型涉及数据保真度项的最小化以及正则化器，其中使用近似算法（例如 ISTA 和 ADMM）执行优化。在即插即用 (PnP) 正则化中，ISTA 和 ADMM 中的近端算子（与正则器相关）被强大的图像降噪器取代。尽管 PnP 正则化在实践中效果出人意料地好，但它的理论收敛性（是否保证 PnP 迭代的收敛性以及它们是否最小化某些目标函数）即使对于简单的线性降噪器（例如非局部均值）也没有被完全理解。特别是，虽然有些工作是单独建立迭代收敛或目标收敛，但据我们所知，任何降噪器都无法同时保证迭代收敛和目标收敛。在本文中，我们为一类特殊的线性降噪器建立了两种形式的收敛。值得注意的是，与现有工作重点关注对称降噪器不同，我们的分析涵盖非对称降噪器，例如非局部均值和几乎任何凸数据保真度。这方面的新颖之处在于，我们利用平均算子的收敛理论，并使用从线性降噪器导出的特殊内积（和范数）；后者要求我们适当地定义与数据保真度项相关的梯度和近端算子。我们使用图像重建实验验证我们的收敛结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了插件式（PnP）算法在图像重建中的固定点和目标函数收敛性，针对一类线性去噪器提出了理论保证。
AI.motivation: 尽管PnP正则化在实践中表现优异，但其理论收敛性（尤其是迭代和目标函数的同时收敛）尚未被完全理解，尤其对于非对称去噪器如非局部均值。
AI.method: 利用平均算子的收敛理论，结合由线性去噪器导出的特殊内积和范数，重新定义数据保真项的梯度和近端算子。
AI.result: 证明了针对一类线性去噪器（包括非局部均值）的迭代和目标函数收敛性，并通过图像重建实验验证了理论结果。
AI.conclusion: 该分析为PnP算法的收敛性提供了理论基础，扩展了现有工作至非对称去噪器和广泛的数据保真项，推动了其在实际应用中的可靠性。
